At baseline, target strings are propagated into tool arguments in 78.8% of PII cases and 85.5% of rendered unsafe-text cases. Under a defensive system prompt, rendered unsafe-text propagation remains high at 52.6%, while PII tool propagation falls to 2.0%, largely by suppressing tool use rather than preserving utility. Rates are tool-surface dependent: search-like tools suppress PII propagation, but rendered unsafe text still crosses tool boundaries. We measure visual-to-tool propagation rather than downstream instruction execution. We additionally provide a labeled-target oracle upper-bound diagnostic that localizes most failures at the tool boundary while leaving response-side leakage as residual risk.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视觉-语言代理在处理截图、文档和用户界面时出现的‘动作边界传播’失败模式，即敏感或不安全的可见文本被复制到下游工具参数中。为此，作者构建了一个包含500张图像的多样化基准VisualLeakBench，并在100张图像子集上评估了四个主流VLM系统在两种工作流下的表现，发现敏感信息传播率仍较高，尤其在不安全文本场景下防御性提示效果有限。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言代理日益依赖图像输入（如UI、文档截图）进行决策与工具调用，但其中可见的敏感或不安全文本可能未经过滤直接进入工具参数，构成隐私与安全风险，亟需系统性评估与诊断。
AI.method: 构建VisualLeakBench——一个涵盖UI、聊天、文档、表单和仪表盘场景的500图像基准；选取100张图像子集，在note capture和external handoff两种工作流下，对四个生产级VLM系统进行测试；引入防御性系统提示，并设计labeled-target oracle诊断方法定位泄漏环节。
AI.result: 基线设置下，PII和渲染的不安全文本分别以78.8%和85.5%的概率传播至工具参数；启用防御性提示后，PII传播降至2.0%（主要靠抑制工具调用），而不安全文本传播仍达52.6%；不同工具表面影响传播率，搜索类工具可抑制PII，但不安全文本仍跨边界；oracle诊断表明多数泄漏发生在工具边界。
AI.conclusion: 视觉到工具的文本传播是当前VLM代理的关键脆弱点，现有防御策略（如系统提示）难以兼顾安全性与功能性；需在工具接口层设计更精细的视觉内容过滤与边界管控机制，而非仅依赖模型响应侧抑制。

title: X-OP: Cross-Morphology Whole-Body Teleoperation via MPC Retargeting
summary: Whole-body teleoperation is essential for scalable robot data collection in loco-manipulation tasks, yet existing approaches relying on exoskeleton suits or multi-camera setups impose prohibitive cost, complexity, and environmental constraints. Recent methods using a single extended reality (XR) device with end-to-end reinforcement learning policies partially address these limitations but require robot-specific retraining, suffer from out-of-distribution failures, and rely on motion retargeting that neglects dynamic feasibility. We propose a hierarchical whole-body teleoperation framework driven by a single XR device that generalizes across diverse robot morphologies without retraining robot-specific policies. A Model Predictive Control (MPC)-based motion retargeter jointly optimizes alignment with the operator's intent and the robot's dynamic feasibility, generating optimal commands for existing low-level controllers. To ensure robust online execution, we introduce a state synchronization method that resets the simulator state at each MPC step to handle noisy real-world measurements and contact sensitivity, and integrate SLAM-based global pose feedback to mitigate long-term drift. Simulation results show higher success rates on whole-body control tasks for both a humanoid (over 30% lower completion time and 20% lower power consumption) and a mobile manipulator (zero collisions) compared to baselines. Real-world experiments further validate the effectiveness and flexibility of our method, demonstrating the successful deployment of the proposed retargeter on both platforms for whole-body control tasks and the ease of allowing users to adjust teleoperation behavior based on their preferences. This plug-and-play framework offers a scalable, morphology-agnostic solution for whole-body robot teleoperation, enabling real-time behavioral customization and broad applicability across platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单个XR设备的分层全身遥操作框架，通过MPC驱动的运动重定向和状态同步机制，实现跨机器人形态的即插即用式遥操作，无需针对每个机器人重新训练策略，并在仿真与真实实验中验证了其高效性、鲁棒性与通用性。
AI.motivation: 现有全身遥操作方法成本高、复杂度大或依赖机器人专用策略、泛化性差、动态可行性不足；亟需一种低成本、跨形态、动态可行且鲁棒的通用方案。
AI.method: 提出分层框架：1）MPC-based运动重定向器联合优化操作者意图对齐与机器人动态可行性；2）状态同步机制在每步MPC中重置仿真状态以应对噪声与接触敏感；3）集成SLAM全局位姿反馈抑制长期漂移。
AI.result: 仿真中，人形机器人任务完成时间降低超30%、功耗降低20%；移动机械臂实现零碰撞；真实实验成功部署于两类平台，支持用户行为偏好实时调整。
AI.conclusion: 该框架是可扩展、形态无关、即插即用的全身遥操作解决方案，支持实时行为定制，适用于多种机器人平台。

title: Why Limit the Residual Stream to Layers and Not Tokens? Persistent Memory for Continuous Latent Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable reasoning abilities on mathematical and multi-hop planning tasks. The CoCoNuT (Chain of Continuous Thought) paradigm~\cite{hao2024coconut} extends this by enabling models to reason in latent space, exploring multiple reasoning paths simultaneously rather than committing to a single chain early on. However, we identify a limitation we term the \textbf{concept bottleneck}. At each reasoning pass, intermediate hidden states are overwritten, causing the model to lose critical facts computed in earlier steps as reasoning depth increases. We observe this empirically. On HotpotQA, vanilla CoCoNuT (10.4\% EM) fails to improve over the CoT baseline (11.0\% EM), and performance degrades with curriculum depth on GSM8K. To address this, we propose \textbf{AGCLR} (Adaptive Gated Continuous Latent Reasoning), which augments CoCoNuT with a \textit{Gated Concept Stream}. A persistent residual memory maintained across all reasoning passes, controlled by three learned gates: a \textit{write} gate that commits intermediate facts to memory, a \textit{read} gate that retrieves relevant prior states, and a \textit{forget} gate that prunes irrelevant context. Evaluated on GSM8K, HotpotQA, and ProsQA using GPT-2 as our base model, AGCLR achieves consistent improvements across all types of datasets. With the performance gap compounding as curriculum depth increases, directly resolving the concept bottleneck. Code available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/JJJJ/README.md

AI.tldr: 本文提出AGCLR方法，通过引入门控概念流（Gated Concept Stream）解决CoCoNuT中因中间隐状态被覆盖导致的‘概念瓶颈’问题，显著提升多跳推理任务性能。
AI.motivation: 发现CoCoNuT范式存在‘概念瓶颈’：随着推理深度增加，中间隐状态被不断覆盖，导致早期计算的关键事实丢失，影响模型在HotpotQA和GSM8K等任务上的表现。
AI.method: 提出AGCLR（Adaptive Gated Continuous Latent Reasoning），在CoCoNuT基础上增加一个跨推理步持久保留的残差记忆模块，由写门、读门和遗忘门三个可学习门控机制协同控制信息的存储、检索与清理。
AI.result: 在GSM8K、HotpotQA和ProsQA数据集上，以GPT-2为基模型，AGCLR一致优于CoCoNuT和CoT基线；尤其在课程深度增大时，性能差距更显著。
AI.conclusion: 概念瓶颈是制约连续隐空间推理效果的关键问题，AGCLR通过门控机制有效缓解该问题，验证了持续概念记忆对多步推理的重要性。

title: Emergence via Phase Transitions: Mechanism Landscapes and Universal Convergence Across Complex Systems
comment: 27 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables; 15-page Supplementary Information with complete proofs included
summary: Across machine learning, biology, and physics, independently evolving systems often converge toward strikingly similar high-level structures despite radically different microscopic details. Grokking circuits converge across random seeds, evolutionary lineages rediscover similar metabolic solutions, and renormalization flows approach common fixed points. We propose the Hierarchical Emergence Framework (HEF) as a candidate universality framework for such convergence phenomena. HEF models emergence as a phase transition in a mechanism landscape constrained by thermodynamic and information-theoretic laws. The framework introduces a critical energy threshold Ec separating an exploration regime with competing mechanisms from a convergence regime governed by a unique minimum-cost mechanism. Under structural assumptions, we prove physical feasibility, derive strict metric contraction, and establish convergence toward a unique fixed-point representation independent of initial conditions. We further connect this convergence structure to causal emergence through Effective Information and mechanism competition entropy. To test the framework, we study delayed generalization ("grokking") in modular arithmetic transformers across 111 experiments. We identify a reproducible empirical fingerprint of the Ec transition: the weight norm peaks systematically before grokking in 92% of runs. Normalized accuracy curves collapse onto a tanh kink (R^2=0.93) consistent with a Landau-Ginzburg universality class, and all grokked models converge to 0.9745+/-0.014 regardless of initialization, weight decay, or training fraction (ANOVA p>0.13). HEF is not presented as a universal theory of emergence, but as a falsifiable mathematical scaffold for studying convergence phenomena across complex systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出分层涌现框架（HEF），将复杂系统中的收敛现象建模为受热力学与信息论约束的机制景观中的相变，定义临界能量阈值Ec，并在理论和实证（如Transformer中的'grokking'）两方面验证其普适性与可证伪性。
AI.motivation: 解释跨学科中独立演化系统却趋向相似高层结构的现象（如grokking电路、代谢进化、重整化流），寻求统一的收敛性理论框架。
AI.method: 构建HEF理论框架：将涌现建模为机制景观上的相变，引入临界能量阈值Ec；证明物理可行性、度量收缩性与不动点唯一性；结合有效信息与机制竞争熵关联因果涌现；在111组模运算Transformer实验中检验延迟泛化现象。
AI.result: 发现Ec相变的经验指纹：92%实验中权重范数在grokking前达峰；归一化准确率曲线坍缩为tanh型（R²=0.93），符合Landau-Ginzburg普适类；所有grokked模型收敛至精度0.9745±0.014，且不受初始化、权衰减或训练比例影响（ANOVA p>0.13）。
AI.conclusion: HEF是一个可证伪的数学 scaffold，旨在为复杂系统中的收敛现象提供跨学科分析工具，而非终极涌现理论。

title: Is Telehealth Better Used to Treat Patients or Help Other Physicians Treat Patients? An Agent-Based Modeling Study of Healthcare Provision
summary: Telehealth, the delivery of medical care remotely, is hoped to increase access to specialty services or decrease health care utilization. Physicians can provide telehealth to each other or to patients. Specialists often treat complex patients who can be adequately cared for only in academic hospitals, suggesting that providing specialty services via telehealth will reallocate rather than reduce system utilization. Here I use agent-based modeling to investigate telehealth's effects on clinical outcomes and system utilization in medical toxicology. I found that physician-physician telehealth increased patient health but system utilization did not change. The effects were more pronounced as clinical complexity increased. Physician-patient telehealth increased cost and system utilization but not clinical outcomes. Within the limitations of our approach, these results suggest that telehealth is more cost-effective for improving generalist access to specialist knowledge than in providing care to the public.

AI.tldr: 本文通过基于代理的建模研究远程医疗对临床结果和系统使用的影响，发现医生间远程医疗可提升患者健康但不改变系统使用，而医患远程医疗则增加成本和系统使用但未改善临床结果。
AI.motivation: 远程医疗有望提高专科服务可及性或降低医疗资源使用，但其实际效果尚不明确，尤其在复杂病例中。
AI.method: 采用基于代理的建模方法，模拟医学毒理学领域中医生-医生与医生-患者两类远程医疗服务的影响。
AI.result: 医生-医生远程医疗提升了患者健康状况，系统使用量不变；临床复杂性越高，效果越显著；医生-患者远程医疗则增加了成本和系统使用，但未改善临床结局。
AI.conclusion: 远程医疗在提升全科医生获取专科知识方面更具成本效益，而非直接面向公众提供诊疗服务。

title: The Minimal Retroreflective Microfacet Model
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures, 1 code listing. Author's version. Published in the Journal of Computer Graphics Techniques (JCGT), Vol. 15, No. 1, 2026. Article URL: http://jcgt.org/published/0015/01/04/
summary: We present the Minimal Retroreflective Microfacet (MRM) model, which turns any existing microfacet BSDF into a physically plausible retroreflective one by a single substitution: replacing the view direction with its reflection about the surface normal before evaluating the standard model. Based on the previously published back-vector formulation, MRM requires only minimal code changes and has been adopted in the OpenPBR and MaterialX material standards. We prove reciprocity and energy conservation under the assumption of a reflection-symmetric normal distribution function (NDF), which holds for all commonly used distributions, and validate the model against measured retroreflective material data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Minimal Retroreflective Microfacet (MRM)模型，通过将视图方向替换为关于表面法线的反射方向，将现有微表面BSDF模型转化为物理上合理的逆向反射模型，仅需少量代码修改，并已集成到OpenPBR和MaterialX标准中。
AI.motivation: 为实现物理上合理的逆向反射效果，同时保持与现有微表面模型的兼容性和易用性。
AI.method: 提出MRM模型，核心是将视图方向替换为其关于表面法线的反射方向，再代入标准微表面BSDF计算；基于back-vector公式，假设NDF具有反射对称性，证明了互易性和能量守恒。
AI.result: MRM模型被成功集成进OpenPBR和MaterialX材料标准；理论证明其满足互易性和能量守恒；实验验证其与实测逆向反射材料数据吻合。
AI.conclusion: MRM是一种简洁、高效且物理合理的逆向反射建模方法，具备良好通用性与实用性。

title: TRACER: Token ReAssignment for Concept ERasure in Generative Recommendation
summary:
Generative recommendation formulates next-item prediction as autoregressive generation over semantic ID (SID) sequences derived from users' historical interactions, making modern recommender systems structurally similar to large language models (LLMs). As privacy and safety concerns grow, these systems increasingly require concept unlearning to remove sensitive or harmful concepts associated with items. However, existing LLM unlearning methods cannot be directly applied to generative recommendation. Unlike word tokens with explicit semantics, SIDs are abstract identifiers that are often shared by both forget and retain items, leading to severe conflicts between concept removal and recommendation utility preservation.
  To address this challenge, we propose TRACER, an end-to-end concept unlearning framework based on token reassignment. Rather than directly suppressing shared SIDs, TRACER reassigns concept-related items to alternative tokens that better facilitate forgetting while minimizing side effects on retained items. We further introduce a coherence regularizer to preserve semantic consistency among retain items during unlearning. Experiments on real-world recommendation datasets demonstrate that TRACER effectively removes target concepts while substantially better preserving recommendation utility than existing unlearning baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRACER框架，通过token重分配和一致性正则化，在生成式推荐系统中实现概念遗忘，兼顾敏感概念移除与推荐性能保持。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型的遗忘方法无法直接用于生成式推荐，因语义ID（SID）是抽象且共享的标识符，直接抑制会导致遗忘目标与保留推荐效用间的严重冲突。
AI.method: 提出端到端的TRACER框架：基于token重分配，将与待遗忘概念相关的物品映射到新token；引入一致性正则化，保障保留物品间的语义一致性。
AI.result: 在真实推荐数据集上实验表明，TRACER能有效移除目标概念，且在推荐效用保持方面显著优于现有遗忘基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TRACER为生成式推荐系统提供了可行、高效的概念遗忘方案，解决了SID共享导致的遗忘-效用权衡难题。

title: ABLE: Representing and Mapping LLMs via Attribution-Based Large-model Embedding
summary: The explosive growth of large language models (LLMs) has created a heterogeneous and poorly documented ecosystem, making systematic model comparison increasingly important for provenance auditing, security analysis, and model selection. Existing representation methods struggle to address this setting efficiently. Approaches analyzing internal parameters are powerful when architectures are compatible, but face scalability barriers under structural heterogeneity, while methods relying on external outputs may conflate models with similar behaviors and are difficult to align in richer output spaces across different tokenizers. To bridge this gap, we propose ABLE (Attribution-Based Large-model Embedding), a framework that leverages the interpretability space to construct model representations. By aggregating gradient-based feature attributions via a tokenizer-agnostic word-level alignment, ABLE captures model-specific input-sensitivity patterns rather than only surface-level outputs. Beyond empirical utility, we provide a stability analysis showing that, under standard regularity assumptions for differentiable Transformer-style models, ABLE induces a Lipschitz-continuous parameter-to-embedding map with finite-sample convergence guarantees. Extensive experiments on 239 open-source LLMs demonstrate that our training-free approach achieves competitive or superior performance in relation prediction, model routing, and benchmark score prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ABLE框架，通过基于归因的词级对齐方法，在不依赖训练的情况下构建大语言模型的嵌入表示，以实现跨架构、跨分词器的模型比较与分析。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）快速增长导致生态异构且缺乏文档，亟需系统化、可扩展、跨架构的模型表征与比较方法，以支持溯源审计、安全分析和模型选型。
AI.method: 提出ABLE（Attribution-Based Large-model Embedding），利用梯度特征归因，在tokenizer无关的词级对齐基础上聚合输入敏感性模式，构建模型嵌入；并提供Lipschitz连续性及有限样本收敛性理论分析。
AI.result: 在239个开源LLM上实验表明，ABLE在关系预测、模型路由和基准分数预测任务中达到有竞争力甚至更优性能，且无需训练。
AI.conclusion: ABLE是一种高效、稳定、训练无关的大模型表征方法，能有效应对架构与分词器异构性挑战，为模型分析提供可解释、可理论保障的新范式。

title: Can You Trust What You See? Human and AI Detection of Synthetic Legal Evidence
summary: Visual evidence has long been treated as a reliable form of legal proof, but advances in artificial intelligence (AI) are undermining that assumption. This article asks how well humans and frontier multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can distinguish authentic evidentiary photographs from AI-generated counterparts in the object-centric scenarios typical of civil disputes. We built Synthetic Legal Evidence Detection (SLED-1400), a dataset of 200 authentic evidence images paired with 1,200 synthetic counterparts produced by six contemporary text-to-image generators across ten evidence categories. The same stimuli and response format were used in a controlled web experiment with 136 lay participants and in a standardized evaluation of four MLLMs (GPT-5.1, Gemini-3-Pro, Gemini-3-Flash, Qwen3-VL-235B). Human accuracy was 64.8% overall, and 48.5% and 51.0% on the two strongest generators (Gemini-3-Pro-Image and Flux-2-Max), indistinguishable from chance. MLLMs never misclassified an authentic image (100% specificity), but missed most synthetic outputs from the harder generators, with average MLLM detection at 5.9% on Gemini-3-Pro-Image outputs. Human and MLLM errors were largely uncorrelated, while the four MLLMs were strongly correlated with each other. Neither group is a reliable standalone authenticator. We argue that visual evidence in legal proceedings should be treated as inherently contestable, and that a workable procedural response must combine trained human review, MLLM screening, and provenance infrastructure such as C2PA Content Credentials.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了人类和多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在民事纠纷典型场景中区分真实与AI生成证据图像的能力，发现两者准确率均较低且错误模式不同，建议采用人机协同加可追溯性基础设施的综合程序应对方案。
AI.motivation: 随着AI生成图像技术的进步，视觉证据作为法律证据的可靠性受到挑战，亟需评估人类与前沿MLLMs在识别伪造证据图像方面的能力。
AI.method: 构建了包含200张真实证据图像及1200张由6种文本到图像模型生成的合成图像的数据集SLED-1400；开展136名普通参与者的网络实验，并对4个前沿MLLMs进行标准化检测评估。
AI.result: 人类整体准确率为64.8%，在最强生成器上接近随机水平（48.5%–51.0%）；MLLMs特异性达100%，但对最难生成器（Gemini-3-Pro-Image）的检出率仅5.9%；人与MLLM错误不相关，而各MLLM间高度相关。
AI.conclusion: 人类与MLLM均无法单独可靠鉴别视觉证据真伪，应将视觉证据视为本质上可争议的，并通过训练有素的人类审查、MLLM筛查与C2PA等溯源基础设施协同应对。

title: PRISM: PRior-guided Imagination Sampling in world Models
summary: A learned world model provides a powerful physical intuition for evaluating future states. But its effectiveness in continuous control also depends critically on how candidate actions are generated for model-based planning. Rather than solely asking how accurately a model can simulate the future, we ask: which candidate actions are worth evaluating in the first place? Existing planners typically search arbitrarily or use expert demonstrations only to initialize a sampling mean, discarding the expert's state-conditioned confidence. Properly guiding this search requires a robust action prior, yet current approaches often rely on independent visual encoders or large-scale VLMs to obtain one. We argue that this architectural bloat is unnecessary: the exact same data - and the learned representations of the world model itself - inherently encode the agent's action intuition. We introduce PRISM, a task-agnostic framework that extracts both from a single dataset while maintaining strict architectural simplicity. Building on a standard JEPA-style latent world model, PRISM attaches a lightweight MLP directly to its frozen encoder to predict a state-conditioned Gaussian prior. At plan time, PRISM fuses this prior into the planner's sampling distribution via a precision-weighted Product-of-Gaussians update. This parameter-free, closed-form integration steers the sampling process, making the prior confident where it is and ceding control where it is not. PRISM improves success rates by 35 percentage points over vanilla world-model-based MPC on Cube and 32 percentage points on PushT, without introducing significant inference overhead.

AI.tldr: PRISM是一种轻量级、任务无关的框架，利用世界模型自身学到的表征，直接从同一数据中提取状态条件动作先验，通过精度加权的高斯乘积更新融合到规划器中，显著提升基于模型预测控制（MPC）的连续控制性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于世界模型的规划方法在候选动作生成上缺乏有效引导，虽有专家演示但未充分利用其状态相关的置信度；当前动作先验常依赖额外视觉编码器或大语言模型，造成架构冗余。
AI.method: PRISM基于标准JEPA风格的潜在世界模型，在其冻结编码器后接一个轻量MLP，直接预测状态条件高斯先验；规划时采用无参数、闭式精度加权高斯乘积更新，将该先验融入采样分布。
AI.result: 在Cube和PushT任务上，PRISM相比基线世界模型MPC的成功率分别提升35和32个百分点，且未引入显著推理开销。
AI.conclusion: 世界模型自身已蕴含足够动作直觉，无需额外模块；PRISM通过极简架构与参数自由融合机制，高效利用该直觉，验证了动作先验应内生于世界模型的设计思想。

title: Automatic Extraction of Structured Information from Brain MRI Reports Using an Open-Weight Large Language Model
summary: Objectives: Automatic data extraction from free-text radiology reports enables large-scale research, but few studies assessed the performance of large language models (LLMs) on Dutch neuroradiology reports. Methods: We analyzed 947 brain MRI reports from a tertiary memory clinic (2016-2021), authored by consultant neuroradiologists. Trained medical students annotated thirty variables; 100 reports were double-annotated to assess inter-rater reliability. We evaluated the performance of the open-weight LLM LLaMA 3.1 using different languages (Dutch vs. English translation) and few-shot prompting with different example selection strategies. Performance was evaluated using balanced accuracy for categorical variables, accuracy and mean absolute error for counts, and text similarity for free-text. Metrics were computed across 10 random splits of the 947 reports. Results: LLaMA 3.1 demonstrated high zero-shot performance for visual rating scores (mean [95%-CI]): Medial Temporal Atrophy: 90% [77-100%] on the left and 96% [94-99%] on the right, Global Cortical Atrophy: 87% [83-91%], and Fazekas: 94% [93-96%]. Microbleed mentions were detected with 93% accuracy [92-95%] and infarct mentions with 82% [80-84%]. Text similarity for lesion location reached 0.95 [0.95-0.96]. Performance was lower for numerical variables: 80% [78-82%] for the number of microbleeds and 66% [63-68%] for infarcts. English translation yielded comparable results. Few-shot prompting improved performance for numerical variables, achieving 92% [90-93%] for microbleeds and 81% [77-85%] for infarcts using structural similarity-based selection. Conclusion: LLaMA 3.1 shows strong potential for extracting data from Dutch neuroradiology reports. Few-shot prompting enhances performance for numerical variables, whereas challenges remain for location-specific variables.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了开源大语言模型LLaMA 3.1在荷兰语神经放射学报告中自动提取结构化数据的性能，发现其在视觉评分（如MTA、Fazekas）和病灶提及（微出血、梗死）识别上表现优异，零样本准确率超90%；数值变量提取效果较弱，但通过基于结构相似性的少样本提示可显著提升；英文翻译未带来明显增益。
AI.motivation: 自动从自由文本放射科报告中提取数据对大规模研究至关重要，但目前尚缺乏针对荷兰语神经放射学报告的大语言模型性能评估研究。
AI.method: 使用947份荷兰语脑MRI报告（来自记忆门诊），由医学生标注30个变量；采用LLaMA 3.1模型，对比荷兰语原生输入与英文翻译两种语言设置，并测试不同示例选择策略的少样本提示效果；评估指标包括平衡准确率（分类变量）、准确率与平均绝对误差（计数变量）及文本相似度（自由文本）。
AI.result: 零样本下，视觉评分（MTA左右侧、GCA、Fazekas）和病灶提及（微出血93%、梗死82%）识别准确率高，病变位置文本相似度达0.95；数值变量（微出血/梗死数量）准确率较低（80%/66%），但经结构相似性选例的少样本提示后提升至92%/81%；英文翻译效果与荷兰语相近。
AI.conclusion: LLaMA 3.1在荷兰语神经放射学报告信息提取中展现出强大潜力，尤其适用于定性视觉评分和病灶提及识别；少样本提示可有效改善数值变量提取，但病灶精确定位等细粒度任务仍具挑战。

title: STARIXNet: Multivariate and Multi-attribute Deep Learning Approach to Real-Time Resource Allocation in Cloud Platforms
summary: Intelligent scaling of microservices in cloud platforms is crucial for mitigating escalating compute costs while avoiding service disruptions. Current solutions are limited to the univariate space, typically focusing on CPU usage alone to drive scaling decisions. Moreover, they address the problem as a purely forecasting task, focusing on prediction precision while neglecting the greater risks of underestimation and delays in system responsiveness. Alternative solutions are computationally complex, making them impractical for large-scale, real-time deployments. To address these challenges, we present STARIXNet, a lightweight neural network that guides resource allocation decisions in the multivariate space by capturing spatio-temporal relationships among multiple system metrics. STARIXNet models multiple quasi-dependent attributes, in particular the (S)easonal, (T)emporal, (A)uto-(R)egressive (I)ntegrated, and e(X)ogenous patterns, then implements an aggregation policy to finalize scaling decisions, prioritizing service stability, followed by cost-efficiency, over raw forecast accuracy. We empirically demonstrate the performance of STARIXNet by benchmarking against existing solutions in real-world settings. STARIXNet is deployed for critical production microservices at Walmart achieving tangible savings ranging from 10\% to 50\%, in addition to intangible benefits through improved service stability and customer experience.

AI.tldr: STARIXNet是一种轻量级神经网络，通过建模多维系统指标的时空关系，实现微服务智能扩缩容，在保证服务稳定性前提下兼顾成本效益，已在沃尔玛生产环境落地并取得显著成效。
AI.motivation: 现有微服务扩缩容方案局限于单变量（如CPU使用率），仅关注预测精度而忽视低估风险和响应延迟，且计算复杂度高，难以适用于大规模实时场景。
AI.method: 提出STARIXNet模型，捕捉多个系统指标间的时空关系，建模季节性、时序性、自回归性、差分性和外生性（STARIX）模式，并采用以服务稳定性优先、成本效率次之的聚合策略生成扩缩容决策。
AI.result: 在真实环境中对比实验表明，STARIXNet在沃尔玛关键生产微服务中部署后，实现10%至50%的成本节约，并提升了服务稳定性和用户体验。
AI.conclusion: STARIXNet有效解决了现有方案在多变量建模、风险控制与计算效率上的不足，为云平台微服务智能扩缩容提供了实用、高效且鲁棒的新范式。

title: Performance Evaluation of Social Learning
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Social Learning is a decentralized decision-making paradigm in which spatially dispersed agents collect streaming observations regulated by one of a finite number of models (the hypotheses). The agents are interested in assigning probability scores (the beliefs) to the possible hypotheses. To this end, the agents exchange their beliefs according to a certain communication graph. It has been shown that, under reasonable conditions on the identifiability of the decision model and the network connectivity, each agent ultimately places all the belief mass on the true hypothesis governing the data. However, several questions remain unanswered regarding the evaluation of the social learning performance. One recently adopted performance metric is the rejection rate, i.e., the rate at which the beliefs about the erroneous hypotheses vanish. One contribution of this work is to establish that the rejection rate leads to several paradoxes, which make it unsuitable as a valid performance measure. We then focus on studying the error probability measure. For a binary Gaussian problem, we derive an analytical formula characterizing the ratio between the individual agents' probabilities and the optimal Bayesian probability. The formula shows that this ratio is expressed by the product of two terms quantifying the effect of the network connectivity and the role of the prior information. As a result, an irreducible gap emerges between the decentralized and the centralized error probabilities, which is agent-dependent and does not disappear asymptotically.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了社会学习中的性能评估问题，指出拒绝率作为性能指标存在悖论，转而研究错误概率，并针对二元高斯问题推导出分布式与最优贝叶斯错误概率之比的解析表达式，揭示了二者间存在不可消除的、依赖于个体的渐近误差间隙。
AI.motivation: 现有社会学习理论虽能保证各代理最终识别真实假设，但其性能评估（尤其是拒绝率）仍缺乏合理度量标准，存在未解问题。
AI.method: 通过理论分析指出拒绝率作为性能指标的缺陷；针对二元高斯假设检验问题，推导分布式社会学习中各代理错误概率与集中式最优贝叶斯错误概率之比的解析公式，分解为网络连通性与先验信息两个影响因子。
AI.result: 证明拒绝率会导致多个悖论，不适合作为有效性能指标；得到错误概率比的显式表达式；发现分布式与集中式错误概率之间存在不可消除、与代理相关的渐近误差间隙。
AI.conclusion: 拒绝率不是合适的社会学习性能度量；错误概率分析表明，去中心化学习存在固有性能损失，该损失由网络结构和先验知识共同决定，且不随时间趋于零。

title: MaterialClusterGS: Palette-Based Material Decomposition and Physically-Based Relighting with 2D Gaussian Splatting
summary: We present MaterialClusterGS, a palette-based material decomposition framework for 2D Gaussian Splatting that enables physically based relighting and material editing. Existing Gaussian inverse rendering methods typically assign independent BRDF parameters to individual primitives. While flexible, this local fitting strategy makes material recovery highly under-constrained: shadows, indirect illumination, geometric errors, and visibility residuals can be absorbed into thousands of slightly different local material estimates. Meanwhile, recent palette-based appearance methods operate solely in RGB space without modeling physical materials or illumination. To bridge this gap, we represent scene materials using a compact global palette of shared BRDF prototypes assigned via a continuous spatial material field. Without shared material structure, editing one region does not propagate consistently to others of the same material, making per-primitive decompositions impractical for editing. We jointly optimize the material field, palette prototypes, and environment lighting under a physically based rendering objective. The resulting framework recovers compact, spatially coherent attributes directly usable for material editing, relighting, and transfer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MaterialClusterGS，一种基于调色板的2D高斯点绘材料分解框架，支持基于物理的重光照与材质编辑。通过引入共享BRDF原型的全局材质调色板和连续空间材质场，解决了传统逐原语材质估计欠约束、不一致的问题，并联合优化材质场、调色板和环境光照，实现紧凑、空间一致的材质表示。
AI.motivation: 现有高斯逆渲染方法对每个原语独立拟合BRDF参数，导致材质恢复严重欠约束；而基于调色板的外观方法仅在RGB空间操作，缺乏物理材质与光照建模。二者均难以支持一致的材质编辑与重光照。
AI.method: 提出MaterialClusterGS框架：用紧凑全局BRDF调色板+连续空间材质场表示材质；将各高斯原语材质映射至调色板中共享原型；联合优化材质场、调色板原型与环境光照，以物理渲染目标为约束。
AI.result: 实现了空间一致、紧凑的材质分解结果，可直接用于材质编辑、重光照和材质迁移；显著提升材质一致性与编辑可控性。
AI.conclusion: MaterialClusterGS通过引入共享材质结构与物理渲染约束，有效克服了逐原语材质估计的欠约束问题，为高斯点绘场景提供了实用、可编辑的物理材质表示。

title: ASH: Asymmetric Scalar Hashing With Learned Dimensionality Reduction for High-Fidelity Vector Quantization
summary: For a long time, additive quantizers, such as product quantization, have been considered the gold standard in terms of accuracy and efficiency. Recently, scalar quantization has re-emerged from the depths of history with a new wave of data-agnostic techniques. Inscribed in this general framework, we turn our attention to data-driven methods, showing that new highs in recall and speed can be achieved by reducing the number of dimensions while increasing the bitrate per dimension. Critically, this dimensionality reduction needs to be learned from data to be successful. We present ASH (Asymmetric Scalar Hashing), a data-driven encoder-decoder framework that applies dimensionality reduction to database vectors via a learned orthonormal projection, followed by scalar quantization, while keeping queries in their original form. This asymmetric design enables higher accuracy than the best additive and scalar quantizers at iso-compression, while admitting highly efficient similarity computations via SIMD operations. ASH has short learning and encoding times, making it attractive for real-world deployment. Extensive experiments on a variety of datasets demonstrate that ASH achieves state-of-the-art ANN recall and speeds across all compression regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ASH（Asymmetric Scalar Hashing）的数据驱动编码-解码框架，通过学习正交投影降维并结合标量量化，在保持查询原始形式的同时提升近似最近邻搜索的召回率与速度。
AI.motivation: 传统加性量化器（如乘积量化）长期被视为精度与效率的黄金标准，而近期数据无关的标量量化技术复兴；本文旨在探索数据驱动方法，以在相同压缩率下进一步提升召回率和检索速度。
AI.method: 提出ASH框架：对数据库向量采用学习得到的正交投影进行降维，再进行标量量化；查询向量保持原始高维形式，实现非对称设计；利用SIMD加速相似度计算。
AI.result: ASH在多种数据集上实现了各压缩比下的SOTA近似最近邻召回率与检索速度，且训练与编码耗时短，适合实际部署。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的降维+标量量化（即ASH）优于现有加性和标量量化方法，在精度、速度与实用性上取得平衡，是ANN搜索的新范式。

title: Implicit Causal Graph Construction in Text via Chain Discovery
summary: Causal graphs in text are typically populated by observable, predefined events. In contrast, we study implicit causal graph construction from text by treating each described cause-effect pair as the begin- and endpoint of an underlying latent causal graph and using large language models (LLMs) to infer intermediate causal events. We compare end-to-end graph construction with methods that frame the task as causal chain discovery. In the latter, graphs are built either by aggregating inferred chains or by progressively expanding partial chains through an iterative search process. We further explore Wisdom of the Crowd extensions that access causal knowledge from multiple LLMs in post-hoc aggregation and collaborative inference settings. We analyze trade-offs among these approaches and evaluate the validity of inferred causal relations using a manually curated database of 1,560 scientifically validated causal pairs. This database-based evaluation is proposed as reliable, resource-efficient, and transferable to settings where ground-truth graphs are unavailable.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何从文本中隐式构建因果图，利用大语言模型（LLM）推断因果链中的中间事件，并比较端到端图构建与因果链发现两种范式，引入多模型协同推理与后验聚合策略，并基于1560个经科学验证的因果对构建数据库进行可靠评估。
AI.motivation: 现有因果图构建依赖显式、预定义事件，难以捕捉文本中隐含的因果结构；本文旨在探索从文本中隐式推断完整因果路径（含中间潜变量）的新方法。
AI.method: 提出三种方法：（1）端到端因果图生成；（2）因果链发现——包括链聚合与迭代扩展；（3）群体智慧扩展——涵盖多LLM后验聚合与协同推理；并构建含1560个科学验证因果对的评测数据库。
AI.result: 不同方法在完整性、准确性与效率上存在权衡；多模型协同推理在因果有效性上表现更优；所提数据库评估法具备高可靠性、低资源消耗与良好泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 隐式因果图构建需兼顾结构合理性与因果真实性；基于多LLM协同与科学验证数据库的评估框架，为缺乏真实图标注的场景提供了可行、可迁移的解决方案。

title: SENTRY: Statistical Reliability Analysis of Vision Transformers Under Soft Errors
summary: With the growth of Vision Transformers in safety-critical domains like autonomous systems and medical imaging, ensuring their reliability against soft errors is paramount. While ViTs offer state-of-the-art accuracy, their massive parameter counts render exhaustive fault injection campaigns infeasible. To bridge this gap, a statistical fault injection framework is presented, leveraging finite-population sampling theory to provide formal reliability guarantees. It is demonstrated that failure rates are bounded within a 1% margin at 99\% confidence using only a few thousand samples, regardless of model scale. This methodology achieves up to a 10,700 times reduction in experimental cost compared to exhaustive approaches, while preserving the ability to localize vulnerabilities across architectural components. Through extensive evaluation of different architectures like ViT-Tiny and ViT-Small, a highly non-uniform reliability landscape is uncovered. It is shown that while only 3% of FP32 bit-flips result in failure, the vast majority of these events lead to catastrophic accuracy collapse. Specific vulnerabilities are localized to normalization layers and critical exponent bits within the IEEE-754 format, providing a mathematical foundation and actionable insights for the design of hardened, edge-deployed ViT architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于有限总体抽样理论的统计性故障注入框架，以高效评估视觉Transformer（ViT）在软错误下的可靠性，仅需数千次采样即可在99%置信度下将故障率估计误差控制在1%以内，相比穷举法降低实验成本达10700倍，并定位到归一化层和IEEE-754指数位等关键脆弱点。
AI.motivation: 随着ViT在自动驾驶和医疗影像等安全关键领域的应用增多，其面对软错误的可靠性亟需保障；但ViT参数量巨大，传统穷举式故障注入不可行。
AI.method: 提出基于有限总体抽样理论的统计故障注入框架，结合理论保证与实证分析，在ViT-Tiny、ViT-Small等架构上开展大规模故障注入实验，并按模块和比特位粒度进行脆弱性定位。
AI.result: 仅3%的FP32位翻转导致失效，但其中多数引发灾难性精度崩溃；归一化层和IEEE-754指数位被确认为高危脆弱点；故障率可在99%置信度下以±1%误差界估计，且采样量与模型规模无关。
AI.conclusion: 该统计框架显著提升ViT可靠性评估效率与可解释性，为面向边缘部署的容错ViT架构设计提供了数学基础与实用指导。

title: Q-VGM: Q-Guided Value-Gradient Matching for Flow-Matching VLA Policies
summary: We propose Q-Guided Value-Gradient Matching (Q-VGM), an off-policy reinforcement learning (RL) method that tackles a long-standing challenge in fine-tuning flow-matching vision-language-action (VLA) policies: efficiently improving an expressive flow-matching action expert with respect to a learned Q-function. Effective improvement must exploit the first-order (gradient) information of the critic, but this is difficult for flow policies, because directly back-propagating the value through their multi-step denoising process is numerically unstable at VLA scale, while the tractable action likelihoods required by policy-gradient methods are unavailable under iterative denoising. Existing value-based methods either backpropagate through the full denoising chain, use the critic only at test time without updating the policy, or distill critic-improved actions as terminal labels without supervising the velocity field. Q-VGM sidesteps these issues by leveraging VGG-Flow, a value-gradient view of flow alignment in generative modeling that transforms value gradient into a denoising-time value-gradient field rather than an unstable end-to-end objective. This requires no action likelihoods and no backpropagation through the denoising chain, and operates on a fixed replay buffer. The critic is an action-sensitive Cal-QL ensemble over compact RLT features with per-layer action injection. Q-VGM enables a practical few-shot initialization then learn-from-experience paradigm: starting from a few-shot-SFT pi0.5 VLA, the method leverages self-generated rollout data to substantially improve task performance without additional expert supervision. On LIBERO, Q-VGM raises the average success rate from 75.0% to 92.5%; on RoboTwin 2.0, from 76.4% to 87.2%; and on two real-robot tabletop tasks, from 40.0% to 67.5%, outperforming all same-backbone, same-critic baselines across all three settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Q-VGM方法，通过价值梯度匹配改进流匹配VLA策略，在不依赖动作似然或端到端反传的情况下，利用价值函数梯度提升策略性能，在多个基准上显著提升成功率。
AI.motivation: 解决在微调流匹配视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略时，如何高效利用学习到的Q函数来改进动作专家的问题，尤其避免因多步去噪过程导致的数值不稳定和缺乏可计算动作似然的困难。
AI.method: 提出Q-VGM（Q-Guided Value-Gradient Matching），基于VGG-Flow的价值梯度对齐视角，将价值梯度转化为去噪时间上的价值梯度场；使用Cal-QL集成Q网络，作用于紧凑RLT特征并逐层注入动作信息；在固定回放缓冲区上训练，无需反传至整个去噪链或动作似然。
AI.result: 在LIBERO上成功率从75.0%提升至92.5%，RoboTwin 2.0从76.4%提升至87.2%，两个真实机器人桌面任务从40.0%提升至67.5%，全面优于同骨干网、同Q网络的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Q-VGM提供了一种稳定、高效、免似然、免全链反传的价值引导流匹配策略优化范式，支持少样本初始化后自主经验学习，显著提升VLA策略在仿真与真实机器人任务中的泛化与执行能力。

title: Some hypotheses on how chatbots work in problem-solving-driven conversations. Large Language Models as confirmation of the Innovation Illusion
summary:
This article offers a perspective on the nature of chatbots as genuine conversation partners when discussing problems in relation to their solutions. What can chatbots do and what can't they do, and how can this be explained? Our argument draws on Aggregation Dynamics, Cognitive Linguistics, Neuropsychology and Psychology.
  Our argument focuses on basic chatbots in the hope of thereby making statements about the core functionality of more advanced chatbots. Basic chatbots are assumed to consist of a Large Language Model (LLM) with a simple interface.
  The main results are: a description of human understanding and thinking based on so-called metaphorical problem propagations; the hypothesis that text dataset used for training LLMs have specific characteristics and that these text datasets only partially imitate human thinking and understanding; the hypothesis that the LLM training process encodes artificial metaphorical problem propagations into an LLM from these datasets; our conclusion that a basic chatbot cannot be a thinking partner capable of matching humans; our conclusion that further development of the Large Language Model will not lead to this either.
  Yann LeCun states: "Animals and humans exhibit learning abilities and understandings of the world that are far beyond the capabilities of current AI and machine learning (ML) systems." Our conclusions are in line with this. LeCun's vision and ours are at odds with the optimism of Big Tech. That does not alter the fact that chatbots exist, that they are being used on a massive scale, by both individuals and organisations, and that it is therefore socially and politically important to understand them. Our article aims to contribute to the discussion on the functioning, benefits and drawbacks of chatbots.
  We have not yet encountered the approach we used to arrive at our conclusions in our research into how chatbots work.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了聊天机器人作为真实对话伙伴的能力边界，基于聚合动力学、认知语言学、神经心理学和心理学，提出基础聊天机器人（LLM+简单界面）无法成为与人类匹敌的思考伙伴，且单纯扩大LLM规模也无法实现这一目标。
AI.motivation: 澄清聊天机器人在问题解决对话中的真实能力边界，回应大科技公司对AI能力的过度乐观，并强调社会政治层面理解其功能与局限的紧迫性。
AI.method: 整合聚合动力学、认知语言学、神经心理学和心理学理论，分析人类理解与思维的本质（特别是隐喻性问题传播），并考察训练文本数据特征及LLM训练过程如何编码人工隐喻性问题传播。
AI.result: 1）提出基于隐喻性问题传播的人类理解与思维模型；2）指出训练文本仅部分模拟人类思维；3）推测LLM从数据中习得的是人工隐喻性问题传播；4）得出基础聊天机器人无法成为匹配人类的思考伙伴，且单纯发展LLM亦不能改变此局限。
AI.conclusion: 基础聊天机器人本质上不具备与人类相当的思考能力，其局限源于训练数据与学习机制的根本缺陷；该结论支持LeCun对当前AI能力边界的判断，反对Big Tech的过度乐观；理解聊天机器人的真实功能与局限具有重要社会政治意义。

title: TriHead-GAN: A Generative Adversarial Network with Triple-Head Discriminator for Carbon Emission Time Series Generation
summary: Accurate carbon emission monitoring is critical for climate policy and emerging regulatory mechanisms such as the EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism, yet city-level high-frequency monitoring data remain extremely scarce, severely limiting data-hungry deep learning models. Time series generation is a natural remedy, but existing GAN and diffusion-based generators often provide limited explicit supervision for the domain structure of carbon emission data: they may match marginal distributional statistics while insufficiently preserving cross-variable correlations between CO$_2$ and co-emitted pollutants and meteorological factors, and tend to collapse the first-difference statistics of atmospheric measurements, producing sequences that are smooth on average but lack the realistic step-wise variability of the underlying signals. We propose TriHead-GAN, a Transformer-based adversarial framework whose triple-head discriminator jointly supervises three complementary aspects of the joint distribution: distributional authenticity via a Wasserstein critic, cross-variable dependency via leakage-free regression of the target variable, and step-wise temporal smoothness via adjacent-difference prediction. The generator combines global self-attention with local temporal convolution, per-step noise injection, and an anti-smoothing loss that matches first-difference statistics. Experiments on the self-collected Changsha Carbon dataset, two public carbon datasets (China, US), and the ETTh1 benchmark show that TriHead-GAN achieves favorable performance over mainstream baselines on the vast majority of settings, and that the resulting synthetic windows improve downstream forecasting accuracy in low-resource carbon monitoring scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TriHead-GAN，一种基于Transformer的三头判别器GAN框架，用于生成高质量城市级碳排放时序数据，兼顾分布真实性、跨变量依赖性和步进式时间平滑性，显著提升低资源场景下的下游预测性能。
AI.motivation: 城市级高频碳排放监测数据极度稀缺，制约深度学习模型应用；现有生成方法难以同时保持碳排放数据的边际分布、多变量相关性（如CO2与污染物、气象因子）及一阶差分动态特性。
AI.method: 提出TriHead-GAN：判别器含三头——Wasserstein critic（分布真实性）、无泄漏回归头（跨变量依赖）、相邻差分预测头（时间步进平滑性）；生成器融合全局自注意力、局部时序卷积、逐步噪声注入和抗平滑损失（匹配一阶差分统计）。
AI.result: 在自建长沙碳数据集、中国/美国公开碳数据集及ETTh1基准上，TriHead-GAN在绝大多数指标上优于主流基线；生成数据显著提升低资源下碳监测的下游预测精度。
AI.conclusion: TriHead-GAN通过结构化多目标监督，有效建模碳排放时序的复杂联合分布，为稀缺场景下的高保真时序生成提供了新范式。

title: Path-Traced Inverse Rendering with Global Illumination in 3D Gaussian Fields
summary: Ray tracing enables 3D Gaussian fields to serve as a representation for physically based light transport. Faithful inverse rendering requires forward rendering and backward optimization to be defined within a consistent light-transport pipeline. Existing inverse rendering methods estimate G-buffers via splatting and optimize materials in screen space, tying the recovered properties to a rasterization-based pipeline. This pipeline mismatch, together with simplified rendering equations that neglect indirect illumination, often leads to inconsistent shading, visible artifacts, and inaccurate material-lighting estimation under path-traced rendering. Therefore, we propose a splatting-free path-traced inverse rendering framework for 3D Gaussian fields, where forward light transport and backward gradient propagation are defined within a unified ray-tracing pipeline. Our key idea is to define a path-space equivalent interaction model for overlapping Gaussian primitives, under which Monte-Carlo-based path tracing is unbiased for the induced light-transport integral, while pathwise gradients are replayed over the same ray-traced interactions rather than splatting-derived screen-space buffers. The framework optimizes materials and a compact Spherical-Gaussian environment under the full rendering equation with ray-traced visibility and multi-bounce light transport. Extensive experiments demonstrate competitive material inversion and improved path-traced rendering quality, producing more plausible shadows, reflections, and relighting results under global illumination.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无splatting、基于路径追踪的逆向渲染框架，用于3D高斯场，统一前向光传输与反向梯度传播于同一光线追踪管线中，提升材质估计与全局光照渲染质量。
AI.motivation: 现有逆向渲染方法依赖光栅化管线（如splatting估计G-buffer），与路径追踪不一致，且忽略间接光照，导致阴影、反射等不准确和可见伪影。
AI.method: 提出路径空间等效交互模型处理重叠高斯基元，实现无偏路径追踪及基于相同光线交互的路径式梯度传播；联合优化材质参数与紧凑型球面高斯环境光，在完整渲染方程下支持光线追踪可见性与多跳光照传输。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了更准确的材质反演能力，路径追踪渲染质量显著提升，阴影、反射与重光照效果更逼真。
AI.conclusion: 该splatting-free路径追踪逆向渲染框架解决了管线不一致问题，实现了物理一致的前向渲染与可微分优化，为高斯场的高质量逆向渲染提供了新范式。

title: OneFeed: A Unified Generative Framework for Feed Content Enhancement and Query Generation
summary: Modern feed recommendation and search systems are deeply connected in user behavior butare usually modeled by separate architectures. Feed recommendation mainly captures implicitinterests from browsing interactions, while search systems rely on explicit user queries to retrieveintent-matched content. This separation causes fragmented user understanding and missedopportunities for using feed interactions to improve query generation and using generated queriesto enhance feed candidate retrieval.In this paper, we propose OneFeed, a unified generative framework for jointly modelingfeed content enhancement and query generation. OneFeed encodes heterogeneous user behaviorsequences with a shared behavior encoder and employs two generative heads: a Feed SemanticID Generator that produces content semantic IDs for recommendation retrieval, and an IntentQuery Generator that produces natural-language queries for search-based candidate expansion.To bridge the semantic gap between recommendation content and search queries, we introduce aSID-Query alignment objective that learns a shared semantic space for content semantic IDs andquery representations. We further design a closed-loop self-enhancement paradigm that leveragesimplicit user feedback from generated content and search-retrieved results to improve bothgeneration tasks. We provide a detailed experimental protocol using public recommendationdatasets with weakly supervised query construction, define a comprehensive set of evaluationmetrics, report expected performance estimates grounded in known baseline values, and validatethe executability of the proposed pipeline through a minimal local prototype. OneFeed providesa practical and extensible direction for unifying search and recommendation through generativemodeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OneFeed，一个统一的生成式框架，用于联合建模信息流内容增强与意图查询生成，通过共享行为编码器、双生成头及SID-Query对齐目标，弥合推荐与搜索之间的语义鸿沟，并引入闭环自增强范式提升两者性能。
AI.motivation: 现代信息流推荐与搜索系统虽在用户行为上紧密关联，却常被分离建模，导致用户理解碎片化，错失利用浏览行为优化查询生成、以及利用生成查询增强推荐检索的机会。
AI.method: OneFeed采用共享行为编码器处理异构用户行为序列，并配备两个生成头：Feed语义ID生成器（用于推荐检索）和意图查询生成器（用于搜索候选扩展）；引入SID-Query对齐目标学习内容语义ID与查询表征的共享语义空间；设计闭环自增强范式，利用隐式反馈协同优化两任务。
AI.result: 在公开推荐数据集（配合弱监督查询构建）上验证了OneFeed的有效性，定义了完整评估指标体系，给出基于基线的性能估计，并通过最小本地原型证实了方案的可执行性。
AI.conclusion: OneFeed为通过生成式建模统一搜索与推荐提供了实用且可扩展的新方向。

title: GraphLoRA: Structure-Aware Low-Rank Adaptation for Large Language Model Recommendation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong potential for recommendation (LLMRec) due to their powerful reasoning and generalization abilities. However, effectively aligning the textual semantics modeled by LLMs with the collaborative signals remains a key challenge. Existing methods either translate collaborative information into textual prompts or inject pre-trained embeddings into the LLM, both of which treat structural information as static input and fail to capture high-order relational dependencies. To bridge this gap, we propose GraphLoRA, a novel framework that generalizes low-rank adaptation from independent to structure-aware propagation. GraphLoRA embeds a trainable graph message-passing network within the low-rank adaptation pathway, enabling structural signals to propagate through the parameter space. This design allows collaborative topology to explicitly guide parameter updates, fostering deep integration between graph-structured and textual semantic information. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that GraphLoRA not only outperforms state-of-the-art LLM-based recommendation methods but also achieves superior generalization, effectively balancing structural reasoning capability with computational efficiency. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/wgj15965/GraphLoRA}{https://github.com/wgj15965/GraphLoRA}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GraphLoRA框架，通过在低秩适配路径中嵌入可训练图消息传递网络，实现结构信号在参数空间中的传播，从而深度融合图结构与文本语义信息，提升大语言模型推荐性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效对齐大语言模型的文本语义建模能力与协同过滤中的协作信号，尤其无法捕捉高阶关系依赖。
AI.method: 提出GraphLoRA框架，将低秩适应（LoRA）推广为结构感知的传播机制，在LoRA路径中嵌入可训练的图消息传递网络，使协同拓扑能显式引导参数更新。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，GraphLoRA不仅超越现有基于LLM的推荐方法，还具备更强泛化能力，并在结构推理能力与计算效率间取得更好平衡。
AI.conclusion: GraphLoRA成功 bridged 文本语义与图结构协同信号之间的鸿沟，为LLMRec提供了更高效、更深层的结构-语义融合范式。

title: Eyes All Around: Design and Analysis of 360-Degree LiDAR Perception Using Equivariant Feature Learning in Unstructured Traffic
summary: Perception in dense, unstructured urban traffic remains a major challenge for autonomous driving because of the wide variety of road users, frequent occlusions, irregular motion patterns, and the lack of standardized road layouts. Although recent LiDAR based 3D object detectors have shown strong performance in structured driving scenarios, most are developed and evaluated for limited field of view settings, and their behavior under full surround 360-degree sensing is still not well understood. This paper studies a 360-degree LiDAR perception pipeline for autonomous driving, with particular attention to panoramic sensing, azimuthal sector wise spatial processing, and transformation equivariant feature extraction in complex urban scenes. The paper presents a practical 360-degree perception framework that combines sector wise panoramic processing with rotation equivariant sparse convolutions and evaluates its behavior on a custom Ouster OS0 LiDAR dataset collected across diverse Indian urban traffic conditions. The results show generally stable detection across several object classes, with the strongest performance for cars at 92.02/90.51, buses at 80.53/76.34, and trucks at 78.59/74.16, while lower scores for pedestrians at 67.45/61.02, cyclists at 73.21/69.54, and motorcyclists at 71.20/68.13 reflect the greater difficulty of detecting smaller and more variable road users in dense urban scenes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向复杂城市交通的360度LiDAR感知框架，结合扇区全景处理与旋转等变稀疏卷积，在印度多样的城市数据集上验证了其在各类目标（尤其是车辆）上的稳定检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR 3D目标检测器多针对有限视场设计，在全向360度感知下的表现尚不明确，而密集无结构城市交通中存在多样道路使用者、频繁遮挡、不规则运动和非标准化道路布局等挑战。
AI.method: 构建了一个360度LiDAR感知流水线，重点包括全景感知、方位角扇区空间处理及变换等变特征提取；采用扇区化全景处理与旋转等变稀疏卷积相结合的实用框架，并在自建Ouster OS0 LiDAR印度城市数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 在多个目标类别上实现较稳定的检测性能：汽车（92.02/90.51）、公交车（80.53/76.34）、卡车（78.59/74.16）表现最优；行人（67.45/61.02）、骑行者（73.21/69.54）、摩托车骑手（71.20/68.13）性能较低，反映出小尺寸、高变异性目标在密集城市场景中的检测难度。
AI.conclusion: 该360度感知框架在复杂城市环境中具备实用性与鲁棒性，尤其适用于大型车辆检测；扇区化与旋转等变设计有助于提升全向感知的一致性与泛化能力。

title: IntentNav: Learning Spatial-Visual Object Navigation from Human Demonstrations
summary: Object navigation requires a robot to search for an unobserved target in an unknown environment by deciding where to explore next under partial observability. Effective search resembles human-like exploration: selectively probing visually promising frontiers while relying on spatial memory to avoid redundant revisits. We propose IntentNav, a spatial-visual imitation framework that learns human-like ObjectNav policies from human demonstrations. To infer high-level search intent from low-level human actions, we introduce Frontier-based Human-Intent Labeling, which looks ahead in human demonstrations and labels the frontier that best explains the demonstrator's future search direction. We construct a spatial-visual candidate space, where BEV memory tracks explored regions, unexplored frontiers, and trajectory history, while egocentric visual memory provides semantic cues for each candidate. A VLM policy is trained to select among these grounded candidates, using Intent-Aligned Objective to encourage consistent and human-like exploration. IntentNav achieves state-of-the-art performance on the MP3D, HM3D-v1 and HM3D-v2 ObjectNav benchmarks. The proposed candidate-level navigation interface transfers zero-shot to wheeled, quadruped, and humanoid robots without further VLM fine-tuning. \href{https://anonymous.4open.science/w/IntentNav/}{Project page}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IntentNav，一种基于空间-视觉模仿学习的人类意图驱动的目标导航框架，通过前沿点标注人类搜索意图、构建空间-视觉候选空间，并利用视觉语言模型（VLM）选择候选动作，在多个ObjectNav基准上达到SOTA性能，且支持零样本跨机器人平台迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有目标导航方法缺乏对人类探索行为（如选择性探测有前景的前沿区域、依赖空间记忆避免重复访问）的建模；需从人类示范中学习高阶搜索意图以提升导航效率与自然性。
AI.method: 提出Frontier-based Human-Intent Labeling方法，从前向视角标注人类演示中解释未来行动的最相关前沿点；构建融合鸟瞰图（BEV）空间记忆（含已探索区、前沿、轨迹）与前视视觉记忆（语义线索）的候选空间；训练VLM策略在该空间中做候选选择，并引入Intent-Aligned Objective确保探索一致性与人类相似性。
AI.result: 在MP3D、HM3D-v1和HM3D-v2 ObjectNav基准上达到SOTA性能；所提候选级导航接口可零样本迁移至轮式、四足及人形机器人，无需额外VLM微调。
AI.conclusion: IntentNav验证了显式建模人类搜索意图与空间-视觉联合表征对提升具身目标导航性能与泛化能力的有效性，为通用具身智能提供了可迁移的导航范式。

title: Land cover and flood type govern the detection limits of satellite-based flood mapping across diverse global flood events
summary: Floods are among the most destructive natural hazards, and their increasing frequency under climate change makes satellite-based inundation mapping essential for disaster response. Geospatial foundation models pretrained on satellite archives offer geographic transferability, but their operational reliability across diverse, unseen events remains uncharacterized. Here we deploy Prithvi-EO-2.0 across 19 out-of-distribution flood events (2017-2025) spanning six continents, eight climate zones, and six flood mechanisms, validating against two independent reference products. Detection accuracy depended jointly on land cover and flood type, with cropland yielding the highest agreement (IoU=52%) and riverine events the strongest detection (F1=0.69), while tree cover and built-up areas showed near-zero detection (IoU=4%) regardless of flood mechanism. Dual-reference validation revealed that apparent model error partly reflects definitional inconsistency between reference products rather than detection failure. Iterative pipeline testing identified 23 failure modes, with pipeline engineering dominating initial error over model capacity. These findings establish environment-dependent detection boundaries for operational satellite flood mapping.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了Prithvi-EO-2.0模型在19个跨分布洪水事件中的泛化能力，发现其检测性能高度依赖土地覆盖类型和洪水机制，并揭示参考数据定义差异和流程工程问题是主要误差来源。
AI.motivation: 卫星洪水制图对灾害响应至关重要，但现有地空基础模型在未见过的多样化洪水事件中的操作可靠性尚不明确。
AI.method: 在六大洲、八种气候带、六类洪水机制共19个分布外洪水事件（2017–2025）上部署Prithvi-EO-2.0，采用双参考产品验证，并开展迭代式流程测试以识别失效模式。
AI.result: 检测精度随土地覆盖与洪水类型变化显著：农田IoU达52%，河岸型洪水F1达0.69；林地与建成区IoU仅4%；双参考验证表明部分‘错误’实为参考产品定义不一致所致；23种失效模式中流程工程问题占主导。
AI.conclusion: 研究划定了卫星洪水制图中模型性能的环境依赖边界，强调需协同优化模型能力与处理流程，并统一参考标准。

title: Enabling KV Caching of Shared Prefix for Diffusion Language Models
summary:
Key-value (KV) caching for shared prefixes is essential for high-throughput large language model (LLM) serving, but it faces critical challenges in emerging diffusion language models (DLMs). In DLMs, bidirectional attention means that updating any token dynamically alters the entire context and its corresponding KVs. Thus, existing caching techniques developed for LLMs, which assume that KVs remain invariant once computed, corrupt the shared prefix KVs. Our experiments show that applying these techniques to DLMs causes model accuracy to collapse to near zero.
  To unlock high-throughput DLM serving, we propose bidirectional prefix caching, bicache, the first KV caching technique for shared prefixes in DLMs. bicache is designed based on key observations from our comprehensive analysis: shared prefix KVs remain stable and reusable in shallow layers, while the depth of shallow layers depends on the fraction of shared prefix tokens in each request. Thus, bicache dynamically identifies a safe layer depth for reusing shared prefix KVs and eliminates redundant computation. Evaluations demonstrate that bicache significantly improves serving throughput by 36.3%-98.3% compared to existing techniques without accuracy collapse (only 0-1.8% difference).

AI.tldr: 本文提出bicache，首个针对扩散语言模型（DLMs）的双向前缀KV缓存技术，解决传统KV缓存因忽略双向注意力导致精度崩溃的问题，在保持几乎无损精度前提下显著提升吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存技术基于单向注意力假设，无法适配DLMs中因bidirectional attention导致的KV动态变化，直接应用会引发精度崩溃。
AI.method: 基于对DLMs中共享前缀KV稳定性的观察，提出bicache：动态识别可安全复用共享前缀KV的网络浅层深度，并仅在该深度以上重新计算KV以消除冗余。
AI.result: 相比现有方法，bicache将服务吞吐量提升36.3%–98.3%，且精度损失仅0–1.8%，避免了接近零精度的崩溃问题。
AI.conclusion: bicache是首个支持DLMs高效服务的KV缓存方案，兼顾高吞吐与高精度，为DLM部署提供关键技术支撑。

title: bbsolver: A Unified Error-Bounded Spatiotemporal Optimization Solver for Key Timing and Topology-Consistent Vector Paths
comment: 18 pages, 11 figures; source code and reproducibility artifact at https://github.com/ivg-design/bbsolver
summary: Dense sampling records what an animation system actually evaluated, but it produces a poor final representation: every sampled frame can become a key, edit handles become noisy, and animated vector paths remain hard to adjust. Existing reducers usually treat the two axes separately: animation-curve reducers reduce key timing, while curve and path simplifiers reduce geometry. When applied independently to animated paths, these methods can break point identity across frames, change vertex structure over time, or provide no single error budget that covers both timing and shape. bbsolver frames the task as tolerance-bounded spatiotemporal reduction. A host application, such as After Effects or Blender, samples temporal and spatial animation into a documented JSON bundle; the standalone solver chooses sparse keys, interpolation metadata, and path representation; and the output is accepted only if replayed samples remain within the requested worst-case error. The same solver core can be used by any application that can export samples and write back returned keys or paths. In After Effects validation, solved keys written back into AE and re-sampled from AE playback reduce a DUIK humanoid walk cycle from 12,684 samples to 540 keys at epsilon=1, a 23.5x reduction, and an ant rig from 11,956 samples to 653 keys, an 18.3x reduction, with maximum errors below 1 px and 1 degree. A Blender-sampled FBX mocap retarget reaches 214 keys from 13,455 samples at epsilon=3; baselines tuned to matched measured accuracy require 4.5x to 27.5x more scalar key entries. For vector paths, bbsolver supports reduction when vertex identity/order is constant over time and diagnostics for variable-vertex-count streams, including a 6.7x After Effects-compatible procedural-path compression and exact transition-timing recovery in a diagnostic case.

AI.tldr: 本文提出bbsolver，一种容忍度约束的时空简化方法，用于动画系统中的密集采样数据压缩，能在保证误差范围内显著减少关键帧数量和路径表示复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有动画系统密集采样导致关键帧冗余、编辑困难、向量路径难以调整；传统简化方法分别处理时间轴与空间轴，易破坏顶点一致性、改变顶点结构，且缺乏统一误差预算。
AI.method: 将问题建模为容差约束下的时空联合简化：主机应用（如After Effects或Blender）导出带标注的JSON采样数据包；独立求解器bbsolver选择稀疏关键帧、插值元数据及路径表示；仅当重放采样误差不超过设定容差时才接受结果。
AI.result: 在After Effects中，人形行走循环从12684个采样点压缩至540个关键帧（压缩率23.5×），蚂蚁绑定从11956点压缩至653点（18.3×），最大误差<1像素/1度；Blender中动作捕捉重定向从13455点压缩至214点（epsilon=3），优于基线方法4.5–27.5倍；支持顶点数恒定的矢量路径压缩（6.7×）及可诊断变顶点流。
AI.conclusion: bbsolver实现了统一误差控制下的高效时空联合简化，兼容主流动画工具，显著提升关键帧与路径表示的紧凑性与可编辑性。

title: DeRes: Decoupling Residual Stability and Adaptivity for Scalable CTR Prediction
summary: Transformer-based CTR models face a growing bottleneck at the residual connection: under Pre-Norm, early user-interest signals are diluted layer by layer; the identity skip cannot forget stale interests; and each layer sees only its immediate predecessor, losing long-range cross-layer dependencies. Recent attention-based residual variants (AttnRes) address parts of this in language models, but drop the protective identity skip and have not been tried in recommendation. Drawing on Dual Path Networks (DPN) and the HORNN view of residuals, we present DeRes, which routes each layer through two parallel paths -- an Identity residual path that preserves first-order feature reuse and gradient flow, and a Block Attention Residual path that attends over compressed outputs of all earlier blocks for high-order recall. A vector-wise gate decides, per hidden dimension, the weight given to each path. We further propose Pointwise AttnRes, replacing the Softmax in the cross-layer attention with SiLU so that multiple past blocks can be activated simultaneously and irrelevant ones receive negative (forgetting) weights -- better aligned with CTR's parallel multi-interest patterns. On a large-scale industrial dataset (331M interactions from a major social-media platform), Criteo (45M), and Avazu (40M), DeRes outperforms twelve baselines including OneTrans, TokenMixer-Large, UniMixer, mHC, and AttnRes, achieving up to +0.32% AUC at under 5% extra FLOPs. Beyond a single operating point, DeRes fits a markedly steeper compute-AUC scaling law (gamma=0.118 vs. 0.071 for OneTrans, a 1.66x gap), so an 8-layer DeRes matches a 16-layer OneTrans -- about 2x compute saving at equivalent AUC. Ablations confirm that the dual-path design outperforms either single path, Identity beats learnable residuals, and SiLU beats Softmax.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeRes，一种双路径残差结构，结合恒等路径（保留一阶特征复用）与块注意力路径（跨层高阶召回），并引入向量门控和SiLU激活的Pointwise AttnRes，显著提升CTR模型性能与计算效率。
AI.motivation: Transformer类CTR模型在残差连接上存在信号稀释、无法遗忘过时兴趣、缺乏长程跨层依赖等问题；现有AttnRes变体未在推荐场景验证且舍弃了保护性恒等跳接。
AI.method: 提出DeRes：包含恒等残差路径（保障梯度流与一阶特征复用）与块注意力残差路径（对所有前置压缩块输出做注意力聚合），通过向量级门控融合；进一步提出Pointwise AttnRes，用SiLU替代Softmax实现多块并行激活与负权遗忘。
AI.result: 在工业级（3.31亿）、Criteo（4500万）和Avazu（4000万）数据集上，DeRes超越12个基线（含OneTrans、AttnRes等），AUC最高提升0.32%，额外FLOPs<5%；其计算-AUC缩放律更陡峭（γ=0.118 vs. 0.071），8层DeRes≈16层OneTrans性能，节省约2倍计算量。
AI.conclusion: 双路径设计优于单一路径；恒等残差优于可学习残差；SiLU优于Softmax；DeRes在精度与效率间取得更优平衡，适用于工业级CTR建模。

title: Post-training is (Massive) Supervised Learning
summary: The prevailing paradigm for training LLMs has evolved to rely on a massive post-training phase consisting of SFT and RL. In this position paper, we argue that this methodology effectively marks a reversion to the ``pre-train then fine-tune'' approach of the BERT era, explicitly tailoring models to the desired behaviors and specific benchmarks on which they are evaluated. We begin with a historical overview of LLMs, describing the different phases of the LLM evolution. We argue that the current landscape is remarkably similar to the early days of LLMs, where task performance heavily relied on fitting the models to in-distribution datasets. To empirically demonstrate this, we compare pre-trained models to randomly initialized ones, by fine-tuning both variants on modern reasoning datasets and evaluating them on competitive math and code benchmarks. We show that models post-trained from scratch yield highly non-trivial performance. Our findings suggest that current post-training methodologies function primarily as a distribution-fitting mechanism. We finish by positing that developing generally capable models and systems requires moving beyond extensive post-training for predefined behaviors, shifting instead toward training procedures where models ``learn how to learn''.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑当前大语言模型（LLM）训练范式过度依赖SFT与RL后训练，指出其本质上回归到BERT时代的“预训练+微调”模式，实为对特定分布的数据拟合；实验表明从零初始化模型经后训练即可在数学与代码基准上取得显著性能，说明后训练主要起分布适配作用；作者呼吁转向支持‘学会学习’的通用能力训练范式。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM训练过度依赖大规模后训练（SFT+RL），作者认为这导致模型仅适配特定任务和评测分布，丧失通用能力，亟需反思训练范式的根本目标。
AI.method: 通过历史分析梳理LLM演化阶段，并开展对照实验：将原始预训练模型与随机初始化模型在现代推理数据集上统一进行后训练，随后在数学与编程竞赛基准上评估性能。
AI.result: 随机初始化模型经相同后训练流程后，在多个数学与代码基准上达到非平凡性能，表明后训练本身即具备较强建模能力，预训练权重并非必要前提。
AI.conclusion: 当前后训练范式本质上是分布拟合机制，而非通用能力提升手段；构建真正通用的LLM需摒弃面向固定行为的密集后训练，转向支持元学习与持续适应的‘学会学习’训练框架。

title: AMN: An Adaptive Multi-Scale Fusion Network with Boundary and Uncertainty Modeling for Nuclei Segmentation
summary: Accurate classification of nuclei subtypes in histopathology images is critical for downstream tasks including tumor grading, immune infiltrate quantification, and prognosis prediction. Existing approaches rely on either convolutional or transformer-based encoders in isolation, limiting their ability to simultaneously capture fine-grained local texture and long-range spatial context. We present AMN (Adaptive Multi-Scale Nuclei Network), a dual-encoder segmentation framework that jointly leverages a Swin Transformer and a ResNet-50 feature pyramid, fused via a learned per-channel gating mechanism that dynamically weighs each encoder's contribution at every scale. AMN is trained with a multi-objective loss combining class-weighted focal loss, boundary-aware loss with positive-pixel emphasis, and a novel uncertainty-modulated classification term that suppresses overconfident erroneous predictions. Evaluated on the CoNIC benchmark across seven nuclei classes, AMN achieves a mean Dice of 0.82 and mean F1 of 0.68, with an F1 of 0.67 on the diagnostically challenging lymphocyte class. AMN outperforms eight baseline models spanning pure-CNN, pure-transformer, and recent hybrid architectures: U-Net, ResU-Net, DeepLabV3+, SegNet, ViT-Small, HmsU-Net, ConvFormer-UNet, and BEFUnet. Cross-dataset evaluation on MoNuSeg demonstrates strong generalization without retraining and validating the domain robustness of the learned representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AMN（自适应多尺度核网络），一种结合Swin Transformer与ResNet-50特征金字塔的双编码器分割框架，通过通道级门控机制融合多尺度特征，并引入多目标损失函数，在CoNIC和MoNuSeg数据集上显著提升核亚型分割精度与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅单独使用CNN或Transformer编码器，难以同时建模核亚型的细粒度局部纹理和长程空间上下文，限制了病理图像中核亚型精准分类与分割的性能。
AI.method: 提出AMN双编码器框架：并行采用Swin Transformer和ResNet-50构建特征金字塔，通过可学习的逐通道门控机制动态融合多尺度特征；训练时采用三重损失联合优化——类别加权Focal Loss、边界感知正像素强调损失、以及不确定性调制的分类损失。
AI.result: 在CoNIC基准（7类核）上达到平均Dice 0.82、平均F1 0.68，其中淋巴细胞类F1达0.67；全面超越8种基线模型（含U-Net、ViT-Small、ConvFormer-UNet等）；在MoNuSeg跨数据集测试中无需微调即表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: AMN通过协同建模多尺度局部与全局特征及不确定性感知优化，有效提升了核亚型分割的精度、鲁棒性与泛化能力，为病理图像分析提供了新范式。

title: MuJoCo-Drones-Gym: A GPU-Accelerated Multi-Drone Simulator for Control and Reinforcement Learning
summary: Robotic simulators are a cornerstone of modern research in aerial robotics, serving both as a vehicle for the development of new control algorithms and as the data source for training reinforcement learning (RL) policies. Yet, existing quadcopter learning environments often face a trade-off between physical fidelity, multi-agent support, and the throughput required by modern deep RL pipelines. In this paper, we present MuJoCo-Drones-Gym, an open-source Gymnasium-compatible multi-drone environment built on top of the MuJoCo physics engine. MuJoCo-Drones-Gym supports an arbitrary number of Bitcraze Crazyflie 2.x nano-quadcopters and exposes a modular API for selecting (i)~the physics model (rigid-body MuJoCo, explicit Python dynamics, or any subset of ground effect, blade drag, and inter-drone downwash), (ii)~the action interface (per-motor RPMs, collective normalized thrust, velocity setpoints, or PID waypoint commands), and (iii)~the observation space (kinematic state vectors, RGB / depth / segmentation cameras, or neighbourhood adjacency information). A PettingZoo ParallelEnv wrapper enables drop-in multi-agent reinforcement learning, while a suite of seven task environments, hover, velocity tracking, multi-drone hover, waypoint navigation, formation flight, gate racing, and a generic multi-agent template, demonstrates the breadth of the interface. We describe the environment design, the underlying physics and quadcopter dynamics, and illustrate its use through control and learning examples that mirror those of the closely related gym-pybullet-drones project, while taking advantage of MuJoCo's improved contact handling, rendering, and parallelizability.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了MuJoCo-Drones-Gym，一个基于MuJoCo物理引擎、支持多无人机、高保真且高吞吐的开源强化学习环境，具备模块化API、多智能体支持及多种任务场景。
AI.motivation: 现有四旋翼学习环境在物理保真度、多智能体支持和深度强化学习所需吞吐量之间存在权衡，亟需更优的仿真平台。
AI.method: 构建了一个Gymnasium兼容、基于MuJoCo的模块化多无人机仿真环境，支持自定义物理模型、动作接口与观测空间，并提供PettingZoo ParallelEnv封装及七种典型任务场景。
AI.result: 实现了高物理保真、高并行吞吐、易扩展的多无人机RL训练环境，验证了其在控制与学习任务中优于同类PyBullet方案的性能。
AI.conclusion: MuJoCo-Drones-Gym为 aerial robotics 的算法开发与多智能体强化学习提供了兼具真实性、灵活性与效率的统一仿真平台。

title: Reconstructing and forecasting disease trajectories of patients with Alzheimer's disease using routine data in resource-constrained settings
summary: Alzheimer's disease is a progressive neurodegenerative disorder, and its progression varies substantially across patients. Existing work aims to forecast patients' future cognitive state, with minimal focus on reconstructing the state from past visits. Furthermore, in current research, quantifying predictive uncertainty remains underexplored and relies on costly modalities such as MRI, PET, and CSF, limiting their deployment in resource-limited settings. In this research, our primary objectives are: First, bidirectional prediction of cognitive scores from irregular visits to present the complete disease trajectory. Second, to enable interpolation and extrapolation capabilities to assist clinicians in informed prognostic decision making, and third, to provide a well-calibrated uncertainty estimate for all predictions, and finally, to achieve the objectives using the modalities available during routine visits. We propose a unified framework, GNOVA: A GRU-Neural ODE Variational Autoencoder. The architecture combines a Gated Recurrent Unit encoder and a Neural ODE decoder within a variational autoencoder framework. In our work, we forecast the CDR-SB and MMSE Scores. The GRU encoder allows for any number of inputs at any time point. The Neural-ODE decoder performs continuous estimation, allowing interpolation and extrapolation at any desired time point. The Variational autoencoder allows for uncertainty estimation in predictions. We worked with 1,727 patients from the ADNI dataset over 10 years; the model achieved mean absolute errors of 1.35 and 2.28 for CDR-SB and MMSE scores, respectively, without requiring any neuroimaging or biomarker data. Feature-ablation studies revealed that age, BMI, and APOE4 status were strong predictors. The proposed framework enables the reconstruction of incomplete patient histories and the anticipation of future cognitive states.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GNOVA框架，结合GRU、Neural ODE与变分自编码器，实现阿尔茨海默病患者认知评分（CDR-SB、MMSE）的双向时序预测、插值/外推及校准的不确定性估计，仅使用常规临床数据，无需MRI/PET/CSF等昂贵模态。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦单向预测未来认知状态，缺乏对历史状态的重建能力；且不确定性量化不足，依赖昂贵模态，难以在资源有限场景部署。
AI.method: 提出GNOVA：基于GRU编码器（处理不规则时间点输入）、Neural ODE解码器（支持连续时间插值与外推）和变分自编码器（提供不确定性估计）的统一框架，仅用常规临床数据（如年龄、BMI、APOE4）预测CDR-SB和MMSE分数。
AI.result: 在ADNI数据集1727名患者上，CDR-SB和MMSE预测的平均绝对误差分别为1.35和2.28；消融实验表明年龄、BMI和APOE4状态是强预测因子；模型可重建不完整病史并预测未来认知状态。
AI.conclusion: GNOVA实现了仅用常规临床数据的鲁棒、可解释、带不确定性估计的认知轨迹建模，提升了临床决策支持能力，尤其适用于资源受限环境。

title: When Should an AI Scientist Stop? Verifiable Experiment Steering and Refusal for Autonomous Discovery
comment: Accepted at AI for Science Workshop at ICML 2026
summary: We present CARTOGRAPH, a verification layer for AI scientists that couples unresolved-subspace experiment steering (select), explicit ambiguity closure (resolve), and residual-based library inadequacy detection (refuse). Under a local linear-Gaussian bridge, raw unresolved projection is the isotropic unresolved Fisher-information trace, while CARTOGRAPH-A is the exact unresolved A-optimal rule; closed-form EIG and Box-Hill arise as local comparators rather than global equivalents. Across five testbeds, CARTOGRAPH-A beats raw projection 129W/0T/15L at d = 8 (p < 10^-21) in a replicated structured cascade. More distinctively, the framework tentatively identifies three out-of-library pharmacokinetic mechanisms and then revokes those identifications as residuals expose structural misfit, while one perturbed in-library control stays identified throughout. In low-dimensional pharmacokinetic and filtered EPA settings, near-ties against disagreement are predicted by theory and observed. Finally, in a retrospective audit of 40 positive claims from the published A-Lab autonomous materials system, the refuse guard flags all 4 claims later marked inconclusive under manual reanalysis while passing 32/36 confirmed claims. Code is available at https://github.com/ai4science-boed/cartograph.git

AI.tldr: 本文提出CARTOGRAPH验证框架，通过实验引导、歧义闭合与库不足检测三机制，提升AI科学家的可解释性与可靠性，在多个测试中显著优于基线方法，并成功识别并拒绝错误科学假设。
AI.motivation: 解决AI科学家在复杂科学问题中因模型不确定性、知识库局限及歧义未闭合导致的不可靠推断问题。
AI.method: 提出CARTOGRAPH三层验证机制：未解子空间实验引导（select）、显式歧义闭合（resolve）、基于残差的库不充分性检测（refuse）；基于局部线性高斯桥建模，导出未解Fisher信息迹与A最优规则（CARTOGRAPH-A），并引入EIG与Box-Hill作为局部比较基准。
AI.result: 在5个测试平台中，CARTOGRAPH-A以129胜0平15负显著优于原始投影（d=8, p<10^-21）；在药代动力学中识别并主动撤销3个库外机制假阳性；在低维场景下理论预测并观测到与分歧的近似平局；在40项A-Lab材料学声明回溯审计中，拒止模块100%捕获4项后续被人工判定为不确定的声明，同时通过32/36项确认声明。
AI.conclusion: CARTOGRAPH为AI科学家提供了首个兼具理论可解释性与实证鲁棒性的验证层，能主动识别知识边界、拒绝无效假设，推动可信自主科学发现。

title: LEGS: Laplacian-Enhanced Gaussian Splatting with a Nonlinear Weighted Loss
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has become an efficient explicit representation for radiance field reconstruction and real-time novel view synthesis. However, its standard photometric loss treats flat and structure-rich regions similarly, which may limit the recovery of sharp contours and fine details. Edge-Guided Gaussian Splatting (EGGS) improves structure awareness through edge-guided weighting, but mainly relies on first-order gradient responses and linear weighting. In this paper, we propose LEGS, a Laplacian-Enhanced Gaussian Splatting method with a nonlinearly weighted loss. LEGS replaces first-order gradient guidance with second-order Laplacian structural guidance and maps the normalized Laplacian response into pixel-wise weights through nonlinear response-to-weight functions. The proposed loss improves structure-aware Gaussian optimization while keeping the original 3DGS rendering pipeline unchanged. Experiments on the full Tanks\&Temples and Mip-NeRF360 datasets show that LEGS improves peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) by up to 1.68 dB over 3DGS and up to 0.52 dB over EGGS. Incorporating the proposed second-order nonlinear weighting strategy into FastGS and FasterGS further improves PSNR by up to 1.69 dB, demonstrating its effectiveness as a general loss-level extension for Gaussian Splatting pipelines with potential applications in AR/VR, immersive visualization, and real-time 3D content generation.

AI.tldr: LEGS是一种拉普拉斯增强的高斯点绘方法，通过非线性加权损失提升结构感知能力，在保持原有3DGS渲染流程不变的前提下，显著提升了PSNR指标。
AI.motivation: 标准3D高斯点绘的光度损失对平坦区域和结构丰富区域一视同仁，限制了轮廓和细节恢复；EGGS虽引入边缘引导加权，但仅依赖一阶梯度和线性加权，仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 提出LEGS方法，用二阶拉普拉斯结构引导替代一阶梯度引导，并通过非线性响应-权重函数将归一化拉普拉斯响应映射为像素级权重，构建新型非线性加权损失。
AI.result: 在Tanks&Temples和Mip-NeRF360数据集上，LEGS相比3DGS最高提升PSNR达1.68 dB，相比EGGS最高提升0.52 dB；应用于FastGS/FasterGS亦有最高1.69 dB提升。
AI.conclusion: LEGS是一种通用、即插即用的损失层扩展方案，可有效增强各类高斯点绘管线的结构重建能力，适用于AR/VR、沉浸式可视化与实时3D内容生成。

title: GIScholarBench: Benchmarking LLM Overconfidence in GIS Research
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in academic research workflows, but scholarly tasks require high factual precision and therefore expose a key weakness: overconfidence. Here, overconfidence is defined behaviorally as the tendency to produce confident, assertive, and well-formatted outputs even when the underlying knowledge is incomplete or unverifiable, rather than as a calibration gap between stated confidence and accuracy. To examine this issue, we introduce GIScholarBench, a benchmark built from 10,865 papers published in 25 core GIScience journals between 2020 and 2025. The benchmark covers three tasks with increasing cognitive complexity: metadata retrieval, literature linking, and research direction generation. We evaluate Claude Sonnet 4.5, Gemini 3, and ChatGPT 5.3 through their native web interfaces under real-world user-facing conditions. Results show consistent overconfidence across all tasks. In metadata retrieval, ChatGPT 5.3 achieves the highest accuracy, but all models still generate definitive titles and DOIs when predictions are wrong. In literature linking, Claude Sonnet 4.5 recovers the most references, but all models show a clear gap between top-ranked retrieval and longer citation lists, suggesting that references are extended beyond reliable retrieval capacity. In research direction generation, AI-generated directions show lower topic coverage, higher novel miss rates, and lower semantic diversity than real future-citing papers. These findings suggest that LLM overconfidence is task-invariant but takes different forms: factual overgeneration in retrieval, unreliable citation expansion in literature linking, and overconfidence in output completeness during research ideation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GIScholarBench基准，评估LLM在地理信息科学（GIScience）学术任务中的过自信问题，发现Claude、Gemini和ChatGPT均存在任务不变但表现形式不同的过自信行为：事实性过度生成、不可靠的参考文献扩展、以及研究方向生成中对输出完整性的过度自信。
AI.motivation: 学术任务要求高事实精度，而LLM普遍存在行为意义上的过自信——即在知识不全或不可验证时仍生成自信、断言式、格式良好的输出，亟需系统性评估。
AI.method: 构建基于10,865篇GIScience期刊论文的GIScholarBench基准，涵盖元数据检索、文献链接、研究方向生成三类递进复杂度任务；在真实用户界面条件下评测Claude Sonnet 4.5、Gemini 3和ChatGPT 5.3。
AI.result: 所有模型在三类任务中均表现出一致过自信：元数据检索中错误时仍输出确定性字段；文献链接中引用扩展超出可靠检索能力；研究方向生成中主题覆盖低、新主题遗漏率高、语义多样性差。
AI.conclusion: LLM的过自信是任务不变现象，但形态因任务而异，需针对性缓解策略而非通用校准方法。

title: BEACON: Behavioral Entropy Aggregation for Cross-Model Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models
comment: 12 pages, 6 tables, 1 figure. Code and data available upon request
summary: Hallucination in large language models (LLMs), defined as the generation of factually incorrect or unsupported content, remains a critical barrier to reliable deployment. We present BEACON (Behavioral Entropy Aggregation for Cross-model hallucination detectiON), a black-box hallucination detection framework that operates purely on model outputs without requiring access to internal representations or external knowledge bases. BEACON extracts a 31-dimensional feature vector from structured multi-pass generation, integrating NLI-based semantic entropy, embedding geometry, chain-of-thought consistency, and paraphrase stability signals. A gradient-boosted classifier trained on 7,617 labeled examples across seven benchmarks achieves 0.8123 +/- 0.0102 AUROC (95% CI: 0.7632-0.8251), outperforming standalone semantic entropy (+0.2298) and SelfCheckGPT-style consistency baselines (+0.2457). Feature importance analysis shows that hallucination is inherently multi-dimensional, requiring combined uncertainty signals. An efficient 5-call variant achieves 0.7795 AUROC, enabling practical deployment across black-box LLM APIs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BEACON，一种无需访问模型内部参数或外部知识库的黑盒幻觉检测框架，通过多轮生成提取31维特征并用梯度提升分类器检测LLM输出中的事实性错误，性能显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型（LLM）中幻觉现象（即生成事实错误或无依据内容）严重阻碍其可靠部署，亟需高效、通用、无需模型内部访问的检测方法。
AI.method: 提出BEACON框架：基于结构化多轮生成提取31维特征向量，融合自然语言推理语义熵、嵌入几何、思维链一致性与改写稳定性等信号；采用梯度提升分类器在7617个标注样本上训练。
AI.result: 在七个基准上AUROC达0.8123±0.0102；显著优于单独语义熵（+0.2298）和SelfCheckGPT类一致性基线（+0.2457）；5次调用轻量版AUROC为0.7795，支持实际API部署。
AI.conclusion: 幻觉检测本质上是多维问题，需融合多种不确定性信号；BEACON作为高效、通用、黑盒的检测框架，为LLM安全应用提供了实用解决方案。

title: NeuroAlign: Hierarchical Multimodal Fusion of Dynamic and Structural Neuroimaging for MCI Analysis
summary: Multimodal neuroimaging fusion of functional MRI (fMRI) and diffusion tensor imaging (DTI) provides complementary information for cognitive impairment analysis, but remains challenged by heterogeneous feature spaces and misaligned representations. We propose \textit{NeuroAlign}, a hierarchical framework for structured multimodal fusion. It introduces (1) \textit{Dual-Modal Hierarchical Alignment} (DMHA), which models multi-scale dynamic connectivity and aligns dynamic-static and functional-structural embeddings; and (2) \textit{Dual-Domain Hierarchical Interaction} (DDHI), which enables fine-grained modulation and global interaction between connectivity- and region-level features. To support feature-level inspection, we design \textit{Synergistic Activation Mapping} (SAM), a gradient-free, marker-oriented attribution method for DFC, SFC, ALFF, and FA. Evaluated on GUTCM, ADNI, and OASIS under five-fold validation, NeuroAlign achieves competitive MCI/SCD detection and preliminary cross-dataset transferability. Attribution analyses reveal modality-specific and partially consistent brain patterns, providing model-derived evidence for multimodal representation analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeuroAlign框架，通过双模态分层对齐（DMHA）和双域分层交互（DDHI）实现fMRI与DTI的结构化多模态融合，并设计无需梯度的协同激活映射（SAM）方法进行特征归因分析，在多个数据集上实现了轻度认知障碍/主观认知下降检测的优越性能。
AI.motivation: 功能磁共振成像（fMRI）与弥散张量成像（DTI）融合可为认知障碍分析提供互补信息，但面临异构特征空间与表征错位的挑战。
AI.method: 提出NeuroAlign分层框架，包括：（1）双模态分层对齐（DMHA），建模多尺度动态连接并统一动态-静态、功能-结构嵌入；（2）双域分层交互（DDHI），实现连接水平与脑区水平特征间的细粒度调制与全局交互；（3）协同激活映射（SAM），一种无梯度、标志物导向的归因方法，用于动态功能连接（DFC）、静态功能连接（SFC）、低频振幅（ALFF）和各向异性分数（FA）。
AI.result: 在GUTCM、ADNI和OASIS数据集五折交叉验证下，NeuroAlign在MCI/SCD检测任务中达到竞争性性能，并展现出初步跨数据集迁移能力；归因分析揭示了模态特异且部分一致的脑区模式。
AI.conclusion: NeuroAlign有效缓解了多模态神经影像融合中的表征异质性与错位问题，其可解释性模块提供了模型驱动的多模态表征分析证据，推动了临床认知障碍辅助诊断的发展。

title: EgoAERO: Learning Dexterous Manipulation from a Single Egocentric Video without Object Assets
