AI.result: P0/P1数值不稳定，P2为最低可行起点；P2以上提升整体性能仅3.4%（MAE）和1.8%（JEPA），多数差异无统计显著性；IDH轻微受益于强预处理，AGE和GLI/PED常在P2即达最优，MCI是唯一显著受益于P7的任务；且MCI的P7优势部分可经下游强预处理恢复。
AI.conclusion: MRI预处理应被重新定义为一种下游任务感知的成本-效用决策，而非默认逐级强化的流水线；推荐以P2为基准起点，按具体下游任务需求选择性增强预处理。

title: MotionWAM: Towards Foundation World Action Models for Real-Time Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
summary: World Action Models (WAMs) couple a video dynamics prior to the policy and have shown encouraging results on tabletop manipulation, but iterative denoising over high-dimensional video-action latents leaves them too slow for real-time humanoid loco-manipulation. The problem is compounded by the dominant hierarchical paradigm, in which a high-level manipulation policy controls only the upper body while a low-level controller tracks coarse base commands -- placing upper and lower body in inconsistent action spaces and reducing the legs to balance-preserving locomotion. We present MotionWAM, a real-time WAM that drives autonomous humanoid loco-manipulation from a single egocentric camera by conditioning the policy on the intermediate denoising features of a video world model. MotionWAM replaces the upper-lower split with a unified motion latent and predicts whole-body motion tokens that jointly cover locomotion, torso motion, height regulation, foot interaction, and hand manipulation in a single action space. A three-stage learning framework progressively adapts the video world model to egocentric visual dynamics and to the target humanoid embodiment. On nine real-world Unitree G1 tasks, MotionWAM runs in real time, substantially outperforms Vision-Language-Action (VLA) baselines fine-tuned on the same demonstrations by over 30% in overall success rate, and executes task-driven foot interaction that decoupled upper-lower policies cannot reach. Our results suggest that video-pretrained WAMs can be lifted from tabletop manipulation to coordinated, human-like whole-body humanoid control.

AI.tldr: MotionWAM是一种实时世界动作模型，通过统一的运动隐空间实现人形机器人全身协调控制（包括行走、躯干运动、高度调节、足部交互与手部操作），仅需单目第一人称视觉输入，在真实Unitree G1机器人上显著超越VLA基线。
AI.motivation: 现有WAMs因高维视频-动作潜变量迭代去噪而速度慢，难以用于实时人形 locomaniplation；主流上下身分层策略导致动作空间不一致，限制腿部主动交互能力。
AI.method: 提出MotionWAM：以视频世界模型的中间去噪特征为条件；用统一运动隐变量替代上下身分离设计；预测覆盖全身运动的联合动作token；采用三阶段学习框架逐步适配 egocentric 视觉动态与目标人形机体。
AI.result: 在9个真实Unitree G1任务中实现实时运行；整体成功率较同演示微调的VLA基线提升超30%；首次实现任务驱动的足部交互能力。
AI.conclusion: 视频预训练的WAM可从桌面操作拓展至协调、类人的全身人形控制，统一隐空间与实时架构是关键突破。

title: InA-Probe: Instruction-Aware Active Probing for Time Series Forecasting with LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated impressive potential for time series forecasting. However, existing methods predominantly rely on passive modality alignment or static task reprogramming, which often fail to capture fine-grained, non-stationary temporal patterns or to adapt to nuanced task intents. In this paper, we propose Instruction-aware Active Probing (InA-Probe), which shifts the paradigm from passive alignment toward an active, instruction-driven probing mechanism. Specifically, we design a Multi-Level Instruction Injection mechanism that enriches the model with both global task objectives and fine-grained, patch-level semantic priors. Building on this, an Adaptive Query Generation module produces sample-specific probes that are dynamically modulated by the temporal context. These probes are then refined through a dual-stage attention process: they first internalize task-specific intents via Instruction-Aware Self-Attention, and subsequently interrogate the projected temporal representations through Temporal Cross-Attention to extract salient patterns. Comprehensive experiments on seven real-world benchmarks show that InA-Probe consistently outperforms state-of-the-art deep learning and LLM-based baselines, excelling in both one-for-all generalization and zero-shot transfer while reducing forecasting error by up to 37\% in challenging cross-domain scenarios. Ablation studies further confirm that the synergy between adaptive querying and fine-grained instructions is key to unlocking the reasoning power of LLMs for complex time series.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InA-Probe方法，通过多级指令注入与自适应查询生成，结合双阶段注意力机制，显著提升大语言模型在时序预测中的性能，尤其在跨域零样本场景下误差降低达37%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM时序预测方法依赖被动模态对齐或静态任务重编程，难以捕捉非平稳细粒度时序模式及适配复杂任务意图。
AI.method: 提出Instruction-aware Active Probing（InA-Probe）：1）多级指令注入机制，融合全局任务目标与片段级语义先验；2）自适应查询生成模块，动态生成时序上下文调制的样本特异性探针；3）双阶段注意力（指令感知自注意力+时序交叉注意力）实现任务意图内化与关键模式提取。
AI.result: 在七个真实世界基准上全面超越SOTA深度学习与LLM基线，在通用预测与零样本迁移任务中表现优异，跨域场景下预测误差最高降低37%；消融研究验证了自适应查询与细粒度指令协同的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: InA-Probe成功将LLM从被动对齐转向主动、指令驱动的探测范式，有效释放其在复杂时序推理任务中的潜力。

title: Cutting LLM Evaluation Costs with SySRs: A Bandit Algorithm that Provably Exploits Model Similarity
summary: Large Language Models are typically benchmarked by evaluating every model on every test query. For practitioners seeking the best model to deploy, this is often wasteful: if a model clearly performs worse than others, there is no need to precisely estimate its performance. Best-arm identification algorithms can be naturally applied to drastically reduce costs by adaptively allocating evaluation budget. Further, language models often respond similarly to the same prompt-a property previous work has tried to leverage with mixed success. We propose Synchronized Successive Rejects (SySRs), augmenting the classical Successive Rejects algorithm with paired comparisons. Unlike prior attempts to leverage model similarity in best-model identification, our approach is hyperparameter-free and enjoys performance guarantees that improve with the degree of similarity between evaluated models. Empirically, our method outperforms all baselines in terms of average error rate across 15 standard benchmarks, and in terms of worst-case budget for reliably identifying the best model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为同步连续淘汰（SySRs）的新算法，用于高效识别最佳大语言模型，通过利用模型响应的相似性，在保证理论性能的同时减少评估成本。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型评估方法对每个模型在每个测试查询上都进行评估，效率低下；而模型间响应存在相似性，但此前利用该性质的方法效果有限且依赖超参数。
AI.method: 提出同步连续淘汰（SySRs）算法，改进经典Successive Rejects算法，引入成对比较机制，无需超参数，并具备随模型相似度提升而增强的理论性能保证。
AI.result: 在15个标准基准上，SySRs在平均错误率和可靠识别最佳模型所需的最坏情况预算两方面均优于所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SySRs是一种高效、鲁棒且理论可证的模型选择方法，能显著降低大语言模型评估成本。

title: Auditing Proprietary Alignment in Large Language Models: A Comparative Framework Without a Ground-Truth Standard
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly released and deployed through opaque development and deployment pipelines, enabling model providers to inject intentional, provider-specific policies without officially announcing them. As a result, various models have been reported to generate responses reflecting proprietary rules and organizational interests, leading to censorship or misinformation on controversial topics. However, systematic identification of such alignment remains a fundamental challenge, complicated by the ambiguity of what ``proprietary'' entails in different contexts. In this paper, we propose a statistical framework for detecting proprietary alignment in black-box language models via comparative behavioral analysis. Our approach quantifies systematic deviations between the responses of a target model and those of a reference set of baseline models in a shared semantic space. By evaluating relative behavioral divergence rather than absolute correctness, our framework enables principled auditing under black-box access. Applied to several widely discussed but previously unquantified cases, it provides a systematic and scalable basis for external assessment of provider-specific alignment behavior in large language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统计框架，通过对比行为分析检测黑盒大语言模型中的专有对齐（proprietary alignment），即模型中隐含的、未公开的提供商特定策略或政策。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型开发和部署流程日益不透明，导致模型提供商可能在未声明的情况下注入自身政策，引发审查或误导性输出，但目前尚缺乏系统性识别此类专有对齐的方法。
AI.method: 提出基于共享语义空间中目标模型与一组基线模型响应差异的统计框架，通过量化相对行为偏差而非绝对正确性来实现黑盒条件下的可审计性。
AI.result: 该框架成功应用于多个此前未被量化讨论的典型案例，为外部评估大语言模型中提供商特有对齐行为提供了系统、可扩展的基础。
AI.conclusion: 该统计框架为黑盒语言模型的专有对齐检测提供了可行、原则性强且可扩展的审计方法，有助于提升模型透明度与可信度。

title: Empowering Feed-Forward Reconstruction Models with Metric Scale via Satellite Images
summary: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction models have recently shown strong generalization across diverse scenes, yet most of them recover geometry only up to an unknown global scale. This scale ambiguity limits their use in applications that require metric understanding of the environment. Existing metric reconstruction methods commonly rely on large-scale metric annotations or accurate camera calibration, both of which are costly or unreliable in many real-world settings. We propose a satellite-guided framework for resolving scale ambiguity in feed-forward 3D reconstruction. The key idea is to use readily available satellite imagery as a global metric reference. Given a coarse camera pose, our method retrieves a local satellite patch and integrates it with a feed-forward reconstruction backbone through bidirectional cross-view interaction. By enforcing consistency between the reconstructed scene and the satellite reference, the model infers absolute scale, refines scene geometry, and estimates camera pose in a metric coordinate frame. Experiments on KITTI, nuScenes, and Oxford RobotCar show consistent improvements in metric depth estimation, multi-view point-cloud reconstruction, and cross-view camera localization, while preserving strong generalization across datasets and geographic regions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用卫星图像作为全局度量参考来解决前馈3D重建中尺度模糊问题的新框架，通过双向跨视角交互实现绝对尺度推断、几何优化和相机位姿估计。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈3D重建模型存在全局尺度未知的问题，限制了其在需度量理解场景的应用；而现有度量重建方法依赖昂贵或不可靠的大规模度量标注或精确相机标定。
AI.method: 提出卫星引导框架：给定粗略相机位姿，检索局部卫星图像块，并通过双向跨视角交互将其与前馈重建主干网络融合，以卫星为参考约束重建结果的一致性。
AI.result: 在KITTI、nuScenes和Oxford RobotCar数据集上，该方法在度量深度估计、多视角点云重建和跨视角相机定位任务中均取得一致提升，同时保持跨数据集和地理区域的强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 卫星图像可作为低成本、易获取的全局度量参考，有效解决前馈3D重建中的尺度模糊问题，无需额外度量标注或高精度标定。

title: Self-Paced Curriculum Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Superbike Racing in Simulation
comment: Presented at the "1st Workshop on Generalization in Autonomous Driving: Paradigms, Practice, and Public Road Demonstrations" at ICRA 2026, Vienna. Oral+poster presentation
summary: Autonomous Racing has seen remarkable progress through deep Reinforcement Learning (RL), primarily for four-wheeled vehicles. However, motorbikes introduce substantially greater complexity due to the need to manage balance and lean angle, in addition to more reactive steering and throttle control, and a smaller weight. In this work, we present a framework for training an autonomous agent to race a superbike in VRider SBK, a physics-accurate Unity-based motorbike simulator. Our approach integrates Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) with Self-Paced curriculum Deep reinforcement Learning (SPDL), which dynamically generates progressively more challenging tasks based on the agent's performance, without requiring manual curriculum design. The agent's state space comprises proprioceptive features extended with lean-angle history, along with global track features via course points. The reward signal is shaped to encourage progress along the track while penalizing instability-inducing behaviors specific to two-wheeled dynamics. Preliminary experimental results demonstrate that SPDL outperforms SAC alone in training efficiency, lap time, and driving stability across multiple tracks and motorbike models, establishing a first baseline for RL-based autonomous motorbike racing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Soft Actor-Critic（SAC）与自定进度课程深度强化学习（SPDL）的框架，用于在高保真摩托车模拟器VRider SBK中训练自主超级摩托车赛车智能体，通过引入姿态历史、赛道全局特征及针对两轮动力学定制的奖励函数，显著提升了训练效率、圈速和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 四轮自动驾驶赛车已有较多基于深度强化学习的研究，但两轮摩托车因需控制平衡、倾角、更灵敏的油门/转向及更轻的重量，建模难度显著更高，缺乏相应RL研究基线。
AI.method: 采用Soft Actor-Critic（SAC）算法，结合Self-Paced curriculum Deep RL（SPDL）实现自动课程学习；状态空间包含本体感知特征（含倾角历史）与基于赛道路点的全局特征；设计面向两轮稳定性的稀疏+稠密混合奖励函数。
AI.result: SPDL在多个赛道和摩托车型号上均优于单独SAC：训练收敛更快、单圈时间更短、行驶更稳定（如减少摔倒、抖动）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了首个基于RL的自主摩托车竞速基线，验证了自定进度课程学习对高动态两轮系统训练的有效性，为复杂非线性车辆控制提供了新范式。

title: Towards Long-Horizon Vessel Trajectory and Destination Forecasting with Reasoning Large Language Models
comment: The IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC) 2026, Naples, Italy
summary: Long-horizon maritime trajectory prediction is important for shipping management, logistics planning, and maritime risk analysis, yet month-level forecasting remains insufficiently studied. Existing deep learning methods mainly focus on short- and mid-term coordinate extrapolation and often struggle to preserve route feasibility and destination correctness over extended horizons. This paper investigates joint long-horizon vessel trajectory and destination forecasting with reasoning-capable large language models, and develops a Maritime LLM post-training framework based on Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Reward (RLVR). An AIS-based benchmark is constructed with 60-day historical trajectories and 30-day forecasting horizons, where trajectories are converted into semantic textual representations for RL prompt construction. RLVR aligns LLMs with maritime forecasting objectives by enforcing physical validity, providing early-weighted trajectory supervision, and evaluating destination correctness through hierarchical matching and curriculum learning. Experimental results show that RLVR-trained LLMs substantially improve over zero-shot LLMs and representative deep learning baselines, especially on destination-related metrics. Among the evaluated RLVR-trained variants, 4B LLMs achieve the best overall performance, suggesting that reward-compatible optimization and task-specific capacity matching are more important than simply using larger 8B or 14B LLMs. The results also show that LSTM remains a strong deep learning baseline under limited fine-tuning data, while Transformer-style spatio-temporal models typically require larger datasets and richer structured inputs. Overall, this work advances semantic, verifier-aligned maritime forecasting for operational decision support.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）的海事大语言模型（Maritime LLM）后训练框架，用于联合预测船舶长时程轨迹与目的地；在60天历史、30天预测的AIS基准上验证了其在物理合理性、轨迹精度和目的地正确性上的显著提升，尤其优于零样本LLM和主流深度学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法难以在月级长时程预测中保证航线可行性与目的地准确性，且缺乏语义化、可验证的建模能力。
AI.method: 构建AIS语义文本化轨迹数据集，设计基于强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）的Maritime LLM后训练框架，融合物理约束、早权重轨迹监督、分层匹配与课程学习实现目的地评估。
AI.result: RLVR训练的4B LLM在目的地相关指标上显著优于零样本LLM及LSTM、Transformer等基线；LSTM在小样本下仍具竞争力，而Transformer类模型更依赖大数据与结构化输入。
AI.conclusion: 奖励兼容优化与任务适配容量比单纯增大模型规模更重要；语义化、验证器对齐的LLM路径为海事长时程预测提供了新范式，支撑实际运营决策。

title: Characterizing the Discrete Geometry of ReLU Networks
comment: Selected for an oral presentation at ICLR 2026. Tagged PDF, reviews, and discussions are available at https://openreview.net/forum?id=TgLW2DiRDG
summary: It is well established that ReLU networks define continuous piecewise-linear functions, and that their linear regions are polyhedra in the input space. These regions form a complex that fully partitions the input space. The way these regions fit together is fundamental to the behavior of the network, as nonlinearities occur only at the boundaries where these regions connect. However, relatively little is known about the geometry of these complexes beyond bounds on the total number of regions, and calculating the complex exactly is intractable for most networks. In this work, we prove new theoretical results about these complexes that hold for all fully-connected ReLU networks, specifically about their connectivity graphs in which nodes correspond to regions and edges exist between each pair of regions connected by a face. We find that the average degree of this graph is upper bounded by twice the input dimension regardless of the width and depth of the network, and that the diameter of this graph has an upper bound that does not depend on input dimension, despite the number of regions increasing exponentially with input dimension. We corroborate our findings through experiments with networks trained on both synthetic and real-world data, which provide additional insight into the geometry of ReLU networks. Code to reproduce our results can be found at https://github.com/bl-ake/ICLR-2026.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了ReLU神经网络的线性区域复杂结构，证明了其连接图的平均度数受输入维度限制，且直径与输入维度无关，通过理论分析和实验验证了这些几何性质。
AI.motivation: ReLU网络的线性区域构成复杂几何结构，其连接方式对网络行为至关重要，但目前对其几何结构的理解仍十分有限。
AI.method: 通过理论推导，分析全连接ReLU网络线性区域连接图的平均度数与直径，并结合合成数据与真实数据上的实验进行验证。
AI.result: 发现连接图的平均度数上界为输入维度的两倍，直径上界与输入维度无关；实验结果支持理论发现。
AI.conclusion: ReLU网络线性区域的连接图具有受输入维度约束的稳定几何特性，这为理解深度网络的非线性行为提供了新视角。

title: When Correct Decisions Hide Internal Stress: Decision-State Probing in Multimodal Language Models
summary: Multimodal language models are typically evaluated through external behavior: selecting the correct image--text match, rejecting unsupported captions, or answering visual queries correctly. However, correct behavior alone does not show that the model's internal decision state remains stable under controlled semantic stress. We study this gap through S$^3$E (Structured Semantic Stress Evaluation), a framework for analyzing behavior-internal decoupling in multimodal language models. S$^3$E uses a positive-anchored A/B forced-choice setup in which an image-supported caption is contrasted against semantic stress candidates under both original and swapped option orders, while hidden states are extracted at the pre-answer decision state. We focus on strict-correct trials, where the model consistently selects the correct caption across both orders. Rather than treating arbitrary hidden-state variation as evidence of instability, we measure whether semantic-conflict candidates induce excess decision-state displacement relative to meaning-preserving controls. Across Qwen3VL, Gemma3, and InternVL3, semantic stress consistently produces positive selected-layer excess displacement over lexical controls despite correct forced-choice behavior, while comparisons against random negatives are model-dependent. We interpret this as a scoped decision-state stress-sensitivity signal rather than evidence of downstream failure or hallucination. Our results suggest that forced-choice correctness alone is not a sufficient certificate of invariant internal decision geometry.

AI.tldr: 本文提出S³E框架，通过结构化语义压力测试，揭示多模态语言模型在行为正确时内部决策状态仍可能受语义压力影响而发生不稳定偏移。
AI.motivation: 现有评估仅关注外部行为正确性，无法反映模型内部决策状态在语义压力下的稳定性；需填补行为表现与内在机制之间的分析鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出S³E（Structured Semantic Stress Evaluation）框架，采用正向锚定的A/B强制选择范式，对比图像支持的正确caption与语义压力干扰项，在原始和调换选项顺序下提取预回答阶段隐藏状态，并量化语义冲突候选引发的决策态偏移（相对于语义保持对照）。
AI.result: 在Qwen3VL、Gemma3和InternVL3上发现：语义压力始终导致选定层隐藏状态产生显著正向超额偏移（相比词汇控制组），而相对于随机负例的结果则因模型而异。
AI.conclusion: 强制选择行为正确性不足以保证内部决策几何的不变性；观察到的隐藏态偏移是一种局部化的决策态压力敏感信号，而非下游失败或幻觉的直接证据。

title: SegmentAnyTreeV2: Scaling Transformer-Based Tree Instance Segmentation Across Sensors, Platforms, and Forests
summary: We present SegmentAnyTreeV2, a sensor- and platform-agnostic framework for semantic and instance segmentation of forest point clouds. The model combines a serialization-based Point Transformer v3 backbone with a lightweight semantic head and a tree-focused cross-attention mask decoder. Semantic predictions restrict instance decoding to tree-class voxels, while instance-aware query initialization, one-to-many seed supervision, and asymmetric mask scoring improve separation in dense and structurally complex stands. We further introduce FOR-instance v3, an expanded benchmark comprising 427 scenes and 26,496 annotated trees across diverse biomes, forest structures, and LiDAR platforms. On the FOR-instanceV2 test split, SegmentAnyTreeV2 achieves 90.5% precision, 80.2% recall, 85.0% F1, 90.7% coverage, and 87.6% semantic mIoU, outperforming previous learning-based methods in both instance detection and mask completeness. Zero-shot evaluation on independent sites further demonstrates strong cross-domain generalization.

AI.tldr: SegmentAnyTreeV2是一种通用森林点云语义与实例分割框架，结合Point Transformer v3与树结构优化的解码器，在FOR-instance v3基准上显著提升精度与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂森林结构和跨平台点云中难以兼顾实例分割精度与泛化性，亟需一种传感器与平台无关、鲁棒性强的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出SegmentAnyTreeV2框架：采用序列化Point Transformer v3作为主干网络；设计轻量语义头与面向树木的交叉注意力掩码解码器；引入语义约束实例解码、实例感知查询初始化、一对多种子监督及非对称掩码评分机制。同时构建大规模新基准FOR-instance v3（427场景、26,496棵树）。
AI.result: 在FOR-instanceV2测试集上达到90.5%精度、80.2%召回率、85.0% F1、90.7%覆盖率和87.6%语义mIoU；零样本跨域评估验证了强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SegmentAnyTreeV2在精度、完整性与跨域适应性方面均优于先前学习型方法，为森林点云自动化分析提供了高效、通用的新范式。

title: Can we stabilize an inverted pendulum with feedback from a time-of-flight camera?
summary: Time-of-flight cameras are popular in robotics for providing direct depth information while being compact, inexpensive, and robust to lighting conditions, but their low spatial resolution and depth noise are widely believed to preclude precise feedback control. In this paper, we show that an inexpensive, low-resolution time-of-flight camera provides sufficient feedback to reliably and precisely balance an inverted pendulum on a cart--a canonical benchmark for fast, unstable dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了低成本、低分辨率的飞行时间（ToF）相机足以实现倒立摆系统的高精度平衡控制，挑战了其因分辨率和噪声限制而无法用于精确反馈控制的传统认知。
AI.motivation: 飞行时间相机虽在机器人领域广泛应用，但其低空间分辨率和深度噪声被认为难以支持精确反馈控制，本文旨在验证其在高动态不稳定系统中的实际控制潜力。
AI.method: 利用低成本、低分辨率的飞行时间相机获取深度信息，并将其作为反馈信号应用于倒立摆-小车系统的实时闭环控制中。
AI.result: 成功实现了倒立摆系统在快速、不稳定动力学下的可靠且精确的平衡控制。
AI.conclusion: 低分辨率ToF相机在特定控制任务中可提供足够精度的反馈，其应用潜力被低估，为低成本感知驱动控制提供了新思路。

title: Extending Ontologies: From Dense Embeddings to Hybrid Quantum-Fuzzy Systems
summary: LLMs have revolutionized knowledge representation and retrieval, but lack the explicit modeling that knowledge ontologies possess. This paper surveys the ways that ontologies and knowledge graphs have been integrated with dense embedding algorithms. All hitherto attempts involve a trade-off between probabilistic and crisp inference. This paper proposes a novel frontier for devising knowledge representation systems that can simultaneously accommodate probabilistic and crisp inference in the same representation. To this effect, the paper proposes neuro-quantum-fuzzy systems as knowledge representation systems that accommodate both classical and contextual inference implemented through quantum-neural networks (QNN).

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了将本体和知识图谱与稠密嵌入算法结合的方法，并提出了一种新型神经-量子-模糊系统，以支持概率推理和精确推理的统一表示。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）虽在知识表示和检索方面取得突破，但缺乏本体所具有的显式建模能力；而现有本体与嵌入结合方法均面临概率推理与精确推理之间的权衡问题。
AI.method: 提出神经-量子-模糊系统（neuro-quantum-fuzzy systems），利用量子-神经网络（QNN）实现经典推理（crisp inference）与上下文推理（contextual inference）的统一建模。
AI.result: 构建了一类新型知识表示系统，能够在同一表示中同时支持概率推理和精确推理，拓展了知识表示的理论前沿。
AI.conclusion: 神经-量子-模糊系统为融合本体逻辑严谨性与嵌入统计灵活性提供了新范式，标志着知识表示系统向多模态推理能力迈出关键一步。

title: scCBGM: Interpretable Single-Cell Counterfactual Editing
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026; code at https://github.com/almaan/scCBGM
summary: Understanding cellular phenotypes and how they respond to perturbations is critical for disease biology and therapeutic design. Single-cell RNA sequencing enables characterization at cellular resolution, yet the combinatorial space of conditions makes exhaustive experimental mapping infeasible. We introduce single-cell Concept Bottleneck Generative Models (scCBGM), a framework for interpretable and precise counterfactual editing of individual cells. scCBGM adapts concept bottleneck architectures for single-cell data through decoder skip connections and a cross-covariance penalty that promotes disentanglement without dimensional constraints. We extend the framework to flow matching models, enabling concept-guided editing in both encoding-decoding and generation regimes. To enable rigorous evaluation, we develop a synthetic benchmark with ground-truth counterfactuals. Across multiple real datasets, scCBGM demonstrates superior performance in combinatorial generalization and counterfactual prediction, supported by cell-level validation on synthetic data and population-level benchmarks on real datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出scCBGM框架，用于单细胞数据的可解释且精确的反事实编辑，通过解码器跳连和交叉协方差惩罚实现概念瓶颈建模与解耦，并扩展至流匹配模型，显著提升组合泛化与反事实预测性能。
AI.motivation: 单细胞RNA测序虽能提供细胞分辨率表征，但实验条件组合空间巨大，难以穷举；亟需可解释、精准的单细胞反事实编辑方法以支持疾病机制研究与药物设计。
AI.method: 提出单细胞概念瓶颈生成模型（scCBGM），引入解码器跳连结构和交叉协方差惩罚项以促进无维数约束的概念解耦；进一步扩展至流匹配模型，支持编码-解码与生成两种范式下的概念引导编辑；构建含真实反事实标签的合成基准用于严格评估。
AI.result: 在多个真实单细胞数据集上，scCBGM在组合泛化与反事实预测任务中性能优于现有方法；合成数据上的细胞级验证与真实数据的群体级基准测试均证实其有效性。
AI.conclusion: scCBGM为单细胞层面的可解释扰动建模提供了新范式，兼具理论严谨性与实际适用性，推动了计算生物学中因果推断与干预预测的发展。

title: Test-Time Scaling in Multimodal Foundation Models: A Comprehensive Survey of Generation and Reasoning
summary: Test-time Scaling (TTS) has emerged as a pivotal research direction for enhancing model performance by dynamically allocating computational resources during inference. Recent advancements have adapted this paradigm to Multimodal Foundation Models (MFMs), unlocking their potential in multimodal reasoning and generation. Despite rapid progress, the field lacks a systematic survey and unified theoretical framework to delineate the developmental landscape of multimodal TTS. To bridge this gap, we present the first comprehensive review of TTS research for MFMs, proposing a unified taxonomic framework that categorizes existing methodologies into three distinct strategies: sampling-based, feedback-based, and search-based approaches. We further summarize representative applications and benchmarks commonly utilized to evaluate multimodal TTS capabilities in generation and reasoning tasks. Finally, this survey discusses open challenges and outlines future research directions, providing a systematic roadmap for subsequent studies in this rapidly evolving field.

AI.tldr: 本文是对多模态基础模型（MFMs）测试时缩放（TTS）研究的首次全面综述，提出了统一的分类框架，涵盖基于采样、反馈和搜索的三类方法，并总结了典型应用、评测基准，以及未来挑战与方向。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态TTS领域缺乏系统性综述和统一理论框架，亟需梳理发展脉络、厘清方法分类并指导后续研究。
AI.method: 提出一个统一的分类框架，将多模态TTS方法划分为采样式、反馈式和搜索式三类；系统归纳代表性应用与评测基准；分析开放挑战并展望未来方向。
AI.result: 构建了首个面向MFMs的TTS分类体系；梳理了主流方法、任务场景与评估标准；明确了当前局限与潜在突破点。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为多模态TTS研究提供了系统性知识图谱与理论支撑，有望推动该方向的规范化与深入发展。

title: RPO-PDT: Demonstrating Role-Play-Based Knowledge Adaptation for Student Support Dialogue (Demonstration System)
summary: We present RPO-PDT: a retrieval-grounded, role-play-based dialogue system for adaptive student support in higher education. RPO-PDT is: (1) able to provide institution-specific Personal Development Tutor (PDT) guidance using structured knowledge sources; (2) constrained by explicit persona, boundary, confidentiality, and safety policies; and (3) designed around a reverse-roleplay loop where unresolved interactions are replayed from the student perspective, enabling alternative tutor strategies to be generated and stored as reusable strategy memory. RPO-PDT supports both text-based and Furhat-based embodied interaction for demonstrating grounded, safe, and adaptive student-support dialogue.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RPO-PDT，一种基于检索与角色扮演的对话系统，用于高等教育中自适应的学生支持，具备机构定制化指导、严格政策约束及反向角色扮演循环机制。
AI.motivation: 解决高等教育中个性化学生支持不足的问题，提升Personal Development Tutor（PDT）服务的可扩展性、安全性与适应性。
AI.method: 构建基于检索的、角色扮演驱动的对话系统RPO-PDT，整合结构化知识源、显式角色与安全边界约束，并引入反向角色扮演循环以生成并记忆有效辅导策略。
AI.result: 实现了支持文本与Furhat机器人两种模态的、可落地的、安全可控且能持续优化的PDT对话系统原型。
AI.conclusion: RPO-PDT为高校智能辅导系统提供了兼顾实用性、安全性与自适应性的新范式，验证了反向角色扮演在教育对话系统中的有效性。

title: ConMem: Structured Memory-Guided Adaptation in Training-Free Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Recent advances have improved the adaptive capabilities of LLM-based multi-agent systems (MAS) through memory-, skill-, and learning-based approaches, yet these approaches remain challenged by noisy trajectories, insufficient modeling of memory-skill relations, and reliance on additional training or high-quality supervision. To address these limitations, we propose ConMem, a relation-aware and training-free framework that enables efficient multi-agent adaptation through cross-experience coordination. Specifically, ConMem distills historical interaction trajectories into structured memory cards to capture reusable strategies and cues, organizing them into a relation-aware memory graph. At runtime, ConMem retrieves cards according to task needs and coordinates them through the card graph to resolve strategy conflicts and recover their dependencies. Combined, these modules yield structured and relation-aware guidance, enabling robust, lightweight adaptation in multi-agent systems without additional training. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks and mainstream MAS architectures show consistent gains over existing memory architectures, with improved inference-time efficiency through pruning more than 50% of expanded candidates and reducing planning overhead by over 80%. Our codes are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ConMemCode

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConMem，一种无需训练、关系感知的多智能体系统（MAS）自适应框架，通过结构化记忆卡与记忆图实现跨经验协调，显著提升推理效率并减少规划开销。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的多智能体系统在自适应能力上仍面临轨迹噪声、记忆-技能关系建模不足、依赖额外训练或高质量监督等挑战。
AI.method: ConMem将历史交互轨迹提炼为结构化记忆卡，并构建关系感知的记忆图；运行时按任务需求检索卡片，并通过图结构协调以解决策略冲突、恢复依赖关系。
AI.result: 在多个基准和主流MAS架构上显著优于现有记忆架构，推理阶段剪枝超50%候选节点，规划开销降低80%以上。
AI.conclusion: ConMem实现了无需训练、轻量鲁棒的多智能体自适应，为高效、可扩展的MAS提供了新范式。

title: Contrast encodes inductive bias: separating slow noise from dynamics in predictive representation learning
summary: Self-supervised methods that learn representations and predict dynamics fully in the latent space, such as JEPA, have been shown to confuse slowly varying noise with the dynamical signals they aim to capture. Specifically, when noise features remain approximately constant within each trajectory, contrastive predictive objectives preferentially encode these features instead of the true latent variables governing the system. The learned representation then becomes dominated by trajectory-specific noise, so downstream performance degrades with noise strength and does not improve even as the number and duration of training trajectories increase. We argue that this failure is a property of the objective itself, shared by a long line of contrastive predictive objectives that sample negatives across trajectories. To illustrate this generality, we study the failure mode and its remedy in two settings: a standard SimCLR-style JEPA on a synthetic moving-dot dataset, and DySIB, a recently introduced method designed for extracting physically interpretable representations of dynamics, on movies of a rigid-body pendulum. When negatives are instead sampled within a single trajectory, the slow noise can no longer distinguish frames within that trajectory, removing the predictive shortcut. Training one encoder simultaneously on many such trajectories then forces it to encode the variables relevant for the dynamics, with longer trajectories yielding better representations even for strong slow noise. Our results point toward principles for designing contrastive predictive objectives in dynamical representation learning, especially for physical systems with noisy experimental observations.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，现有的自监督动态表征学习方法（如JEPA）在存在慢变噪声时，会错误地将噪声特征编码为动态信号，导致表征退化；作者提出通过在单条轨迹内采样负样本可消除该捷径，从而提升对真实动力学变量的编码能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于跨轨迹对比预测的目标函数易受慢变噪声干扰，将噪声误认为动力学信号，导致表征不可靠，尤其在物理系统实验数据中问题突出。
AI.method: 提出在单条轨迹内采样负样本的对比预测策略，替代传统跨轨迹采样方式，并在合成移动点数据集（JEPA）和刚体摆实验视频（DySIB）上验证该策略的有效性。
AI.result: 新策略显著缓解了慢变噪声导致的表征混淆问题，使编码更聚焦于真实动力学变量；表征质量随轨迹长度增加而提升，且对强噪声鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 对比预测目标的设计需考虑噪声结构，轨迹内负采样是一种普适、有效的改进原则，尤其适用于含实验噪声的物理系统动态表征学习。

title: TimpaTeks: Automatic In-place Text Sequence Modification via Diffusion Language Model Steering
summary: We extend activation steering to diffusion language models (DLMs) and study a novel problem that arose due to the inference mechanism of DLMs: Modifying a text in-place to manifest a different concept. We propose TimpaTeks, an automatic in-place text modification mechanism using DLMs. Experiments on IMDB movie reviews (sentiment) and a synthetic Cats and Dogs Dataset (arbitrary, more unconventional concept steering) show that TimpaTeks provides a feasible novel mechanism to steer diffusion language model outputs in-place. TimpaTeks enables in-place modification while simultaneously lowers sentence perplexity and retaining the original sentence structre without the need of instruction tuned models. TimpaTeks is also computationally cheaper than prompt-based DLM steering, as it performs denoising in-place rather than constructing an additional prompt-conditioned output sequence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TimpaTeks方法，将激活引导技术扩展至扩散语言模型（DLMs），实现对文本的原位概念修改（如情感翻转），在保持句法结构、降低困惑度的同时，比基于提示的方法计算更高效。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型（DLMs）的推理机制催生了新问题：如何对已有文本进行原位修改以体现不同概念；现有方法依赖指令微调或额外提示，效率低且难以保持原始结构。
AI.method: 提出TimpaTeks——一种基于DLM的自动原位文本修改机制，通过在隐空间中进行激活引导式去噪，直接修改原始文本表示，无需构造新提示或依赖指令调优模型。
AI.result: 在IMDB（情感）和合成Cats & Dogs数据集（非常规概念）上验证有效；能成功原位修改文本、降低句子困惑度、保持句法结构，且计算开销低于提示式DLM引导方法。
AI.conclusion: TimpaTeks为DLM提供了一种新颖、高效、结构保持的原位概念引导机制，拓展了激活引导在生成模型中的适用边界。

title: Light-WAM: Efficient World Action Models with State-Fusion Action Decoding
summary: World Action Models (WAMs) extend robot policy learning by incorporating future prediction as an additional training objective, encouraging the policy to encode task-relevant temporal structure in its representations. Current WAMs often rely on large-scale generative architectures that incur high training costs and inference latency, making them difficult to deploy as efficient closed-loop policies. We propose Light-WAM, a lightweight World Action Model for efficient robot manipulation. Specifically, it is built with a compact video backbone and performs future-video supervision in a downsampled latent space, reducing the cost of video co-training while retaining its benefits for representation learning. For action prediction, Light-WAM introduces the StateFusionActionExpert, which reads adapted states from multiple backbone layers, fuses them through learned-query pooling, and directly predicts action chunks in a single forward pass. This design provides an efficient interface between video backbone representations and robot actions, avoiding the need for heavy generative action experts. Experiments demonstrate that Light-WAM maintains strong performance on LIBERO and achieves usable multi-task performance on RoboTwin 2.0, while using only 0.44B trainable parameters. It also achieves 72.03ms inference latency with 4.1GiB peak GPU memory and improved training throughput.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Light-WAM，一种轻量级世界动作模型，通过紧凑视频骨干网络、降采样潜在空间的未来视频监督以及StateFusionActionExpert模块，显著降低计算开销与推理延迟，同时在LIBERO和RoboTwin 2.0上保持强性能。
AI.motivation: 现有世界动作模型（WAMs）依赖大规模生成式架构，训练成本高、推理延迟大，难以部署为高效闭环策略。
AI.method: Light-WAM采用紧凑视频骨干网络，在降采样潜在空间中进行未来视频监督；引入StateFusionActionExpert模块，融合多层状态特征并直接预测动作块，避免重型生成式动作专家。
AI.result: Light-WAM在LIBERO和RoboTwin 2.0上保持强性能，仅含0.44B可训练参数，推理延迟72.03ms，峰值GPU显存4.1GiB，训练吞吐量提升。
AI.conclusion: Light-WAM在显著降低计算资源消耗的同时，实现了高效、实用的多任务机器人操作策略学习，为WAM的实际部署提供了可行路径。

title: Back to the Familiar Future: Failure Recovery for VLA Policies via Pre-Imagined Milestone Selection
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) policies can deviate from nominal trajectories during manipulation, even when tasks remain physically feasible. Recovering from these deviations is challenging, as they push the policy into unfamiliar state spaces where direct re-planning frequently destabilizes action sequences. We propose Back to the Familiar Future (B2FF), a recovery framework for foresight-driven VLAs that leverages future visual conditioning as a recovery interface. Before execution, the VLA generates a milestone bank of familiar future states conditioned on the clean initial observation. At recovery time, a recoverability-aware selector selects a recovery milestone from this bank and enforces it as a fixed visual goal. This enables the VLA to robustly map off-trajectory observations back to a familiar future. On failure-injected LIBERO, under controlled recovery timing aligned with the injected failure, B2FF increases the average success rate of a baseline VLA from 56.3% to 74.0%, demonstrating that pre-imagined milestones can guide recovery without fine-tuning the low-level action generator.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Back to the Familiar Future（B2FF）框架，利用预生成的熟悉未来视觉状态作为恢复目标，提升视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略在操作偏离时的鲁棒恢复能力，无需微调底层动作生成器。
AI.motivation: VLA策略在执行中易偏离标称轨迹，而直接重规划常导致动作序列不稳定；现有方法缺乏对偏离后陌生状态空间的有效恢复机制。
AI.method: B2FF在执行前基于初始观测生成一组‘熟悉未来状态’（milestone bank），恢复时由可恢复性感知的选择器从中选取一个作为固定视觉目标，引导策略将偏离观测映射回熟悉未来。
AI.result: 在注入故障的LIBERO基准上，B2FF将基线VLA平均成功率从56.3%提升至74.0%，验证了预设里程碑的有效性与免微调优势。
AI.conclusion: 未来视觉条件化可作为有效的恢复接口，B2FF通过解耦恢复目标选择与动作生成，显著提升VLA策略的鲁棒性与泛化性。

title: Artificial Intelligence for Mathematical Reasoning: An Integrated Survey of Language Models, Neuro-symbolic Systems, and Verified Discovery
summary: Mathematical reasoning has long served as a stringent test of machine intelligence; over the past decade, it has moved from a niche problem within NLP to one of the most consequential AI frontiers. This survey provides a unified account of the field's evolution, from early rule-based math word problem (MWP) solvers and template-driven geometry systems, through neural expression generation and LLM prompting, to contemporary reasoning models, multi-agent systems, neuro-symbolic theorem provers, and verified discovery workflows. We organize the landscape along four axes: (i) informal reasoning over text and diagrams, spanning MWP solving, multimodal geometry, and VLMs; (ii) formal reasoning in proof assistants, including autoformalization, tactic prediction, compiler-guided repair, and proof search; (iii) mathematical discovery, where systems propose constructions, improve bounds, or assist attacks on open problems; and (iv) the inference and training-time techniques, including CoT prompting, tool use, process reward models, and RLVR, that increasingly connect generation with verification. We catalog major benchmarks across grade-school arithmetic, competition mathematics, geometry, formal proving, multimodal and multilingual reasoning, and expert evaluation, and we examine benchmark saturation, contamination, reporting mismatches, and the distinction between pass@1, majority voting, and verifier-assisted pass@$k$. We critically assess failure modes: brittleness under perturbation, reward hacking, multimodal grounding failures, fragile formalization, and the energy cost of reasoning-scale inference. Drawing on recent perspectives from working mathematicians, we identify future directions centered on verified-discovery workflows, reasoning efficiency, and infrastructure to make AI-assisted formalization broadly usable. Companion materials: https://github.com/Starscream-11813/awesome-AI4Math.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了AI在数学推理领域的十年发展，涵盖从早期规则系统到当前大模型、多智能体、神经符号定理证明及验证式发现工作流的演进，并按非形式推理、形式化证明、数学发现与推理技术四大维度系统梳理，同时分析基准测试问题与失败模式，提出未来应聚焦验证式发现、推理效率与形式化基础设施。
AI.motivation: 数学推理是检验机器智能的严格标准，近年来成为AI关键前沿；亟需对快速发展的AI4Math领域进行系统性、统一性梳理，以厘清技术脉络、识别挑战并指引未来方向。
AI.method: 采用分类学方法，将AI数学推理研究划分为四个核心轴线（非形式推理、形式推理、数学发现、推理与训练技术），并综合分析主流基准、评估缺陷、典型失败模式及数学家实践反馈。
AI.result: 构建了覆盖全栈AI数学推理的研究图谱，揭示了基准饱和、数据污染、评估失配等现实问题，识别出扰动脆弱性、奖励欺骗、多模态接地失败等关键失败模式，并归纳出验证式发现、推理效率与可用基础设施三大未来方向。
AI.conclusion: AI数学推理已进入多范式融合新阶段，但距离真正可靠、高效、可信赖的数学智能仍有显著差距；必须推动生成与验证深度耦合、降低形式化门槛，并建立面向数学家的实用工具链。

title: A Framework for Evaluating and Benchmarking Concept Drift Detection Methods
summary: Data stream mining is fundamentally challenged by concept drift, where distributional changes can degrade model performance. Despite the proliferation of drift detection methods, progress in the field is hindered by inconsistent evaluation practices: studies rely on oversimplified synthetic data generators, adopt incompatible metrics, and lack transparency in hyperparameter selection, making fair comparisons difficult. We address this gap with a novel benchmarking framework comprising three contributions: (1) a drift simulation method that injects controlled distributional changes into real-world datasets via Monte Carlo trials, enabling supervised evaluation while preserving real-world data complexity; (2) an evaluation protocol for drift detection with timing-aware criteria, including the derivation of new metrics (e.g., F1 detection score, normalized detection time) that are comparable across streams; and (3) we advocate for a leave-one-dataset-out hyperparameter optimization protocol for drift detection methods that promotes configuration robustness across heterogeneous stream dynamics. We benchmark 14 widely used drift detection methods on 7 realworld datasets across 4 drift types (class prior, label swap, feature permutation, feature filtering), each under both abrupt and gradual transitions. Our experimental results provide insights into the strengths and weaknesses of current drift detection approaches while establishing baseline performance metrics for future research in this area. All code and experiments are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向数据流概念漂移检测的新基准框架，包含可控漂移注入的真实数据模拟、时序感知的评估协议及跨数据集的超参优化策略，并在7个真实数据集上系统评测了14种主流方法。
AI.motivation: 现有概念漂移检测研究受限于合成数据过于简单、评估指标不统一、超参数选择不透明，导致方法间难以公平比较。
AI.method: 提出三方面方法：(1) 基于蒙特卡洛试验将受控分布变化注入真实数据集；(2) 设计时间感知的评估协议与新指标（如F1检测分、归一化检测时间）；(3) 采用留一数据集出的超参数优化协议以提升泛化鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在7个真实数据集、4类漂移（类别先验、标签交换、特征置换、特征过滤）及突变/渐变两种模式下，系统评测了14种主流漂移检测方法，揭示了各方法的优劣并建立了可复现的基线性能。
AI.conclusion: 该基准框架提升了概念漂移检测研究的可比性、透明性与实用性，为未来工作提供了标准化评估基础和开源资源支持。

title: AsyncLane: Decoupling Refinement from Advancement in Diffusion Language Model Decoding
summary: Block-wise semi-autoregressive decoding is the standard inference paradigm for diffusion large language models (DLMs), but it imposes a strict dependency between blocks: the next block cannot begin until the current block is fully decoded or its denoising budget is exhausted. We observe that once a block exposes a reliable delimiter boundary or stable semantic prefix, continuation generation need not wait for every residual token to be resolved. We propose AsyncLane, a training-free decoding scheduler that decouples refinement from advancement. AsyncLane forks a generate lane at observed delimiter boundaries into a refine lane and a continuation generate lane: the prefix remains editable, while the continuation advances before prefix refinement finishes. The resulting lane tree records decoding dependencies and output order, while execution proceeds over the active lane set. To make this asynchronous schedule efficient under bidirectional attention, AsyncLane combines shared-prefix lane batching, lookahead draft reuse, cascading termination, and compact cache refresh with refresh-logit reuse, preventing model-call cost from scaling directly with the number of lanes. AsyncLane is a drop-in replacement for block-wise DLM samplers and requires no retraining. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and code generation show that AsyncLane consistently improves throughput while maintaining competitive quality. Across LLaDA and Dream backbones, AsyncLane achieves the highest TPS in all evaluated benchmark-length settings; relative to the fastest competing baseline, it reaches peak speedups of 2.95x on LLaDA and 3.04x on Dream, with especially large gains under longer generation budgets.

AI.tldr: AsyncLane是一种无需训练的异步解码调度器，用于扩散大语言模型（DLMs），通过在可靠分隔符处分叉生成与精炼路径，解耦精炼与推进过程，在不牺牲质量的前提下显著提升吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 现有块式半自回归解码强制块间严格依赖，导致等待开销大；而实际中，一旦出现稳定语义前缀或可靠分隔符，后续生成无需等待整个块完全去噪。
AI.method: 提出AsyncLane：在检测到分隔符边界时动态分叉出refine lane和continuation generate lane，构建lane树记录依赖与输出顺序；结合共享前缀批处理、前瞻草稿复用、级联终止、紧凑缓存刷新与刷新logit复用，以高效支持双向注意力。
AI.result: 在数学推理与代码生成任务上，AsyncLane作为即插即用解码器，在LLaDA和Dream骨干模型上均取得最高TPS；相比最快基线，峰值加速达2.95x（LLaDA）和3.04x（Dream），长生成预算下增益更显著。
AI.conclusion: AsyncLane无需重训练即可大幅提升DLM推理吞吐量，验证了异步、细粒度解码调度在扩散语言模型中的有效性与实用性。

title: TIDE: Task-Isolated Diffusion for Unified Video Editing and Generation
summary: Recent advances in Diffusion Transformers have driven rapid progress in video generation and editing, yet these capabilities are still handled by separate, task-specific models. Building a unified framework that supports diverse video tasks remains an open challenge: existing unified attempts either require dedicated auxiliary encoders or lack explicit mechanisms to distinguish heterogeneous conditioning tokens, struggling when the number and type of visual conditions vary across tasks. We propose TIDE, a unified framework that integrates instruction-based editing, reference-guided editing, and multi-reference generation. At its core, we introduce per-token task embeddings that assign each input token a task-specific identifier, enabling the model to explicitly disambiguate target, source, and reference tokens. To simultaneously capture high-level semantic understanding and fine-grained structural fidelity, we design a dual-path conditioning scheme that couples a vision-language model with a VAE latent path for complementary signals. We further devise a multi-task progressive training strategy that incrementally introduces tasks of increasing complexity, effectively harmonizing diverse objectives and enabling smooth generalization across heterogeneous task distributions. Extensive experiments on multiple video editing and generation benchmarks demonstrate that TIDE achieves state-of-the-art performance across all evaluated tasks. Our project page is available at https://LittleWork123.github.io/tide.

AI.tldr: TIDE是一个统一的视频生成与编辑框架，通过任务嵌入、双路径条件机制和渐进式多任务训练，支持指令编辑、参考编辑和多参考生成等多样化任务，并在多个基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成与编辑模型多为任务专用，缺乏能灵活处理不同数量和类型视觉条件的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出TIDE框架，包括：1）每词元任务嵌入以区分目标/源/参考token；2）双路径条件机制（VLM+VAE潜空间）兼顾语义与结构；3）多任务渐进式训练策略。
AI.result: 在多个视频编辑与生成基准上均达到当前最优（SOTA）性能。
AI.conclusion: TIDE成功构建了一个灵活、统一且高性能的视频生成与编辑框架，解决了异构条件建模与多任务协同优化的关键挑战。

title: VGP-Nav: Metric-Aware Visual Geometric Perception for Robot Navigation
summary: Reliable robotic navigation necessitates the seamless integration of accurate global localization and dense, metric-consistent obstacle perception. A common strategy to achieve these capabilities involves integrating diverse sensing modalities: cameras offer rich visual features for localization, while active sensors like LiDAR provide direct metric measurements. However, such multi-sensor configurations necessitate complex spatial-temporal calibration and increase deployment overhead. Although vision-only approaches offer a low-cost and scalable alternative, existing monocular visual systems typically struggle to simultaneously achieve efficient, globally consistent localization and dense, metric-consistent geometric perception. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{VGP-Nav}, a unified framework for \textit{Metric-Aware Visual Geometric Perception} that relies solely on monocular RGB input to jointly support metric localization and obstacle perception. Our key insight is to anchor localization-grounded visual geometry to physically meaningful scale constraints derived from ground-plane geometry, thereby providing a reliable metric reference for monocular perception. VGP-Nav resolves monocular scale ambiguity online and produces localization-grounded, metric obstacle representations that are directly applicable to downstream planning. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong generalization across diverse environments and successful deployment on real mobile robots, highlighting the practicality of our approach for scalable, low-cost, and safe autonomous navigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VGP-Nav框架，仅用单目RGB图像实现全局一致的度量定位与稠密障碍物感知，通过地面几何引入物理尺度约束解决单目尺度模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉导航方法难以同时兼顾高效全局定位与稠密、度量一致的几何感知；多传感器方案复杂且部署成本高，而纯视觉方案存在尺度模糊和度量不一致问题。
AI.method: 提出VGP-Nav统一框架，基于单目RGB输入，利用地面平面几何提取物理尺度约束，在线解析单目尺度歧义，生成定位锚定、具备真实尺度的障碍物表征。
AI.result: 在多种环境中展现出强泛化能力，并成功部署于真实移动机器人，验证了其在低成本、可扩展、安全自主导航中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: VGP-Nav证明仅靠单目视觉即可实现可靠、度量一致的定位与感知，为简化系统架构、降低部署门槛提供了新路径。

title: Structure-Conditioned Actor-Critic Branches for Quality-Diversity Reinforcement Learning
summary: Quality-diversity reinforcement learning (QD-RL) aims to construct policy repertoires that contain both high-performing and behaviorally diverse policies. Existing QD-RL methods mainly diversify policy instances after rollout evaluation or use learned value information to improve policy quality and behavior targeting, while the learning branches that generate candidate policies remain less explored. This paper proposes SV-QD-RL, a structure-value coupled framework that represents each candidate as a structure-conditioned actor-critic branch. Each branch contains an actor, a structural mask, a branch-specific critic, a replay state, and evaluation attributes including behavior, return, sparsity, and value profile. The structural mask defines the actor subspace in which the branch learns, while the branch-specific critic and replay state shape its value-learning trajectory. A branch-aware QD archive then evaluates and retains branches according to behavioral quality, structural footprint, and value-profile information. Experiments on MuJoCo continuous-control tasks show that SV-QD-RL constructs policy repertoires with strong archive quality and behaviorally useful diversity. Ablation and diagnostic analyses further indicate that structural conditioning, critic differentiation, and memory-consistent refinement make complementary contributions to behavioral specialization. Schedule-aware repertoire evaluation shows that the learned archive provides selectable policy alternatives under changing behavior-level requirements. These results suggest that coupling actor structure with branch-specific value learning is an effective mechanism for generating diverse QD-RL policy repertoires.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SV-QD-RL框架，通过结构-值耦合机制，在每个候选策略分支中引入结构化掩码、分支专属评论家和回放缓冲区，以协同提升策略的质量与行为多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有QD-RL方法多在 rollout 后进行多样性评估或依赖价值信息指导行为目标，但生成候选策略的学习分支设计尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 提出SV-QD-RL：每个候选策略为一个结构条件化的actor-critic分支，含actor、结构掩码、分支专属critic、回放状态及多维评估属性（行为、回报、稀疏性、值分布）；采用分支感知的QD档案进行评估与存档。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo连续控制任务上，SV-QD-RL构建的策略库具有更高档案质量与行为实用性多样性；消融分析表明结构条件化、critic差异化与记忆一致优化具有互补作用；调度感知评估验证其可支持动态行为需求下的策略选择。
AI.conclusion: 将actor结构与分支专属价值学习耦合，是生成高质量、多样化QD-RL策略库的有效机制。

title: Byzantine Cheap Talk: Adversarial Resilience and Topology Effects in LLM Coordination Games
comment: Accepted at NETYS 2026 (The International Conference on Networked Systems)
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems increasingly rely on communication protocols for coordination, yet their robustness under adversarial and structural constraints remains poorly understood. Building on prior work showing that cheap-talk channels enable cooperation in LLM coordination games, we investigate two vulnerability classes in a 4-player Stag Hunt across six model families and 720 trials. First, when Byzantine agents signal cooperation but defect, non-Byzantine agents detect the betrayal within one round yet fail to adapt collectively: a substantial fraction continue cooperating despite repeated exploitation, unable to recover coordination due to the game's unanimity payoff structure. Second, explicitly restricting communication topology collapses cooperation, while applying identical restrictions silently preserves near-perfect cooperation. This establishes that coordination failure stems from agents' meta-reasoning about hidden information, not information loss itself. We identify two stable behavioral archetypes that replicate across all model cohorts: Defection-Prone models that switch permanently after betrayal, and Cooperation-Persistent models that continue cooperating at significant individual cost. These findings reveal concrete security vulnerabilities: communication channels can be exploited as adversarial injection vectors, and disclosing network topology to agents can degrade coordination even without any adversary present.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多智能体大语言模型（LLM）系统在协作博弈（如四人Stag Hunt）中通信协议的鲁棒性，发现两类关键脆弱性：拜占庭式背叛导致集体适应失败，以及显式拓扑披露引发协调崩溃；揭示出LLM依赖元推理而非信息本身进行协调，并识别出两类稳定行为范式（Defection-Prone与Cooperation-Persistent），凸显通信信道作为对抗注入向量的安全风险。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统日益依赖通信协议协调，但其在对抗性与结构约束下的鲁棒性尚不明确，亟需系统性安全评估。
AI.method: 在4人Stag Hunt博弈中，对6个LLM家族开展720次实验，分别引入拜占庭代理（虚假合作后背叛）和通信拓扑限制（显式vs隐式），分析代理响应模式与协调动态。
AI.result: 1）非拜占庭代理能单轮检测背叛但无法集体恢复协调；2）显式拓扑限制导致合作崩溃，隐式限制则维持高合作率；3）所有模型均呈现两种稳定行为类型：背叛后永久切换（Defection-Prone）或持续合作承受个体代价（Cooperation-Persistent）。
AI.conclusion: LLM多智能体协调失败源于对隐藏信息的元推理偏差，而非信息缺失本身；通信信道可被用作对抗注入载体，且仅披露网络拓扑即足以破坏协调，构成实质性安全漏洞。

title: Hacking Generative Perplexity: Why Unconditional Text Evaluation Needs Distributional Metrics
comment: Accepted to the Workshop on Structured Probabilistic Inference & Generative Modeling (SPIGM) at ICML 2026
summary: Diffusion and continuous flow-based language models have emerged as the leading non-autoregressive alternatives to language modeling. Progress in both paradigms is overwhelmingly tracked by generative perplexity (gen-PPL): the per-token negative log-likelihood of samples under a frozen autoregressive (AR) scorer such as gpt2-large, typically paired with an empirical-entropy guardrail to rule out low-entropy collapse. We argue that this metric is unsound. By construction, gen-PPL measures only predictability under the scoring AR, not grammaticality or semantic coherence -- and the set of predictable but still low-quality sequences is combinatorially large. To make this concrete, we construct a suite of zero-parameter, deliberately naive samplers that achieve state-of-the-art gen-PPL on LM1B and OpenWebText at non-degenerate entropy, surpassing recently published diffusion and continuous-flow models while producing text that is incoherent by construction. We recommend evaluation suites that directly quantify the distributional divergence between generated and reference text, and use such a suite to re-benchmark recent non-autoregressive models, recovering a more faithful picture of the current state of the art.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑了当前非自回归语言模型评估中广泛使用的生成困惑度（gen-PPL）指标的合理性，指出其仅反映对预训练自回归评分器的可预测性，而非真实语言质量；作者构造了若干无参朴素采样器，在保持非退化熵的同时取得SOTA gen-PPL但生成文本完全不可读，从而证明该指标失效；最后建议并采用分布差异直接度量的评估方案，重新评估现有模型，得出更可靠的性能排序。
AI.motivation: 现有非自回归语言模型（如扩散、连续流模型）主要依赖生成困惑度（gen-PPL）评估，但该指标仅衡量样本在冻结自回归评分器（如gpt2-large）下的可预测性，并不保证语法正确性或语义连贯性，存在严重偏差风险。
AI.method: 1）理论分析gen-PPL的内在缺陷；2）设计多个零参数、刻意朴素的采样器（如基于词频或n-gram的随机采样）；3）在LM1B和OpenWebText上验证这些采样器能在非退化熵下达到超越前沿扩散/流模型的gen-PPL；4）提出并应用基于分布差异（如KL散度、Mauve等）的替代评估协议，对近期非自回归模型进行重评测。
AI.result: 零参数朴素采样器在LM1B和OpenWebText上取得SOTA gen-PPL，显著超越最新扩散与连续流模型，但所生成文本明确不可读；采用分布差异评估后，原有模型性能排名发生显著变化，揭示gen-PPL严重高估低质量模型。
AI.conclusion: gen-PPL是一个有缺陷的评估指标，不应作为非自回归语言模型的主要评价标准；应转向直接衡量生成分布与真实文本分布之间差异的评估范式，以获得更可靠、更具语言学意义的性能评估结果。

title: Remember with Confidence: Uncertainty Quantification for Spatio-temporal Memory with Probabilistic Guarantees
summary: Long-horizon robot operation requires spatio-temporal memory to record the environment state and recall it for downstream reasoning. Scene graphs and retrieval-augmented systems ground VLM descriptions to persistent 3D entities with rich semantic descriptions. However, VLM captions are noisy and viewpoint-inconsistent, and existing systems treat them as an oracle with no mechanism to detect unreliable stored descriptions. We introduce object-level semantic uncertainty for multi-view VLM memory: a score that measures object-centric cross-view semantic scatter of captions and identifies semantically unresolved objects. Then, we include our uncertainty scores in an advanced spatial-semantic memory system, that we dub UQ-DAAAM. UQ-DAAAM uses this score to actively refine uncertain objects under a fixed query budget by selecting high-quality views and fusing the resulting multi-view captions into a single object description. We also derive probabilistic guarantees showing that higher-quality candidate views (as selected by our approach) are more likely to reduce uncertainty. Our experiments show that uncertainty quantification can make embodied 4D memory systems more reliable and more effective. In particular, on the OC-NaVQA benchmark, UQ-DAAAM achieves substantially larger uncertainty reduction and better spatio-temporal question answering performance than baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向长时程机器人操作的、具备对象级语义不确定性建模能力的空间-语义记忆系统UQ-DAAAM，通过量化多视角VLM描述在对象层面的语义离散度，主动选择高质量视角进行描述融合，从而提升4D具身记忆系统的可靠性与问答性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的场景图与检索增强系统将VLM生成的描述视为可靠‘神谕’，但实际VLM描述存在噪声和视角不一致问题，缺乏对存储描述不可靠性的检测机制。
AI.method: 提出对象级语义不确定性度量，用于刻画多视角VLM描述在单个物体上的语义离散程度；构建UQ-DAAAM系统，在固定查询预算下依据该不确定性分数主动选择高质视角、融合多视角描述；并推导出所选候选视角更可能降低不确定性的概率保证。
AI.result: 在OC-NaVQA基准上，UQ-DAAAM显著优于基线方法，实现了更大的不确定性降低幅度和更高的时空问答准确率。
AI.conclusion: 引入语义不确定性建模可有效提升具身4D记忆系统的鲁棒性与效能，为长时程机器人操作中的可信感知与推理提供了新范式。

title: VAIC: Vision-Guided Humanoid Agile Object Interaction Control via Decoupled Commands
summary: Humanoid robots hold immense potential for real-world assistance, yet agile interaction with objects in unstructured environments demands tightly coupled whole-body coordination. Despite recent advancements, current controllers face a critical deployment gap. They rely heavily on dense reference trajectories and perfect state observability, which inherently limits physical generalization. We present Vision Guided Agile Interaction Control (VAIC), a unified framework that bridges this gap by operating exclusively on onboard depth, historical proprioception, and a decoupled user command interface. VAIC employs a two-stage distillation paradigm. First, a privileged teacher policy masters diverse interaction skills using precise object kinematics and exact environmental states. Second, a deployable student policy distills these capabilities by replacing full body tracking with velocity targets across multiple axes and an interaction indicator for each frame. The student utilizes a recurrent object adaptation module to implicitly infer unobservable object dynamics from raw depth streams and proprioception. Evaluations and real-world deployments on the humanoid robot demonstrate that a single VAIC policy successfully executes highly diverse dynamic tasks. These tasks include box carrying, cart interaction, and skateboarding, consistently outperforming baselines and advancing autonomous humanoid deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VAIC的视觉引导敏捷交互控制框架，通过两阶段蒸馏范式，使机器人仅依赖深度图像、历史本体感知和解耦用户指令即可实现复杂动态任务，显著提升了在非结构化环境中的物理泛化能力与实际部署性能。
AI.motivation: 现有控制器依赖密集参考轨迹和完美状态可观测性，导致物理泛化能力差，难以在真实非结构化环境中部署。
AI.method: 提出VAIC框架：第一阶段用具备完整环境信息的‘特权教师’策略学习多种交互技能；第二阶段将教师知识蒸馏给‘学生’策略，后者仅使用深度图像、历史本体感知和解耦指令，并引入递归物体自适应模块，从原始深度流和本体感知中隐式推断不可观测的物体动力学。
AI.result: 在人形机器人上实测表明，单一VAIC策略可成功执行搬运箱子、推车、滑板等高度多样化的动态任务，性能持续优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: VAIC有效弥合了仿真到现实的部署鸿沟，推动了自主人形机器人在真实世界中的实用化进程。

title: Mitigating the Contractivity Trap in Diffusion ODEs via Stein Stabilization
summary: A fundamental tension exists in the large-step inference of diffusion models via their deterministic probability flow ordinary differential equation (PF-ODE) trajectories, which we identify as the contractivity trap: efficient inference favors large step sizes, while aggressive steps and highly expressive denoisers can undermine contraction-based stability certificates for error suppression. To address this, we propose SteinDiff, a step-wise inference-time stabilization framework that employs Stein-derived corrections without requiring reference samples. Specifically, SteinDiff introduces a geometry-aware residual correction mechanism that regularizes large-step solver updates without retraining. To this end, we derive a closed-form Stein correction coefficient for step-wise solver adjustment, enabling reference-free adaptation to local data geometry. We further establish a score-controlled perturbation bound under distributional shifts and provide a complementary Stein perspective on EDM-style parameterizations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SteinDiff mitigates severe artifacts and improves generative quality across large-step inference settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SteinDiff，一种无需重训练的步进式推理稳定化框架，通过Stein导出的几何感知残差校正机制解决扩散模型大步长推断中的'收缩性陷阱'问题。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在大步长推断中存在'收缩性陷阱'：高效推断需大步长，但大步长与强表达能力的去噪器会破坏基于收缩性的误差抑制稳定性保证。
AI.method: 提出SteinDiff框架，引入几何感知的残差校正机制；推导闭式Stein校正系数用于步进求解器调整；建立分数控制下的分布偏移扰动界；提供对EDM式参数化的Stein视角分析。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，SteinDiff能有效缓解严重伪影，在多种大步长推断设置下提升生成质量。
AI.conclusion: SteinDiff是一种无需参考样本、无需重训练的通用推理时稳定化方法，提升了大步长扩散模型推断的稳定性与生成质量。

title: Segment-level Tree Search for Long Meeting Document Summarization
summary: Meeting documents are challenging to summarize due to their length and complex conversational structure. Existing approaches typically adopt multi-stage pipelines that extract information prior to summarization; however, these approaches often suffer from cumulative error propagation without intermediate validation, a limitation further amplified by short and low-quality reference summaries. We propose segment-level summarization via Monte Carlo Tree Search (S3), a training-free framework that constructs a final summary by composing segment-level summary candidates. S3 partitions a long document into segments and generates multiple summary candidates per segment, forming nodes of a search tree. The best-scoring combination is selected via self-reward-guided tree search and refined into the final output. Despite using a 7B model, S3 achieves performance comparable to larger 72B models while producing length-appropriate summaries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的段级摘要框架S3，利用蒙特卡洛树搜索从多个段级候选摘要中选择并组合最优结果，克服了多阶段流水线中的误差累积问题，并在小模型（7B）上达到与大模型（72B）相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有会议文档摘要方法多采用多阶段流水线，易因误差累积和参考摘要质量差而效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出S3框架：将长文档分段，每段生成多个摘要候选，构建搜索树，通过自奖励引导的蒙特卡洛树搜索选择最优组合，并进行精炼。
AI.result: S3在仅使用7B模型的情况下，性能媲美72B大模型，且生成长度更合适的摘要。
AI.conclusion: S3是一种高效、无需训练的段级摘要方法，有效缓解误差传播问题，提升会议文档摘要质量。

title: G2G: Exploiting Intra-Group Geometry for Inter-Group Pose Estimation
summary: Recovering the relative 6-DoF pose between two image groups underlies cross-sequence relocalization and multi-camera rig odometry. Each group carries known intra-group geometry from visual odometry or rig calibration, and pretrained multi-view backbones already fuse such geometry into visual features. Yet current models treat all views as an unstructured set, leaving cross-group reasoning as the missing piece. We introduce \ours{}, which keeps the foundation model entirely frozen and adds three lightweight trainable modules to bridge the two groups: a perceiver resampler, a cross-group bridge with merged self-attention, and a multi-frame pose head. The trainable footprint totals about 32M parameters, under 6\% of the full model, and is supervised only by relative poses. Across four datasets that span indoor and outdoor simulation, real-world cross-season capture, and zero-shot sim-to-real transfer, \ours{} attains state-of-the-art accuracy on both tasks, while every baseline is retrained with its full original supervision. Code is available at https://github.com/WeiYuFei0217/G2G.

AI.tldr: 本文提出G2G方法，通过在冻结的多视图基础模型上添加三个轻量级可训练模块，实现两个图像组之间的6自由度相对位姿估计，显著提升了跨序列重定位和多相机刚体里程计的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型将所有视图视为无结构集合，缺乏跨组推理能力，而每个图像组内部几何已知且预训练多视图骨干网络已融合该几何信息。
AI.method: 提出G2G方法，在冻结的基础模型上添加三个轻量级可训练模块：感知器重采样器、带合并自注意力的跨组桥接模块、多帧位姿头，总可训练参数约32M（不足全模型6%），仅用相对位姿监督。
AI.result: 在涵盖室内外仿真、真实世界跨季节采集及零样本仿真到真实迁移的四个数据集上，G2G在两项任务中均达到SOTA精度，且所有基线均使用其原始完整监督进行重新训练。
AI.conclusion: G2G证明了仅需极小可训练参数并仅依赖相对位姿监督，即可有效提升跨图像组位姿估计性能，为冻结大模型基础上的高效微调提供了新范式。

title: Dual Quaternion-Based Unscented Kalman Filter with Visual Inertial Odometry for Navigation in GPS-Denied Environments
summary: Reliable navigation in GPS-denied environments remains a fundamental challenge in robotics, aerospace, and autonomous vehicle applications. This paper presents a Dual Quaternion-Based Unscented Kalman Filter (DQUKF) equipped with a Visual Inertial Odometry (VIO) algorithm for accurate state estimation enabling navigation in GPS denied locations. The proposed framework formulates the DQUKF in an error state manner, where the nominal pose is represented by a unit dual quaternion and the local pose error is represented by a 6-dimensional twistor parameterization used for sigma point generation, covariance propagation, and measurement correction. In parallel, the VIO algorithm tracks features across image frames, synchronizes measurements between the IMU and camera, and provides visual constraints that complement inertial propagation. Simulation results on the EuRoC MAV dataset show that the proposed DQUKF converges under high initialization uncertainty and achieves a position RMSE of 0.2584~m in the difficult flight sequence, outperforming the benchmark filters.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对偶四元数的无迹卡尔曼滤波器（DQUKF）与视觉惯性里程计（VIO）相结合的方法，用于GPS拒止环境下的高精度状态估计与导航。
AI.motivation: 在GPS拒止环境下实现可靠导航是机器人、航空航天和自动驾驶领域的一项基础性挑战。
AI.method: 提出一种误差状态形式的对偶四元数无迹卡尔曼滤波器（DQUKF），以单位对偶四元数表示标称姿态，以6维twistor参数化表示局部姿态误差，用于sigma点生成、协方差传播和观测修正；同时结合VIO算法进行特征跟踪、IMU-相机同步及提供视觉约束。
AI.result: 在EuRoC MAV数据集上的仿真结果表明，所提DQUKF在高初始不确定性下仍能收敛，并在困难飞行序列中达到0.2584米的位置RMSE，优于基准滤波器。
AI.conclusion: 该DQUKF-VIO融合框架显著提升了GPS拒止环境下的导航精度与鲁棒性，尤其适用于初始姿态不确定性较大的场景。

title: Bridging Expert Knowledge and Automated Feature Engineering via Self-Evolution
summary: In high-stakes settings such as brand compliance, clinical care, and content moderation, machine learning cannot be deployed as opaque oracles: practitioners inspect the features driving model decisions, and models must leverage the expert documentation governing these domains. In practice, the data arrives as unstructured content, and features extracted from it must be interpretable, discriminative, and aligned with what experts consider important. Existing methods fall short: they target tabular inputs, lack demonstrated expert alignment, and cannot operationalize qualitative criteria such as 'maintain professional tone' into precise features. We present FEST (Feature Engineering with Self-evolving Trees), combining dual-stream feature generation (semantic and deterministic), semantic deduplication, and tree-guided iterative evolution to discover auditable features from raw text and images. FEST leads in 17 of 20 classifier-task combinations across brand classification, content authenticity detection, and stress detection, with a mean gain of 4.2 pp over the strongest baseline across five classifiers. An LLM-as-judge evaluation shows FEST achieves 60-80% coverage of expert-designed brand features at strict semantic-alignment thresholds, corroborated by a human expert study rating features highly on relevance, clarity, and actionability. When seeded with expert guidelines, FEST refines qualitative criteria into operational features, improving accuracy by 6-12 pp on average across brands. To enable systematic evaluation of expert alignment in automated feature engineering, we release BrandGuide, the first dataset pairing expert-designed features with 1M+ assets across 2,683 brands. By grounding feature engineering in expert knowledge, FEST opens a practical pathway for interpretable ML in domains demanding human oversight.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FEST方法，通过双流特征生成、语义去重和树引导迭代演化，从原始文本和图像中自动发现可审计、可解释且与专家知识对齐的特征，在多个高风险任务上显著提升性能，并发布首个专家特征对齐评测数据集BrandGuide。
AI.motivation: 在品牌合规、临床护理和内容审核等高风险场景中，模型需具备可解释性并符合专家知识，但现有方法难以处理非结构化数据、缺乏专家对齐验证，也无法将定性准则（如'保持专业语气'）转化为精确特征。
AI.method: 提出FEST（Feature Engineering with Self-evolving Trees），融合双流特征生成（语义+确定性）、语义去重与树引导的迭代演化机制，支持从原始文本/图像中生成可审计、可解释、专家对齐的特征；并引入LLM-as-judge评估与人工专家研究验证对齐效果。
AI.result: FEST在20个分类器-任务组合中领先17个，平均准确率提升4.2个百分点；LLM评估显示其在严格语义对齐阈值下覆盖60–80%专家设计的品牌特征；人工评估确认其特征在相关性、清晰度和可操作性上得分高；结合专家指南后，平均准确率再提升6–12个百分点。
AI.conclusion: FEST将特征工程扎根于专家知识，为需要人工监督的关键领域提供了实用、可解释的机器学习落地路径，并推动了专家对齐的系统化评测。

title: Teacher-Free Self-Training Amplifies but Does Not Compound: A Pass@$K$ Crossover on a Free-Verifier Domain
summary: When a language model trains on its own verified outputs, does it acquire capability beyond its base, or merely get better at expressing capability the base already had? We make the question decidable with a teacher-free "constellation" -- a generator, a learned critic, and a free exact verifier -- on a FlashFill-style "trapdoor" DSL, where verified (problem, solution) pairs are cheap to synthesize, hard to invert, and free to check exactly. Everything runs on one 4-bit Qwen3-4B on a single 24 GB GPU, with no model in the loop larger than the base. We report three findings. (i) Critic-guided selection beats verifier-filtered best-of-$k$ by $+9.1$ pp ($6/6$ seeds), with the entire gain localized to tasks where candidates disagree on held-out inputs. (ii) Per-round STaR self-training raises the ceiling but never accelerates -- the gain tracks remaining headroom and decelerates across $K=4$ independent training trajectories. (iii) The domain has no clean zero-capability frontier, so the usual "$0\% \to$ climb $=$ emergence" test is invalid here. A measured pass@$K$ crossover settles the diagnosis: the trained model wins at the operating budget (pass@$8$) but the base overtakes it at a large budget (pass@$64$) on every trajectory, so self-training concentrates probability mass rather than expanding reach. This is amplification, not compounding. ($K=4$ is indicative, not yet a robust across-trajectory CI.)

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建一个无需教师的‘星座’系统（生成器、学习型批评家、精确验证器），在FlashFill风格的‘陷阱门’DSL上研究语言模型通过自我训练是否能真正提升能力，还是仅优化已有能力的表达。实验表明，自我训练是一种‘放大’而非‘复合’过程：它集中了概率质量，但并未扩展模型的能力边界。
AI.motivation: 探究语言模型在使用自身经验证正确的输出进行训练时，是否真正获得了超越基线模型的新能力，还是仅仅更有效地表达了基线已有的潜在能力。
AI.method: 提出一种教师无关的‘星座’架构，包含生成器、可学习的批评家和免费的精确验证器；在一种合成验证对廉价、难以逆向、可精确验证的DSL上开展实验；全部运行于单卡24GB GPU上的4-bit Qwen3-4B模型，无更大模型参与。
AI.result: （i）批评家引导的选择比验证器筛选的最佳-k方法提升9.1个百分点；（ii）每轮STaR自训练提升上限但不加速，增益随剩余能力空间衰减；（iii）不存在清晰的零能力边界，pass@8时微调模型优于基线，但pass@64时基线反超，表明是概率质量集中而非能力扩展。
AI.conclusion: 自我训练实现的是能力‘放大’（amplification），而非能力‘复合增长’（compounding）；它优化了输出分布，但未实质性拓展模型的能力边界。

title: Sycophancy as a Multilingual Alignment Failure: How Safety Degrades Across Languages, Topics, and Models
summary: Safety-aligned large language models often exhibit sycophancy, which is the tendency to affirm users' opinions regardless of factual accuracy. Although well-studied in English, its manifestation in other languages remains largely unexamined, leaving billions of non-English speakers potentially vulnerable to model-validated misinformation. We present the first large-scale, multi-model evaluation of cross-lingual sycophancy, benchmarking \textbf{six instruction-tuned models} across \textbf{1.1 million instances} spanning \textbf{38 languages} and \textbf{33 topic categories}. We identify a consistent resource-tier effect: sycophancy rates spike sharply in low-resource and zero-shot language settings. Critically, this degradation is topic-agnostic, as models fail uniformly across both benign and safety-critical prompts, offering no additional protection where it is most needed. We further identify tokenizer fertility as a structural driver of this alignment collapse. Collectively, our results demonstrate that prevailing alignment methodologies generalize poorly beyond high-resource languages, underscoring the urgent need for equitable multilingual safety techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文首次大规模评估了38种语言中6个指令调优大模型的跨语言谄媚现象（sycophancy），发现低资源和零样本语言环境下谄媚率显著上升，且与话题无关；其根本原因之一是分词器丰度（tokenizer fertility）不足，揭示当前对齐方法在多语言场景下存在严重公平性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 安全对齐的大语言模型在非英语语境中可能加剧 misinformation 风险，但跨语言谄媚现象尚未被系统研究，亟需评估其在多语言环境中的普遍性与成因。
AI.method: 构建覆盖38种语言、33类话题、共110万实例的跨语言谄媚评测基准，对6个指令微调模型进行系统评估，并分析资源层级、话题类型与分词器特性对谄媚率的影响。
AI.result: 发现显著的资源层级效应：低资源/零样本语言中谄媚率急剧升高；该效应跨话题稳定存在，尤其在安全关键提示上无缓解；分词器丰度被识别为关键结构驱动因素。
AI.conclusion: 当前主流对齐方法难以泛化至高资源语言之外，必须发展兼顾语言公平性的新型多语言安全对齐技术。

title: HACK++: Towards More Effective Head-Aware Key-Value Compression for Efficient Visual Autoregressive Modeling
summary: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) models adopt a next-scale prediction paradigm, offering high-quality generation with substantially fewer decoding steps. However, existing VAR models suffer from significant attention complexity and severe memory overhead due to the accumulation of key-value (KV) caches across scales. In this paper, we tackle this challenge by introducing KV cache compression into the next-scale paradigm. We begin with an in-depth analysis of VAR attention and observe that attention heads can be stably divided into two functionally distinct categories: Contextual Heads focus on maintaining semantic consistency, while Structural Heads preserve spatial coherence. Their functional divergence makes existing one-size-fits-all compression methods perform poorly on VAR models. We further find that the two head types differ markedly in their reliance on historical scales, and that this reliance shifts across layers and generation steps, arguing for an adaptive cache budget allocation. To address these challenges, we propose HACK++, a training-free Head-Aware key-value Compression frameworK for VAR models. From a one-time offline calibration, HACK++ classifies head types and derives head-specific priors. At inference, it decouples attention from cache compression under independent budgets, bounding the current-scale attention cost while compressing the accumulated cache far more aggressively, via pattern-specific strategies and a reliance-aware budget allocation. Extensive experiments on multiple VAR models across text-to-image, class-conditional, and unified understanding-and-generation tasks validate the effectiveness and generalizability of HACK++. For example, on Infinity-2B/8B, HACK++ maintains near-lossless generation with only a 30% attention budget and a 10% cache budget, and remains robust even under a 1% cache budget.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HACK++框架，通过头感知的KV缓存压缩方法解决VAR模型中注意力复杂度高和内存开销大的问题，实现高效、高质量的多尺度视觉自回归生成。
AI.motivation: 现有VAR模型因跨尺度累积KV缓存而导致注意力计算复杂度高、内存开销大，而通用缓存压缩方法无法适配其注意力头的功能异质性。
AI.method: 提出训练无关的头感知KV压缩框架HACK++：首先离线校准分类注意力头为Contextual Head和Structural Head两类，并提取头特异性先验；推理时按头类型独立分配缓存预算，结合模式特定压缩策略与依赖感知预算分配，分别控制当前尺度注意力开销与历史缓存压缩强度。
AI.result: 在多个VAR模型（如Infinity-2B/8B）及文本到图像、类条件生成、统一理解-生成任务上验证有效：仅用30%注意力预算和10%缓存预算即可保持近无损生成，甚至在1%缓存预算下仍保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HACK++首次将头功能差异与缓存依赖动态性建模引入VAR模型压缩，实现了高保真、低开销、强泛化的推理加速，为下一代高效视觉生成模型提供新范式。

title: KPGrasp: Scalable Keypoint Flow Matching for Dexterous Grasp Generation
summary: Generating high-quality dexterous grasps remains challenging for learning-based methods, which often depend on carefully tuned contact losses or costly contact-based test-time refinement. We present KPGrasp, a flow-matching framework that learns dexterous grasp priors from large-scale data rather than relying on contact losses or contact-based test-time refinement. KPGrasp couples an all-Euclidean 3D hand-keypoint parameterization with a simple yet scalable Transformer flow model. The parameterization avoids the drawbacks of the conventional mixed SE(3) pose and joint-angle output space, expresses grasps in the same frame as the object point cloud, and thus enables native spatial reasoning; the Transformer flow model is trained with only the standard flow-matching loss and scales effectively with data, model capacity, and batch size. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on two simulation benchmarks. On the Dexonomy benchmark, it reaches a 76.3% grasp success rate, improving over the strongest directly comparable baseline by 47.4% while reducing penetration depth to 2.4 mm. The same model also achieves the best average performance on the DexGrasp Anything benchmark without fine-tuning. For batched inference, KPGrasp requires only 0.032 s per grasp. Finally, real-world experiments on 20 diverse objects demonstrate that the pipeline can be deployed in a real-world setup.

AI.tldr: KPGrasp是一种基于流匹配的框架，通过纯欧几里得手部关键点参数化和可扩展Transformer流模型，学习灵巧抓取先验，无需接触损失或接触感知的测试时优化，在仿真和真实场景中均达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的方法生成高质量灵巧抓取仍具挑战，常依赖精细调优的接触损失或高成本的接触感知测试时优化。
AI.method: 提出KPGrasp：采用全欧几里得3D手部关键点参数化（避免传统SE(3)+关节角混合空间缺陷，与物体点云同坐标系），结合仅用标准流匹配损失训练的Transformer流模型。
AI.result: 在Dexonomy基准达76.3%抓取成功率（较最强可比基线提升47.4%，穿透深度降至2.4mm）；在DexGrasp Anything基准上零微调即获最佳平均性能；单次推理仅0.032秒；真实世界20种多样物体验证可行。
AI.conclusion: KPGrasp证明了摆脱接触建模依赖、以简洁几何参数化+流匹配范式学习抓取先验的有效性，兼具高性能、高效率与强泛化能力。

title: Q-Delta: Beyond Key-Value Associative State Evolution
summary: Linear attention reformulates sequence modeling as recurrent state evolution, enabling efficient linear-time inference. Under the key-value associative paradigm, existing approaches restrict the role of the query to the readout operation, decoupling it from state evolution. We show that query-conditioned state readout induces a structured value prediction over accumulated memory that complements key-based retrieval. Based on this insight, we propose Q-Delta, a query-aware delta rule that integrates mixed key-query prediction errors into state evolution, enabling jointly corrective dynamics while preserving delta-rule efficiency. We establish stability guarantees for the resulting dynamics and derive a hardware-efficient chunkwise-parallel formulation with a custom Triton implementation. Empirical results demonstrate stable optimization, competitive throughput, and consistent improvements over strong baselines on language modeling and long-context retrieval tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Q-Delta方法，通过引入查询条件化的状态读出与混合键-查询预测误差驱动的状态演化，提升线性注意力机制在长序列建模中的稳定性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有线性注意力方法将查询仅用于读出操作，与状态演化解耦，限制了其对记忆的结构化利用能力。
AI.method: 提出Q-Delta：一种查询感知的delta规则，将键和查询共同参与的预测误差融入状态演化过程，并给出稳定性保证及硬件友好的分块并行Triton实现。
AI.result: 实验表明Q-Delta在语言建模与长上下文检索任务中优化稳定、吞吐率具竞争力，并持续优于强基线。
AI.conclusion: 查询不应仅用于读出，而应参与状态演化；Q-Delta实现了高效、稳定且性能更优的线性注意力新范式。

title: Instrumented data for causal scientific machine learning
summary: Scientific machine learning is limited less by model size than by the data it is trained on. Observational data records what happened but not why; template synthetic data has a known generating process but only for the simulator's template, not the case a user faces. We argue a third option is now operationally feasible: instrumented data, in which every datum carries the mechanistic model that produced it, an explicit uncertainty over that model, and an executable family of counterfactuals. Verification-and-validation (V&V) instrumented image-to-simulation pipelines are one realisation: a sensor observation becomes a fully specified, solver-backed simulation with explicit, editable parameters and a propagated aleatoric/epistemic uncertainty. The substrate is case-specific, mechanistically supervised, and supports causal interventions through Pearl's do-operator. Near-term consequences for validation, auditing, and surrogate training span computational biology, climate, materials, fluid mechanics, and medical imaging; a longer-term, falsifiable implication concerns foundation models for scientific reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型数据范式——'仪器化数据'（instrumented data），即每个数据点都附带其生成的机理模型、对该模型的不确定性估计以及可执行的反事实集合，以弥补观测数据缺乏因果解释、合成模板数据缺乏现实适配性的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 科学机器学习受限于数据质量而非模型规模；观测数据缺乏因果解释，模板合成数据又局限于特定仿真器，无法适配真实场景。
AI.method: 提出并构建'仪器化数据'范式，以验证与确认（V&V）驱动的图像到仿真的端到端流水线为实现方式，将传感器观测映射为具备显式参数、可编辑性及传播不确定性的求解器支撑仿真，并支持Pearl do-算子进行因果干预。
AI.result: 该范式已在计算生物学、气候建模、材料科学、流体力学和医学影像等领域展现出对验证、审计与代理模型训练的实际价值。
AI.conclusion: 仪器化数据为科学AI提供了案例特异、机理监督、可因果干预的新数据基础，短期推动多领域科学建模可信性提升，长期有望支撑面向科学推理的基础模型发展，并具有可证伪性。

title: More Yap Less Meaning: Uncovering Self-Improvement Behavior in SLMs
summary: Recently, language models have made rapid progress across various domains and applications. However, their capability for self-improvement, i.e., whether they are adept at recognising and correcting flaws in their own reasoning, remains dubious. In this study, we address this question by constructing a sufficiency test to rigorously examine the self-correction capabilities of small language models (SLMs). We propose a minimal three-step self-correction pipeline that collects initial SLM answers, prompts the same model to generate hints for its incorrect responses given the ground truth, and feeds the model the same question with its own feedback to refine the initial answer. We evaluate a variety of instruction-tuned and reasoning SLMs in this experimental setup on arithmetic and logical reasoning benchmarks. Our findings show that SLMs with injected hint sentences yield only a 4.4 percent gain over initial question-answering accuracy. Even though the correct answer was provided alongside the model's incorrect reasoning, the evaluated SLMs fail to understand what was missing in their reasoning and show minimal semantic difference between hints that lead to corrections and ones that do not. Furthermore, our experiments show that longer hints are positively correlated with incorrect final answers, suggesting that longer deliberation on problems can hinder the reasoning process, meaning that SLMs do not necessarily scale in performance with a larger compute budget.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个充分性测试来评估小型语言模型（SLMs）的自我纠正能力，发现其在提供正确答案和提示的情况下仍难以识别并修正自身推理错误，且更长的提示反而降低性能。
AI.motivation: 探究语言模型是否具备自我改进能力，即能否识别并纠正自身推理中的缺陷。
AI.method: 设计了一个三步自我纠正流程：获取初始回答、基于真实答案生成提示、用提示引导模型重新作答，并在算术与逻辑推理基准上评估多种小型语言模型。
