AI.tldr: 本文提出'审计鸿沟'概念，指出仅依赖行为层面的安全评估不足以反映大语言模型在表征层面的鲁棒性；为此构建了'解离模型'并设计基于干预的评估框架，引入'潜在脆弱性分数（LVS）'量化模型在潜空间中被诱发有害行为的难易程度，发现行为安全与潜在鲁棒性存在显著脱节。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM安全性评估多集中于行为层面（如拒绝有害请求），但忽视了模型内部表征在干预下的脆弱性，导致对真实鲁棒性的误判，因此需弥合‘审计鸿沟’——即行为安全与干预下鲁棒性之间的差距。
AI.method: 构建保持表面安全行为但潜空间仍脆弱的‘解离模型’；提出基于软干预的评估框架，包括有害微调和逐层潜变量扰动；定义‘潜在脆弱性分数（LVS）’，衡量在有界潜空间扰动下诱发有害行为的敏感度。
AI.result: 实验证明，行为安全指标（如拒答率）无法反映潜空间鲁棒性；解离模型LVS显著升高，而行为表现几乎不变；中间层表征对干预最敏感。
AI.conclusion: 仅依赖行为安全评估是不充分的，必须结合表征层面的‘潜在脆弱性’审计，实现对LLM安全性的全面评估。

title: HydraQE: OSU's Submission for the IWSLT 2026 Speech Translation Metrics Shared Task
comment: Accepted to IWSLT 2026; 9 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables
summary: We present HydraQE, our contribution to the IWSLT 2026 Speech Translation Metrics shared task. HydraQE is an end-to-end, reference-free quality estimation (QE) system for speech translation built on a Qwen3-ASR backbone, which accepts source audio and a translation hypothesis as joint input. Hidden states from all backbone layers are combined via a learnable sparsemax scalar mix, then re-encoded by a lightweight bidirectional Transformer to enable full cross-modal interaction prior to pooling into a shared embedding. Three independent prediction heads are trained on complementary supervision signals: human direct assessment (DA) annotations, MetricX-24 pseudo-labels, and xCOMET pseudo-labels. To address the scarcity of human-annotated data, we train on a combination of synthetically corrupted examples and silver pseudo-labeled machine translation outputs, using a curriculum that begins on synthetic and silver data and gradually shifts toward human-annotated examples. HydraQE outperforms cascaded text-based baselines and prior direct speech QE systems, demonstrating that end-to-end speech translation QE is competitive with cascaded approaches.

AI.tldr: HydraQE is an end-to-end, reference-free quality estimation system for speech translation, built on Qwen3-ASR, using multi-source supervision and curriculum learning to overcome data scarcity.
AI.motivation: To address the scarcity of human-annotated speech translation quality data and improve reference-free quality estimation by moving beyond cascaded (ASR → text-QE) approaches.
AI.method: HydraQE uses a Qwen3-ASR backbone processing source audio and translation hypothesis jointly; employs learnable sparsemax layer mixing and a lightweight bidirectional Transformer for cross-modal interaction; trains three prediction heads on human DA, MetricX-24, and xCOMET pseudo-labels; applies curriculum learning starting from synthetic/silver data toward human annotations.
AI.result: HydraQE outperforms cascaded text-based baselines and prior direct speech QE systems, showing end-to-end speech translation QE is competitive with cascaded methods.
AI.conclusion: End-to-end, reference-free speech translation quality estimation is viable and effective when leveraging multi-source supervision, cross-modal modeling, and curriculum learning to mitigate annotation scarcity.

title: OmniCap-IF: Benchmarking and Improving Instruction Following Abilities for Omni-Video Captioning
summary: While Omni-modal Large Language Models (OLLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in jointly processing audio and visual streams, their ability to strictly adhere to complex, multi-faceted user instructions remains largely unexplored. Existing benchmarks primarily focus on holistic video understanding or text-only instruction following, failing to capture the intricate interplay between modalities and user constraints. To bridge this gap, we introduce OmniCap-IF, the first comprehensive benchmark specifically designed to evaluate instruction-following capabilities in omni-modal captioning. OmniCap-IF incorporates a systematic framework that assesses captions on two dimensions: format correctness and content correctness. Our benchmark encompasses 50 distinct constraint types across pure visual, pure audio, and audio-visual modalities, while integrating Temporal Grounding to assess spatio-temporal precision. Extensive evaluations of prominent models on 1,920 high-quality samples reveal significant performance disparities. Furthermore, our analysis uncovers a critical "format-content tradeoff", demonstrating that increasing formatting complexity directly degrades models' omni-modal reasoning abilities. Finally, to advance the field, we curate a 54K instruction-tuning dataset, OmniCap-IF-54K and present OmniCaptioner-IF, which achieves notable improvements in both complex instruction adherence and general omni-modal captioning performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个专门评估全模态字幕生成中指令遵循能力的基准OmniCap-IF，涵盖格式与内容双重正确性、50种约束类型及时间定位，并揭示了格式复杂度与多模态推理能力之间的权衡关系；同时发布了54K指令微调数据集OmniCap-IF-54K和模型OmniCaptioner-IF。
AI.motivation: 现有基准无法有效评估全模态大模型在复杂、多方面用户指令下的严格遵循能力，尤其缺乏对多模态间交互与用户约束协同的刻画。
AI.method: 构建OmniCap-IF基准，从格式正确性和内容正确性两维度系统评估全模态字幕；引入时间定位以衡量时空精度；设计50类跨视觉、音频及音视频模态的约束；基于1920个高质量样本开展模型评测，并提出OmniCap-IF-54K数据集与OmniCaptioner-IF模型。
AI.result: 实验表明主流模型在OmniCap-IF上表现差异显著；发现‘格式-内容权衡’现象：格式越复杂，模型多模态推理能力越弱；OmniCaptioner-IF在复杂指令遵循与通用全模态字幕任务上均取得明显提升。
AI.conclusion: OmniCap-IF为全模态指令遵循能力提供了可靠评估框架，揭示了当前模型的关键瓶颈，并通过新数据集与模型推动该方向发展。

title: Safe Polytope-in-Polytope Motion Planning and Control with Control Barrier Functions
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Autonomous mobile robots operating in tight environments require motion planning frameworks that account for the physical footprint of the robot. Simplifying the geometry to a point or a circle is conservative and discards information needed to successfully and safely traverse narrow passages. This work proposes a safe local motion planning and control method that guarantees that a polytopic robot footprint stays inside a continuously updated convex free-space region. The containment condition is formulated as a set of discrete-time control barrier function constraints within a model predictive controller. The number of safety constraints depends on the complexity of the local free-space geometry and the robot shape, instead of the number of obstacles. The proposed free-space formulation does not need any obstacle detection or segmentation. A comparative analysis against a polytope-based obstacle avoidance formulation confirms favorable scaling up to a reduction of 91$\times$ in computation time as the number of obstacles increases. The approach is validated in simulation with an autonomous surface vehicle and on hardware with a non-holonomic mobile robot, using both occupancy grids and LiDAR sensing. The experiments demonstrate safe real-time motion planning and control at 10~Hz on an onboard embedded computer, including reactive avoidance of dynamic obstacles.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于控制屏障函数（CBF）与模型预测控制（MPC）结合的安全局部运动规划与控制方法，确保多边形机器人在实时更新的凸自由空间内严格包含，无需障碍物检测或分割，显著降低计算复杂度，并在仿真与实物平台上验证了10Hz实时性能。
AI.motivation: 传统将机器人简化为点或圆的方法在狭窄环境中过于保守，无法充分利用几何信息，导致难以安全通过窄通道；同时，现有基于多面体避障的方法计算开销随障碍物数量急剧增长。
AI.method: 将机器人多边形轮廓包含于连续更新的凸自由空间区域作为安全性约束，建模为离散时间控制屏障函数（CBF）约束，并嵌入模型预测控制器（MPC）中；自由空间由占用栅格或LiDAR直接生成，无需障碍物检测或分割。
AI.result: 相比多面体障碍物避障方法，在障碍物数量增加时计算时间减少达91倍；在仿真（无人水面艇）和实物（非完整移动机器人）中均实现10Hz实时规划与控制，支持动态障碍物的反应式避让。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过几何感知的自由空间建模与CBF-MPC协同，兼顾安全性、实时性与可扩展性，适用于资源受限的嵌入式平台及复杂狭窄环境下的自主导航。

title: The Token Not Taken: Sampling, State, and the Variability of AI Agent Outputs
summary: Agentic AI systems can behave differently across runs: the same request may produce a different plan, a different tool call, a different code edit, or a different final answer. Such variability arises from several layers that are often conflated. A foundation model is a large pretrained model, usually adaptable to many downstream tasks, that maps an input context to predictions over outputs. In many current agents, that model is embedded in an orchestration loop that plans, calls tools, observes results, and updates state. One explicit intrinsic source of variability in such systems is token generation: the model computes scores over possible next tokens, the scores are converted into probabilities, and a decoder may sample tokens using a pseudo-random number generator. A small sampled token difference can then propagate upward into a different tool call, code path, search query, or agent state. Other sources of variability are extrinsic to token sampling, including changing environments, live data, serving infrastructure, batch effects, and numerical details. By separating these layers, the manuscript clarifies what it means to call agentic AI systems stochastic, when such variability can be reproduced under matched conditions, and why deterministic execution need not imply identical behavior in deployed settings.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了Agentic AI系统在不同运行中表现出的不同行为，分析了其内在和外在的变异性来源，并强调了区分这些层次对理解系统随机性、可复现性和实际部署中确定性执行的意义。
AI.motivation: Agentic AI系统在不同运行中可能产生不同的计划、工具调用、代码修改或最终答案，这种变异性源于多个常被混淆的层次，需要明确区分以理解其本质。
AI.method: 通过分离基础模型、编排循环、token生成机制以及外部环境等不同层次，分析Agentic AI系统中变异性的内在（如token采样）与外在（如动态环境、实时数据等）来源。
AI.result: 明确了Agentic AI系统的‘随机性’定义，指出在匹配条件下某些变异可复现，而确定性执行并不保证部署中行为完全一致。
AI.conclusion: 区分变异性的不同来源有助于更准确地评估、调试和部署Agentic AI系统，避免将不同层次的不确定性混为一谈。

title: Beyond Homophily: Towards Generalized Graph Reconstruction Attack and Defense
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are widely deployed on relational data, yet they can leak sensitive or proprietary information about the training graph adjacency, e.g., social ties, transactions, and interactions. This work studies graph reconstruction attacks (GRA), a form of model inversion that reconstructs the training adjacency from a trained GNN, given different levels of attacker-side information. We first provide a systematic characterization of when and why adjacency becomes recoverable through features, labels, embeddings, and predictions, with leakage modulated by graph homophily, heterophily, and the model's inductive bias. Motivated by these findings, we view GNN inference through a Markov chain approximation lens, treating the layered forward computation as a chain of topology-dependent representations. Building on this view, we develop complementary attack and defense methods. On the attack side, we propose MC-GRA (+), which reconstructs the adjacency by optimizing a surrogate adjacency whose GNN-induced representations align with those of the target model at each layer. On the defense side, we propose MC-GPB (+), which suppresses adjacency-dependent information throughout the representation chain while aiming to preserve classification accuracy under a privacy-utility trade-off. Experiments across homophilic/heterophilic graph benchmarks and GNNs show that our attacks improve reconstruction fidelity over prior methods, while our defenses reduce reconstruction success with only minor accuracy loss.

AI.tldr: 本文研究图神经网络（GNN）训练图邻接结构的信息泄露问题，提出基于马尔可夫链视角的图重建攻击（MC-GRA+）与隐私保护防御方法（MC-GPB+），在保持分类精度的同时有效降低邻接重建成功率。
AI.motivation: GNN在关系数据上广泛应用，但其训练过程可能泄露敏感的图结构信息（如社交关系、交易记录），现有模型反演攻击对邻接重建机制缺乏系统性理解。
AI.method: 提出马尔可夫链近似视角，将GNN前向传播建模为拓扑依赖的逐层表征链；据此设计MC-GRA+攻击（通过优化代理邻接矩阵使各层GNN表征对齐目标模型）和MC-GPB+防御（在表征链中抑制邻接相关性，兼顾隐私-效用权衡）。
AI.result: 在同质/异质图基准及多种GNN上实验表明，MC-GRA+比先前方法提升重建保真度，MC-GPB+显著降低重建成功率且仅带来微小精度损失。
AI.conclusion: 图邻接可恢复性受图同质性、异质性及模型归纳偏置调控；基于表征链的攻击与防御框架能更精准控制结构信息泄露，在隐私保护与模型效用间取得更好平衡。

title: Co-Evolving Skill Generation and Policy Optimization
summary: Skill-augmented reinforcement learning improves language agents by storing reusable procedural knowledge acquired from past experience. Existing methods typically use strong language models to analyze trajectories, generate skills, and update a retrievable skill bank during online training. However, they rarely assess whether a newly generated skill is useful before it is stored and reused. We find that this assumption is unreliable: even skills generated by proprietary frontier LLMs exhibit highly mixed utility, with many providing little benefit or even degrading performance. Once such skills enter the bank, their effects are difficult to identify, because subsequent rollout feedback is delayed and usually reflects the combined effect of multiple retrieved skills rather than the marginal contribution of any individual skill. We propose an online reinforcement learning framework for pre-storage skill validation. The framework estimates whether a candidate skill contributes useful information beyond the skills already retrieved for the current task. It uses the standard rollout budget to form two matched groups under the same task and retrieval context: base rollouts conditioned on the currently retrieved skills, and skill-augmented rollouts conditioned on the same skills plus one candidate skill induced from the base trajectories. The reward gap between these two groups estimates the candidate skill's context-dependent marginal utility, enabling the framework to promote useful skills while filtering ineffective or harmful ones without additional rollout overhead. The framework further uses this marginal-utility signal to train the policy itself as a skill generator, reducing reliance on repeated calls to proprietary models. The learned skill-generation likelihood serves as a context-dependent score for retrieval-time reranking and outdated-skill pruning as the policy evolves.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线强化学习框架，用于在技能存入技能库前验证其有效性，通过对比基线与增强 rollout 的奖励差来估计技能的边际效用，并利用该信号优化技能生成与检索。
AI.motivation: 现有技能增强型强化学习方法在将新生成技能存入技能库前缺乏效用评估，导致低效或有害技能污染技能库，且难以追溯其影响。
AI.method: 提出一种在线RL框架，通过构造匹配的基线rollout与技能增强rollout，计算奖励差以估计候选技能在当前上下文中的边际效用；并用该信号端到端训练策略作为技能生成器，支持检索重排序与过时技能剪枝。
AI.result: 该方法能在不增加rollout开销的前提下，有效筛选高价值技能、过滤无效/有害技能，并降低对黑盒大模型的调用依赖，提升语言智能体的稳定性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 预存储技能验证是提升技能库质量的关键环节；基于边际效用的在线评估与联合优化策略，为构建高效、鲁棒的语言智能体提供了新范式。

title: Facial Expression Recognition in the Deep Learning Era: A Systematic Multi-Criteria Review of Methods, Models, Datasets, Performance, Challenges, and Future Research Directions
summary: Facial Expression Recognition (FER) has advanced rapidly over the last decade, driven by the shift from handcrafted descriptors and shallow classifiers to deep convolutional, attention-based, vision-language, and foundation-model architectures, and by the parallel growth of large-scale in-the-wild benchmarks spanning categorical, dimensional, compound, micro-expression, Action Unit (AU), and intensity-estimation tasks. Yet the deep learning-based FER landscape has so far been reviewed only along narrow task-, architecture-, or application-specific axes, leaving a holistic, systematically organized account of its recent advances missing. This survey addresses that gap with a comprehensive review of recent deep learning-based FER, explicitly linked to the wider Facial Affect Recognition (FAR) domain. Its main contributions are: a) A description of FER's evolution into five distinct phases, from handcrafted features and classical machine learning to attention-based, vision-language, and foundation-model approaches, with the key milestone works of each, b) A multi-criteria taxonomy analyzing the literature along seven complementary axes: recognition task, input modality, face pre-processing pipeline, network architecture, learning strategy, acquisition setting, and application domain, c) A per-criterion comparative analysis, with critical insights into the strengths and limitations of each category under in-the-wild conditions, d) A task-organized review of public FER datasets, with their annotation schemes, modalities, and evaluation protocols, e) A compilation of performance metrics and a per-task quantitative comparison of representative state-of-the-art methods on widely adopted benchmarks, and f) A discussion of current challenges and promising future directions.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了近十年基于深度学习的面部表情识别（FER）研究进展，系统梳理其发展脉络、多维度分类体系、数据集、性能评估及未来挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有FER综述局限于任务、架构或应用等单一视角，缺乏对整个深度学习FER领域的整体性、系统性梳理。
AI.method: 采用系统性文献调研与多维分类法，构建涵盖任务、模态、预处理、网络结构、学习策略、采集环境和应用领域的七轴taxonomy，并对各维度进行对比分析；同时整理主流数据集与评估指标，开展跨任务定量性能比较。
AI.result: 提出了FER发展的五个阶段划分；建立了七维分类体系；提供了全面的数据集与基准性能对比；总结了当前挑战与未来方向。
AI.conclusion: 该综述填补了深度学习FER领域缺乏综合性、结构化回顾的空白，为研究者提供了统一框架与实用参考。

title: ProbeAct: Probe-Guided Training-Free Failure Recovery in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models demonstrate strong perfor-1 mance on language-conditioned robotic manipulation within their training dis-2 tribution, yet their generalization capabilities remain fundamentally limited. They3 lack the robustness required to handle perturbations, frequently failing when con-4 fronted with lighting changes, altered camera viewpoints, or small initial-state5 variations. We propose PROBEACT, a training-free runtime intervention frame-6 work that detects and recovers from grasping and placement failures in pre-7 trained VLA policies without modifying their weights or requiring additional8 demonstrations. PROBEACT combines three components: (i) a lightweight multi-9 target hidden-state probe that predicts the 3D positions of task-relevant objects10 from intermediate VLA features, with Hungarian-matched identity tracking for11 multi-object scenes; (ii) an object-agnostic kinematic state machine that detects12 grasp, transport, and placement failures using only gripper-internal signals and13 end-effector kinematics; and (iii) a hierarchical Control Barrier Function (CBF)14 filter that encodes repeated-failure locations as soft safe-set constraints, mini-15 mally correcting VLA actions while preserving baseline behavior. As a plug-and-16 play, training-free intervention loop, PROBEACT is orthogonal to existing train-17 ing pipelines. Evaluated on the LIBERO-plus benchmark, our framework acts as18 a universal safety net, improving the success rate of the OpenVLA-OFT model19 from 69.6% to 74.1%, while demonstrating broad applicability to both base and20 fine-tuned VLA policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PROBEACT，一种无需训练的运行时干预框架，用于检测和恢复预训练视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在抓取与放置任务中的失败，显著提升其鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型在分布内表现良好，但面对光照、视角或初始状态等扰动时泛化能力差、鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: PROBEACT包含三部分：(i) 轻量级多目标隐状态探针，从VLA中间特征预测物体3D位置并实现身份跟踪；(ii) 无对象依赖的运动学状态机，仅利用夹爪内部信号与末端执行器运动学检测失败；(iii) 分层控制障碍函数（CBF）滤波器，将重复失败位置编码为软安全集约束，最小修正VLA动作。
AI.result: 在LIBERO-plus基准上，PROBEACT将OpenVLA-OFT模型成功率从69.6%提升至74.1%，且适用于多种基线及微调后的VLA策略。
AI.conclusion: PROBEACT作为一种即插即用、无需训练的干预机制，有效增强了VLA策略的可靠性与通用性，且与现有训练流程正交兼容。

title: LATTEArena: An Evaluation Framework for LLM-powered Tabular Feature Engineering (Extended Version)
summary: Feature engineering remains essential for tabular data analysis, and Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for automating this process, giving rise to LLM-powered AuTomated Tabular feature Engineering (LATTE). However, the absence of standardized platforms prevents fair, cost-aware comparisons. Furthermore, complex methodological designs obscure the specific contributions of individual components; for example, although LFG integrates Tree-of-Thought, few-shot demonstrations, Monte Carlo Tree Search, and natural language generation, the isolated impact of each technique's competitive edge remains unquantified. To address these challenges, we introduce LATTEArena, the first competitive evaluation framework featuring: (1) a six-dimensional taxonomy decomposing 15 representative methods into reusable components; (2) a standardized modular arena for controlled comparison; (3) multi-dimensional assessments covering performance, cost, and robustness; and (4) component-level ablation quantifying each technique's competitive edge. Through extensive evaluations, we reveal 16 key findings, including: (1) Tree-of-Thought with Monte Carlo Tree Search achieves optimal cost-effectiveness; (2) RPN and Code output formats dominate classification and regression tasks, respectively. We publicly release the modular framework and over 4000 execution logs, enabling researchers to seamlessly pit new techniques against existing ones and advance LATTE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了LATTEArena，首个用于LLM驱动的自动表格特征工程（LATTE）的标准化竞争性评估框架，通过六维分类法、模块化竞技场、多维评估和组件级消融分析，系统揭示了各技术组件的贡献与成本效益。
AI.motivation: 缺乏标准化平台导致LATTE方法间难以公平、成本感知地比较；复杂方法设计掩盖了各组件的独立贡献，如LFG中Tree-of-Thought、少样本示例、蒙特卡洛树搜索等技术的单独影响未被量化。
AI.method: 构建LATTEArena框架，包含：(1) 六维分类法分解15种代表性方法为可复用组件；(2) 标准化模块化竞技场支持受控对比；(3) 覆盖性能、成本与鲁棒性的多维评估；(4) 组件级消融实验量化各技术的竞争优势。
AI.result: 通过大规模评估得出16项关键发现，例如：Tree-of-Thought结合蒙特卡洛树搜索具有最优成本效益；RPN格式在分类任务、Code格式在回归任务中表现最优；公开释放模块化框架及4000+执行日志。
AI.conclusion: LATTEArena为LATTE研究提供了可复现、可扩展、可归因的评估基础设施，推动该领域向更透明、高效和组件化方向发展。

title: DICE: Entropy-Regularized Equilibrium Selection for Stable Multi-Agent LLM Coordination
summary: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems often fail to reliably outperform a single strong model equipped with best-of-N sampling. We argue that a core source of this instability is ill-posed equilibrium selection: current systems specify what information agents share, but not which coordination convention should be selected. We formalize a broad class of such systems as discounted incomplete-information Markov games and show that two common pathologies, oscillation between competing conventions and drift across them, can both induce unstable learning and linear Bayesian regret. To obtain a well-posed target, we introduce the Heterogeneous Quantal Response Equilibrium (HQRE), an entropy-regularized equilibrium concept with agent- and state-dependent temperatures. Under a monotonicity condition, HQRE is unique, admits linearly convergent mirror updates, and yields bounded Bayesian regret; the same condition yields rollout-measurable stability diagnostics. We instantiate this objective in two algorithms: DICE-PC, which coordinates frozen models through prompt-control actions, and DICE-FT, which performs parameter-efficient mirror fine-tuning. Across eleven benchmarks in four domains, DICE improves accuracy-cost trade-offs over strong within-class baselines; on reasoning and planning tasks, DICE-PC improves by 4.3 percentage points on average and DICE-FT by 8.5 points.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Heterogeneous Quantal Response Equilibrium (HQRE)以解决多智能体大语言模型系统中因均衡选择不当导致的不稳定性问题，并设计了DICE-PC和DICE-FT两种算法，在多个基准测试中显著提升准确率与成本权衡性能。
AI.motivation: 多智能体大语言模型系统常无法稳定优于采用best-of-N采样的单个强模型，核心问题在于未明确指定协调惯例（ill-posed equilibrium selection）。
AI.method: 将多智能体LLM系统建模为折扣不完全信息马尔可夫博弈，提出带状态与智能体依赖温度的熵正则化均衡概念HQRE；在单调性条件下保证唯一性与收敛性，并据此设计DICE-PC（基于提示控制）与DICE-FT（参数高效镜像微调）两种算法。
AI.result: 在四个领域共11个基准任务上，DICE显著改善准确率-成本权衡；推理与规划任务中，DICE-PC平均提升4.3个百分点，DICE-FT提升8.5个百分点。
AI.conclusion: HQRE为多智能体LLM协调提供了良好定义的目标，其对应的DICE算法能有效缓解震荡与漂移问题，实现稳定、低悔值的学习与推理。

title: RadOT-Eval: Auditable Structured-Evidence Transport for Radiology Report Evaluation
summary: Automatic evaluation is critical for high-stakes text generation, where errors often involve omitted findings, hallucinated content, polarity reversals, location changes, uncertainty mismatches, and temporal-comparison errors rather than low surface similarity alone. Radiology report generation provides a challenging test case because generated reports must preserve structured clinical evidence across sources. We present RadOT-Eval, an interpretable structured-evidence optimal transport framework for offline auditing of radiology report generation. RadOT-Eval decomposes reference and candidate reports into attribute-structured clinical evidence units, aligns corresponding evidence using entropy-regularized optimal transport, and uses clinically meaningful side-channel discrepancies in a monotone risk model to predict error burden. All transport, feature, and readout choices are selected using the ReXVal dataset, and the frozen system is evaluated on the independent RadEvalX dataset. RadOT-Eval achieves Spearman correlations of 0.715, 0.548, and 0.399 with total, clinically significant, and clinically insignificant annotated error burden, respectively, yielding higher point estimates than standard evaluation metrics and the open-source large language model (LLM)-based evaluator GREEN-radllama2-7B. In a frozen auxiliary corruption-sensitivity stress test on ReXErr-v1, RadOT-Eval achieves 0.768 AUROC and a 0.990 corrupted-greater-than-clean paired win rate. These results show that structured evidence transport provides an auditable, rank-oriented evaluation tool for high-stakes generated clinical text under ReXVal-only model selection and frozen RadEvalX testing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RadOT-Eval，一种基于结构化临床证据最优传输的可解释自动评估框架，用于放射报告生成任务，显著优于传统指标和LLM-based评估器。
AI.motivation: 高风险文本生成（如放射科报告）中的错误常表现为临床语义层面的问题（如遗漏、幻觉、极性反转等），而非表面相似度低；现有自动评估方法难以捕捉这些关键临床错误。
AI.method: RadOT-Eval将参考报告和生成报告分解为属性结构化的临床证据单元，利用熵正则化最优传输对齐对应证据，并结合临床有意义的旁路差异，在单调风险模型中预测错误负荷；所有组件均在ReXVal数据集上选定并冻结，在RadEvalX上独立评估。
AI.result: RadOT-Eval在RadEvalX上与总错误负荷、临床显著错误、临床不显著错误的Spearman相关性分别达0.715、0.548、0.399；在ReXErr-v1压力测试中AUROC达0.768，污染样本胜率99.0%；整体性能超越标准指标及GREEN-radllama2-7B。
AI.conclusion: 基于结构化证据传输的评估方法可提供可审计、面向排序的高风险临床文本评估工具，适用于仅用ReXVal选型、冻结后在RadEvalX上测试的设定。

title: Harnessing Streaming Video in the Wild
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly required to process unbounded video streams in applications such as video-call assistants, live commentary, and embodied robots. An ideal streaming system should support proactive interaction, long-horizon memory, and real-time processing, while resting on a VLM backbone capable of handling diverse in-the-wild streaming tasks. However, existing VLMs excel at offline video understanding but fall short in streaming capabilities and lack dedicated infrastructure for streaming deployment. We address this gap on three fronts. (i) For backbone capability, we construct \textbf{Streaming-Train-248K}, a streaming dataset paired with a novel training objective for adapting VLMs to streaming interaction and understanding. (ii) For real-world deployment, we introduce \textbf{Streaming Harness}, a plug-and-play system that endows any VLM with three core abilities: proactive interaction (per-second response decisions), long-term memory (12-hour context retention), and real-time processing (sub-second latency). (iii) To drive continued community progress on streaming capabilities, we design \textbf{Streaming-Eval}, a benchmark that reflects models' capabilities across diverse in-the-wild scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent gains from our approach across all core capabilities required for streaming video understanding. We will open-source our data, code, and benchmark to advance the community's shift from offline video understanding to deployable streaming intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向流式视频理解的 Vision-Language Model（VLM）新范式，包含流式训练数据集 Streaming-Train-248K、可即插即用的部署系统 Streaming Harness（支持主动交互、长时记忆与实时处理），以及面向真实场景的评估基准 Streaming-Eval，并全面开源。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM擅长离线视频理解，但缺乏对持续视频流的实时响应、长时记忆和主动交互能力，也缺少适配流式部署的基础设施。
AI.method: 从三方面入手：(i) 构建流式训练数据集 Streaming-Train-248K 并设计新训练目标；(ii) 提出 Streaming Harness 系统，赋予任意VLM三大流式能力；(iii) 设计覆盖多场景的 Streaming-Eval 基准。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在主动交互、12小时长时记忆和亚秒级实时处理等核心能力上均取得一致提升。
AI.conclusion: 本工作填补了VLM向真实流式视频理解与部署演进的关键空白，推动社区从离线理解迈向可部署的流式智能。

title: Your Model Already Knows: Attention-Guided Safety Filter for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated impressive end-to-end performance across a variety of robotic manipulation tasks. However, these policies offer no guarantees against collisions with task-irrelevant objects in the scene. Existing safety filters sidestep this problem by querying a vision-language model (VLM) to identify obstacles and their locations. This, however, is too slow to run in the control loop and can only be invoked at episode initialization, leaving the filter unable to track moving obstacles. We discover that a small number of attention heads within a VLA model reliably localize the object the policy intends to approach. These heads can be exploited within a training-free safety framework that obtains the active target from the attention heads at every step, treats the remainder of the scene as obstacles, and feeds these into a Control Barrier Function (CBF) filter. Together with a lightweight real-time object tracker, this allows for collision avoidance for non-static obstacles. We evaluate our framework on SafeLIBERO, which we extend with moving obstacles. On the original static benchmark, our method performs comparably to an oracle that uses privileged simulator state to identify the target, emulating a VLM-based identification step run once at episode initialization. On the dynamic variant, where the oracle's init-time target assignment becomes stale, our method substantially outperforms it by 43%, on average. Our findings suggest that the perceptual signals needed for real-time safety filtering are already present within VLA policies and can be exploited without additional training or heavy auxiliary models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练、基于VLA模型内部注意力机制的安全过滤框架，利用特定注意力头实时定位目标物体，并结合CBF和轻量跟踪器实现对动态障碍物的实时避碰。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型缺乏对任务无关物体的碰撞保证，而依赖外部VLM的安全滤波器因速度慢且无法处理移动障碍物而受限。
AI.method: 挖掘VLA模型中少数注意力头对目标物体的稳定定位能力，将其作为实时目标信号输入Control Barrier Function（CBF）滤波器，并辅以轻量级实时目标跟踪器。
AI.result: 在扩展为含移动障碍物的SafeLIBERO基准上，相比仅在初始化时识别目标的oracle方法，本方法平均提升43%；在静态场景中性能与oracle相当。
AI.conclusion: VLA模型内部已蕴含可用于实时安全过滤的感知信号，无需额外训练或重型辅助模型即可实现高效动态避障。

title: ConSteer-RL: Steering Reasoning Capabilities in Large Language Models via Confidence-Aware Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has recently become a key paradigm for improving the reasoning abilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), yet it remains limited by sparse binary rewards and its ignorance of model-internal uncertainty. In this paper, we propose ConSteer-RL, a simple yet effective framework that integrates token-level confidence signals derived from model log-probabilities into RLVR training. Specifically, building upon the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) framework, we construct a confidence-aware reward by aggregating per-token probabilities into a scalar confidence score and incorporating it into an awareness-based reward shaping mechanism that penalizes overconfident errors while reinforcing correct and confident reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate that ConSteer-RL consistently outperforms strong GRPO baselines, achieving average improvements of 2.3%-4.0% across different model scales.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConSteer-RL框架，在RLVR中引入基于token级置信度的奖励塑形机制，提升LLM推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法受限于稀疏的二元奖励，且忽略模型内部不确定性，难以有效指导推理过程。
AI.method: 基于GRPO框架，利用模型log-probabilities构建token级置信度得分，并设计一种感知置信度的奖励塑形机制，对过度自信的错误进行惩罚、对正确且自信的推理进行强化。
AI.result: ConSteer-RL在多个模型规模上持续超越强GRPO基线，平均提升2.3%-4.0%。
AI.conclusion: 引入模型内部置信度信号可显著增强RLVR在复杂推理任务中的训练效果与稳定性。

title: TeamHerald@CHIPSAL 2026: Hate Speech Detection and Sentiment Analysis of Nepali Memes using Transformer-based Architectures and Ensemble Learning
comment: Accepted at the 2nd Workshop on Challenges in Processing South Asian Languages (CHiPSAL 2026) at LREC 2026
summary: The analysis of internet memes in the Nepali language is complicated by frequent code-mixing and a lack of established baseline resources. While memes inherently combine visual and textual elements, this study focuses on a text-centric approach by extracting embedded text using an OCR layer and modeling it with Transformer-based architectures. We evaluate six distinct models and investigate the comparative effectiveness of Hard and Soft Voting ensemble strategies across two tasks: binary hate speech detection and three-class sentiment analysis. Experimental results show that a standalone decoder-only model achieved the highest performance for binary classification, whereas the Soft Voting ensemble performed best for the multi-class sentiment task, yielding a 15.8% relative improvement in Macro F1-score over the strongest standalone baseline. These findings suggest that ensemble strategies behave differently across binary and multi-class tasks, highlighting the importance of selecting aggregation methods suited to the classification objective.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了尼泊尔语网络模因（meme）中的文本分析，采用OCR提取文本并用Transformer模型建模，比较了六种模型及硬/软投票集成策略在仇恨言论检测（二分类）和情感分析（三分类）任务上的性能，发现解码器-only模型在二分类中最优，而软投票集成在多分类情感任务中提升显著（Macro F1相对提升15.8%）。
AI.motivation: 尼泊尔语模因分析面临频繁语码混用和缺乏基准资源的挑战，且现有工作多忽略其图文结合特性下的文本建模难点。
AI.method: 基于OCR提取模因中的嵌入文本，采用六种Transformer架构建模，并对比硬投票与软投票两种集成策略在二分类（仇恨言论检测）和三分类（情感分析）任务上的效果。
AI.result: 解码器-only模型在二分类任务中性能最佳；软投票集成在三分类情感任务中Macro F1较最强单模型提升15.8%；集成策略效果因任务类别数而异。
AI.conclusion: 针对不同分类任务（二类vs多类），应选择适配的模型集成方式；软投票更适用于多类情感分析，而单模型可能更优于简单二分类任务。

title: SSAFE: Simple and Strong AI-Generated Image Detection via Frozen Vision Encoders
comment: Preprint. 22 pages, 10 figures, supplementary material included
summary: The rapid advancement of generative models has blurred the boundary between synthetic and real imagery, creating an urgent need for reliable deepfake detection. Yet most existing approaches rely on massive real--fake datasets, which are increasingly difficult to maintain as new generators continue to emerge. In this work, we investigate how much information about image authenticity is already encoded in modern multimodal vision representations. We find that frozen multimodal encoders naturally separate real and synthetic images in their embedding space, enabling a simple linear classifier to achieve strong performance without task-specific fine-tuning. Motivated by this observation, we develop a representation-aware data curation strategy that selects a compact set of representative generators for training. The resulting training set contains only 10K images, compared to 288K in AIGIBench and 4M in OpenFake, while improving robustness to unseen generators and distribution shifts. We additionally introduce RealWorldBench, a benchmark consisting of modern camera photographs, contemporary stock images, and outputs from recent commercial generators. Experiments across multiple benchmarks show that combining frozen multimodal representations with carefully curated training data provides a simple and effective approach to AI-generated image detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需大量真实-伪造图像对、仅依赖冻结的多模态视觉表征与精心筛选的小规模训练数据即可实现高效AI生成图像检测的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法严重依赖大规模真实-伪造图像数据集，但随着新型生成器不断涌现，此类数据集难以持续维护；同时，亟需提升模型对未知生成器和分布偏移的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 发现冻结的现代多模态视觉编码器（如CLIP）的嵌入空间天然区分真实与合成图像，据此设计线性分类器，并提出一种基于表征感知的数据筛选策略，仅选取代表性生成器构建精简训练集（10K图像）；同时构建新基准RealWorldBench。
AI.result: 在多个基准（含新提出的RealWorldBench）上，该方法以远小于AIGIBench（288K）和OpenFake（4M）的数据量，实现了对未见生成器和分布偏移更强的检测鲁棒性与更高性能。
AI.conclusion: 冻结多模态表征蕴含充足真实性判别信息，结合表征驱动的数据筛选，可构建简洁、高效、泛化性强的AI图像检测范式，降低对大规模标注数据的依赖。

title: Difference-Aware Retrieval Policies for Imitation Learning
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables. Accepted to ICLR 2026. Code and demos available at https://weirdlabuw.github.io/darp-site/
summary: Parametric imitation learning via behavior cloning can suffer from poor generalization to out-of-distribution states due to compounding errors during deployment. We show that reusing the training data during inference via a semi-parametric retrieval-based imitation learning approach can alleviate this challenge. We present Difference-Aware Retrieval Policies for Imitation Learning (DARP), a semi-parametric retrieval-based imitation learning approach that addresses this limitation by reparameterizing the imitation learning problem in terms of local neighborhood structure rather than direct state-to-action mappings. Instead of learning a global policy, DARP trains a model to predict actions based on $k$-nearest neighbors from expert demonstrations, their corresponding actions, and the relative distance vectors between neighbor states and query states. DARP requires no additional assumptions beyond those made for standard behavior cloning -- it does not require additional data collection, online expert feedback, or task-specific knowledge. We demonstrate consistent performance improvements of 15-46% over standard behavior cloning across diverse domains, including continuous control and robotic manipulation, and across different representations, including high-dimensional visual features. Code and demos are available at https://weirdlabuw.github.io/darp-site/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DARP的半参数化检索式模仿学习方法，通过在推理时重用训练数据，利用k近邻及其相对距离向量预测动作，从而缓解行为克隆中因分布外状态导致的误差累积问题，且无需额外假设或数据。
AI.motivation: 行为克隆在部署中面对分布外状态时易因误差累积而泛化性能差，需一种不依赖额外数据或专家反馈的改进方法。
AI.method: DARP将模仿学习问题重新参数化为基于局部邻域结构的问题：在推理时检索专家演示中k个最近邻状态，结合其动作和与查询状态的相对距离向量，训练模型预测动作。
AI.result: 在连续控制与机器人操作等多领域、多种表征（包括高维视觉特征）下，DARP相较标准行为克隆稳定提升15–46%性能。
AI.conclusion: 半参数化检索机制可有效缓解行为克隆的误差累积问题，DARP在不增加假设与数据成本的前提下显著提升泛化能力与鲁棒性。

title: Personalization Meets Safety:Mechanisms,Risks,and Mitigations in Personalized LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled increasingly personalized interactions by adapting to users' preferences, contexts, and long-term histories. However, the mechanisms that enable personalization also expand the safety landscape in ways not systematically addressed by existing literature. Existing reviews typically focus either on personalization or safety, leaving their intersection largely unexplored. We present the first comprehensive, safety-aware review of personalized LLMs. We organize personalization along three dimensions-user representation, personalization paradigm, and evaluation-and introduce a unified taxonomy of safety risks. At the representation level, we analyze risks arising from diverse user representations. Across mainstream personalization paradigms, we delineate vulnerabilities inherent to prompting, retrieval augmentation, parameter fine-tuning, reinforcement learning, Mixture-of-Experts (MoE), pruning, agent frameworks, and multimodal personalization, and synthesize mitigation strategies across the model lifecycle. Beyond these fine-grained risks, we characterize paradigm-agnostic safety risks arising from personalized adaptation. We further summarize personalized datasets and evaluation methodologies. Through a case study of OpenClaw, we analyze deployment trends in personalized agent ecosystems. Our analysis reveals three structural inadequacies in existing research: safety is evaluated as user-invariant rather than relational, personalization techniques are analyzed in isolation rather than in composition, and evaluation frameworks cannot capture emergent long-term risks. By jointly examining personalized representations, personalization paradigms, safety risks, defenses, and evaluation methods, we provide a unified framework for developing safe personalized LLMs and highlight key directions for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统性地综述了个性化大语言模型（LLMs）的安全问题，构建了涵盖用户表征、个性化范式与评估的三维分析框架，并提出统一的安全风险分类体系；揭示了当前研究在安全评估关系性、技术组合性与长期风险建模三方面的结构性不足，为安全个性化LLM的发展提供理论框架与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常孤立关注个性化或安全性，二者交叉领域缺乏系统性梳理；个性化机制扩展了安全风险面，亟需安全感知的全面综述。
AI.method: 构建三维分析框架（用户表征、个性化范式、评估），提出统一安全风险分类；对主流个性化方法（提示工程、RAG、微调、RL、MoE等）逐一分析其脆弱性与缓解策略；开展OpenClaw案例研究，并识别现有研究的三大结构性缺陷。
AI.result: 建立了首个安全感知的个性化LLM综述框架；系统识别并分类多层次安全风险（表征层、范式特异性、范式无关）；总结数据集、评估方法及部署趋势；指出当前研究在关系性安全评估、技术组合分析和长期风险建模上的不足。
AI.conclusion: 个性化与安全不可割裂，需以统一框架协同设计表征、范式、评估与防御；未来研究应转向关系性安全建模、多技术协同风险分析及长期动态风险评估。

title: Constraint-Aware Optimization for Robust Protein Stability Prediction
summary: Multimodal $ΔΔG$ predictors integrating protein language models with inverse-folding representations achieve strong in-distribution accuracy on the Megascale dataset but exhibit limited robustness on out-of-distribution (OOD) proteins, persistent forward-reverse bias on paired-mutation benchmarks, and under-representation of rare stabilizing mutations. Existing approaches address these limitations primarily through additional architectural components, leaving optimization-level intervention comparatively underexplored. We introduce a constraint-aware optimization framework combining Balanced Mean Squared Error, a Siamese anti-symmetric regularizer, and a novel OOD-margin consistency loss on the per-position feature representation, requiring no architectural changes to the SPURS backbone. Across eleven benchmarks and three random seeds, the framework improves Spearman correlation on S669 from 0.486 to 0.540 ($σ=0.002$ across seeds), matching the published SPURS baseline (0.50) without architectural modification, and on S461 from 0.653 to 0.711, with consistent smaller gains on five additional OOD datasets. A controlled diagnostic on Ssym reveals that anti-symmetric training does not eliminate systematic forward-reverse bias, indicating that gains arise through implicit regularization rather than exact thermodynamic constraint enforcement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需修改模型架构的约束感知优化框架，通过结合平衡均方误差、Siamese反对称正则化和OOD边界一致性损失，提升了多模态ΔΔG预测器在OOD蛋白和配对突变基准上的鲁棒性与公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有ΔΔG预测器在OOD蛋白上鲁棒性差、存在前向-反向偏差、且对稀有稳定突变表征不足；而当前改进多依赖架构调整，优化层面干预尚不充分。
AI.method: 提出约束感知优化框架，包含Balanced MSE损失、Siamese反对称正则项、以及作用于位置级特征表示的OOD-margin一致性损失，完全复用SPURS骨干网络，无架构改动。
AI.result: 在11个基准上显著提升性能：S669的Spearman相关系数从0.486升至0.540，S461从0.653升至0.711；在5个OOD数据集上也有稳定小幅提升；诊断实验表明增益源于隐式正则化而非热力学约束的精确满足。
AI.conclusion: 优化层面的约束建模可有效缓解ΔΔG预测中的OOD泛化弱、前向-反向偏差及稀有突变表征不足问题，无需增加模型复杂度，为蛋白质稳定性预测提供了轻量高效的新范式。

title: The Amplifying Mirror: Locating and Steering the Partisan Direction inside a Large Language Model
summary: Large language models are rapicly replacing search engines as the primary interface between people and information. Unlike search engines, which retrieve existing content, LLMs generate novel text shaped by internal representations learned during training. Here we show that partisan political identity is encoded in the model's activation space, and that this direction directly shapes generation. Using 190,491 tweets from sitting members of the U.S. Congress as labeled training data, we train linear probes on the hidden states of the Llama 3.1 8B Instruct model. We identify a single geometric axis at layer 18 that separates Republican from Democratic text with an AUC of 0.945 and a Cohen's d of 1.94, and use sparse autoencoders to decompose that axis into interpretable partisan features. Causally intervening along this axis, ablating or amplifying the partisan component mid-generation, produces systematic shifts in the model's output. We witness stance reversals, register shifting, and structured fabrications of authority. Our results demonstrate that partisan bias in language models is not a vague emergent property but a learned geometric feature that can be precisely located and steered. Partisan bias is not a bug to be patched, but a structural property of how these models encode information about their users. As LLMs displace search engines as the interface to knowledge, understanding that product design (and its consequences) will be essential for navigating the legal, social, and political transitions from an information ecosystem that is curated to one that is generated.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大型语言模型（LLM）中存在可定位、可干预的党派政治身份编码，表现为隐藏层激活空间中的一个几何轴；通过线性探针和稀疏自编码器识别并解释该轴，并证明沿此轴进行因果干预会系统性改变生成内容（如立场反转、语域偏移、权威性虚构），表明党派偏见是模型信息编码的结构性特征而非偶然缺陷。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型逐渐取代搜索引擎成为人与信息交互的主要界面，理解其内部如何编码和表达用户的政治身份变得至关重要；现有研究多将偏见视为模糊的涌现现象，本文旨在揭示其是否具有可定位、可解释、可干预的结构性基础。
AI.method: 基于190,491条美国国会议员推文构建党派标注数据集，在Llama 3.1 8B Instruct模型第18层隐藏状态上训练线性探针，识别高区分度（AUC=0.945）的党派分离轴；结合稀疏自编码器分解该轴为可解释的党派特征；并在文本生成过程中进行因果干预（消融/放大该方向分量）。
AI.result: 发现第18层存在单一几何轴可高精度区分共和党与民主党文本（Cohen's d=1.94）；该轴可被稀疏自编码器分解为具解释性的党派特征；干预该轴导致生成内容发生系统性变化，包括政治立场反转、语域风格偏移及虚构权威信息。
AI.conclusion: 党派偏见并非需修补的缺陷，而是模型学习用户信息表征时形成的结构性几何特征；这一发现对LLM作为知识接口的设计、监管与社会影响评估具有根本性启示。

title: Learnable Token Sparsification for Efficient Gigapixel Whole Slide Image Reasoning
summary: The processing of gigapixel whole slide images within vision language models faces a major difficulty due to an excessive number of visual tokens. Existing solutions typically rely on spatial downsampling or heuristic pruning strategies that operate without training, and these methods often discard subtle but clinically meaningful patterns because pathological evidence is scattered irregularly across the tissue. To overcome this limitation, we reformulate token reduction in whole slide images as a trainable sparsification problem, allowing the model to learn an optimal selection strategy instead of following fixed heuristics. We propose a decoupled routing architecture. To enable gradient propagation through the nondifferentiable pruning operation during training, we introduce a component called SparseLearn. This component uses a variance-preserving noise gate that regulates the information flow of each patch via a differentiable Soft Top-K operator, together with a diagonal attention denoiser that recovers perturbed representations without leaking spatial information. At inference time, the SparseLearn module is entirely discarded, and the trained scorer applies a deterministic Hard Top-K operator to keep only the highest scoring 32 tokens, incurring no extra computation. By compressing the visual sequence down to a sparse set of just 32 tokens, which represents as little as 0.78% of the original length, our framework achieves 73.32% overall accuracy on SlideBench (TCGA), consistently surpassing sampling-based baselines and general-purpose vision language models. It also demonstrates strong zero shot generalization on SlideBench (BCNB) and WSI VQA*. By resolving the visual context bottleneck and preventing the dilution of sparse diagnostic evidence, this work provides a highly efficient paradigm for end to end gigapixel whole slide image reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可训练的稀疏化方法SparseLearn，用于在全切片图像（WSI）中高效选择最具诊断价值的视觉token，仅保留32个token（约0.78%），显著提升视觉语言模型在WSI理解任务上的准确率与零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有WSI处理方法依赖无训练的空间下采样或启发式剪枝，易丢失散在但临床关键的病理模式；需一种能自适应学习关键token的选择机制。
AI.method: 提出可训练的解耦路由架构，引入SparseLearn模块：包含方差保持噪声门控与可微Soft Top-K算子实现梯度传播，并辅以对角注意力去噪器恢复表征；推理时用确定性Hard Top-K保留最高分32个token。
AI.result: 在SlideBench (TCGA)上达73.32%整体准确率，超越采样基线及通用VLM；在SlideBench (BCNB)和WSI VQA*上展现强零样本泛化能力；视觉序列压缩至仅32 token（0.78%原始长度），无额外推理开销。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过端到端可训练稀疏化，有效缓解WSI视觉上下文瓶颈，防止稀疏诊断证据被稀释，为超大图像推理提供了高效新范式。

title: AetheRock: An Arm-Worn Robot Teaching System for Force-Guided Vision-Tactile Learning
summary: Force and tactile sensing are indispensable in contact-rich manipulation. However, force-aware robot learning faces critical challenges due to the incompatible assembly of tactile and force sensors in handheld or wearable devices. To address these limitations, we first introduce AetheRock for gripper-force, vision, and tactile data collection, which is an arm-worn device featuring a modular and easily manufactured visuo-tactile sensor, GelSlim-MiniFab, at the fingertip, a resistive pressure sensor at the human finger contact region, a customized PCB module, and a wearable kit for comfortable and robust collection. Building on this, we propose ForceVT, a representation learning framework that uses force and vision to guide fidelity-agnostic tactile learning, enabling robust inference in any tactile situation. Real-world experiments show that AetheRock achieves qualified data efficiency and that ForceVT effectively alleviates inefficiencies when visuo-tactile sensors exhibit manufacturing and utilization inconsistencies. Overall, our work mitigates the limitations of gripper-force vision-tactile robot learning through innovative hardware design and algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AetheRock硬件设备和ForceVT算法框架，解决力觉与触觉传感器在机器人操作中难以兼容的问题，通过模块化设计和表示学习提升多模态数据采集与学习的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 力觉与触觉传感在接触密集型操作中至关重要，但现有手持/可穿戴设备中两类传感器难以兼容装配，限制了力感知机器人学习的发展。
AI.method: 设计模块化、易制造的臂戴式设备AetheRock（含指尖视觉-触觉传感器GelSlim-MiniFab、指端电阻式压力传感器、定制PCB及可穿戴套件）；提出ForceVT表示学习框架，利用力与视觉信号引导保真度无关的触觉表征学习。
AI.result: 实验证明AetheRock具备良好数据采集效率，ForceVT能有效缓解因视觉-触觉传感器制造与使用不一致带来的学习低效问题。
AI.conclusion: 本工作通过创新硬件设计与算法框架，显著缓解了夹爪-力-视觉-触觉机器人学习中的关键局限。

title: Agent Economics: An Entropy-Controlled Pluralistic Alignment Framework for Preventing Artificial Hivemind in Autonomous Agents
summary: This study proposes the Behavioral Protocol Framework (BPF), an entropy-controlled pluralistic alignment framework designed to address two critical challenges in autonomous agent economies: the hivemind effect arising from excessive strategic convergence among agents and the lack of transparency in autonomous decision-making processes. The proposed BPF consists of three core modules: Mentalizing-based Social Intelligence (MbSI) grounded in Theory of Mind (ToM), Pluralistic Alignment (PA), and a Verifiable Execution Kernel (VEK). These modules are organically integrated within a closed-loop architecture that governs the entire lifecycle of agent behavior, from decision-making and execution to verification and feedback. To evaluate the proposed framework, a simulation environment implemented in Python and a Streamlit-based user interface will be developed. Through empirical experimentation, the study aims to examine whether the entropy-control mechanism of the PA module can effectively preserve strategic diversity among agents and mitigate collective convergence, while the VEK module provides a comprehensive and transparent audit trail of the decision-making process. The anticipated results are expected to demonstrate that the proposed framework can simultaneously enhance the stability, efficiency, and trustworthiness of autonomous agent economies. Consequently, this research offers a practical approach for developing robust, transparent, and accountable agent-native economic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出行为协议框架（BPF），通过熵控多元对齐机制，缓解自主智能体经济中的群体思维效应与决策不透明问题，提升系统稳定性、效率与可信度。
AI.motivation: 解决自主智能体经济中因策略过度收敛导致的‘蜂群效应’以及自主决策过程缺乏透明性两大关键挑战。
AI.method: 构建包含心理理论驱动的社会智能（MbSI）、多元对齐（PA）和可验证执行内核（VEK）三模块的闭环行为协议框架（BPF），并在Python仿真环境与Streamlit界面中实证评估。
AI.result: 预期验证PA模块的熵控机制能有效维持智能体策略多样性、抑制集体收敛，VEK模块可提供完整、透明的决策审计轨迹。
AI.conclusion: BPF框架可同步增强自主智能体经济系统的稳定性、效率与可信度，为构建鲁棒、透明、可问责的智能体原生经济系统提供可行路径。

title: A Unifying View of Attention Sinks: Two Algorithms, Two Solutions
summary: When attention concentrates on a single token, a sink, what is the model actually computing? Attention sinks are ubiquitous in softmax transformers, yet this shared visual signature can hide fundamentally different algorithms. We show that visually similar sink patterns can reflect two distinct mechanisms: {i} adaptive nop, where a head suppresses its update by routing to a null token, and {ii} broadcast, where a sink aggregates and redistributes global information. In that case, sinks serve an analogous role: a safe destination when there is nothing useful to compute. Proposed interventions like gating or registers work because they implicitly target one or the other, revealing a duality between method and assumed mechanism: gating implicitly assumes nop; registers implicitly assume broadcast. Each mechanism leaves distinct traces (nop sinks exhibit negligible value norms; broadcast sinks induce low-rank outputs) which we formalize on synthetic tasks and use to derive practical diagnostics. Applied to pretrained vision transformers, these diagnostics reveal that both mechanisms exist at scale: sinks transition from CLS in early layers to patches in deeper layers, and concentrate in specialized heads. Strikingly, register tokens, designed for broadcast, are repurposed to also serve nop, confirming that neither intervention alone suffices. Combining gating with registers yields complementary gains in stability and performance. Overall, we find that the same attention pattern can reflect two very different computations and effective intervention requires first asking what the model is actually computing.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了注意力机制中'sink'模式的两种不同计算机制：自适应nop（抑制更新）和广播（聚合与分发全局信息），并提出了相应的诊断方法和干预策略。
AI.motivation: 注意力'sink'模式在softmax transformer中普遍存在，但其背后可能隐藏着完全不同的计算机制，需要深入理解其本质以设计有效的干预策略。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和合成任务实验，形式化了两种机制的特征（如nop sink的价值范数极小，broadcast sink导致低秩输出），并开发了实用的诊断工具；将这些工具应用于预训练视觉Transformer进行实证分析。
AI.result: 发现预训练ViT中两种机制共存，且sink位置随网络深度变化（从早期层的CLS token转向深层的patch token），并集中在特定注意力头上；注册token被重新用于nop机制，表明单一干预不足；结合门控与注册可带来互补的稳定性与性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 相同的注意力模式可能对应截然不同的计算过程，有效的干预策略需首先明确模型实际执行的计算类型。

title: Continuous Language Diffusion as a Decoder-Interface Problem
summary: Gaussian-corrupted sentence embeddings have no direct linguistic interpretation, yet continuous diffusion language models can generate fluent text from them. We study this puzzle through Embedded Language Flows (ELF) and identify a decoder-basin mechanism: denoising succeeds when trajectories reach regions where the native decoder can read stable tokens. We introduce a diagnostic protocol for denoisability, semantic recoverability, order sensitivity, decoder compatibility, and trajectory reliability. It exposes failures hidden by scalar metrics: low mean-squared error can discard linguistic content, low perplexity can reflect low-entropy collapse, and clean latent reconstruction can coexist with a narrow decoder basin. A decoder-margin bound explains why token recovery depends on margin and local decoder sensitivity, not latent error alone. Auditing public ELF checkpoints reveals an interface phase diagram: early predictions are weakly readable, mid-trajectory disagreement marks a competition region, and late predictions enter a high-margin final-token basin. Once inside, token realization is surprisingly simple on generated ELF states: frozen T5 token-embedding lookup recovers $93$--$96\%$ of native decoder decisions, and a single linear readout reaches $97.9\%$ agreement at 32k samples, leaving about a 1.1 perplexity gap in a structured residual tail. A conservative margin gate exits $17$--$27\%$ earlier in denoising steps under an explicit diagnostic monitor. Boundary checks on LangFlow, BitstreamDiffusion, and the Continuous Latent Diffusion Language Model (Cola-DLM) show that the same interface questions remain meaningful when the state object and decoder change. Continuous and latent diffusion language models should therefore be evaluated as representation-decoder systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了连续扩散语言模型如何从高斯噪声污染的句子嵌入中生成流畅文本，提出了Embedded Language Flows（ELF）框架，并揭示了‘解码器盆地’机制；通过新诊断协议发现传统标量指标（如MSE、困惑度）易掩盖语义失败，进而提出解码器边界理论，并在多个模型上验证了该机制的普适性，主张将扩散语言模型作为‘表征-解码器系统’整体评估。
AI.motivation: 高斯噪声污染的句子嵌入缺乏直接语言意义，却能驱动扩散模型生成流利文本，这一现象缺乏解释，亟需理解其内在机制与评估缺陷。
AI.method: 提出Embedded Language Flows（ELF）分析框架；设计多维诊断协议（可去噪性、语义可恢复性、顺序敏感性、解码器兼容性、轨迹可靠性）；推导解码器边界理论；在ELF、LangFlow、BitstreamDiffusion和Cola-DLM等模型上进行实证审计与边界检查。
AI.result: 发现去噪成功依赖于轨迹是否进入高边界的‘最终token盆地’；在该盆地内，仅用冻结T5嵌入查表即可恢复93–96%原生解码决策，单一线性读出达97.9%一致率；保守边界门控可提前17–27%终止去噪；传统指标（如低MSE/低困惑度）常掩盖语义退化或低熵坍缩。
AI.conclusion: 连续/潜在扩散语言模型不应孤立评估潜变量或解码器，而应作为耦合的‘表征-解码器系统’进行联合诊断；解码器局部敏感性与边界宽度比潜变量误差本身更关键；需超越标量指标，采用结构化轨迹分析。

title: FiberTune: Preserving Action-Fiber Visual Residuals in Vision-Language-Action Fine-Tuning
summary: Action-supervised fine-tuning of vision-language-action (VLA) policies fits demonstrations effectively but constrains only the directions that change predicted actions, leaving visual structure consistent across action-equivalent states free to collapse. We formalize this as residual visual collapse along local action fibers and propose FiberTune, a training-time objective that preserves teacher-structured visual residuals without adding inference-time overhead. FiberTune uses an online action probe to estimate action-predictive feature directions, filters them from intermediate visual-token representations, and aligns the resulting probe-filtered residuals to a frozen visual teacher while regularizing their effective rank. Under identical training conditions, FiberTune improves over task-loss-only fine-tuning in every one of six controlled simulation settings spanning two benchmarks and two architectures (pi_0.5 and OpenVLA-OFT), as well as on physical SO-101 pick-place; representative gains include +10.7 percentage points SR(5) on long-horizon CALVIN ABC-to-D and physical SO-101 task success rising from 72.7% to 78.1%. Residual diagnostics show that these gains coincide with increased probe-filtered residual teacher alignment and effective rank, consistent with the action-fiber motivation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FiberTune方法，通过在训练时保留动作等价状态下的视觉残差结构，缓解视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略微调中的残余视觉坍塌问题，在多个仿真与真实机器人任务上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 动作监督的VLA策略微调虽能有效拟合演示数据，但仅约束动作预测方向，导致动作等价状态下的视觉表征结构坍塌（即残余视觉坍塌）。
AI.method: FiberTune设计了一个训练时目标：利用在线动作探针估计动作预测性特征方向，从视觉token中滤除这些方向，再将剩余残差对齐冻结的视觉教师模型，并对其有效秩施加正则化。
AI.result: 在六个受控仿真设置（涵盖CALVIN和SO-101基准、pi_0.5与OpenVLA-OFT架构）及真实SO-101机器人任务上，FiberTune均优于仅用任务损失的微调；例如CALVIN长程任务SR(5)提升+10.7个百分点，真实机器人任务成功率从72.7%升至78.1%。残差诊断证实残差对齐度与有效秩同步提升。
AI.conclusion: FiberTune通过显式建模动作纤维上的视觉残差结构，在不增加推理开销的前提下，有效缓解视觉坍塌，提升了VLA策略的泛化性与鲁棒性。

title: SynManDex: Synthesizing Human-like Dexterous Grasps from Synthetic Human Pre-Grasps
summary: Human hand-object interactions encode functional intent, but direct transfer to robotic hands often fails under morphology, contact, and reachability constraints. We present SynManDex, a synthetic pipeline that uses generated human pre-grasps as affordance-aware proposals and resolves the final contacts with robot-native optimization. SynManDex samples object-conditioned digital human pre-grasps, retargets them to dexterous robotic hand poses, optimizes force-closure contacts on the target embodiment, and admits trajectories that pass checks from each step. The resulting keyframes support both grasp-and-lift demonstrations and various prehensile manipulation tasks such as tea pouring, photo taking, and flute playing, designed via VLM agents. As a result, SynManDex combines high grasp quality (86.4\% grasp stability) with 4.67/5 human-likeness (93.4\%). It achieves 80.7\% successes in simulation and 25/30 (83.3\%) real-robot successes when applied to a 36-DOF bimanual dexterous robotic platform.

AI.tldr: SynManDex是一种合成管道，利用生成的人类预抓取姿态作为功能感知的初始建议，并通过机器人本体优化最终接触点，从而实现高质量、高拟人度且可迁移的机器人手-物交互。
AI.motivation: 人类手-物交互蕴含功能意图，但直接迁移到机器人手常因形态学、接触和可达性约束而失败。
AI.method: SynManDex首先采样物体条件下的数字人预抓取姿态，将其重定向至灵巧机器人手姿态，再在目标机器人本体上优化力闭合接触点，并验证各阶段轨迹可行性；最终关键帧支持抓取-提升演示及多种操作任务（如倒茶、拍照、吹笛），由视觉语言模型（VLM）代理设计。
AI.result: 在仿真中达到80.7%成功率，在36自由度双手机器人平台上实现30次实机实验中25次成功（83.3%）；抓取稳定性达86.4%，人类相似度评分为4.67/5（93.4%）。
AI.conclusion: SynManDex有效融合了人类先验与机器人本体约束，在保持高拟人表现的同时实现了鲁棒、可泛化的灵巧操作能力。

title: REFLECT: Intervention-Supported Error Attribution for Silent Failures in LLM Agent Traces
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents now solve complex tasks through long plan-and-execution traces, yet the ability to locate errors in a completed traces still lags far behind, especially in the \emph{silent failure} regime. Existing approaches predict suspect steps via classifiers or LLM judges, or recover correct answers via retry, but none feed the intervention outcome back to \emph{refine the attribution itself}. We propose \methodname, a method that closes this gap by diagnosing a candidate error step, testing it through controlled replay with a diagnosis-specific patch, and using the verified outcome flip as contrastive evidence to refine the final attribution. Across four localization benchmarks spanning multi-hop reasoning across domains, \methodname achieves the highest localization accuracy among same-auditor methods across all four benchmarks, with the largest gains on structured tool-use traces, while providing actionable localization even when ground-truth answers are unavailable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为\methodname的新方法，用于在大型语言模型（LLM）代理的长计划-执行轨迹中精确定位错误步骤，尤其针对‘静默失败’情形。该方法通过诊断候选错误步骤、用特定补丁进行受控重放测试，并利用结果翻转作为对比证据来迭代优化错误归因。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在LLM代理执行轨迹中定位错误（尤其是静默失败）的能力不足，且缺乏将干预结果反馈以改进错误归因本身的机制。
AI.method: \methodname方法包含三步：（1）诊断候选错误步骤；（2）使用诊断专用补丁进行受控重放测试；（3）依据测试结果是否翻转（即输出变化）作为对比证据， refine最终的错误归因。
AI.result: 在四个跨领域的多跳推理定位基准上，\methodname在同类审计器方法中均取得最高定位准确率，尤其在结构化工具调用轨迹上提升最显著；即使无真实答案标签，仍可提供可操作的错误定位。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入基于结果验证的反馈闭环，\methodname显著提升了LLM代理执行轨迹中错误定位的准确性与实用性，为可信AI系统调试提供了新范式。

title: Conditional Random Ordered Transport Spaces
summary: A small Wasserstein distance does not certify that a transformation is admissible. In evidence-constrained, semantic, causal, physical, monotone, or risk-sensitive learning, one must ask not only how far two probability laws are, but whether mass has moved in a direction allowed by available information. We introduce conditional random ordered transport spaces (CROTS), a class of \(L^0\)-valued spaces of random probability measures equipped with a Wasserstein ambient metric, a closed stochastic order, hard and soft ordered transport discrepancies, and a conditional risk functional for evaluating order violation under an evidence sigma-field. The central object is an order-admissible transport geometry for random measure-valued dynamics, distinct from cone-valued metrics, ordered Kantorovich constructions, random Wasserstein spaces alone, and model-specific residuals for generative paths. We develop the foundations of CROTS as a space theory for reliable distributional learning. The results include well-posedness and duality for hard and soft ordered transport, soft-to-hard variational convergence, measurability and completeness of the random lifted space, reductions to classical Wasserstein and ordered geometries, ordered geodesics, constrained barycenters and projections, conditional risk-transport duality, and separation of order-violating distributions. The main stability theorem shows that random learning dynamics may converge in the ambient Wasserstein metric while its local admissibility leakage follows a separate conditional order-risk recursion. The resulting asymptotic order-risk floor provides a mathematical language for evidence overreach, ordered distribution shift, robustness failure, and admissible distributional dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出条件随机有序传输空间（CROTS），用于在分布学习中刻画和控制基于证据约束的有序性（如因果、语义、物理等），扩展Wasserstein度量以纳入方向性约束，并建立其数学基础与稳定性理论。
AI.motivation: 传统Wasserstein距离无法反映概率质量移动是否符合领域知识所要求的方向性约束（如因果、单调、风险敏感等）；需在分布学习中同时评估距离与方向合规性。
AI.method: 构建条件随机有序传输空间（CROTS），包含Wasserstein环境度量、闭随机序、硬/软有序传输差异及条件风险泛函；发展其空间理论，包括对偶性、变分收敛、可测性、完备性、几何结构（有序测地线、约束质心）及条件风险-传输对偶。
AI.result: 建立了CROTS的严格数学框架，证明了硬/软有序传输的良定性与对偶性、软到硬变分收敛、随机提升空间的可测性与完备性、多种经典几何的还原、有序测地线与约束投影的存在性、条件风险-传输对偶，以及核心稳定性定理：Wasserstein收敛下局部顺序违规风险满足独立的条件递归。
AI.conclusion: CROTS为证据驱动的可靠分布学习提供了统一的几何与风险建模范式，其渐近顺序风险下界为理解证据越界、有序分布偏移与鲁棒性失效提供了新的数学语言。

title: PaperMentor: A Human-Centered Multi-Agent Writing Tutor for AI Research Papers on Overleaf
comment: Accepted to the ACL 2026 Demo Track
summary: Expert writing feedback from experienced researchers is critical for early-career scholars to improve their manuscripts, yet high-quality feedback often remains scarce because reviewing research papers is labor-intensive. Emerging AI-powered writing assistants largely focus on grammar fixes or simulating peer review with final scores, yet they fall short of providing concrete, actionable suggestions that help students improve their papers during drafting. We present PaperMentor, a human-centered writing assistant system that delivers actionable suggestions as Overleaf-native inline comments while leaving the actual writing entirely to human authors. PaperMentor integrates an expert skill library carefully curated from established researchers' writing advice with 12 specialized agents covering different aspects of paper writing, such as formatting compliance, phrasing accuracy, and terminology consistency. In a user study (n=14), 90.6% of the generated comments were rated actionable and 67.5% were rated valid, significantly outperforming a GPT-5.2 baseline uswithout the skill library. We release PaperMentor as open source for public use. Our code is publicly available under the AGPL-3.0 license at https://github.com/jiarui-liu/overleaf

AI.tldr: 本文提出PaperMentor，一个基于专家技能库和12个专用智能体的、面向Overleaf平台的人机协同写作辅助系统，旨在为初学者提供具体、可操作的论文写作建议。
AI.motivation: 高质量的专家写作反馈对早期研究者至关重要，但人工审阅耗时费力；现有AI工具多聚焦语法纠错或模拟评审打分，缺乏在撰写过程中提供具体、可操作改进建议的能力。
AI.method: 构建了一个集成专家技能库（源自资深研究者写作经验）与12个专业化智能体（覆盖格式合规、措辞准确、术语一致等维度）的Overleaf原生插件系统PaperMentor，并开展n=14的用户研究评估其有效性。
AI.result: 用户研究表明，90.6%的生成评论被评定为‘可操作’，67.5%被评定为‘有效’，显著优于未使用技能库的GPT-5.2基线模型。
AI.conclusion: PaperMentor验证了融合领域专家知识与多智能体协同设计在人机协同学术写作辅助中的有效性，开源发布以促进社区发展。

title: WaveDiT: Distribution-Aware Wavelet Flow Matching for Efficient 3D Brain MRI Synthesis
summary: Large and demographically balanced datasets are essential for reliable neuroimaging biomarkers. Full-resolution 3D brain MRI synthesis can support data augmentation in this setting, but existing approaches either incur prohibitive computational cost at volumetric scale or rely on lossy latent compression that may compromise anatomical detail. As a result, practical 3D generative augmentation often requires specialized compute infrastructure. We propose WaveDiT, a conditional flow matching framework operating in the coefficient space of a 3D Haar Discrete Wavelet Transform. The model combines factorized spatio-depth attention with band-wise heteroscedastic uncertainty modeling derived from higher-order wavelet statistics. Predicted log-variance is integrated directly into both the flow objective and conditioning pathway, enabling adaptive precision consistent with the heavy-tailed and input-dependent variance structure of anatomical detail. This formulation supports full-resolution 3D synthesis under practical memory and time constraints on a single modern GPU. Evaluation on a multi-site cohort demonstrates improved alignment between generated and real MRI distributions, together with enhanced downstream brain age prediction and region-level anatomical agreement relative to diffusion, latent, and wavelet-based baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/sisinflab/WaveDiT

AI.tldr: 本文提出WaveDiT，一种基于3D Haar小波系数空间的条件流匹配框架，用于高效、高保真全分辨率3D脑MRI合成，支持单GPU训练，在多中心数据上显著提升生成图像质量与下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D脑MRI生成方法存在计算开销大或压缩损失解剖细节的问题，难以在常规硬件上实现高质量数据增强。
AI.method: WaveDiT在3D Haar小波系数空间中构建条件流匹配模型，引入因子化空-深注意力机制和基于高阶小波统计的频带异方差不确定性建模，并将预测的对数方差融入流目标函数和条件路径中。
AI.result: 在多中心队列上验证表明，WaveDiT生成MRI分布更贴近真实数据，在脑龄预测和区域解剖一致性上优于扩散模型、潜在空间及其它小波基线方法。
AI.conclusion: WaveDiT实现了兼顾计算效率与解剖保真度的全分辨率3D MRI生成，为神经影像生物标志物研究提供了实用的数据增强新范式。

title: AHA-WAM:Asynchronous Horizon-Adaptive World-Action Modeling with Observation-Guided Context Routing
summary: World-action models have emerged as a promising paradigm for robot manipulation, jointly modeling visual scene dynamics and actions to inject physical priors into policy learning. However, existing world-action models couple world prediction and action execution at the same temporal resolution, forcing the world branch to model near-term frame variations that are redundant and weakly informative. We posit that strictly binding world prediction and action execution to the same temporal rhythm may underutilize the potential of the video branch for embodied control. Therefore, we propose AHA-WAM, an Asynchronous Horizon-Adaptive World-Action Model built on a dual Diffusion Transformer (DiT) architecture that reorganizes world-action modeling around this temporal asymmetry. AHA-WAM instantiates the video DiT as a low-frequency world planner that maintains rolling key-value memory over past observations and exposes reusable layerwise latent context encoding long-horizon scene evolution, while a high-frequency action DiT executes short action chunks in closed loop by querying this context through layerwise joint attention. To support asynchronous execution, we introduce horizon-adaptive offset training and Observation-Guided Video-Context Routing (OVCR), which together let the action expert exploit long-horizon world context while remaining responsive to real-time execution state without rerunning the video DiT. Experiments on RoboTwin and real-world manipulation tasks show that AHA-WAM achieves state-of-the-art performance without any robot-data pretraining, attaining 92.80% average success on RoboTwin and 78.3% success across 4 real-world tasks, while reaching 24.17 Hz closed-loop control with a 4.59x speedup over Fast-WAM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AHA-WAM，一种异步、时域自适应的世界-动作模型，通过双Diffusion Transformer架构解耦低频世界建模与高频动作执行，在不依赖机器人数据预训练的情况下显著提升操纵任务性能与控制频率。
AI.motivation: 现有世界-动作模型将世界预测与动作执行绑定在同一时间分辨率，导致视频分支建模冗余且信息量低的短期帧变化，未能充分利用视频分支对具身控制的潜力。
AI.method: 提出AHA-WAM：采用双Diffusion Transformer（DiT）架构，其中视频DiT作为低频世界规划器，维护滚动KV记忆并输出层式长时程场景隐状态；动作DiT作为高频执行器，通过层式联合注意力查询该隐状态；引入时域自适应偏移训练与观测引导的视频-上下文路由（OVCR）实现异步高效执行。
AI.result: 在RoboTwin上平均成功率92.80%，4个真实世界任务平均成功率78.3%，闭环控制达24.17 Hz，较Fast-WAM提速4.59倍，且无需机器人数据预训练。
AI.conclusion: 解耦世界建模与动作执行的时间尺度可显著提升世界-动作模型的效率与性能，AHA-WAM为具身智能提供了更高效、更鲁棒的端到端控制范式。

title: DynaOD: Dynamic Origin-Destination Flow Generation with Discrete-to-Continuous Temporal Semantic Modeling
summary: Dynamic origin-destination (OD) flow generation seeks to synthesize realistic mobility dynamics from temporal context alone, without relying on historical OD observations. A key challenge is to translate semantic temporal signals into temporally coherent OD patterns while preserving the inherent spatial heterogeneity of urban regions. We propose DynaOD, a semantic-driven framework that models temporal dynamics through two complementary perspectives: discrete directional trends that characterize qualitative shifts in urban activity patterns, and continuous temporal evolution that captures how such shifts unfold over time. By jointly encoding these temporal semantics, the framework constructs time-varying region representations that condition pretrained static OD generators in a lightweight and plug-and-play fashion. This modular design further supports scalable deployment and cross-city transferability. Extensive experiments on large-scale real-world datasets show that our method consistently outperforms representative baselines in both predictive accuracy and distributional fidelity. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/csjiezhao/DynaOD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DynaOD框架，通过离散方向趋势和连续时间演化两种互补视角建模语义时间动态，生成高保真、时空一致的动态OD流，无需历史OD数据，具有轻量、即插即用、可扩展和跨城市迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 动态OD流生成面临如何仅从时间上下文中合成真实移动性动态、同时保持城市区域空间异质性的挑战。
AI.method: 提出DynaOD框架，联合编码离散的方向趋势（刻画城市活动模式的定性变化）与连续的时间演化（刻画变化过程），构建时变区域表征，以轻量方式调节预训练静态OD生成器。
AI.result: 在大规模真实数据集上实验表明，该方法在预测精度和分布保真度上均持续优于代表性基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DynaOD实现了无需历史OD观测的高质量动态OD生成，具备模块化、可扩展和跨城市迁移优势，为城市动态建模提供了新范式。

title: TRUST-SCF: Transformer-based Risk Understanding and Scoring for Transactional Supply Chain Finance
summary: Supply Chain Finance (SCF) and LendTech platforms need credit scoring systems that respond to evolving transaction behavior, repayment delays, and active exposure. We propose TRUST-SCF, a transformer-based framework for transaction-level risk prediction and dynamic credit scoring. Each user history is represented as a sequence of transaction tokens containing utilization, repayment delay and transaction position. The main contributions are: (1) a financially aligned attention bias that combines utilization similarity and recency, enabling the model to compare repayment behavior under comparable exposure conditions; (2) continuous repayment-delay prediction in a log-transformed target space, reducing the influence of extreme delays while improving sensitivity to short-delay behavior and (3) a label-efficient credit-scoring pipeline in which the final credit score is not trained using any explicit external credit-score label, but is instead derived from predicted delay, potential risk over simulated utilization, actual unpaid exposure, and nonlinear calibration. Experiments on real transaction data from more than 300,000 transactions show that TRUST-SCF improves delay prediction over sequential baselines and produces scores that are strongly associated with future repayment behavior. These results suggest that TRUST-SCF is a practical framework for adaptive credit scoring and transaction-level risk mitigation in SCF and LendTech environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRUST-SCF，一种基于Transformer的交易级风险预测与动态信用评分框架，通过金融对齐的注意力机制、对数变换的延迟预测及无显式标签的信用评分流程，在真实供应链金融数据上验证了其优于时序基线模型的效果。
AI.motivation: 供应链金融（SCF）和LendTech平台需要能响应交易行为变化、还款延迟和活跃敞口的信用评分系统。
AI.method: 提出TRUST-SCF框架：将用户交易历史建模为包含使用率、还款延迟和位置信息的序列；设计金融对齐的注意力偏置（融合使用率相似性与时间近因）；采用对数变换空间进行连续还款延迟预测；构建标签高效信用评分流程，信用分由预测延迟、模拟使用率下的潜在风险、实际未偿敞口及非线性校准联合导出。
AI.result: 在超30万真实交易数据上的实验表明，TRUST-SCF在还款延迟预测上优于时序基线模型，生成的信用分与未来还款行为强相关。
AI.conclusion: TRUST-SCF是一种适用于SCF与LendTech场景的实用化、自适应信用评分与交易级风险缓释框架。

title: Building Customer Support AI Agents at 100M-User Scale: An Evaluation-Driven Framework
summary:
The rapid rise in LLM capabilities has made AI agents increasingly viable across a broad range of tasks. Among the most promising applications is building production-ready customer-facing agents, a challenge that demands coordinated excellence in evaluation methodology, context engineering, training, and online measurement. Yet these critical pillars are typically developed in isolation, creating blind spots that only surface after deployment.
  In this paper, we present a unified framework that bridges offline development with online impact for customer support AI agents at Nubank, a company with 100M+ users. Our approach integrates several key components: (1) structured context engineering tailored to customer support agents, (2) systematic human-in-the-loop prompt iteration, (3) rigorous LLM judge evaluation with measured inter-rater agreement and GEPA optimization for consistency, and (4) ideation-to-production validation.
  A central insight is that evaluation-pipeline quality directly determines iteration velocity. We present results from five production deployments spanning distinct domains: card delivery, debt management, credit-limit support, card management, and product explanation. These deployments deliver consistent customer-satisfaction gains while substantially accelerating iteration. In our card-delivery deployment, large-scale A/B testing yields a 37 percentage-point improvement in AI transactional Net Promoter Score and a 29 percentage-point gain in self-service rate over prior agent variants, alongside a strong correlation between offline simulation metrics and online outcomes, demonstrating that eval-driven development reliably predicts production impact. On most use cases, AI satisfaction reaches within a few percentage points of expert human agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一框架，将离线开发与线上效果结合，用于构建面向客户的AI客服代理，并在Nubank的五个实际业务场景中验证了其有效性，显著提升了客户满意度和自助服务率。
AI.motivation: 现有AI代理的关键环节（评估方法、上下文工程、训练、在线测量）常孤立发展，导致部署后才暴露问题，亟需统一框架弥合离线开发与线上效果之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出集成结构化上下文工程、人工参与的提示迭代、基于LLM裁判的严格评估（含评分者一致性测量与GEPA优化）、以及从创意到生产的全流程验证的统一框架。
AI.result: 在五个生产部署中实现客户满意度持续提升与迭代速度大幅加快；其中卡片交付场景A/B测试显示AI事务性净推荐值提升37个百分点、自助服务率提升29个百分点，且离线指标与线上结果高度相关；多数场景下AI满意度接近专家人工水平。
AI.conclusion: 评估流水线质量直接决定迭代速度，以评估驱动的开发范式能可靠预测并提升AI代理的线上实际效果。

title: Learning to Solve Generative ODEs Beyond the Linear Span
summary: Diffusion and flow generative models sample by integrating a learned ODE, but high quality still requires many sequential model evaluations. Solver learning reduces this cost by adapting scalar coefficients, timesteps, or both, while keeping the backbone model fixed. In this work, we identify a structural bottleneck in this update family: each step remains span-limited. Since the scalar-coefficient update lies in the span of buffered velocity evaluations, it can fit only the in-span component while leaving any out-of-span residual unreachable by scalar recombination alone. We propose SpanLift, a lightweight neural solver that augments scalar-coefficient updates with a spatial residual operator. SpanLift keeps a fixed base solver as an in-span prior and learns a spatial residual operator over the state and velocity buffer. The operator is trained by endpoint teacher matching, preserves the pretrained backbone, and adds no model NFEs. Empirically, the learned correction transfers across base solvers and is predominantly out-of-span. Across pixel-space diffusion, latent flow matching, and precipitation nowcasting, SpanLift achieves state-of-the-art few-step sampling. With only 3 NFE, it improves CIFAR-10 FID from 8.16 to 5.69 and ImageNet FID from 17.37 to 11.83.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpanLift，一种轻量级神经求解器，通过在标量系数更新基础上增加空间残差算子来突破传统求解器的span限制，显著提升少步采样质量，且不增加模型前向计算次数（NFE）。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散与流生成模型依赖大量顺序模型评估以保证采样质量，而求解器学习虽能降低计算成本，但其标量系数更新受限于已有速度缓冲的线性张成空间（span-limited），无法捕捉span外的残差成分。
AI.method: SpanLift保持固定基础求解器作为in-span先验，引入一个可学习的空间残差算子作用于状态与速度缓冲；该算子通过端点教师匹配方式训练，不修改预训练主干模型，也不增加NFE。
AI.result: SpanLift在像素空间扩散、潜在空间流匹配和降水临近预报任务上均达到少步采样SOTA性能：仅用3次NFE，CIFAR-10 FID从8.16降至5.69，ImageNet FID从17.37降至11.83；且所学修正具有跨基础求解器泛化能力，且主要为out-of-span成分。
AI.conclusion: SpanLift有效突破了标量更新的span瓶颈，证明引入轻量空间残差是提升少步生成质量的关键路径，为高效生成建模提供了新范式。

title: iMaC: Translating Actions into Motion and Contact Images for Embodied World Models
summary: Embodied world models have emerged as a pivotal paradigm for visual robotic decision-making and interactive environment simulation. However, conventional embodied frameworks rely on low-dimensional structured action vectors (e.g., joint angles and end-effector poses), which suffer from limited expressive capacity, poor generalization across diverse embodiments, and unnatural dynamic modeling for complex physical interactions. To address these limitations, this paper proposesiMac (Image as Action Control), a novel unified control paradigm that treats raw visual images as native action representations for embodied world models. Departing from traditional explicit kinematic action encoding, iMac formulates continuous visual manipulation as image-based action tokens, which inherently encapsulate spatial motion intentions, interactive geometric constraints and subtle physical dynamics. We construct a dual-branch embodied architecture consisting of an image-action encoder and a dynamic world predictor: the encoder compresses target-driven visual images into compact action embeddings, while the predictor learns environment transition rules conditioned on image actions to achieve high-fidelity future state prediction and closed-loop embodied control. Extensive experiments are conducted on public embodied manipulation benchmarks and real-world robotic scenarios. The results demonstrate that iMac outperforms vector-based action control baselines in prediction accuracy, task success rate and cross-scene generalization ability. Moreover, our image-action design eliminates the reliance on manually defined action spaces, realizing flexible and universal control for heterogeneous embodied agents. This work provides an innovative visual-action perspective for embodied world models, offering a simple yet effective paradigm for scalable robotic perception and manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出iMac（Image as Action Control），一种将原始视觉图像作为动作表示的新范式，用于具身世界模型，以克服传统低维结构化动作向量的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统具身框架依赖低维结构化动作向量（如关节角、末端位姿），存在表达能力弱、跨形态泛化差、复杂物理交互建模不自然等问题。
AI.method: 提出iMac范式，将目标驱动的视觉图像编码为图像动作token，并构建双分支架构：图像动作编码器压缩图像为动作嵌入，动态世界预测器基于图像动作学习环境状态转移，实现高保真未来状态预测与闭环控制。
AI.result: 在公开具身操作基准和真实机器人场景中，iMac在预测精度、任务成功率和跨场景泛化能力上均优于向量动作基线；且无需人工定义动作空间，支持异构具身智能体的灵活通用控制。
AI.conclusion: iMac为具身世界模型提供了创新的‘视觉即动作’视角，是一种简单而有效的可扩展机器人感知与操作新范式。

title: Graph2Idea:Retrieval-Augmented Scientific Idea Generation with Graph-Structured Contexts
summary: Generating novel, feasible, and high-quality research ideas is an important yet challenging task in scientific discovery.Recent Large Language Model (LLM)-based methods often ground idea generation with retrieved literature, but the retrieved evidence is usually provided as flat text, such as titles, abstracts, or summaries.
