Finally, we used 12 features (network measures, emotional scores, and spreading activation simulations) in a machine learning model using ridge regression to predict individual creativity scores. The combination of structurally similar layers, as identified in the previous stage, improved a proof-of-concept prediction accuracy by 50%. Structural measures showed the highest feature importance, with spreading activation dynamics providing additional predictive power. Together, these findings indicate that multiplex semantic networks capture a richer, cross-cultural picture of associative knowledge underlying creativity. We also release our diverse dataset and code to foster diverse computational approaches within the creativity community.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过构建来自六种认知任务的多层语义网络（multiplex semantic networks），更全面地建模创造力背后的联想知识结构；发现多任务网络具有非冗余性，能更好区分高低创造力人群，AI生成网络则缺乏这种区分能力；结合结构特征与扩散激活模拟的机器学习模型将创造力预测准确率提升50%。
AI.motivation: 现有创造力研究多依赖单一任务，难以全面刻画其依赖语义记忆组织与提取的复杂认知本质，亟需跨任务、跨文化的综合建模方法。
AI.method: 基于518名来自奥地利、美国、新加坡和意大利被试在言语流畅性、句子链、自由联想和叙事写作等任务中的反应，构建多层语义网络；引入AI人格化响应作基线；采用结构可约性分析、网络测量、情感评分与扩散激活模拟，并用岭回归预测个体创造力得分。
AI.result: 不同任务层提供非冗余语义组织信息；高低创造力组的网络结构显著可分，而AI网络无此区分；融合结构相似层特征使预测准确率提升50%；结构指标最重要，扩散激活进一步增强预测力。
AI.conclusion: 多层语义网络能更丰富、跨文化地表征创造力所依赖的联想知识；该框架兼具理论解释力与计算可操作性，并开源数据与代码以推动领域发展。

title: NutriMLLM: Multimodal Large Language Models for Dietary Micronutrient Analysis
summary: Comprehensive estimation of dietary micronutrients from food images could improve clinical nutrition care, but training such models requires large multimodal datasets linking diverse foods to complete nutrient profiles. We first show that existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs), including leading proprietary models, are unreliable for this task. Across five model families and four independent evaluation benchmarks (ASA24, SNAPMe, FNDDS, and NutriBench), models frequently abstained or returned statistically implausible values. To address this gap without costly expert annotation, we repurposed a decade of population-scale 24-hour dietary recalls as structured prompts for text-to-image generation. This pipeline produced a synthetic corpus of about 1.1 million image-description-nutrient triplets, each pairing a generated food image with a complete 65-nutrient label. To our knowledge, this is the largest synthetic food-image corpus with comprehensive micronutrient annotation planned for public release upon publication. Fine-tuning Qwen3-VL (2B/4B/8B/30B) and GLM-4.6V-Flash on this corpus yielded NutriMLLM, the first family of vision-language models specialized for comprehensive dietary micronutrient estimation. We evaluate these models with a four-component framework that separately measures abstention, hallucination, overall usability, and per-nutrient numerical accuracy. On real food images, every NutriMLLM variant achieved near-complete coverage across all 65 nutrients, and the largest variant matched or exceeded proprietary baselines (GPT-5, Gemini 3, and Claude Sonnet 4.5) in accuracy on most nutrients. These results show that recall-driven synthetic supervision can make image-based comprehensive micronutrient estimation a tractable engineering problem and support dietary assessment, personalized nutrition guidance, and population-scale micronutrient surveillance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NutriMLLM，一种基于合成数据训练的视觉语言模型家族，用于从食物图像中全面估计65种膳食微量营养素；通过将十年膳食回忆数据转化为110万图像-描述-营养三元组，解决了缺乏大规模多模态营养标注数据的问题，并在多个基准上超越主流闭源模型。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在膳食微量营养素估计任务上表现不可靠，频繁拒绝回答或输出统计上不合理的值；而构建真实的大规模、高精度、含完整营养成分标注的食品图像数据集成本高昂。
AI.method: 利用十年人口级24小时膳食回顾数据，作为结构化提示驱动文生图模型生成约110万张食品图像，并自动关联完整的65种营养素标签，构建大规模合成食品图像-营养数据集；在此数据集上微调Qwen3-VL和GLM-4.6V-Flash系列模型，得到NutriMLLM；采用四维评估框架（拒答率、幻觉率、整体可用性、单营养素数值精度）进行评测。
AI.result: 所有NutriMLLM变体在真实食品图像上对65种营养素均实现近全覆盖；最大参数量模型在多数营养素上的估计精度达到或超过GPT-5、Gemini 3和Claude Sonnet 4.5等专有模型；该合成数据集将是首个计划公开发布的含全面微量营养素标注的大规模食品图像数据集。
AI.conclusion: 基于膳食回顾驱动的合成监督范式，可使图像驱动的全面微量营养素评估成为可行的工程问题，为临床营养评估、个性化膳食指导及人群级微量营养素监测提供新工具。

title: Self-Explainability in Self-Adaptive and Self-Organising Systems: Status and Research Directions
comment: Under review as a regular paper at ACM Transactions on Autonomous and Adaptive Systems (TAAS)
summary: The growing complexity of self-adaptive and self-organising systems, fuelled by advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI), has made them increasingly difficult to understand and trust. While Explainable AI aims to provide insight into AI decision-making, a more advanced goal is for systems to explain themselves - an ability referred to as Self-Explainability (SX). This article presents a systematic literature review on SX, analysing existing approaches, including their domains, targets, and evaluation methods. The review develops a unified definition and taxonomy of SX and introduces Levels of Self-Explainability, providing a framework for positioning current and future research. Our results show that most SX approaches remain conceptual, with few practical implementations. Moreover, there is currently no formal or de facto standard for evaluating SX, highlighting a major research gap. This work thus establishes a foundation and roadmap for advancing Self-Explainability in complex systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统性文献综述，提出了自解释性（SX）的统一定义、分类法及解释能力等级框架，指出当前SX研究多为概念性，缺乏实践实现与标准化评估方法。
AI.motivation: 随着AI驱动的自适应与自组织系统日益复杂，其可理解性与可信度下降；Explainable AI难以满足更高阶的系统自主解释需求，因此需发展Self-Explainability（SX）。
AI.method: 采用系统性文献综述（SLR）方法，分析现有SX方法的领域、目标与评估方式，并据此构建统一定义、分类法和SX等级框架。
AI.result: 确立了SX的统一定义与 taxonomy；提出Levels of Self-Explainability框架；发现多数SX工作仍属概念阶段，且缺乏正式或事实上的评估标准。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为SX领域奠定了理论基础与发展方向，明确了亟需加强实践实现与标准化评估的研究路径。

title: When Are Neural Interaction Discoveries Real? Identifiability, Recoverability, and a Pre-Fit Diagnostic
summary: When a neural time-series model reports that one variable modulates another's effect on a target, is the discovered interaction a property of the data or an artifact of model flexibility? We argue that this is fundamentally a question of identifiability, governed by the geometry of the observed input support rather than by the specific neural architecture. We study the problem in a multiplicative-gating extension of neural additive vector autoregression (GNAVAR), in which source contributions are modulated by other lagged variables. We show that representational capacity is not identifiability: dependent inputs induce leakage between edge-specific interaction terms, and low-dimensional support permits distinct interaction decompositions that agree on the observed data while differing elsewhere. We then prove a population identifiability theorem for normalized minimal GNAVAR decompositions under explicit support conditions, including settings with shared modulators. The theory yields a simple practitioner-facing diagnostic: the effective rank of the joint lag-block covariance predicts, before fitting, whether interaction recovery is feasible for a given candidate set. When the candidate set is unknown, a two-seed stability check provides a practical operational test. The same support condition organizes empirical outcomes into the three states predicted by the theory. Our results show that interaction recoverability depends on support geometry, that effective rank provides a practical pre-fit diagnostic, and that instability across independent fits is a characteristic signature of non-identifiable interaction discovery. The identifiability phenomenon, the support condition, and the instability signature are model-agnostic; GNAVAR is the vehicle that makes them provable.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了神经时间序列模型中变量间交互作用的可识别性问题，指出其根本取决于观测数据的支持集几何结构而非具体模型架构，并在GNAVAR模型框架下建立了可识别性理论及实用诊断方法。
AI.motivation: 当神经时间序列模型报告某变量调制另一变量对目标的影响时，该发现是数据固有属性还是模型灵活性导致的假象？作者认为这是本质上的可识别性问题。
AI.method: 基于乘性门控的神经加性向量自回归（GNAVAR）模型，分析输入支持集几何对交互项可识别性的影响；提出归一化极小分解的总体可识别性定理，并导出基于联合滞后块协方差有效秩的预拟合诊断与双种子稳定性检验方法。
AI.result: 证明了在显式支持条件下归一化极小GNAVAR分解的总体可识别性；发现有效秩可预测交互恢复可行性；双种子不稳定性是不可识别性的经验标志；该现象、条件与签名具有模型无关性。
AI.conclusion: 交互作用是否可恢复取决于输入支持集的几何结构，而非模型选择；有效秩是实用的预拟合诊断指标；拟合结果的不稳定性是不可识别性的关键实证信号；该结论适用于各类神经时间序列交互建模。

title: What Should a Skill Remember? Quality-Cost Trade-offs in Cost-Aware Skill Rewriting for Language Model Agents
summary: Large language model agents increasingly rely on skills: reusable procedural documents encoding workflows, tool use, implementation patterns, validation checks, and domain rules. Skill rewriting is often treated as prompt compression, but shorter skills can make agents more expensive by removing sparse operational anchors that prevent exploration, debugging, and recovery. We study skill rewriting through this economic lens. Our controlled framework profiles skill structure, rewrites skills using information-preservation strategies, and evaluates the rewrites under fixed task instructions, environments, and verifiers. Experiments on SkillsBench reveal distinct quality--cost trade-offs across strategies: API/code anchoring, workflow guarding, and rule/formula anchoring benefit different task families, with no universally dominant template. In the main held-out evaluation, the learned policy reduces total cost by 7.0\% and downstream agent-token cost by 6.0\%; in frozen cross-model transfer, the corresponding reductions average 14.7\% and 13.7\%, while verifier quality is preserved. These results position skill design as cost-aware operational knowledge engineering rather than prompt compression. Resources: \href{https://github.com/1Reminding/Skill_EE}{SkillEE}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出从经济角度重新审视技能重写，强调保留稀疏操作锚点的重要性，并通过信息保留策略优化技能结构，在多个评估中显著降低成本同时保持验证质量。
AI.motivation: 技能重写常被简化为提示压缩，但过短的技能可能因丢失关键操作锚点而增加代理成本，影响探索、调试与恢复能力。
AI.method: 构建受控框架，分析技能结构，采用信息保留策略进行重写，并在固定任务指令、环境和验证器下评估重写效果。
AI.result: 在SkillsBench上实验表明不同锚定策略适用于不同任务；主评估中总成本降低7.0%，下游agent-token成本降低6.0%；跨模型迁移中分别平均降低14.7%和13.7%，验证质量保持不变。
AI.conclusion: 技能设计应被视为成本感知的操作知识工程，而非单纯的提示压缩。

title: Rethinking 3D Shape Generation: Diffusion over Superquadrics
summary: Diffusion models have advanced 3D shape generation, yet most methods still denoise in high-cardinality spaces (e.g., voxel/SDF grids, meshes, or point clouds), which is computationally and memory intensive and makes it difficult to scale in terms of both higher resolution and stronger controllability. We rethink the diffusion representation and propose to move diffusion from dense geometry to compact geometric primitives, representing each shape as a small set of superquadrics. Instead of operating on thousands to millions of geometric representation values, we leverage 7KB superquadric parameters (pose, size, and shape), drastically reducing diffusion-state dimensionality and per-step compute/memory. Our diffusion-over-superquadrics improves scalability by supporting broader capabilities (e.g., resolution-free point-cloud decoding, part-level editing, and constraint-based design) and achieving competitive surface-fidelity and distributional performance on standard benchmarks after point-cloud decoding, while enabling efficient generation within 0.6s per shape for most conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超二次曲面（superquadrics）的扩散模型，将3D形状生成从高维稠密几何空间（如体素、SDF、点云）转移到紧凑的参数化基元空间，显著降低计算与内存开销，并支持分辨率无关解码、部件级编辑和约束设计等新能力。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在高基数几何表示（如体素、SDF、网格、点云）上进行去噪，计算和内存开销大，难以兼顾高分辨率与强可控性。
AI.method: 将3D形状表示为少量超二次曲面（每个仅需7KB参数：姿态、尺寸、形状），在该低维参数空间中进行扩散建模与去噪。
AI.result: 在标准基准上点云解码后达到有竞争力的表面保真度与分布质量；生成速度快（多数条件下0.6秒/形状）；支持分辨率无关点云重建、部件级编辑与约束驱动设计。
AI.conclusion: 扩散过程迁移到紧凑几何基元（超二次曲面）是提升3D生成模型可扩展性、效率与可控性的有效范式。

title: Provably Efficient Personalized Multi-Objective Bandits with Proactive Conversational Queries
summary: Personalized decision-making in multi-objective bandits requires learning user-specific trade-offs among competing objectives. Since arm utility depends on both unknown rewards and unknown preferences, existing methods infer preferences only from utility feedback, entangling preference learning with reward exploration. In practice, however, users often reveal their priorities through proactive conversational queries (e.g., "cheap and clean hotel"), yet this structured signal is not leveraged. We formalize a proactive query-based framework in which user queries provide structured preference signals. Modeling these signals via a Plackett-Luce subset choice model, we show that query-only learning is insufficient due to a fundamental shift-invariance barrier. To resolve this, we introduce MO-PQUCB, a hybrid algorithm that integrates query-based preference anchoring with bandit feedback through shift-invariant regularization and dual-exploration UCB. We prove that proactive queries accelerate preference estimation and yield improved regret scaling over prior preference-aware MO-MAB methods. Under corrupted queries, we further characterize statistical limits and design a robust estimator achieving near-optimal performance when the corruption is sparse. Experiments validate both theoretical and practical gains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于用户主动查询的多目标赌博机（MO-MAB）个性化决策框架，通过结合Plackett-Luce子集选择模型与新型算法MO-PQUCB，在偏好学习中引入结构化查询信号，克服了传统方法中奖励探索与偏好推断纠缠的问题，并在理论和实验上验证了其在遗憾界和鲁棒性方面的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅从效用反馈中推断用户偏好，导致偏好学习与奖励探索相互纠缠；而现实中用户常通过主动对话式查询（如“便宜又干净的酒店”）表达优先级，该结构化信号未被利用。
AI.method: 提出基于主动查询的框架，建模查询为Plackett-Luce子集选择模型；设计MO-PQUCB算法，融合查询锚定偏好、平移不变正则化与双探索UCB机制；针对查询被污染情形，设计鲁棒估计器。
AI.result: 理论证明主动查询可加速偏好估计并改善遗憾界；在查询污染下刻画统计极限，鲁棒估计器在稀疏污染下达到近最优性能；实验验证了理论优势与实际收益。
AI.conclusion: 主动查询是提升多目标赌博机个性化决策效率与鲁棒性的关键结构化信号，所提MO-PQUCB框架统一了查询学习与带反馈探索，为偏好感知决策提供了新范式。

title: Toward Signing Activity Projection in Sign Language Interaction
summary: Social robots must interact robustly not only with users assumed by speech-centered systems but also with diverse users whose communication relies on different modalities, e.g., sign language. One important capability gap is predictive turn-taking with signing users. Although Voice Activity Projection (VAP) has been successfully used to model future voice activity in spoken interaction, it remains unclear whether the framework transfers to sign language interaction. This paper presents an initial transfer study of adapting a VAP architecture to dyadic sign language interaction. Using interaction recordings from the Public DGS Corpus, we derive binary signing activity streams from lexical sign annotations and formulate proxy tasks for turn-taking prediction. The model uses pose-derived hand, eye-region, and mouth-region features extracted for each signer. The results show that SHIFT/HOLD prediction is promising, especially with hand cues, while SHIFT-prediction remains difficult. These findings provide initial evidence for both the promise and the current limitations of transferring predictive turn-taking models from spoken interaction to sign language interaction. Predictive modeling of sign language interaction still requires sign-language-specific event definitions that go beyond speech-derived categories.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了将语音活动预测（VAP）模型迁移至手语交互中用于预测性轮流发言的可行性，基于德国手语（DGS）语料库构建了基于姿态特征的手语活动流，并发现手部线索对SHIFT/HOLD预测效果较好，但SHIFT预测仍具挑战，强调需建立手语特异性的事件定义。
AI.motivation: 社交机器人需稳健地与依赖不同交流模态（如手语）的多样化用户交互，而当前缺乏对手语用户的预测性轮流发言能力。
AI.method: 基于Public DGS语料库，从词汇级手语标注中导出二值化手语活动流，构建轮流发言预测的代理任务；模型输入为姿态提取的手部、眼区和口区特征。
AI.result: SHIFT/HOLD预测表现良好（尤其依赖手部线索），但SHIFT预测仍困难；验证了VAP框架迁移到手语交互的部分可行性，但也揭示其局限性。
AI.conclusion: VAP框架在手语交互中具有初步应用潜力，但预测建模仍需手语特异性的事件定义，不能简单沿用语音交互中的类别。

title: ChinaHeritaQA: A Culturally-Grounded Visual Question Answering Dataset for World Heritage Sites in China
summary: We introduce ChinaHeritaQA, a multimodal benchmark dataset for evaluating the cultural reasoning abilities of vision-language models (VLMs) on UNESCO World Heritage sites in China. The dataset comprises 2,279 in-the-wild images paired with 14,133 bilingual (Chinese/English) multiple-choice QA pairs spanning seven cognitive dimensions, from basic identity recognition to historical periodization and architectural analysis. Guided by a UNESCO-aligned heritage ontology and verified through rigorous human annotation, the dataset ensures linguistic quality and factual consistency. Evaluations of state-of-the-art VLMs reveal that while top models exceed human performance on average, substantial task-level variation emerges: models excel at visual recognition but struggle with culturally grounded reasoning. Performance also varies by dynasty and region. ChinaHeritaQA reveals that strong visual retrieval does not extend to cultural and historical understanding. We release the dataset to support future research on culturally aware multimodal learning.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了ChinaHeritaQA，一个用于评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）在中国联合国教科文组织世界遗产场景下文化推理能力的多模态基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有VLMs在文化与历史理解方面的能力缺乏系统性评估，尤其针对中国世界遗产这一富含文化语义的领域。
AI.method: 构建了一个含2279张实景图像和14133道中英双语多选题的数据集，覆盖7个认知维度；基于UNESCO遗产本体设计问题，并通过人工标注保障语言质量与事实一致性；对主流VLM进行评测分析。
AI.result: 顶级VLM在整体准确率上超过人类，但在文化推理任务（如历史分期、建筑分析）上表现显著弱于视觉识别任务；性能随朝代和地域差异明显；强视觉检索能力不等价于文化理解能力。
AI.conclusion: ChinaHeritaQA揭示了当前VLM在文化语义建模上的短板，强调需发展更具文化感知能力的多模态学习方法，并开源该数据集以推动相关研究。

title: Optical Reasoning: Rethinking Images as an Expressive Reasoning Medium Beyond Text
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) improves the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs) and has been extended to Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). More recent work further moves from text-based multimodal reasoning toward interleaved-modal reasoning, where intermediate steps can incorporate both textual rationales and visual evidence. In this work, we propose a bolder and more ambitious idea: could images alone serve as the reasoning medium for both language and multimodal tasks? To explore this, we propose optical reasoning, which treats images as a standalone reasoning medium. We instantiate this concept with two variants: typographic-based optical reasoning, which optimizes visual layouts for compact rationale rendering, and graphical-based optical reasoning, which composes text and graphical elements into structured visual rationales. Across mathematical, scientific, and interleaved-modal reasoning benchmarks, optical reasoning can match or even exceed traditional text reasoning while reducing reasoning tokens by an average of 28.57% on language tasks and 16% on multimodal tasks, achieving 1.96 times the token efficiency of text reasoning. These results show that images can effectively and efficiently encode rationales while providing a unified visual canvas for reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'光学推理（optical reasoning）'的新范式，主张仅用图像作为独立的推理媒介，替代传统文本推理，并通过排版式和图形式两种变体在多项语言与多模态任务中验证其有效性与高效性。
AI.motivation: 受链式思维（CoT）及多模态链式思维启发，作者探索更激进的可能性：能否完全用图像替代文本作为推理媒介，实现统一、高效的视觉化推理？
AI.method: 提出光学推理概念，包含两种实现方式：1）基于排版的光学推理，优化视觉布局以紧凑呈现推理过程；2）基于图形的光学推理，将文本与图形元素组合成结构化视觉推理图；并在数学、科学及交错模态推理基准上进行评估。
AI.result: 光学推理在多个基准上达到或超越传统文本推理性能，语言任务平均减少28.57%推理token，多模态任务减少16%，整体token效率达文本推理的1.96倍。
AI.conclusion: 图像可作为高效、有效的独立推理媒介，提供统一的视觉推理画布，为语言与多模态推理开辟新路径。

title: Sparrow: Sparse Rollout for Stable and Efficient Long-context RL of Large Language Models
summary: Despite being powerful, reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) induces extremely long COT, making it computationally expensive. Since RLVR per-step cost is dominated by long-context rollout generation, sparse attention offers a promising way to accelerate dense rollout. However, sparse rollouts require a delicate stability-efficiency tradeoff: overly aggressive sparsity causes collapse, while overly lenient sparsity gives insufficient speedup. In this work, we study this tradeoff through sparse-to-dense actor-policy mismatch. We first observe that sparse rollout collapse is not driven by uniform degradation across tokens: most sparse tokens align perfectly with dense even under aggressive sparsity. Motivated by this, we hypothesize that sparse rollout training remains stable if the lower tail of per-token actor-policy mismatch stays above a critical threshold throughout the trajectory. We introduce a dynamic sparsity schedule that keeps this tail statistic constant during generation and validate our hypothesis. Across Qwen3 thinking-family models, keeping the tail mismatch statistic near a consistent threshold generally enables stable training. We then use a cost model to find the sparsity schedule for maximum speedup under this mismatch threshold, achieving 2.2x, 2.4x, and 2.0x rollout speedups when training Qwen3-1.7B, Qwen3-4B, and Qwen3-8B. Empirically, we show the thresholds generalize to a larger model (Qwen3-14B) and another RL domain (coding). Finally, our analysis naturally motivates DistillSparse: lightweight LoRA-based distillation on sparse rollout lets more aggressive sparsity reach the same sparse-to-dense mismatch threshold, yielding higher speedup.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态稀疏注意力调度方法，通过控制稀疏-稠密策略匹配的尾部统计量来平衡稳定性与效率，在Qwen3系列模型上实现了2.0–2.4倍推理加速，并扩展至更大模型和编码任务；进一步提出DistillSparse方法，利用LoRA蒸馏支持更激进稀疏度。
AI.motivation: RLVR因长思维链（COT）导致计算开销巨大，而稀疏注意力虽可加速 rollout，但需在稳定性和效率间精细权衡：过度稀疏引发崩溃，过松则提速不足。
AI.method: 1）观察稀疏-稠密actor-policy mismatch的非均匀性，发现多数token仍对齐；2）提出维持每步生成中该mismatch下尾部统计量恒定的动态稀疏调度；3）结合成本模型优化调度以最大化加速；4）引入DistillSparse——基于LoRA的轻量蒸馏方法提升稀疏鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-1.7B/4B/8B上分别实现2.2x/2.4x/2.0x rollout加速；验证阈值泛化至Qwen3-14B及代码生成任务；DistillSparse进一步提升稀疏程度与加速比。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏 rollout 的稳定性关键在于控制 actor-policy mismatch 的下尾分布而非均值；动态维持尾部统计量是高效稳定稀疏训练的有效原则；DistillSparse为更激进稀疏提供了可行路径。

title: Guide Me Out: A Framework to Benchmark VLM Operators Communication in Crisis Scenarios
summary: Effective crisis response requires spatially grounded communication that bridges linguistic guidance of civilians with the physical environment, accounting for structural bottlenecks, evolving threats, and agent-specific contexts. Yet, current NLP research in crisis communication remains mainly limited to static, text-only classification settings, overlooking the critical communicative role of AI operators in dynamic, embodied scenarios. We address this gap with a novel benchmarking framework for evaluating Vision-Language Models (VLMs) tasked with guiding civilian agents through simulated evacuations. We test two communication strategies (narrowcast vs. broadcast), two environment representations (visual vs. graph-based), and two threat behaviors (static vs. moving) across nine maps of varying structural complexity. Our results show that Narrowcast consistently reduces civilian Fail rates compared to Broadcast across all difficulty levels. Guidance quality depends heavily on how the VLM operator represents the world: the visual modality drives performance, while adding an adjacency graph is model-dependent and often harmful. Moving threats raise Fail rates across all conditions as communication must continuously adapt over time. Together, these findings show that deploying VLMs as AI operators in evacuation scenarios remains a non-trivial challenge, where the choice of communication strategy and input representation can directly determine the success or failure of the intervention.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于评估视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在模拟疏散任务中作为AI操作员引导平民能力的新基准框架，发现窄播策略优于广播策略，视觉输入比图结构更有效，而移动威胁显著增加失败率。
AI.motivation: 现有危机通信中的NLP研究局限于静态文本分类，忽视了AI操作员在动态、具身场景中的关键沟通作用，亟需结合空间、语言与实时环境的评估框架。
AI.method: 构建了一个多维度基准框架，评估VLMs在模拟疏散中指导平民的能力，变量包括通信策略（窄播/广播）、环境表征（视觉/图结构）和威胁行为（静态/移动），覆盖九种不同复杂度地图。
AI.result: 窄播显著降低平民失败率；视觉模态主导性能，添加邻接图常损害效果；移动威胁普遍提高失败率；模型表现高度依赖策略与输入表示选择。
AI.conclusion: 将VLMs部署为疏散场景中的AI操作员仍具挑战性，通信策略与输入表征的选择直接影响干预成败，需更贴近具身现实的评估范式。

title: EPS3D: End-to-End Feed-Forward 3D Panoptic Segmentation
comment: ICML 2026. The code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/Runsong123/EPS3D}{https://github.com/Runsong123/EPS3D}
summary: This paper introduces EPS3D, a new end-to-end feed-forward framework for open-vocabulary 3D panoptic segmentation. Unlike existing methods relying on additional preprocessing, we design an end-to-end architecture, with a distillation-based training strategy on diverse 3D scenes to predict 3D-aware semantic and instance features from multi-view images, improving 3D consistency and avoiding error accumulation. We further propose a mutual enhancement module to enforce inherent semantic-instance consistency. By aligning semantics within instances (Ins2Sem) and refining instance features with semantic guidance (Sem2Ins), we achieve more coherent 3D scene understanding. Ultimately, EPS3D outperforms SOTA baselines on two benchmarks (e.g., +13% mIoU for semantics on Replica) with high efficiency (e.g., 1s per scene), supporting tasks like robotic manipulation and 3D scene editing.

AI.tldr: EPS3D是一种端到端的前馈框架，用于开放词汇3D全景分割，通过蒸馏训练和互增强模块提升语义-实例一致性，在Replica等基准上显著优于SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖额外预处理，且易产生误差累积；需提升3D一致性与语义-实例协同理解能力。
AI.method: 提出端到端EPS3D框架，采用基于蒸馏的多场景训练策略预测3D感知语义与实例特征，并设计互增强模块（Ins2Sem与Sem2Ins）强化语义-实例一致性。
AI.result: 在Replica等两个基准上超越SOTA（如语义mIoU提升13%），单场景推理仅需1秒，支持机器人操作与3D场景编辑。
AI.conclusion: EPS3D实现了高效、一致且开放词汇的3D全景分割，为真实场景应用提供了新范式。

title: Next-Token Prediction Learns Generalisable Representations of Sleep Physiology
summary: Foundation models offer a promising route to compress multi-modal physiological signals into compact representations of human health, with broad applications across sleep medicine, cardiology, neurology and other healthcare domains. Existing models have typically been trained with masked-reconstruction or contrastive objectives. However, masked reconstruction may be poorly suited to the stochastic nature of these signals, while contrastive approaches rely on positive-pair definitions despite the semantic invariances of physiological signals being poorly understood. In this work, we show that next-token prediction is a simple and scalable alternative. We develop Hypnos, a multi-modal sleep foundation model trained using eight different sensing modalities (e.g. EEG, ECG, respiratory signals) drawn from over 20,000 overnight polysomnography recordings. We tokenize each modality into streams of discrete tokens using residual vector quantization, then train a large auto-regressive RQ-Transformer to jointly predict the next token across all modalities in parallel. After training, Hypnos can be applied to continuous streams of sensor data from any subset of supported modalities, generating embeddings for downstream tasks. Across a range of benchmarks, Hypnos significantly outperforms existing foundation models. In sleep stage classification, we match the performance of strong supervised baselines on held-out test sets whilst using \(100\times\) less labelled data. Hypnos even generalises to daytime physiology, surpassing a dedicated ECG foundation model at detecting atrial fibrillation. Our results demonstrate that next-token prediction is a strong self-supervised objective for representation learning from multi-modal physiological signals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hypnos，一种基于多模态生理信号（如EEG、ECG等）的睡眠基础模型，采用残差向量量化（RQ）与自回归RQ-Transformer架构，以next-token预测为自监督目标进行训练，在睡眠分期和心房颤动检测等任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有生理信号基础模型多采用掩码重建或对比学习目标，但前者难以建模生理信号的随机性，后者依赖语义正样本对定义，而生理信号的语义不变性尚不明确；因此需更鲁棒、可扩展的自监督目标。
AI.method: 提出基于next-token预测的自监督范式；构建Hypnos模型：对8种生理模态分别进行残差向量量化（RQ）离散化，再用大型自回归RQ-Transformer联合并行预测各模态下一token；支持任意子集模态的流式输入与嵌入生成。
AI.result: 在多项基准测试中显著超越现有基础模型：睡眠分期任务中仅用1/100标注数据即达到强监督基线性能；跨域泛化至日间ECG数据，在房颤检测上超越专用ECG基础模型。
AI.conclusion: next-token预测是一种适用于多模态生理信号表征学习的高效、鲁棒且可扩展的自监督目标，Hypnos验证了其在健康监测中的广泛潜力。

title: Not Just After One: Sleep-Inspired Replay Prevents Catastrophic Forgetting After Sequential Tasks
summary: One of the critical limitations of artificial neural networks is their lack of ability to continually learn: training on new tasks often leads to interference and forgetting of the previous ones. While several algorithms have been proposed to protect old memories from interference, they are typically applied during or immediately after each new episode of training. In contrast, humans and animals can learn continuously, acquiring multiple new memories during active learning before consolidating all of them into long-term storage. Here we show that multiple new tasks can be trained sequentially before an unsupervised sleep-like replay phase is applied to partially restore performance across all previously learned tasks. Our study further suggests that task-specific information remains resilient to new training but decays gradually as network is trained on new tasks. These findings point to novel principles for developing a broad range of continual learning AI solutions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受生物睡眠启发的持续学习方法：在顺序学习多个新任务后，通过无监督的‘类睡眠重放’阶段来部分恢复所有先前任务的性能，揭示了任务信息在训练中具有韧性但会随新任务增加而逐渐衰减。
AI.motivation: 人工神经网络缺乏持续学习能力，训练新任务常导致对旧任务的干扰和遗忘；而人类和动物可在活跃学习多个记忆后，再统一巩固到长期记忆中，现有算法多需在每次新训练时或之后立即应用保护机制，缺乏类似生物的延迟整合机制。
AI.method: 在顺序学习多个新任务后，引入一个无监督的、类睡眠的重放阶段（不依赖标签，模拟大脑离线重放），评估其对各历史任务性能的恢复效果，并分析任务特异性信息在连续训练中的保持与衰减规律。
AI.result: 验证了多任务顺序训练后进行类睡眠重放可显著部分恢复所有先前任务的性能；发现任务特定信息在新训练中具有短期韧性，但随后续任务增多而渐进式衰减。
AI.conclusion: 类睡眠重放是一种可行的延迟式记忆巩固机制，为构建更鲁棒、更接近生物学习方式的持续学习AI系统提供了新原理和新方向。

title: MUDIDI: A Two-Stage Framework for Multilingual Dictionary Digitization with Language Models
summary: Multilingual dictionaries are among the most valuable documentary resources for low-resource and endangered languages, yet many remain available only as scans. For many decades, their digitization and conversion into a machine-readable format was nearly impossible due to language-specific scripts, complex multi-column layouts full of entries with abbreviations and cross-references. Recent vision-language models offer a promising solution, but it is unclear how well they preserve characters, markup, and process lexicographic structure. We introduce MUDIDI, a two-stage framework for multi-lingual dictionary digitization. Stage One evaluates the quality of character recognition and markup preservation; Stage Two focuses on dictionary entry segmentation with subsequent mapping into a machine-readable lexicographic schema, SIL's Multi-Dictionary Formatter. We also release a dataset that consists of human-annotated lexicographic entries collected from 30 public-domain dictionaries featuring diverse writing systems, language families, and formats. We benchmark OCR systems, general-purpose Large Language Models (LLMs), and Vision Language Models (VLMs) on the dataset, demonstrating superior performance of LLMs across most writing systems and languages in both stages, and provide practical guidelines on improving the results for more challenging scenarios. Finally, we show that supplementing additional information, such as dictionary introduction, to the LLMs can improve the quality of the digitized dictionary. Github: https://github.com/DavidSamuell/MUDIDI-Pipeline-for-Digitization-of-Multilingual-Dictionary/

AI.tldr: 本文提出MUDIDI框架，用于多语言词典的数字化，包含字符识别与标记保留评估（第一阶段）和词典条目分割及映射到机器可读格式（第二阶段），并发布了一个涵盖30种公共领域词典的标注数据集，实验表明大语言模型（LLMs）在多数文字系统和语言中表现最优，并可通过添加词典引言等信息进一步提升效果。
AI.motivation: 多语言词典对低资源和濒危语言至关重要，但许多仅以扫描形式存在；其数字化长期受限于特殊文字、复杂排版、缩写和交叉引用等问题，而现有视觉-语言模型在字符保真度、标记保留和词典结构处理方面效果尚不明确。
AI.method: 提出两阶段MUDIDI框架：第一阶段评估OCR与VLM在字符识别和标记保留上的质量；第二阶段进行词典条目分割，并映射至SIL的Multi-Dictionary Formatter格式；构建并公开含30种词典的人工标注数据集，对OCR、通用LLM和VLM进行基准测试，并探索引入词典导言等辅助信息对LLM性能的影响。
AI.result: LLM在大多数文字系统和语言中均优于OCR和VLM，尤其在两个阶段均表现更优；补充词典介绍等上下文信息可显著提升LLM输出质量；提供了针对困难场景的实用优化指南。
AI.conclusion: LLM是当前多语言词典数字化任务中更可靠、适应性更强的工具，MUDIDI框架及其配套数据集为低资源语言数字资源建设提供了有效方法论与实践基础。

title: Scaling by Diversified Experience for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action models face significant challenges in real-world deployment due to the entanglement of high-level reasoning with low-level control, and the instability of policy optimization. In this paper, we introduce SyVLA, a robust VLA model trained with diversified experiences. We propose an Intention Decoupling algorithm to isolate control-relevant features from reasoning contexts and a similar-sample guided RL pipeline to stabilize policy updates and mitigate distribution shift. Extensive experiments on real-world robotic tasks and multi-modal benchmarks demonstrate that SyVLA achieves superior task success rates and stronger out-of-distribution generalization compared to existing methods, while effectively preserving core vision-language capabilities. Codes and Datasets is released on \href{https://sy-vla.github.io/}{project page}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SyVLA模型，通过意图解耦算法和相似样本引导的强化学习流程，解决视觉-语言-动作模型在真实场景部署中高阶推理与低阶控制纠缠及策略优化不稳定的问题，显著提升任务成功率和分布外泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在真实世界部署中面临高阶推理与低阶控制纠缠、策略优化不稳定等挑战。
AI.method: 提出SyVLA模型，包含意图解耦算法（分离控制相关特征与推理上下文）和相似样本引导的强化学习流程（稳定策略更新、缓解分布偏移）。
AI.result: 在真实机器人任务和多模态基准上，SyVLA显著提升任务成功率和分布外泛化能力，同时保持核心视觉-语言能力。
AI.conclusion: SyVLA通过解耦与稳定训练机制，有效提升VLA模型的鲁棒性与实用性，为真实场景部署提供新思路。

title: From 0-to-1 to 1-to-N: Reproducible Engineering Evidence for MetaAI Recursive Self-Design
summary: Recursive self-design refers to AI-assisted modification of the mechanisms by which an AI system is built, evaluated, and improved. This paper treats MetaAI not as a mature paradigm, but as a working term for a human-seeded, AI-expanded development pattern in which the design space itself becomes a target of modification. We propose an operational evidence framework with four criteria: inspectable target system, meta-level modifier, feedback-directed selection, and recursive continuation. We then map public systems, including Darwin Goedel Machine (DGM), STOP, Goedel Agent, and ShinkaEvolve, against these criteria. DGM provides the most direct currently reported evidence: its published results show improvement from 20% to 50% on SWE-bench Verified and from 14.2% to 30.7% on full Polyglot after 80 iterations, with ablations suggesting that both open-ended exploration and self-improvement contribute. Finally, we provide MetaAI-Mini, a reproducible HumanEval-based protocol and codebase. Because no completed model run is included in this build, MetaAI-Mini is reported as a protocol rather than as an experimental result.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于评估递归自设计AI（MetaAI）的可操作证据框架，并以Darwin Goedel Machine等系统为例进行验证，同时发布了可复现的MetaAI-Mini协议。
AI.motivation: 为系统性评估和推进递归自设计AI（即AI辅助修改自身构建、评估与改进机制）的发展，需建立清晰、可检验的操作性证据标准。
AI.method: 提出包含四个标准的证据框架：可检查的目标系统、元层级修改器、反馈驱动的选择机制、递归持续性；并据此对多个公开系统进行映射分析；还构建了基于HumanEval的可复现协议MetaAI-Mini。
AI.result: Darwin Goedel Machine（DGM）提供了当前最直接的实证：在SWE-bench Verified上性能从20%提升至50%，在Polyglot全集上从14.2%升至30.7%（80轮迭代），消融实验表明开放探索与自我改进均有贡献；MetaAI-Mini作为协议发布，尚无完整模型运行结果。
AI.conclusion: 递归自设计AI已初具可验证雏形，DGM等系统满足部分核心标准；MetaAI-Mini为后续研究提供了标准化、可复现的评估基础。

title: Theoretical Foundations of Continual Learning via Drift-Plus-Penalty
comment: Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
summary: In many real-world settings, data streams are nonstationary and arrive sequentially, requiring learning systems to adapt continuously without retraining from scratch. Continual learning (CL) addresses this challenge by incorporating new tasks while mitigating catastrophic forgetting, where learning new information degrades performance on previously acquired knowledge. We introduce a control-theoretic perspective on CL that explicitly regulates the evolution of forgetting, framing adaptation as a controlled process subject to long-term stability constraints. We focus on replay-based CL, where a finite memory buffer stores representative samples from prior tasks. We propose COntinual Learning with Drift-Plus-Penalty (COLD), a continual learning framework based on the Drift-Plus-Penalty (DPP) principle from stochastic optimization. To facilitate analysis, we also consider an oracle variant, COLD-ORACLE, as a reference benchmark. At each task, both methods minimize the current task loss while maintaining a virtual queue that tracks deviations from long-term stability on previously learned tasks, capturing the stability-plasticity trade-off as a regulated dynamical process. We establish stability and convergence guarantees that characterize this trade-off through a tunable control parameter. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that COLD consistently outperforms a broad range of state-of-the-art CL methods while providing competitive and controllable forgetting behavior through explicit regulation of stability and plasticity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于控制理论的持续学习框架COLD，利用Drift-Plus-Penalty原理调控遗忘与稳定性，在回放式持续学习中实现可控的稳定性-可塑性权衡，并在多个基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现实中的数据流具有非平稳性和时序性，需模型持续适应而避免灾难性遗忘；现有CL方法缺乏对遗忘过程的显式动态调控机制。
AI.method: 提出COLD框架，基于Drift-Plus-Penalty（DPP）原理，在每任务优化当前损失的同时维护一个虚拟队列以量化对历史任务性能偏移，引入控制参数调节稳定性与可塑性；并设计COLD-ORACLE作为理论分析基准。
AI.result: 理论证明了COLD的稳定性和收敛性，刻画了可调控制参数下的稳定性-可塑性权衡；实验表明其在标准持续学习基准上持续优于多种SOTA方法，且遗忘行为更可控、更具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 将控制理论引入持续学习是有效的，COLD通过显式调控遗忘动力学，在保证长期稳定性的同时支持高效适应，为持续学习提供了新范式。

title: Reasoning without Gold Standards: A Proxy-Judge Theory of Autoformalization
summary:
Complex reasoning tasks increasingly require systems to produce outputs whose correctness cannot be judged by exact match against a single reference. Autoformalization (AF) is a representative example; it asks a model to translate informal mathematical or logical reasoning into a formally checkable object, yet expert-validated formalizations do not scale beyond toy cases and a single informal argument can admit many valid formal renderings. Progress therefore depends on whether partial, structured proxies can substitute for exact references.
  We introduce a reference-free proxy-judge framework for AF that replaces gold-standard matching with a vector of per-axis property checks. The framework organizes the proxy along three structural scopes that cover global properties of the elicited object, per-module properties internal to its sub-components, and cross-domain properties that re-align it to the informal source, and aggregates each axis into a verdict vector. The vector drives a reflective refinement loop in which a violated coordinate routes the controller to a matching repair target, so each iteration changes only what is judged wrong.
  Under bounded judge noise, the expected intrinsic gap contracts geometrically to a noise-dependent plateau. Across seven formalization backbones on miniF2F, ProofNet, e-SNLI, and ProntoQA, refinement consistently lifts Pass Rate over the single-shot ICL baseline, and the per-axis proxy outperforms a matched scalar proxy on benchmarks where the baseline has room to improve. Structured proxy judgments therefore provide both a practical refinement signal and a theoretical handle on convergence when exact references are unavailable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需参考答案的代理评判框架，用于自动形式化（AF）任务，通过多轴结构化检查（全局、模块内、跨域）生成判决向量，并驱动迭代式反思修正，理论证明其在噪声下可几何收敛，实验表明其显著提升多种形式化模型的通过率。
AI.motivation: 自动形式化任务缺乏可扩展的专家验证形式化答案，且同一非形式化陈述可能对应多个合法形式化结果，因此需要不依赖精确匹配的、部分有效的结构化代理评判机制。
AI.method: 提出一种参考-free的代理评判框架，按三个结构范围（全局属性、模块内属性、跨域对齐属性）进行多轴检查，生成判决向量；该向量触发反射式细化循环，仅修正被判定为错误的维度；理论分析其在有界评判噪声下的收敛性。
AI.result: 在miniF2F、ProofNet、e-SNLI和ProntoQA等七个形式化主干模型上，该方法持续优于单次上下文学习基线；结构化代理评判优于标量代理，在基线尚有提升空间的基准上效果更显著。
AI.conclusion: 结构化代理评判不仅为无精确参考的任务提供了实用的细化信号，也为收敛性分析提供了理论支撑，是迈向可靠复杂推理评估的重要一步。

title: Frequency-based Constrained Sampling for Interval Patterns
summary: Output space pattern sampling is a powerful alternative to exhaustive pattern mining for exploring large pattern spaces, as it enables users to focus on representative patterns drawn according to a chosen interestingness measure. In this paper, we address the problem of sampling interval patterns under user-defined syntactic constraints. We introduce CFips, a sampling approach that incorporates constraints directly into the sampling procedure. The approach relies on a multi-step sampling framework and supports several syntactic constraints by decomposing them into elementary predicates on interval bounds while preserving exact sampling guarantees. We formally prove that CFips samples interval patterns proportionally to their frequency within the constrained pattern space. The experimental results show that integrating constraints into the sampling procedure enables to complete mining tasks that would otherwise fail within a given time out.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CFips方法，用于在用户定义的语法约束下对区间模式进行采样，通过多步采样框架将约束直接融入采样过程，并保证按频率精确采样。
AI.motivation: 解决在大规模模式空间中，如何在用户定义的语法约束下高效、准确地采样代表性区间模式的问题。
AI.method: 提出CFips采样方法，采用多步采样框架，将语法约束分解为区间边界上的基本谓词，并在采样过程中直接集成约束，确保精确采样保证。
AI.result: 理论证明CFips能按模式在约束空间内的实际频率进行比例采样；实验表明该方法可完成原本超时失败的挖掘任务。
AI.conclusion: CFips是一种有效支持语法约束的区间模式采样方法，在保持采样准确性的同时显著提升效率和可行性。

title: Beyond Linear Activation Steering: Invertible Latent Transformations for Controlling LLM Behavior
summary: Activation steering provides a lightweight inference-time mechanism for controlling large language models (LLMs) by modifying their internal activation vectors toward desired behaviors. Most existing methods compute a fixed steering direction in the original activation space, typically from pairs of contrastive examples using mean differences, linear probes, or arbitrary separability criteria. While effective to a certain extent, these methods treat behavioral control as a global, linear, additive offset: the same direction is applied across inputs, and behaviors are linearly separable. This can be restrictive when behavioral features vary nonlinearly across the activation space or lie on curved and anisotropic manifolds, where the optimal intervention may be input-dependent. To address this limitation, we propose INNSteer, a nonlinear activation steering framework based on invertible latent transformations. Rather than searching for a better steering vector in the original representation space, INNSteer learns a lightweight invertible neural network $φ$ that maps an LLM's activations into a latent space where behavioral classes are more amenable to linear control. At inference time, activations are mapped through $φ$, steered in the latent space, and mapped back through the exact inverse transformation $φ^{-1}$. This makes a simple latent-space translation become a nonlinear, input-dependent intervention in the original activation space. Across experiment settings on multiple LLM families, scales, behavioral traits, and safety benchmarks, INNSteer consistently improves model control over linear, transport-based, and nonlinear steering baselines while largely preserving generation fluency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出INNSteer，一种基于可逆神经网络的非线性激活引导框架，通过将LLM激活映射到更易线性控制的隐空间，实现输入依赖、非线性的行为调控，在多个模型和任务上优于现有线性及非线性引导方法。
AI.motivation: 现有激活引导方法多采用固定、线性、全局的干预方向，难以应对行为特征在激活空间中呈非线性、流形化分布的情况，缺乏输入依赖性。
AI.method: 提出INNSteer框架，利用轻量级可逆神经网络φ将LLM激活映射至隐空间，在该空间中进行线性平移式引导，再通过精确逆变换φ⁻¹映射回原空间，从而实现原空间中的非线性、输入相关干预。
AI.result: 在多种LLM架构、规模、行为特质及安全基准上，INNSteer持续超越线性、传输式及其它非线性引导基线，同时较好保持生成流畅性。
AI.conclusion: 可逆隐空间变换为激活引导提供了更灵活、更具表现力的建模范式，验证了输入依赖非线性干预的有效性与实用性。

title: AbstRAG: Learning to Abstract for Retrieval Problems
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation often fails when the query, the document evidence, and the user's intent are expressed at different levels of abstraction. A query may ask about a class, a relation, or an event, while the document only states specific instances, indirect framings, or scoped formulations. We define this mismatch as an abstraction gap: the minimal set of typed assumptions required to align query intent with the available evidence. To close this gap, we introduce AbstRAG, which treats abstraction as an explicit retrieval object. AbstRAG decomposes the query--evidence gap into expression, conceptual, intent--evidence, and event-type components, and scores relevance by combining match quality, a query-independent utility prior, and the cost of the required bridges. Its central mechanism is reflective refinement: a critic diagnoses retrieval failures, localizes the failed abstraction operator, proposes a minimal stage-specific patch, and accepts the patch only under sufficiency and compression controls. Across three within-document retrieval benchmarks against seven baselines, AbstRAG outperforms on nDCG@10 in 18 of 21 paired-bootstrap contrasts and improves generation accuracy by 1.9%, 5.2%, and 4.0% across the three benchmarks; ablations confirm that reflective refinement drives most of the retrieval gain and the compression control alone reduces over-expansion false positives from 73.7% to 0% on a stress slice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AbstRAG方法，通过显式建模抽象层级差异（即‘抽象间隙’）来提升检索增强生成（RAG）效果；其核心是‘反思式精炼’机制，能诊断并精准修补检索失败的抽象环节，在多个基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 检索增强生成常因查询、文档证据与用户意图在抽象层次上不匹配而失效，即存在‘抽象间隙’——查询意图与可用证据之间所需的最小类型化假设集合。
AI.method: AbstRAG将抽象视为显式检索对象，将查询–证据间隙分解为表达、概念、意图–证据和事件类型四个组件；结合匹配质量、查询无关效用先验与桥接成本进行相关性打分；核心机制为反思式精炼：由批评者诊断失败、定位缺失的抽象操作、提出最小阶段补丁，并在充分性与压缩性约束下接受补丁。
AI.result: 在三个文档内检索基准上，AbstRAG在21组配对bootstrap对比中18组nDCG@10优于7个基线；生成准确率分别提升1.9%、5.2%和4.0%；消融实验证明反思式精炼主导检索增益，压缩控制单独将压力子集上的过扩展假阳性率从73.7%降至0%。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模和动态修补抽象间隙可显著提升RAG性能，反思式精炼是一种高效可控的抽象对齐机制。

title: Frequency Decoupled Framework for Screen Content Image Super-Resolution
summary:
Methods based on implicit neural representations have demonstrated superior performance in Screen Content Image Super-Resolution (SCISR) . However, they overlooked the inherent frequency characteristics, leading to suboptimal performance. We propose a frequency decoupled framework (FDF) that rethinks SCISR from a phasor perspective by capturing structured energy in amplitude and relational continuity in phase, and jointly exploiting them with bespoke implicit representations to faithfully recover the regular textures and global configuration of Screen Content Image (SCI).
  Amplitude-Phase Factorization Network (APFN) first separates images into amplitude and phase streams, where Amplitude Clustering Module (ACM) organizes sparse yet high-energy amplitude responses into representative prototypes for periodic pattern extraction, while Phase Consistency Self-Attention (PCSA) progressively reinforces configuration through continuous consistency propagation.
  And Oscillation-Anharmonic Implicit Fitting Network (OAIF-Net) integrates periodic and coherent implicit representations for efficient exploitation of the periodic patterns and coherent context embedded in SCI.
  Experimental results show FDF achieves state-of-the-art SCISR performance at multiple scales across four public SCI datasets. Ablation experiments further demonstrate the effectiveness of each component in extracting and exploiting periodic patterns and coherent context.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种频率解耦框架（FDF），从幅值-相位角度建模屏幕内容图像的周期性纹理与全局结构，结合定制隐式表示实现高性能超分。
AI.motivation: 现有基于隐式神经表示的屏幕内容图像超分辨率方法忽略了图像固有的频率特性，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 提出频率解耦框架（FDF），包括幅值-相位分解网络（APFN）和振荡-非谐隐式拟合网络（OAIF-Net）：APFN通过幅值聚类模块（ACM）提取周期模式，通过相位一致性自注意力（PCSA）建模结构连续性；OAIF-Net融合周期性与一致性隐式表示进行高效重建。
AI.result: 在四个公开SCI数据集上多尺度超分任务中达到SOTA性能，消融实验验证了各模块对周期模式与一致上下文建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 从频域（幅值/相位）视角建模屏幕内容图像的结构特性，并与隐式表示协同设计，可显著提升SCISR性能。

title: SpatialWorld: Benchmarking Interactive Spatial Reasoning of Multimodal Agents in Real-World Tasks
summary: Spatial reasoning is a foundational capability for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to perceive and operate within the physical world. However, existing benchmarks predominantly rely on passive evaluation (e.g., static VQA) or simulator-specific pipelines, failing to assess general interactive spatial understanding. We introduce SpatialWorld, a unified benchmark designed specifically for evaluating the interactive spatial understanding of multimodal agents in complex real-world tasks. Integrating eight heterogeneous simulation backends under a shared, simulator-agnostic protocol, SpatialWorld features 760 human-annotated tasks across diverse domains (e.g., household routines, travel, social collaboration). Agents must solve tasks under vision-only partial observability, actively gathering egocentric visual evidence and expressing decisions via a unified, text-based action interface native to MLLMs. For reliable evaluation, each task includes a human-validated initial state, a reference trajectory, and a terminal-state verifier. Evaluating 15 advanced agents reveals that robust spatial task solving remains challenging: the strongest model, GPT-5, achieves an average task success rate (TSR) of only 17.4%, while the leading open-source model, Qwen-3.5, reaches 14.1%. Further analysis exposes a clear mismatch between task success and execution efficiency, alongside substantial domain-specific performance variations. These bottlenecks in active exploration and long-horizon planning position SpatialWorld as a rigorous testbed for future spatial agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SpatialWorld，一个用于评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在复杂现实任务中交互式空间理解能力的统一基准。它整合了8种异构仿真后端、760个人工标注任务，并设计了视觉部分可观测、文本动作接口等评估机制；实验表明当前先进模型在此基准上表现仍较差（最高仅17.4%任务成功率），揭示了主动探索与长时序规划等关键瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有空间推理基准多依赖静态问答或特定仿真器，无法有效评估模型在真实世界中的交互式空间理解能力。
AI.method: 构建SpatialWorld基准，集成8种异构仿真后端，定义统一、仿真器无关的协议；设计760个跨领域人工标注任务；要求代理在视觉部分可观测条件下，通过文本动作接口主动探索并决策；每个任务配备人工验证初始状态、参考轨迹和终端状态验证器。
AI.result: 在15个先进代理上的评测显示：最强模型GPT-5任务成功率仅17.4%，开源最强Qwen-3.5为14.1%；存在任务成功率与执行效率不匹配、领域间性能差异显著等问题。
AI.conclusion: SpatialWorld为多模态智能体的空间能力提供了更贴近真实世界的严格评测平台，凸显了主动探索与长时序规划是当前关键瓶颈，为后续研究指明方向。

title: The Confidence Trap: Calibration Attacks for Graph Neural Networks
summary: While confidence calibration is essential for trustworthy decision-making in safety-critical applications, the robustness of calibrated GNNs to adversarial structural perturbations remains largely unexplored. However, studying calibration attacks on graphs presents unique technical challenges: (1) the discrete nature of graph structures complicates gradient-based optimization, (2) existing underconfidence objectives fail to drive predictions toward uniform distributions, and (3) GNNs are highly sensitive to edge perturbations, often causing unintended label changes that violate attack constraints. To address these challenges, we propose a \textbf{Unified Graph Calibration Attack (UGCA)} framework designed for \textbf{worst-case (white-box) analysis} of GNN calibration robustness. UGCA introduces a KL-divergence loss to encourage uniform predictive distributions, a reranking mechanism to reduce label flipping, a hybrid loss to recover labels when violations occur, and beam search to explore a broader adversarial search space. We further provide theoretical insights linking model generalization, dataset complexity, and calibration vulnerability, showing that models with higher accuracy or trained on datasets with more classes are more susceptible under this threat model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UGCA substantially increases Expected Calibration Error while preserving classification accuracy. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/CaptainCuong/Graph-Calibration-Attack.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一图校准攻击（UGCA）框架，用于白盒场景下评估图神经网络（GNN）在校准鲁棒性方面的最坏情况表现，通过KL散度损失、重排序机制、混合损失和束搜索等技术，有效提升预期校准误差（ECE）同时保持分类精度。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对校准后的GNN在面对结构对抗扰动时的鲁棒性分析，且图结构离散性、校准目标失效及标签意外翻转等问题使此类攻击设计困难。
AI.method: 提出UGCA框架，包括KL散度损失以推动预测分布均匀化、reranking机制减少标签翻转、混合损失恢复违规时的正确标签、以及束搜索扩展对抗搜索空间；并从理论上分析模型泛化能力、数据集复杂度与校准脆弱性的关系。
AI.result: UGCA显著提升了预期校准误差（ECE），同时维持了原始分类准确率；实验验证其在多种GNN模型和数据集上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: UGCA为评估GNN校准鲁棒性提供了首个系统性白盒攻击框架，揭示了高精度模型或在多类别数据集上训练的模型更易受校准攻击，并开源代码促进后续研究。

title: H2HMem: A Multimodal Memory Benchmark for Agents in Human-Human Interactions
summary: Large language model agents are increasingly deployed in human-human interaction settings, such as meeting assistants and clinical documentation systems, where they must observe conversations and retain information for downstream queries. Unlike traditional human-assistant settings, these environments are inherently multimodal, involve complex discourse phenomena such as anaphora and deixis, and contain asynchronous or conflicting information from multiple participants. However, existing memory benchmarks largely focus on single-user, text-only interactions, failing to capture these challenges. To address this gap, we introduce H2HMem, a Human-to-Human Multimodal Memory Benchmark for evaluating memory capabilities in complex human-human interactions. H2HMem includes both dyadic and multi-party conversations with multimodal information streams, and evaluates agents along three dimensions: memory recall, reasoning, and application. Experiments with advanced agents reveal substantial limitations in constructing, retaining, and utilizing memories across modalities, participants, and sessions, highlighting substantial room for improvement in next-generation LLM agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了H2HMem，一个面向人与人之间多模态交互的记忆基准测试，用于评估大语言模型代理在复杂对话环境中的记忆能力，发现现有模型在跨模态、跨参与者和跨会话的记忆构建、保持与应用方面存在显著缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆基准主要针对单用户、纯文本交互，无法反映真实人-人交互中多模态、指代、回指及异步/冲突信息等复杂现象，亟需更贴近实际场景的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建H2HMem基准，涵盖双人及多方对话，整合多模态信息流，并从记忆召回、推理与应用三个维度评估代理性能。
AI.result: 实验表明当前先进LLM代理在跨模态、跨参与者和跨会话的记忆能力上存在显著局限。
AI.conclusion: H2HMem揭示了现有LLM代理在人-人交互记忆任务中的关键短板，为下一代智能代理的记忆建模提供了新方向与评估标准。

title: CRANE: Knowledge Editing for Reasoning MLLMs
summary:
The emergence of reasoning multimodal large language models (MLLMs), which generate explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning before producing answers, has introduced a new challenge for knowledge editing: methods that appear successful under traditional metrics (teacher-forcing accuracy up to 100%) can fail severely when the model's reasoning process is examined (Grounded Success as low as 0%). We identify three failure modes: (1) Structural Collapse, where weight-modifying methods destroy the CoT format; (2) Cognitive Dissonance, where the model's reasoning chain actively rejects the injected edit fact based on visual evidence; and (3) Shallow Internalization, where methods succeed on exact queries but fail on rephrase or multi-hop variants. On reasoning MLLMs, these modes interact: methods that generalize (FT, LoRA) trigger format collapse, while methods without deep modification cannot generalize. To expose these failures, we propose a CoT-aware evaluation protocol and construct ReasonEdit-Bench, with conflict stratification, multi-level probes, and multi-hop portability tests.
  We propose CRANE, a retrieval-augmented framework that requires no per-edit parameter modification. CRANE combines a modality-aware dual-library retrieval system with a two-phase training strategy: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for structural initialization, followed by GRPO with a Cognitive Routing Reward that trains the model to arbitrate between visual priors and injected edit facts. On ReasonEdit-Bench, CRANE achieves 96.9% Grounded Success on conflict scenarios and 96.9% intermediate entity usage in multi-hop chains, with 97.6% text-locality and 68.1% image-locality Edit Independence. On the out-of-distribution MMEVOKE benchmark, CRANE reaches 87.0% under gold retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CRANE框架，用于在推理型多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）中进行知识编辑，解决现有方法在链式推理（CoT）层面失效的三大问题：结构崩溃、认知失调与浅层内化；CRANE采用无需参数修改的检索增强架构，并通过双模态检索与两阶段训练（SFT+GRPO）提升推理一致性与编辑鲁棒性，在ReasonEdit-Bench和MMEVOKE上取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有知识编辑方法在传统指标（如teacher-forcing准确率）下表现良好，但在推理型MLLMs中无法保证链式推理（CoT）过程的正确性，暴露出结构性、认知性和泛化性三类失败模式。
AI.method: 提出CRANE框架：基于检索增强，包含模态感知的双库检索系统；采用两阶段训练策略——先监督微调（SFT）初始化结构，再用带认知路由奖励（Cognitive Routing Reward）的GRPO优化模型对视觉先验与注入事实的仲裁能力；全程无需针对每次编辑修改模型参数。
AI.result: 在ReasonEdit-Bench上，CRANE达到96.9%的Grounded Success（冲突场景）和96.9%中间实体使用率（多跳推理），编辑独立性达97.6%（文本）和68.1%（图像）；在OOD基准MMEVOKE上，黄金检索下达87.0%准确率。
AI.conclusion: CRANE有效缓解了推理型MLLMs知识编辑中的三大失败模式，验证了检索增强与认知引导训练在保持CoT结构与语义一致性上的关键作用，为可信多模态知识更新提供了新范式。

title: Correlation Is Not Enough: Embedding Human Metadata for Individual Causal Discovery
summary:
Ask a pretrained biomedical language model whether "cortisol 28 ug/dL" and "stock-market volatility" are related, and it returns a cosine similarity of 0.83 on a scale where 1.0 means identical. The two share no mechanism. This is not a corner case: every off-the-shelf biomedical encoder we tested (BioBERT, PubMedBERT, BioM-ELECTRA) scores unrelated cross-domain pairs between 0.76 and 0.92 when the answer should be near zero. Accuracy on cross-domain discrimination is 0%.
  Retrieval systems survive this, because a language model downstream filters the noise. A Large Behavioural Model (LBM), a foundation model whose subject is a person rather than a sentence, does not: it reasons over a graph of a user's life and treats embedding proximity as evidence that two events are causally linked. False proximity writes a false causal edge, and everything downstream inherits the error. Here, embedding geometry is not a tuning knob; it is correctness.
  We report the fix. A contrastive pass over 72,034 pairs raises PubMedBERT BIOSSES correlation from 0.633 to 0.828 and within-vs-across-domain separation from 1.05x to 1.63x. A second pass, BODHI, mines hard negatives from edges absent in a biomedical knowledge graph and lifts separation to 2.30x and the discrimination gap to +0.392, at a 4.5% BIOSSES cost. On an Intel Xeon 6737P with AMX, OpenVINO cuts single-query latency from 1367 ms to 10 ms (133x) and reaches 555 sentences/sec. One finding contradicts standard advice: FP16 beats INT8 on this silicon at every serving batch size, and we explain why. The same model on a no-AMX Ice Lake instance runs 13-27x slower. We release the benchmark suite, training corpora, the BODHI generator, and the OpenVINO scripts.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了现有生物医学语言模型在跨领域语义相似度判断中存在严重偏差（如将'皮质醇'与'股市波动'错误关联），提出BODHI对比学习方法显著提升领域内/跨领域区分能力，并优化推理效率，开源全部代码与数据。
AI.motivation: 现有生物医学语言模型（如BioBERT、PubMedBERT）在跨领域实体对上产生过高且错误的语义相似度得分，导致以行为建模为基础的大模型（LBM）因误判嵌入邻近性而引入虚假因果关系，威胁下游推理正确性。
AI.method: 提出两阶段对比学习修正方法：第一阶段在72,034对样本上进行常规对比训练；第二阶段BODHI从生物医学知识图谱中自动挖掘缺失边作为难负样本进行强化训练；同时采用OpenVINO工具链优化推理部署，并系统评估FP16/INT8精度-性能权衡。
AI.result: PubMedBERT在BIOSSES相关性达0.828（+0.195），跨域分离比提升至2.30x（原1.05x），歧视差距达+0.392；OpenVINO优化后单查询延迟降至10ms（加速133倍），吞吐达555句/秒；发现FP16在AMX硬件上全面优于INT8。
AI.conclusion: 嵌入几何结构在行为级大模型中直接决定推理正确性，不能仅视为可调超参；通过知识图谱引导的难负样本挖掘与硬件感知部署，可系统性修复跨域混淆问题并实现高效可信推理。

title: Physically Consistent Null Space Alignment for Detection of Low-Magnitude False Data Injection Attacks
summary: False data injection attacks (FDIAs) introducing small measurement perturbations can still cause large deviations in power system state estimation when the injected signals align with the pseudo-null space of the system model. Existing model- and data-driven detectors may fail to identify such low-magnitude but high-impact attacks because residual tests ignore changes hidden in the pseudo-null space, while subspace learning methods capture correlation patterns without enforcing physical consistency. This paper proposes Physically Consistent Null Space Alignment (PCNSA), a framework that detects stealthy FDIAs by preserving, through preprocessing, the geometric correspondence between the physical null space and the measurement-derived pseudo-null space. The key point is a Pseudo-null Space Conserved data Preprocessing (PSCP) step that re-expresses measurements in the physical coordinate frame before subspace extraction. We prove that PSCP preserves the separation between row space and its orthogonal complement, a property that conventional per-feature standardization violates. This keeps the singular value decomposition (SVD)-derived pseudo-null subspace aligned with the physical residual space without explicit knowledge of H. Experiments on IEEE 14-, 30-, 57-, and 118-bus systems confirm this principle in practice: stealthy attacks that evade XTM, LSTM, AE and Isolation Forest baselines appear as clear deviations in the aligned subspace, yielding higher F1-score and detection accuracy while remaining robust under partial observability and realistic PMU noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PCNSA框架，通过PSCP预处理步骤保持物理零空间与测量伪零空间的几何一致性，从而有效检测隐蔽的虚假数据注入攻击（FDIAs）。
AI.motivation: 现有基于模型或数据驱动的检测方法难以识别低幅值但高影响的FDIAs，因其残差检验忽略伪零空间中的隐藏变化，而子空间学习方法缺乏物理一致性约束。
AI.method: 提出Physically Consistent Null Space Alignment（PCNSA）框架，核心是Pseudo-null Space Conserved data Preprocessing（PSCP）步骤，将测量数据重表达于物理坐标系中进行子空间提取，并理论证明其保持行空间与其正交补的分离性。
AI.result: 在IEEE 14/30/57/118节点系统上的实验表明，PCNSA能显著提升F1分数和检测精度，成功识别逃逸XTM、LSTM、AE和孤立森林等基线方法的隐蔽攻击，且在部分可观测性和真实PMU噪声下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: PCNSA通过物理一致的预处理实现伪零空间对齐，无需先验知识H，为电力系统状态估计中隐蔽FDIAs的检测提供了新范式。

title: DECSELFMASK: Leveraging Unlabeled Text via Self-Relevance-Guided Masking for Decoder-Only Classification
summary: Classification tasks require annotated data, which can often be expensive, time-consuming, or even unfeasible to collect. This is the case of the medical domain, where large datasets often have few annotated examples. To address this, we propose DecSelfMask (Decoder Self-learning by Masking), an approach to enhance decoder-only performance on classification tasks. We build on common self-learning approaches by leveraging a model to create training examples from unlabeled data to propose a novel relevance-guided masking strategy. We use relevance attribution methods to determine what portions of unannotated texts are relevant for a task. We then create self-supervised training examples by masking out those portions, training the model to reconstruct them via next-token-prediction. We hypothesize that those examples convey knowledge about the structure and semantics of unannotated data that can be useful for downstream performance. We test our approach on 136 tasks from a collection of 1.9M clinical notes from an Italian hospital. We quantify DecSelfMask's impact on downstream tasks on 5 models of different scales and families, including a probing analysis. Experiments show consistent gains, outperforming standard supervised fine-tuning approaches (+19.9 points in Macro F1), synthetic label generation (+12.5), and continual pretraining (+6.3), as well as common baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DecSelfMask方法，通过相关性引导的掩码策略，利用无标签医疗文本进行自监督学习，显著提升解码器-only模型在分类任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 医疗领域标注数据稀缺且昂贵，需要一种有效利用大量无标签数据的方法来提升分类性能。
AI.method: 提出DecSelfMask方法，基于相关性归因方法识别无标注文本中与任务相关的部分，并对其进行掩码，然后通过下一词预测任务训练模型重建被掩码内容。
AI.result: 在136个临床任务上验证了该方法的有效性，相比监督微调、合成标签生成和持续预训练等基线方法，Macro F1分别提升19.9、12.5和6.3分。
AI.conclusion: DecSelfMask能有效利用无标签数据增强解码器-only模型的分类能力，在医疗文本分析中具有显著优势。

title: Leveraging NeRF-Rendered Images for 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Neural radiance field (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) are two mainstream approaches for novel view synthesis. They often show complementary performance, i.e., 3DGS demonstrating faster rendering speed and NeRF demonstrating higher rendering quality. Motivated by this, we propose leveraging NeRF-rendered images for 3DGS. Specifically, we target street scenes and utilize a pre-trained street-specific NeRF method to produce training images for a target 3DGS method. In our 3DGS training, NeRF-rendered images are used to remove transient objects in street-level input views and to generate bird's-eye views as additional views, inheriting the higher-quality rendering of NeRF into 3DGS. We further incorporate a diffusion-based image enhancement to improve the image quality of the additional views. Experimental results on one synthetic and two real datasets demonstrate that our proposed method improves street-scene rendering while preserving the speed of 3DGS and the quality of NeRF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合NeRF高质量渲染与3DGS高速度优势的新方法：利用街景专用预训练NeRF生成去除了瞬态物体的图像和鸟瞰图，再用于训练3DGS，并引入扩散模型增强图像质量，从而在保持3DGS速度的同时提升街景渲染质量。
AI.motivation: NeRF渲染质量高但速度慢，3DGS速度快但质量略低；二者在街景重建中具有互补性，因此希望融合二者优势。
AI.method: 利用预训练街景NeRF生成两类训练图像：（1）去除输入视图中瞬态物体的干净图像；（2）鸟瞰图作为新增视角；再结合扩散模型对新增视图进行图像增强，用于监督3DGS训练。
AI.result: 在1个合成数据集和2个真实街景数据集上验证，所提方法在保持3DGS渲染速度的同时，显著提升了街景新视角合成的质量，兼顾NeRF的高质量与3DGS的高效率。
AI.conclusion: NeRF可作为3DGS的高质量‘教师’，通过生成增强训练数据（尤其含语义一致的鸟瞰图），有效提升3DGS在复杂街景中的泛化与重建能力。

title: (Auto)formalization is supposed to be easy: Trellis process semantics for spelling out rigorous proofs
summary: We present Trellis: an autoformalization system that leverages LLM agents in a deterministically constrained workflow to enforce incremental progress in Lean autoformalization tasks through iterative refinement of natural language proofs. Our approach is motivated by the common mathematician's notion of what it means to have a rigorous proof in the first place: namely, that it would be routine to elaborate any part of the proof in further detail. The result is a system which aims to achieve reliable autoformalization on a modest budget and with generalist agents, with specialization to autoformalization coming not from any task-specific agent training but instead from a meaning-of-rigor inspired workflow enforced by process semantics. We link to an end-to-end Lean formalization of a recent Ramsey theory breakthrough produced by the process.

AI.tldr: Trellis是一个利用大语言模型（LLM）代理、在确定性约束工作流中进行迭代精炼的自动形式化系统，旨在以较低成本和通用型代理实现可靠的Lean自动形式化。
AI.motivation: 受数学家对‘严谨证明’的理解启发——即证明的任何部分都可被常规地进一步展开细化，从而设计出符合‘严谨性含义’的工作流程。
AI.method: 采用LLM代理，在确定性约束的工作流中，通过自然语言证明的迭代精炼，逐步推进Lean自动形式化任务。
AI.result: 实现了可靠、低成本的Lean自动形式化；成功端到端形式化了近期拉姆齐理论的重要突破成果。
AI.conclusion: 自动形式化的专业化不依赖于任务定制的代理训练，而源于由‘严谨性含义’驱动的过程语义设计。

title: Inferring hidden forcing in a biological oscillator using Kolmogorov-Arnold networks
summary: Inferring the forces that drive a dynamical system from partial observations is a fundamental challenge across physics, particularly when distinct underlying mechanisms produce similar observable dynamics. Here we show that the effective muscular forcing underlying avian respiratory dynamics can be reconstructed from measurements of air-sac pressure alone. Using an interpretable learning framework based on Kolmogorov-Arnold networks, we infer the governing equations of the system directly from data and uncover a nontrivial structure in the underlying forcing that is not apparent from the pressure signal, which instead suggests a relaxation-like oscillation. The reconstructed dynamics predict a two-phase activation pattern within each respiratory cycle, which we independently validate through electromyographic recordings of expiratory muscles. These results demonstrate that data-driven reconstruction of dynamical laws can reveal hidden physical structure and provide access to unobserved driving variables, establishing a general route to infer latent forces in partially observed dynamical systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Kolmogorov-Arnold网络的可解释学习框架，从鸟类气囊压力数据中成功重构出驱动呼吸动力学的有效肌肉力，并揭示了隐藏的两相激活模式，经肌电图验证。
AI.motivation: 从部分观测中推断动力系统的驱动作用力是物理学中的基本挑战，尤其当不同机制产生相似可观测动力学时。
AI.method: 采用基于Kolmogorov-Arnold网络的可解释机器学习框架，直接从气囊压力数据中推断系统控制方程。
AI.result: 重构出非平凡的肌肉强迫结构，发现每个呼吸周期内存在两相激活模式，并通过肌电图独立验证。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的动力学定律重建能揭示隐藏物理结构、获取未观测驱动变量，为部分观测系统中推断潜在作用力提供了通用路径。

title: A Finetuned SpeechLLM for Joint Multi-Granular L2 Assessment and Natural-Language Rationales
comment: Accepted to Interspeech 2026. This publication is part of the project Responsible AI for Voice Diagnostics (RAIVD) with file number NGF.1607.22.013 of the research programme NGF AiNed Fellowship Grants, which is financed by the Dutch Research Council (NWO)
summary: Automated L2 speech assessment can assign proficiency labels, but often lacks interpretability. We propose a rubric-guided SpeechLLM for multi-aspect, multi-granular assessment, trained with a hybrid objective combining supervised fine-tuning and Bounded Direct Preference Optimization. The model jointly predicts ordinal labels at the sentence-level (accuracy, fluency, prosody), word/phoneme-level accuracy, and generates a natural-language rationale in the same response. On SpeechOcean762, our approach matches or outperforms single-granularity models while remaining competitive with prior approaches. We analyze rationale reliability along two axes: self-consistency with model predictions and alignment with ground-truth labels, using sentiment consistency (plausibility) and mention-based agreement (faithfulness). Rationales are plausible at the sentence level, but faithfulness degrades at the word/phoneme level: references are sparse and weakly aligned with token-level labels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于评分标准的SpeechLLM模型，用于多维度、多粒度的二语口语自动评估，结合监督微调与有界直接偏好优化进行训练，并能同时输出等级标签、细粒度准确率及自然语言解释；实验表明其性能媲美单粒度模型，但解释在词/音素级的忠实性较弱。
AI.motivation: 现有L2口语自动评估方法缺乏可解释性，难以支持教学反馈和学习诊断。
AI.method: 提出rubric-guided SpeechLLM，采用混合目标函数（监督微调 + Bounded Direct Preference Optimization），联合预测句子级（准确性、流利度、韵律）、词/音素级准确率，并生成自然语言解释；在SpeechOcean762数据集上评估，并从自一致性（plausibility）和与真值对齐度（faithfulness）两方面分析解释质量。
AI.result: 该方法在SpeechOcean762上匹配或超越单粒度模型，且整体性能接近先前最优方法；解释在句子级具有较高合理性（sentiment consistency），但在词/音素级忠实性差（mention-based agreement低，引用稀疏且与token标签弱对齐）。
AI.conclusion: 多粒度联合建模可行且有效，但生成式解释在细粒度层面仍面临忠实性挑战，需进一步提升对底层语音标注的对齐能力。

title: MilliVid: Hierarchical Latents for Long-Range Consistency in Video Generation
comment: Ishaan Preetam Chandratreya and David Charatan contributed equally. Project page: https://davidcharatan.com/millivid/
summary: Video generative models have become increasingly powerful, but long-range consistency remains challenging to achieve because even a few dozen frames require impractically long transformer sequence lengths. We show that this issue can be mitigated by generating video using coarse-to-fine rollout within a multi-scale token space. Our approach is simple: first, we pre-train an autoencoder that compresses each frame into a hierarchy of tokens, with levels ranging from the typical latent resolution to only a handful of tokens per frame. The coarsest levels capture the most consequential information, such as scene layout and semantics, while finer levels add high-frequency appearance and texture. Then, we train a video diffusion model to generate these tokens using coarse-to-fine rollout. By carefully controlling the level of detail at which frames are generated and used as context during each rollout step, we are able to preserve long-range consistency in geometry and object permanence while spending less compute on the long-range consistency of less perceptually relevant details. We validate this approach using a custom dataset of long Minecraft videos, where it produces substantially more consistent rollouts compared to existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多尺度令牌空间的粗到细视频生成方法，通过分层压缩帧并逐步生成不同粒度的令牌，在保证长程几何和物体一致性的同时降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型在长程一致性上存在挑战，因长视频需要极长的Transformer序列长度，计算不现实。
AI.method: 首先预训练一个分层自编码器，将每帧压缩为从粗到细多个尺度的令牌；然后训练视频扩散模型，按粗到细顺序逐级生成令牌，并在每步中控制生成和上下文使用的细节级别。
AI.result: 在自建的长Minecraft视频数据集上验证，该方法相比现有基线显著提升了生成视频的长程一致性（如场景布局、物体永久性）。
AI.conclusion: 粗到细的多尺度令牌生成策略能有效缓解长程一致性难题，在保持感知关键信息一致性的同时节省计算资源。

title: Proxy Reward Internalization and Mechanistic Exploitation: A Learned Precursor to Reward Hacking and Its Generalization
summary: Reward hacking is usually studied after it becomes visible, once a model earns high proxy reward while failing the intended task. We instead study what proxy RL teaches before that failure appears. We introduce Proxy Reward Internalization and Mechanistic Exploitation (PRIME), a learned capability to assess task correctness, predict proxy acceptance, and reason about exploitable proxy--gold gaps. In coding RL environments with exploitable pytest rewards, we measure PRIME through chain-of-thought monitoring, direct probes, and activation-level concept vectors. We find that PRIME emerges in a staged sequence before sustained reward hacking, and that its current direct-probe score forecasts later hack onset and severity even when the visible hack rate is still low. PRIME also adapts when the evaluator changes, retargeting to whichever proxy--gold gap remains rewarded and persisting when gold reward suppresses overt hacking, and ablating its activation directions reduces hacking. Across checkpoints, in-domain PRIME tracks out-of-domain misalignment. Together these results suggest that exploitable proxy RL amplifies a proxy-internalization capability upstream of visible hacking, making PRIME a candidate early-warning signal for broader alignment risk.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRIME（Proxy Reward Internalization and Mechanistic Exploitation）概念，指出在奖励黑客行为显现前，模型已习得评估任务正确性、预测代理奖励接受度及识别代理-真实目标差距的能力；通过多种测量手段发现PRIME按阶段出现，其早期探测分数可预测后续黑客行为的 onset 和严重程度，并随评估器变化而适应，且与跨领域对齐失败相关，因此可作为对齐风险的早期预警信号。
AI.motivation: 传统上奖励黑客行为仅在明显失效后被研究，本文旨在探究代理强化学习（proxy RL）在失效发生前教给模型的内在能力，以提前识别对齐风险。
AI.method: 在具有可利用pytest奖励的编码RL环境中，通过思维链监控、直接探针和激活层面的概念向量来测量PRIME能力。
AI.result: PRIME按阶段性顺序出现于持续奖励黑客之前；其直接探针得分可提前预测黑客行为的发生时间与严重程度；PRIME能适应评估器变化，持续关注仍被奖励的代理–真实目标差距，并在黄金奖励抑制显性黑客时仍持续存在；消融其对应激活方向可降低黑客行为；域内PRIME水平与域外对齐失败呈正相关。
AI.conclusion: 可利用的代理RL会放大一种位于可见奖励黑客上游的代理内化能力（即PRIME），该能力可作为更广泛对齐风险的早期预警信号。

title: Memory Beyond Recall: A Dual-Process Cognitive Memory System for Self-Evolving LLM Agents
summary: Long-term memory for an LLM agent is more than retrieving the right passage at the right time. Current memory systems collapse belief revision, causal coupling, and cross-domain abstraction into a single retrieval surface tuned for surface recall, and consequently struggle on implicit personalisation that requires reasoning over how a user has evolved. We propose DCPM, which reorganises agent memory along a cognitive capability hierarchy ascending from raw inputs and atomic facts, through diachronic belief trajectories and identity, to domain schemas, latent intentions and cross-domain patterns. The hierarchy is driven by two processes inheriting the architectural split of dual-process theory: a synchronous daytime writer (System1) that records belief revisions as doubly linked supersedes chains, and an asynchronous nighttime engine (System2) that induces schemas and intentions and sweeps for cross-domain collisions abstracted into higher-level core schemas. On LongMemEval, PersonaMem and PersonaMem-v2, enabling System2 contributes most where the benchmark rewards implicit cross-session inference (up to +5.20 on PersonaMem-v2) and least on span recall, matching the architectural prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DCPM，一种基于认知能力层次结构的长期记忆系统，通过双过程理论驱动的记忆机制（日间同步记录与夜间异步抽象）提升LLM代理在隐式个性化和跨会话推理上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆系统将信念修正、因果耦合和跨域抽象统一为单一检索表面，难以支持需建模用户演化过程的隐式个性化任务。
AI.method: 提出DCPM记忆架构：构建从原始输入、原子事实，到历时性信念轨迹、身份、领域模式、潜在意图及跨域模式的认知能力层次；引入类比双过程理论的‘日间写入器’（System1）记录信念修订链，与‘夜间引擎’（System2）进行模式归纳、意图推断与跨域冲突检测。
AI.result: 在LongMemEval、PersonaMem及PersonaMem-v2上验证，启用System2显著提升隐式跨会话推理性能（PersonaMem-v2最高+5.20），而在片段召回任务中增益最小，符合理论预期。
AI.conclusion: 将记忆组织为分层认知能力结构，并解耦实时记录与离线抽象，是提升LLM代理长期个性化推理能力的关键路径。

title: See More, Think Deeper: Query-Expanded Visual Evidence and Answer-Clue Guided Reflection for Long Video Understanding
summary: Recent advances in Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) have enabled performance on long-video understanding tasks. However, existing methods still face two key limitations: evidence acquisition often relies on a single search intent, and answer generation lacks an effective visual feedback mechanism. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{CoVER}, a Comprehensive Visual Evidence and Reflection framework for long-video understanding. CoVER enables Video-LLMs to \textbf{See More} by dynamically gathering query-expanded visual evidence, and \textbf{Think Deeper} by verifying draft answers with effective answer-specific visual feedback. Together, these mechanisms shift long-video understanding from answer-centric generation to evidence-centric and visually verifiable reasoning. Experimental results show that CoVER-7B substantially outperforms models with the same parameter scale and even surpasses state-of-the-art closed-source models on certain metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoVER框架，通过动态获取查询扩展的视觉证据和基于答案的视觉反馈机制，提升长视频理解能力，显著优于同规模模型。
AI.motivation: 现有Video-LLMs在长视频理解中存在证据获取依赖单一搜索意图、答案生成缺乏有效视觉反馈两大局限。
AI.method: 提出CoVER框架，包含‘See More’（动态查询扩展式视觉证据采集）和‘Think Deeper’（答案特异性视觉反馈验证）两个核心机制。
AI.result: CoVER-7B在多项指标上显著超越同参数规模模型，甚至在部分指标上超过当前最优闭源模型。
AI.conclusion: CoVER将长视频理解从答案中心转向证据中心与可视觉验证的推理范式。

title: Beyond Probabilistic Similarity: Structural, Temporal, and Causal Limitations of Retrieval-Augmented Generation in the Legal Domain
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become a standard architectural response to unreliability in legal AI, yet high-profile failures, including fabricated citations submitted to courts and anachronistic legal content presented as current, continue to appear across jurisdictions. We argue that these failures are not residual confabulations to be eliminated by scaling language models, but symptoms of an architectural mismatch between probabilistic retrieval and the hierarchical, temporal, and institutional structure of legal knowledge. We develop the argument in three moves. First, we articulate the ontological commitment of legal knowledge as a triad of properties derivable from classical legal theory: hierarchical and mereological structure, diachronic dynamism under operational closure, and causal traceability of institutional provenance grounded in the duty of justification. Second, we identify three corresponding pathologies of retrieval (mereological blindness, diachronic blindness, and causal opacity), each developed with an operational definition, a failure mechanism, a canonical example, and detection criteria for diagnostic use. Third, we review the state of the art through this lens, showing that existing approaches address these requirements unevenly and do not yet compose into a paradigm that treats them as co-constitutive. From this analysis we derive four architectural commitments that characterize the deterministic-by-design direction for legal retrieval: ontological primacy, event reification, bitemporal correctness, and deterministic interaction protocols. The framework concerns quaestio juris (which norms apply and in what state) rather than the downstream tasks that act on identified norms, and addresses legislative and constitutional retrieval primarily, with interpretive time as an explicit extension.

AI.tldr: 本文批判了法律AI中检索增强生成（RAG）架构的局限性，指出其失败源于概率性检索与法律知识固有的层级性、时序性和制度性结构之间的根本不匹配；进而提出一种‘确定性设计’的新型法律检索框架，强调本体优先、事件具象化、双时态正确性与确定性交互协议四大原则。
AI.motivation: 高发的法律AI错误（如虚构判例、过时法条）并非模型规模不足所致，而是现有RAG架构无法适配法律知识特有的层级、时间演化与制度溯源等本体特征。
AI.method: 通过三步论证：1）基于经典法理学提炼法律知识的三重本体属性（层级-整体论结构、历时动态性、制度因果可追溯性）；2）据此定义检索的三类病理（整体论盲区、历时盲区、因果不透明）并给出操作化定义与检测标准；3）以该框架评估现有技术，揭示其不均衡性与范式缺失。
AI.result: 提出面向法律检索的‘确定性设计’四原则框架（本体优先、事件具象化、双时态正确性、确定性交互协议），聚焦‘何规范适用及处于何种状态’（quaestio juris）这一核心问题，优先覆盖立法与宪法检索，并将解释性时间作为显式扩展。
AI.conclusion: 法律AI需超越概率性RAG范式，转向以法律本体为先、保障确定性的新架构；该框架为构建可信赖、可审计、符合法律推理本质的法律信息系统提供了理论基础与设计指南。

title: PIPE-Cypher: Automatic Enterprise Benchmark Generation for Text-to-Cypher Systems
summary: Enterprise property graphs vary widely in schema structure, internal terminology, domain assumptions, governance constraints, and user interaction patterns. A deployment-relevant Text2Cypher benchmark therefore reflects the questions users and agents actually ask of that graph. Creating such a benchmark is difficult because schemas and values are unique, and graph structure changes over time. Each NL-query pair must also be executable, use real graph entities, preserve diversity, and remain balanced across query types and difficulty levels. We present PIPE-Cypher, a local benchmark-generation pipeline that turns a live property graph and optional seed queries from customer questions, analyst logs, or agent tool calls into balanced NL-to-Cypher benchmarks. PIPE-Cypher combines schema profiling, reverse-query grounding, constrained generation, deterministic Cypher governance, execution validation, redaction, diversity controls, and a calibrated local LLM judge. Using local Qwen3.5-9B generation and judging, PIPE-Cypher exports 3,000 accepted FinBench/SNB examples, completes three audited ablation suites, calibrates judge behavior with human labels, and evaluates 11 local downstream models. The resulting benchmark is deliberately discriminative: zero-shot transfer is weak, while a few-shot control shows that schema-specific example banks can help compatible model families. Together, PIPE-Cypher makes Text2Cypher benchmarking a repeatable process that evolves with the graph, its users, and its target workloads.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PIPE-Cypher，一种面向企业级属性图的本地化Text2Cypher基准生成流程，支持从真实图谱和用户问题中自动生成可执行、多样、平衡的自然语言到Cypher查询对。
AI.motivation: 现有Text2Cypher基准难以反映企业属性图在schema、术语、治理与交互上的多样性与动态性；构建部署相关的高质量基准面临可执行性、真实性、多样性与平衡性等多重挑战。
AI.method: PIPE-Cypher结合schema分析、逆向查询锚定、约束式生成、确定性Cypher治理、执行验证、脱敏、多样性控制及本地LLM（Qwen3.5-9B）判别器，实现端到端基准生成。
AI.result: 生成3000个经验证的FinBench/SNB样本，完成三组消融实验，校准判别器与人工标注一致，并评估11种下游模型；基准具有强区分性：零样本迁移效果差，但少样本提示可提升兼容模型表现。
AI.conclusion: PIPE-Cypher将Text2Cypher基准构建变为可重复、可演化的本地化过程，适配图谱、用户与实际工作负载的持续变化。

title: Detecting Differences Is Not Understanding Structure: Large Language Models Fail at Graph Isomorphism
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown impressive performance on diverse reasoning tasks, yet their capacity for structural reasoning in graphs remains unclear. We investigate whether LLMs can genuinely understand graph isomorphism -a fundamental problem in graph theory. While LLMs achieve near-perfect accuracy on isomorphism detection, we show this performance is illusory.
