When identical graphs are presented with permuted node labels, LLMs fail to identify their isomorphism. This finding suggests that LLMs exploit patterns rather than reasoning about abstract graph structure. Since permutation invariance is a fundamental requirement for valid structural reasoning, these results indicate that success on graph reasoning benchmarks should not be interpreted as evidence of genuine topological understanding.

AI.tldr: 大型语言模型在图同构检测任务上表现优异，但其成功依赖于表面模式而非真正的结构推理能力，缺乏对图拓扑结构的抽象理解。
AI.motivation: 探究大型语言模型是否真正具备图结构推理能力，特别是对图同构这一基础图论问题的理解。
AI.method: 通过测试LLMs在节点标签置换后的相同图（即同构图）上的识别能力，检验其是否具备置换不变性这一结构推理的基本要求。
AI.result: LLMs在标准图同构检测中准确率接近完美，但在节点标签置换后无法识别同构关系，表明其不具备置换不变性。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在图推理任务上的高分并不反映真实的拓扑理解能力，而是依赖数据中的表面统计模式，因此不能作为其具备结构性推理能力的证据。

title: REFINE: Super-efficient 3D Gaussian Splatting Pruning via Rendering-Free Primitive Importance
summary: Existing pruning methods for 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) suffer from either severe quality degradation or prohibitive computational overhead. In this paper, we propose REFINE, a highly accelerated 3DGS pruning framework centered on a novel rendering-free primitive importance metric. Our approach leverages an analytically approximated, rendering-aware Hessian field to quantify the expected perceptual error induced by the removal of individual primitives. By modeling the joint modulation of visibility, projection geometry and the content adaptive hyperparameter, we entirely bypass costly forward rendering passes and derive an anisotropic perceptual weight field that serves as a high-fidelity proxy for primitive importance. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that REFINE maintains highly competitive rendering quality while achieving an unprecedented $3,000\times$ reduction in pruning-related computational complexity compared to state-of-the-art pruning methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出REFINE，一种基于渲染无关的原始重要性度量的高效3D高斯点阵剪枝框架，显著降低计算开销同时保持高质量渲染效果。
AI.motivation: 现有3D高斯点阵（3DGS）剪枝方法存在质量严重下降或计算开销过大的问题。
AI.method: 提出基于解析近似、渲染感知Hessian场的渲染无关原始重要性度量；建模可见性、投影几何与内容自适应超参数的联合调制，生成各向异性感知权重场，避免前向渲染。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证，REFINE在保持高竞争力渲染质量的同时，剪枝相关计算复杂度相较SOTA方法降低达3000倍。
AI.conclusion: REFINE是一种高效、高质量的3DGS剪枝新范式，通过引入渲染无关但感知感知的重要性度量，突破了传统剪枝方法的效率-质量权衡瓶颈。

title: SearchSwarm: Towards Delegation Intelligence in Agentic LLMs for Long-Horizon Deep Research
summary: Large language models are increasingly expected to handle complex, long-horizon real-world tasks whose context demands can grow without bound, yet model context windows remain inherently finite. Recent work explores a paradigm where a main agent decomposes tasks and dispatches subtasks to subagents, which execute and return only summarized results, conserving the main agent's context budget. However, performing this well requires delegation intelligence: the ability to decompose complex tasks, determine when and what to delegate, and integrate returned results into the ongoing workflow. Training data for this capability is scarce in naturally occurring text, and to our knowledge, how to synthesize such data and train models to acquire this capability remains largely unexplored in the open-source community. To bridge this gap, we present a preliminary exploration targeting deep research, a representative long-horizon agent task. Specifically, we design a harness that guides the model toward high-quality task decomposition and delegation, while constraining subagents to return results properly to support the main agent's workflow. The harness-guided trajectories naturally encode correct delegation decisions, which we use as supervised fine-tuning data to internalize delegation intelligence into model weights. Our resulting model, SearchSwarm-30B-A3B, achieves 68.1 on BrowseComp and 73.3 on BrowseComp-ZH, the best results among all models of comparable scale. We will release our harness, model weights, and training data to facilitate future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过harness引导生成高质量任务分解与委托轨迹，并用于监督微调，以赋予大模型‘委托智能’的方法，在BrowseComp等基准上取得了同规模模型最优效果。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在处理长周期、复杂现实任务时面临上下文窗口有限的挑战，而任务分解与子代理委托需要专门的‘委托智能’，但相关训练数据稀缺且缺乏开源训练方法。
AI.method: 设计了一个harness框架，引导模型进行高质量任务分解与委托，并约束子代理返回摘要结果；利用harness生成的正确委托轨迹作为监督微调数据，将 delegation intelligence 注入模型权重。
AI.result: 所训练模型SearchSwarm-30B-A3B在BrowseComp和BrowseComp-ZH上分别达到68.1和73.3，为同规模模型最佳；同时开源harness、模型权重与训练数据。
AI.conclusion: 通过可控的数据合成与监督微调，可有效赋予大模型 delegation intelligence，为长周期多步代理任务提供可行技术路径。

title: STELLAR: Spatio-Temporal Environmental Learning with Latent Alignment and Refinement for Long-Tailed Species Distribution Modeling
summary: Joint Species Distribution Modeling (JSDM) is a key enabler for biodiversity monitoring and conservation planning. However, accurate JSDM faces two coupled challenges: environmental drivers and species distributions are inherently spatio-temporal, while species co-occurrence patterns exhibit complex non-linear community structure and severe long-tail imbalance driven by rare species. Existing approaches often address these factors in isolation, learning from static covariates or neglecting the historical trajectories of dynamic community structure. To overcome these limitations, we propose STELLAR (Spatio-Temporal Environmental Learning with Latent Alignment and Refinement), a novel framework that learns a shared latent space where dynamic habitat context and community structure are optimized jointly. Our approach integrates three complementary components: (1) a Graph-Temporal Encoder that employs graph attention and recurrent units to aggregate spatial neighborhood effects and capture the co-evolving historical dynamics of environmental context and community structure; (2) a Context-Anchored Latent Alignment mechanism that structures the latent space using a label-activated mixture prior and supervised contrastive learning, actively clustering species based on shared environmental preferences; and (3) an Imbalance-Aware Decoupled Decoding module that utilizes Asymmetric Loss to focus learning on hard, rare species samples, preventing mode collapse in the long tail. Experiments on the large-scale eBird dataset, curated with domain experts, demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, particularly in predicting rare species and revealing interpretable species interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出STELLAR框架，通过联合建模时空环境动态与物种群落结构，在共享隐空间中同时优化生境背景和群落结构，并采用图-时序编码器、上下文锚定隐空间对齐机制和不平衡感知解码模块，显著提升稀有物种预测性能与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 准确的联合物种分布建模（JSDM）面临两大耦合挑战：环境驱动因子和物种分布具有固有的时空特性，而物种共现模式呈现复杂的非线性群落结构及由稀有物种导致的严重长尾不平衡；现有方法常孤立处理这些因素，忽略动态群落结构的历史轨迹。
AI.method: 提出STELLAR框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) 图-时序编码器，融合图注意力与循环单元以聚合空间邻域效应并捕捉环境与群落协同演化的历史动态；(2) 上下文锚定隐空间对齐机制，利用标签激活混合先验与监督对比学习结构化隐空间，按环境偏好聚类物种；(3) 不平衡感知解耦解码模块，采用非对称损失聚焦于难样本（稀有物种），防止长尾模式坍塌。
AI.result: 在专家构建的大规模eBird数据集上实验表明，该框架显著优于现有最先进基线，尤其在稀有物种预测和揭示可解释物种互作方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: STELLAR通过联合建模时空环境与动态群落结构，并针对性解决长尾不平衡问题，为生物多样性监测与保护规划提供了更准确、更具可解释性的JSDM新范式。

title: Self-Harness: Harnesses That Improve Themselves
summary: The performance of LLM-based agents is jointly shaped by their base models and the harnesses that mediate their interaction with the environment. Because different models exhibit distinct behaviors, effective harness design is inherently model-specific. Yet agent harnesses are still largely engineered by human experts, a paradigm that scales poorly as modern LLMs become increasingly diverse and rapidly evolving. In this paper, we introduce Self-Harness, a new paradigm in which an LLM-based agent improves its own operating harness, without relying on human engineers or stronger external agents. We operationalize Self-Harness as an iterative loop with three stages: Weakness Mining, which identifies model-specific failure patterns from execution traces; Harness Proposal, which generates diverse yet minimal harness modifications tied to these failures; and Proposal Validation, which accepts candidate edits only after regression testing. We instantiate Self-Harness on Terminal-Bench-2.0 using a minimal initial harness and three base models from diverse families: MiniMax M2.5, Qwen3.5-35B-A3B, and GLM-5. Across all three models, Self-Harness consistently improves performance, with held-out pass rates increasing from 40.5% to 61.9%, 23.8% to 38.1%, and 42.9% to 57.1%, respectively. Qualitative analyses further show that Self-Harness does not simply add generic instructions, but effectively turns model-specific weaknesses into concrete, executable harness changes. These results suggest a path toward LLM-based agents that are not merely shaped by their harnesses, but can also participate in reshaping them.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Self-Harness范式，使LLM代理能自主迭代优化自身运行环境（harness），无需人工干预或更强外部模型；通过弱点挖掘、harness提案与验证三阶段循环，在Terminal-Bench-2.0上显著提升三类不同基座模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理的harness主要依赖人工设计，难以适应日益多样和快速演进的基座模型，亟需一种可扩展、模型自适配的自动化harness优化机制。
AI.method: 提出Self-Harness三阶段迭代框架：1）Weakness Mining——从执行轨迹中识别模型特异性失败模式；2）Harness Proposal——生成针对这些失败的轻量、精准harness修改；3）Proposal Validation——通过回归测试筛选有效修改。在Terminal-Bench-2.0上以极简初始harness对MiniMax M2.5、Qwen3.5-35B-A3B和GLM-5进行验证。
AI.result: 三个模型在held-out测试集上的pass rate分别从40.5%→61.9%、23.8%→38.1%、42.9%→57.1%；定性分析表明修改具有模型特异性，非泛化指令堆砌。
AI.conclusion: Self-Harness证明了LLM代理可主动参与并优化自身运行环境，为构建具备自我演进能力的智能体提供了新路径。

title: Beyond Scalar Rewards by Internalizing Reasoning into Score Distributions
summary: Reward models are central to text-to-image post-training, but visual preference is subjective and better represented as a distribution over rubric scores than as a deterministic scalar. Existing scalar, score-token, and pairwise reward models over-compress uncertainty and fine-grained score differences, while reasoning-based generative rewards provide stronger judgments but are costly to deploy and difficult to use as direct optimization signals. We propose Z-Reward, a teacher-student reward modeling framework that decouples reasoning-heavy judgment from efficient reward deployment. The teacher is a large VLM that uses reasoning to infer rubric-aligned score distributions, and is trained with Group-wise Direct Score Optimization (GDSO), which combines policy-gradient rewards from distribution expectations with direct pointwise and pairwise supervision on score distributions and score gaps. The student is trained with Reasoning-Internalized Score Distillation (RISD), which transfers the teacher's reasoning-conditioned score distribution into a compact VLM without requiring explicit reasoning chains at inference time. On our internally annotated evaluation set, the 27B GDSO teacher reaches 89.6% human preference accuracy, outperforming SFT, RewardDance, and GRPO, while the 9B RISD student reaches 88.6%, outperforming the OPD baseline and closely matching the larger teacher. We further show that Z-Reward can serve as a differentiable reward signal for text-to-image optimization, yielding a 41.3% net human-preference improvement over the SFT baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Z-Reward框架，通过教师-学生架构解耦推理密集型判断与高效奖励部署：教师大模型（27B）用Group-wise Direct Score Optimization（GDSO）学习rubric对齐的分数分布；学生小模型（9B）用Reasoning-Internalized Score Distillation（RISD）蒸馏该分布，无需推理链即可高效推理；在人工偏好评估中，教师达89.6%，学生达88.6%，且作为可微奖励信号使文本到图像生成提升41.3%净偏好胜率。
AI.motivation: 现有奖励模型（标量、分数token、成对）过度压缩主观视觉偏好的不确定性与细粒度差异；基于推理的生成式奖励虽强但部署成本高、难用于直接优化。
AI.method: 提出Z-Reward教师-学生框架：教师为大型VLM，采用Group-wise Direct Score Optimization（GDSO），融合分布期望的策略梯度奖励与对分数分布及分数差的点对点/成对监督；学生为紧凑VLM，采用Reasoning-Internalized Score Distillation（RISD），将教师的推理条件化分数分布蒸馏至无显式推理链的小模型。
AI.result: 在内部标注评测集上，27B GDSO教师达89.6%人类偏好准确率，优于SFT、RewardDance和GRPO；9B RISD学生达88.6%，优于OPD基线并接近教师性能；Z-Reward作为可微奖励信号用于文生图优化，带来41.3%净人类偏好提升。
AI.conclusion: Z-Reward通过解耦推理与部署、建模分数分布而非标量奖励，有效缓解视觉偏好主观性与不确定性建模难题，在保持高性能的同时显著提升效率与可优化性。

title: Multi-Turn Evaluation of Deep Research Agents Under Process-Level Feedback
comment: Published as a workshop paper at SCALE - ICML 2026 (Oral)
summary: Existing benchmarks for deep research agents (DRAs) assess only single-shot outputs, ignoring a key question: can DRAs improve their reports when guided by feedback? To investigate this, we conduct a multi-turn evaluation of DRAs under two feedback settings: self-reflection, in which the agent revises its report without any external diagnostic signal, and process-level feedback, in which the agent receives guidance targeting gaps in its research strategy. To enable process-level feedback, we design Research Gap Inference (RGI), a method that analyzes patterns of satisfied and unsatisfied rubric criteria to infer research-process gaps. Our analysis reveals three key findings: (i) under self-reflection, agents incorporate and regress on rubric criteria at nearly equal rates, yielding negligible net improvement; (ii) a single round of process-level feedback yields substantial gains, raising the normalized score by approximately $8$-$15$ points and yielding a roughly $35$-$40\%$ incorporation rate; (iii) these gains do not compound over subsequent turns, as agents regress on up to $24\%$ of previously satisfied criteria when rewriting the full report to address remaining gaps. Even with targeted guidance, reliable multi-turn improvement remains out of reach for the DRA architectures we evaluate. Our code and results are publicly available at https://github.com/sabharwalrishabh/Multi-Turn-Evaluation-of-DRAs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多轮评估框架，研究深度研究代理（DRAs）在自我反思和过程级反馈下的报告改进能力；发现自我反思效果有限，单轮过程反馈可显著提升性能，但多轮迭代无法持续增益，揭示当前DRA架构在可靠多轮改进上的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有基准仅评估DRAs的单次输出，忽略了其能否通过反馈持续改进报告这一关键问题。
AI.method: 设计了多轮评估框架，包含自我反思与过程级反馈两种设置；提出Research Gap Inference（RGI）方法，基于评分标准满足情况推断研究过程中的缺陷。
AI.result: （i）自我反思下，代理对评分项的采纳与退化率相近，净提升可忽略；（ii）单轮过程反馈使归一化得分提升8–15分，采纳率达35–40%；（iii）后续轮次中，代理在重写报告时会退化最多24%已满足的评分项，增益不累积。
AI.conclusion: 即使提供针对性的过程级反馈，当前评估的DRA架构仍难以实现可靠的多轮持续改进。

title: A Joint Finite-Sample Certificate for Adaptive Selective Conformal Risk Control
summary: Selective predictors answer on confident inputs and abstain elsewhere; deploying one safely needs a single finite-sample certificate that simultaneously upper-bounds the selected risk, lower-bounds the acceptance probability $\pacc$ above a floor $\pmin$, and lower-bounds the deployment utility. This certificate must be valid under adaptive threshold selection from a finite grid of $m$ pairs on $\ncert$ samples. We give such a certificate for bounded, possibly non-monotone losses by treating the selected risk directly as a ratio rather than through a Hoeffding-style range bound. The construction couples three confidence bounds: a variance-adaptive empirical-Bernstein bound on the ratio risk, a Clopper--Pearson bound on acceptance, and a two-sided closeness bound on utility. Together they lower-bound the certified policy's utility absolutely and to within $2\gammau$ of the best over the \emph{certified set}, both non-vacuous whenever feasible; a regime-scoped third leg matches an external oracle, informative only where the risk margin $\gammar < α$ and vacuous at the headline operating points. Relative to the range-only Hoeffding-ratio construction this sharpens the acceptance-floor dependence from $1/\pmin$ to $1/\sqrt{\pmin}$, and a closed-form corollary identifies a per-pair regime in which our risk bound dominates a Hoeffding conformal risk control (Hoeffding--CRC) selective bound. Empirically, on ImageNet (three ResNets) and COCO val 2017 panoptic, the certificate opens a $+22$ pp certified-acceptance frontier over Hoeffding--CRC and is ${\approx}10{\times}$ tighter than a non-vacuous matched-valid baseline; these gains are regime-scoped, not universal, and absent on ADE20K. The certifier runs in $O(\ncert m)$ time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对选择性预测器的有限样本认证方法，通过联合三个置信界（经验Bernstein比值界、Clopper-Pearson接受率界、双向效用接近界），在自适应阈值选择下同时保证风险上界、接受概率下界和效用下界，显著改进了现有Hoeffding型方法的理论界和实证性能。
AI.motivation: 部署选择性预测器需要一个统一的有限样本证书，能同时控制所选风险、接受概率不低于给定下限、以及部署效用；而现有方法（如Hoeffding型）在理论界和实际性能上存在局限，尤其在低接受率区域表现不佳。
AI.method: 将所选风险直接建模为比值，并采用方差自适应的经验Bernstein比值界；结合Clopper–Pearson法对接受概率进行下界估计，以及双向 closeness 界约束效用；三者耦合构成联合证书，支持在m个阈值对、ncert样本上的自适应选择。
AI.result: 证书在理论上将接受率下限依赖从1/pmin改进为1/√pmin；给出闭式条件判定其风险界优于Hoeffding-CRC；实验显示在ImageNet和COCO上认证接受率提升22个百分点，比非空匹配有效基线紧约10倍；但该增益具有数据集依赖性（ADE20K上无提升）。
AI.conclusion: 所提证书提供了更紧致、非平凡且可计算的联合保障，在特定数据分布和任务下显著优于现有方法，但其优势具有场景依赖性，需结合问题特性谨慎选用。

title: Emergence of Context Characteristics Sensitivity in Large Language Models
summary: During instruction fine-tuning (IFT), large language models (LLMs) learn to follow instructions by using the provided context to answer a query. While prior work has studied how context characteristics correlate with context usage by the LLM, this analysis has been limited to inference time, leaving open how these relationships are acquired in the first place. Here, we measure how models' sensitivity to such characteristics shifts across successive IFT stages: supervised fine-tuning (SFT), direct preference optimization (DPO), and reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). Experiments across four models and three datasets show that SFT makes models more likely to use contexts that are easy to understand, such as containing high length, context-query similarity, and fluency. Post-SFT dynamics may either reinforce or resolve these preferences depending on the training dataset. Our findings reveal that context usage is actively reshaped at each IFT stage, and designing a balanced IFT dataset is important in ensuring robust context utilization of instruction-tuned models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型在指令微调（IFT）过程中对上下文特征敏感性的变化，发现监督微调（SFT）阶段增强了模型对易理解上下文（如长度长、与查询相似度高、流畅性好）的偏好，而后续DPO和RLVR阶段可能强化或缓解该偏好，强调平衡IFT数据集设计对稳健上下文利用的重要性。
AI.motivation: 先前工作仅在推理阶段分析上下文特征与模型使用行为的关系，未探究这些关系如何在指令微调过程中被习得。
AI.method: 通过在四个模型和三个数据集上，测量模型在监督微调（SFT）、直接偏好优化（DPO）和基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）各阶段对上下文特征（如长度、上下文-查询相似度、流畅性）的敏感性变化。
AI.result: SFT阶段使模型更倾向于使用易理解的上下文；DPO和RLVR阶段的效果因数据集而异，可能强化或削弱SFT形成的偏好；上下文使用策略在每个IFT阶段均被主动重塑。
AI.conclusion: 上下文使用能力在IFT各阶段动态演化，构建平衡的IFT训练数据集对提升指令微调模型的鲁棒上下文利用能力至关重要。

title: Edge-Constrained UAV Small-Object Detection with P2 Enhancement and Quantum-Inspired Lightweight Structure Search
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) object detection requires compact detectors that retain small-object details under onboard computation and memory constraints. Repeated downsampling inlightweight networks weakens shallow spatial information, while manually adding attention orfusion modules may increase cost without stable gains. This study analyzes YOLOX-Nano underedge-deployment constraints by combining a P2 high-resolution detection branch with a quantum-inspired evolutionary algorithm (QIEA) for lightweight structure screening. The search space isdefined by lightweight priority and task specificity, and the evaluation jointly considers accuracy,floating-point operations (FLOPs), latency, memory consumption, and recall. On VisDrone, theP2 branch increases APamall by 31.10% over the YOLOX-Nano baseline. Compared with NanoDet-Plus with similar model size, YOLOX-Nano+-P2 improves APs0.ss by 17.5% and APamal by 44.9%.The QIEA-selected candidate obtains the highest Recallso, but +P2 remains the strongest AP-oriented variant after full training. Full 100-epoch verification of Random-best, GA-best, andSA/QUBO-best candidates further shows that proxy rankings do not necessarily transfer to finalAPse9s. These results support using P2 as the main small-object enhancement path and QIEA as alightweight tool for candidate screening and accuracy-cost analysis. The source code, configurationfiles, diagnostic scripts, and summarized results are available at https://github.com/Ming23233/UAV-QIEA-Edge-Detection

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合P2高分辨率检测分支与量子启发式进化算法（QIEA）的轻量级UAV目标检测方法，在VisDrone数据集上显著提升小目标检测性能（APamall提升31.10%），并验证了QIEA在结构筛选和精度-成本权衡中的有效性。
AI.motivation: UAV目标检测需兼顾模型轻量化与小目标细节保留，传统轻量网络因重复下采样削弱浅层空间信息，而人工添加注意力或融合模块常带来额外开销且增益不稳定。
AI.method: 在YOLOX-Nano基础上引入P2高分辨率检测分支，并采用量子启发式进化算法（QIEA）进行轻量级网络结构搜索；搜索空间兼顾轻量化优先级与任务特异性，评估指标联合考虑精度、FLOPs、延迟、内存消耗与召回率。
AI.result: 在VisDrone上，P2分支使APamall较YOLOX-Nano基线提升31.10%；相比同规模NanoDet-Plus，YOLOX-Nano+-P2的APs0.ss和APamall分别提升17.5%和44.9%；QIEA筛选出最高Recall的候选结构，但+P2在完整训练后仍为AP最优变体；代理评估（如随机、GA、SA/QUBO）的排序不能可靠预测最终AP性能。
AI.conclusion: P2分支是增强小目标检测的主路径，QIEA是一种高效的轻量级候选结构筛选与精度-成本分析工具。

title: Collaborative Human-Agent Protocol (CHAP)
summary: Foundation models are moving from response generation into operational roles. They plan across steps, call tools, request human input, coordinate with other agents, and increasingly carry responsibility for work that affects customers, claims, code, contracts, and clinical decisions. Production deployments are no longer one human supervising one model. They are multi-human, multi-agent collaborations that cross teams, time zones, and trust boundaries. The technical surface for this collaboration remains weakly specified. When an agent drafts a response and a human edits it before it ships, the moment of human judgement is the most valuable signal in the system. In current practice it is recorded, if at all, in application code, chat threads, ticket comments, and tribal memory. Two protocol standards address adjacent concerns: MCP standardises agent access to tools and data, and A2A standardises agent-to-agent interoperability. Neither defines the shared workspace in which humans and agents perform accountable work together. This paper presents CHAP, the Collaborative Human-Agent Protocol. Under CHAP, the override that used to vanish into a chat thread becomes a structured event carrying a diff, a rationale, and a content hash. The handoff between shifts becomes a portable envelope rather than a pinned message. The human approval of an agent's draft becomes a non-repudiable signed decision that can be replayed years later. The protocol achieves this through a small Core (workspaces, participants, tasks, artefacts, and an append-only evidence log) together with composable profiles that add review, modes, routing, deliberation, handoff, identity, signatures, and transparency-backed audit as deployments require them. Specification, reference implementation, conformance suite, and worked examples are available at: https://github.com/BrightbeamAI/chap

AI.tldr: 本文提出CHAP（Collaborative Human-Agent Protocol），一种用于规范人与AI代理协同工作的协议，旨在将人类干预、审批和交接等关键行为结构化、可追溯、可审计。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型已进入实际业务操作角色，但人机协作的技术规范薄弱，人类的关键判断信号（如编辑、审批、交接）常散落在非结构化渠道中，缺乏统一、可信、可追溯的协议支持。
AI.method: 设计并定义CHAP协议，包含一个精简核心（工作区、参与者、任务、产物、仅追加证据日志）和可组合的扩展配置文件（支持评审、模式、路由、审议、交接、身份、签名与透明审计等功能）。
AI.result: CHAP将人类覆盖操作转化为带diff、理由和内容哈希的结构化事件；将轮班交接封装为便携信封；将人工审批固化为不可否认、可长期回溯的数字签名决策。
AI.conclusion: CHAP填补了人机协同生产系统中‘共享工作空间’的协议空白，为多团队、跨时区、高责任场景下的人机共治提供了可实施、可验证、可审计的基础架构。

title: Overcoming Decoder Inconsistencies in Whisper for Dravidian and Low-Resource Languages
comment: Accepted at INTERSPEECH 2026, 5 pages, 1 figure, 5 tables
summary: Multilingual ASR models such as Whisper perform well on high-resource languages but exhibit substantially higher Word Error Rates (WER) for Dravidian languages compared to Indo-Aryan ones. Through linguistic and dataset analysis, we show that Dravidian languages have longer words, higher vocabulary diversity, and lower repetition, resulting in sparse token distributions and frequent character-level substitution errors. Baseline fine-tuning further reveals decoder imbalance between self-attention (linguistic context) and cross-attention (acoustic cues). Although synthetic token-repetition experiments indicate potential gains, they are impractical. Motivated by these observations, we introduce two decoder-level enhancements: Weighted-Attention, which adaptively balances attention sources, and Self-Conditioning, which reinjects intermediate predictions to improve token consistency. Experiments demonstrate consistent WER reductions for low-resource and agglutinative languages.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多语言ASR模型（如Whisper）在达罗毗荼语系语言上性能较差的问题，通过语言学与数据集分析揭示其根本原因，并提出两种解码器级改进方法——加权注意力与自条件机制，显著降低了低资源及黏着型语言的词错误率。
AI.motivation: Whisper等多语言ASR模型在达罗毗荼语系语言上WER显著高于印欧语系语言；语言学分析表明其词汇更长、词表多样性更高、重复率更低，导致token分布稀疏和字符级替换错误频发；基线微调进一步暴露了解码器中自注意力（语言上下文）与交叉注意力（声学线索）之间的不平衡。
AI.method: 提出两种解码器级增强方法：1）Weighted-Attention——自适应平衡自注意力与交叉注意力权重；2）Self-Conditioning——将中间预测结果重新注入解码过程以提升token生成一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明所提方法在低资源语言和黏着型语言上均带来一致的WER下降。
AI.conclusion: 解码器层面的注意力机制优化与预测反馈机制可有效缓解多语言ASR模型在结构差异大、资源稀缺语言上的性能退化问题，为跨语言语音识别提供了可迁移的改进思路。

title: SIGA: Self-Evolving Coding-Agent Adapters for Scientific Simulation
summary: Advanced scientific simulators expose specialized input languages that turn simulation goals into executable configurations, but learning them can cost domain scientists hours to days. We study simulator setup as a problem of agent-tool interface grounding: what minimal simulator-specific adaptations are needed for an off-the-shelf coding agent to operate real scientific software? Our intuition is that coding agents already know how to navigate files, edit code, run commands, and repair outputs, but they lack the simulator's executable contract: its vocabulary, structural constraints, validation rules, and termination conditions. We introduce SIGA, a Simulator-Interface Grounding Adapter that supplies this contract through retrieval, procedural memory, in-trajectory validation, and validation-enforced termination. We primarily evaluate SIGA on GEOS, an open-source multiphysics simulator used in subsurface science. SIGA produces a complete GEOS deck in about five minutes with TreeSim above 0.90, matching an extended-budget human expert who took about three hours, a roughly 36x wall-clock speedup. On a harder held-out set, grounding raises TreeSim from 0.720 to 0.789, a roughly 10% relative gain over the bare agent, and can reduce the across-seed standard deviation by 16x. Self-evolution further improves SIGA by rewriting adapter contents from prior trajectories, yielding the highest held-out GEOS mean and matching or outperforming the strongest hand-designed configuration. Transfers to OpenFOAM and LAMMPS show that the dominant mechanism shifts by interface: validation matters most when structural completeness is the bottleneck, while memory and retrieval matter most when domain correctness is the bottleneck. These results suggest that lightweight, self-improvable grounding layers can turn general coding agents into practical operators of scientific software.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIGA（Simulator-Interface Grounding Adapter），一种轻量级适配器，使通用编程智能体无需大量训练即可高效操作专业科学模拟器（如GEOS、OpenFOAM、LAMMPS）；通过提供模拟器执行契约（词汇、结构约束、验证规则、终止条件），实现约36倍加速配置生成，并支持自演化提升性能。
AI.motivation: 领域科学家学习专用模拟器输入语言耗时数小时至数天；通用编程智能体虽具备文件操作、代码编辑、命令执行与错误修复能力，但缺乏对特定模拟器‘可执行契约’的理解，亟需最小化适配以实现有效接口对接。
AI.method: 提出SIGA框架，融合检索机制、程序化记忆、轨迹内验证及验证驱动的终止机制；在GEOS上主评估，辅以OpenFOAM和LAMMPS迁移实验；引入自演化机制，利用历史轨迹重写适配器内容。
AI.result: SIGA在GEOS上5分钟生成完整输入配置（TreeSim > 0.90），达人类专家（3小时）36倍提速；在难样本集上将TreeSim从0.720提升至0.789（相对+10%），标准差降低16倍；自演化后性能超越最优人工设计配置；跨模拟器迁移揭示验证、记忆与检索机制依接口瓶颈差异主导作用。
AI.conclusion: 轻量、可自改进的接口接地层（如SIGA）能有效桥接通用编程智能体与专业科学软件，显著提升配置效率与鲁棒性，为科学计算自动化提供新范式。

title: Routine laboratory trajectories encode the onset of organ-level complications in cancer
summary: Routine laboratory panels drawn during cancer treatment constitute longitudinal physiological recordings of organ function, yet their temporal structure is discarded by single-timepoint prognostic tools. A transformer trained on 2,777,595 laboratory measurements from 3,905 patients with multiple myeloma or ovarian cancer predicted the two-year onset of 162 treatment-associated complications, including therapy-related myelodysplastic syndromes, spanning eight clinical categories, achieving 1.5- to 6.1-fold enrichment above prevalence at the group level. It matched or outperformed non-sequential baselines across grouped endpoints (AUROC gains up to +0.11), demonstrating that longitudinal laboratory trajectories capture evolving complication-specific physiology inaccessible from isolated measurements. Predictions generalised across both cancers, divergence concentrating in disease-specific complications, and biomarker masking recovered signatures consistent with established pathophysiology. External validation on MIMIC-IV and MMRF CoMMpass confirmed transferability across independent healthcare systems (AUROC up to 0.85). Routine oncological laboratory data encode organ deterioration weeks to months before clinical onset, enabling complication-specific surveillance without additional testing infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的模型，利用癌症患者常规实验室检查的纵向数据预测治疗相关并发症，显著优于单时间点方法，并在多个外部数据集上验证了其泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有预后工具忽略实验室检查数据的时间序列结构，而这些纵向数据可能蕴含器官功能动态变化的重要信息。
AI.method: 使用Transformer模型，训练于3905名多发性骨髓瘤和卵巢癌患者的277万余条实验室检查记录，预测162种两年内发生的治疗相关并发症。
AI.result: 模型在群体水平上实现1.5–6.1倍于基线的富集率；AUROC最高提升0.11；跨癌种泛化良好；在外部队列（MIMIC-IV、MMRF CoMMpass）中AUROC达0.85；可提前数周至数月预警器官功能恶化。
AI.conclusion: 常规肿瘤实验室数据的纵向轨迹蕴含特异性病理生理信号，无需额外检测即可实现并发症的早期、特异性监测。

title: From Genes to Tokens: a GWAS-inspired Approach for Interpretable Stylometric Analysis
summary: This short paper introduces a stylometric interpretation method inspired by genome-wide association studies (GWAS). Each "gene" token's association with "phenotype" authorship is tested using logistic regression with multiple-comparison correction. Applied to English, German, and Russian corpora, the method detects statistically significant lexical markers distinctive of individual authors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受全基因组关联研究（GWAS）启发的文体学分析方法，通过逻辑回归与多重比较校正，识别与作者身份显著相关的词汇标记。
AI.motivation: 旨在借鉴GWAS在遗传学中的成功范式，将其应用于文体分析，以自动发现区分不同作者的显著词汇特征。
AI.method: 将每个词汇视为一个‘基因’，将作者身份视为‘表型’，使用逻辑回归检验各词汇与作者身份的关联性，并进行多重比较校正。
AI.result: 在英语、德语和俄语语料库上验证有效，成功检测出多个统计显著的、具作者特异性的词汇标记。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为作者识别提供了一种可解释、统计严谨的新思路，具有跨语言适用潜力。

title: HDRAgent: An Agentic Framework for Multi-Exposure HDR Imaging
summary: Most existing multi-exposure HDR methods follow a fixed feed-forward reconstruction paradigm, making them prone to ghosting artifacts in complex dynamic scenes. To address this issue, we propose HDRAgent, the first agent-driven framework for HDR imaging, which adaptively selects reconstruction strategies according to the current scene conditions. Specifically, to provide scene-specific prior knowledge, we introduce a fine-grained contextual knowledge matching (FCM) module. This module leverages multimodal large language model (MLLM)-derived scene perception to retrieve relevant historical cases and tool knowledge, organizing them into structured evidence for MLLM-based adaptive tool scheduling. In addition, we propose a perception--distortion feedback mechanism that transforms post-execution quality assessment and artifact diagnosis into structured feedback, which is accumulated in historical memory to help subsequent contextual knowledge refinement and strategy selection. Furthermore, considering that extreme motion can invalidate alignment methods, we design an agent-guided generative alignment strategy that uses MLLM-based dynamic-region parsing to reconstruct unreliable contents in non-reference frames under reference-frame guidance. Experiments demonstrate that HDRAgent effectively reduces ghosting and local artifacts while achieving competitive or superior objective performance and visual quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HDRAgent，首个基于智能体的HDR成像框架，通过多模态大语言模型驱动的场景感知、细粒度上下文匹配、感知-失真反馈机制及生成式对齐策略，自适应选择重建方法，显著缓解动态场景中的鬼影与局部伪影。
AI.motivation: 现有多曝光HDR方法采用固定前馈重建范式，在复杂动态场景中易产生鬼影伪影，缺乏对场景变化的自适应能力。
AI.method: 提出HDRAgent框架：1）细粒度上下文匹配（FCM）模块，利用多模态大语言模型（MLLM）进行场景感知并检索历史案例与工具知识；2）感知–失真反馈机制，将质量评估与伪影诊断转化为结构化反馈并存入历史记忆；3）代理引导的生成式对齐策略，结合MLLM动态区域解析与参考帧指导重建非参考帧不可靠区域。
AI.result: 实验表明HDRAgent在减少鬼影和局部伪影方面效果显著，客观指标与主观视觉质量均达到或优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: HDRAgent通过引入智能体范式与MLLM协同推理，实现了HDR重建策略的场景自适应调度，为动态HDR成像提供了新思路。

title: Evaluation Cards: An Interpretive Layer for AI Evaluation Reporting
summary: AI evaluation results are produced at scale but reported inconsistently across leaderboards, model cards, benchmark papers, and company blogs. The cost is interpretive: readers cannot reliably compare results across sources, identify what a report omits, or trace an aggregate claim to its underlying evidence. Recent efforts address isolated components but leave three gaps: they cover only narrow slices of the evaluation lifecycle and do not compose into a single interpretable record; they specify static representations that do not differentiate the questions different stakeholders bring to the same evidence; and they remain proposals on paper, lacking the extraction infrastructure required for adoption at scale. We present \EvalCards{}, an operational reporting layer that composes benchmark metadata, evaluation run data, and model metadata into a unified record. We (1) derive a reporting schema from a structured review of 52 papers and 10 stakeholder interviews, (2) implement four interpretive signals (reproducibility, documentation completeness, provenance and risk, and score comparability), rendered through reader modes calibrated to research and non-research audiences, and (3) deploy a monitoring tool that applies \EvalCards{} across 5,816 models, 635 benchmarks, and 101,843 results, surfacing systematic gaps in current reporting practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvalCards，一种操作性报告层，旨在统一AI评估结果的报告方式，通过整合基准元数据、评估运行数据和模型元数据，提升结果的可解释性与可比性。
AI.motivation: 当前AI评估结果报告不一致，导致读者难以跨来源比较结果、识别报告遗漏内容或追溯汇总声明的原始证据，现有方案未能全面覆盖评估生命周期、缺乏动态适应不同利益相关者需求的能力，且缺少大规模实施的基础设施。
AI.method: 1）基于52篇论文和10次利益相关者访谈推导出报告模式；2）实现四种解释性信号（可复现性、文档完整性、溯源与风险、分数可比性），并针对研究与非研究受众设计阅读模式；3）部署监控工具，在5816个模型、635个基准和101843个结果上应用EvalCards，揭示当前报告实践中的系统性缺陷。
AI.result: EvalCards成功构建了一个可操作的统一报告框架，并在大规模数据上验证了其有效性，识别出当前AI评估报告中存在的系统性缺失。
AI.conclusion: EvalCards填补了AI评估报告在一致性、可解释性和可扩展性方面的关键空白，为构建可信、透明、可审计的AI评估生态提供了实用基础设施。

title: A Theoretical Analysis of Memory and Overfitting Phenomena in Stochastic Interpolation Models
summary: This paper provides a theoretical account of memorization in stochastic interpolation models. By leveraging closed-form expressions for the optimal velocity field and the associated score function, we show that, in the continuous-time oracle setting, both deterministic and stochastic generation processes recover training samples. Under Euler discretization, generated samples remain centered around training samples, with deviations controlled by the step size. We further analyze generation in the presence of estimation errors and show that accumulated estimation errors control the endpoint deviation from the training set. These results imply that the generated sample admits a representation as a training sample perturbed by three controlled terms: a discretization-induced bound, an estimation-error-induced bound, and stochastic Gaussian noise. Based on this characterization, we provide theoretical definitions of overfitting and underfitting in generative models. Synthetic simulations support our theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上分析了随机插值模型中的记忆化现象，揭示了生成过程如何恢复训练样本，并定义了生成模型中的过拟合与欠拟合。
AI.motivation: 理解随机插值模型中生成过程为何会记忆并恢复训练样本，以及如何从理论角度界定生成模型的过拟合与欠拟合。
AI.method: 利用最优速度场和对应得分函数的闭式表达式，在连续时间oracle设定下分析确定性与随机生成过程；结合欧拉离散化和估计误差分析，刻画生成样本与训练样本之间的偏差来源。
AI.result: 证明在理想连续时间设定下生成过程可精确恢复训练样本；离散化和估计误差分别引入可控偏差项；生成样本可表示为训练样本叠加三个可控扰动项（离散化、估计误差、高斯噪声）；据此提出生成模型中过拟合与欠拟合的理论定义。
AI.conclusion: 记忆化是随机插值生成模型的内在特性，其程度受离散化步长与估计误差共同控制；该工作为理解生成模型泛化行为提供了新的理论框架。

title: OpenBibleTTS: Large-Scale Speech Resources and TTS Models for Low-Resource Languages
summary: Recent advances in neural text-to-speech (TTS) and multilingual speech generation have substantially improved synthetic speech quality, yet these gains remain unevenly distributed across the world's languages. Existing models are still dominated by a small set of high-resource languages, while many studies of low-resource TTS are simulated on artificially downsampled high-resource corpora that do not reflect the orthographic variation and limited phonetic coverage encountered in genuinely underrepresented settings. As such, we introduce OpenBibleTTS, which is a large-scale benchmark for low-resource speech synthesis spanning 37 underrepresented languages. Moreover, a systematic comparison of various TTS architectures and large-scale speech generation models is conducted across in-domain Biblical text and out-of-domain material. Results show that no single system dominates across languages and metrics: Gemini-TTS achieves the highest listener ratings on most evaluated languages, but monolingual EveryVoice models trained on OpenBibleTTS remain strongest for intelligibility and are preferred in several African languages, while open from-scratch systems degrade sharply on out-of-domain text, revealing a persistent gap between broad multilingual coverage and reliable synthesis quality in underserved linguistic communities. We complement automatic evaluation with subjective human judgments, and open-source all processed datasets, alignments, and trained models to support future low-resource TTS research.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了OpenBibleTTS——一个涵盖37种低资源语言的大规模语音合成基准，并系统评估了多种TTS架构在圣经文本（域内）和非圣经文本（域外）上的表现，发现无单一模型全面占优，强调了低资源语言中多语言覆盖与高质量合成之间的持续差距。
AI.motivation: 现有神经TTS研究集中在高资源语言，低资源语言研究多依赖人工降采样数据，无法真实反映其正字法多样性与音系覆盖不足的问题；亟需面向真实低资源场景的基准与系统评估。
AI.method: 构建OpenBibleTTS基准（含37种低资源语言的圣经语音-文本数据），对多种TTS架构（如Gemini-TTS、EveryVoice、开源从头训练系统）在域内（圣经）与域外文本上进行系统评测，结合自动指标与主观听感评估。
AI.result: Gemini-TTS在多数语言听众评分中最高；单语EveryVoice模型在可懂度上最优，且在若干非洲语言中更受偏好；开源从头训练系统在域外文本上性能显著下降；揭示了多语言广度与合成可靠性之间的根本张力。
AI.conclusion: 低资源TTS需兼顾语言真实性、数据开放性与模型泛化能力；OpenBibleTTS及其开源资源为未来研究提供了关键基础设施与实证基础。

title: Illumination-Invariant Anomaly Detection for Sub-Canopy UAV Multispectral Point Clouds
summary: Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) multispectral point clouds (MPC) provide high-dimensional spatial-spectral data for sub-canopy target detection; however, their efficacy is significantly compromised by severe illumination heterogeneity caused by vegetation shadows. To address this, we propose a prior-free anomaly detection framework capable of robustly handling lighting variations. First, we formulate solar angle estimation as an inverse optimization problem. By coupling spectral indices with a ray-tracing model, this strategy achieves Prior-Free Shadow Extraction without relying on flight metadata, effectively distinguishing dark objects from true shadows. Second, to mitigate spectral distortions, we introduce an Illumination-Consistent Sparse Representation mechanism. Unlike standard reconstruction methods, we construct a background dictionary strictly from neighbors sharing the same illumination state. This constraint effectively disentangles spectral reflectance from lighting variations, ensuring that targets are represented solely by physically consistent background points. Experimental results indicate that the proposed method significantly improves the separability between anomalies and background in complex forest environments, demonstrating superior performance over state-of-the-art baselines. This framework is particularly suited for identifying camouflaged military targets, mapping fallen tree trunks, and uncovering archaeological ruins hidden beneath dense foliage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需先验知识的异常检测框架，用于处理无人机多光谱点云中因植被阴影导致的光照不均问题，通过无先验阴影提取和光照一致稀疏表示机制，显著提升了复杂森林环境中异常目标与背景的可分性。
AI.motivation: UAV多光谱点云在林下目标检测中面临严重光照异质性（尤其是植被阴影）导致检测性能下降的问题。
AI.method: 1）将太阳角度估计建模为逆优化问题，结合光谱指数与光线追踪模型实现无需飞行元数据的先验自由阴影提取；2）提出光照一致的稀疏表示机制，构建仅含相同光照状态邻域点的背景字典，以解耦反射率与光照变化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著提升复杂森林环境中异常与背景的可分性，优于当前主流方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架适用于伪装军事目标识别、倒木测绘及密林覆盖下的考古遗迹探测等任务。

title: Physics-Guided Dual Decoding and Spectral Supervision for Global 3D Hydrometeor Prediction
summary: While global data-driven models excel at predicting continuous atmospheric variables, three-dimensional hydrometeor forecasting remains challenging due to the zero-inflated, long-tailed distributions of these variables. Standard deep learning optimization often yields overly smooth forecasts, attenuating extreme events and spatial textures. We propose PredHydro-Net, a physics-guided dual-decoding framework that mitigates this smoothing. To resolve multi-variable optimization conflicts, it employs a decoupled architecture where macroscopic thermodynamic and dynamic fields unidirectionally modulate hydrometeor generation. By integrating wavelet-based frequency decoupling, spectral amplitude matching, and adversarial training, the model achieves a favorable trade-off between quantitative accuracy and spatial fidelity. In a 72-h global evaluation, PredHydro-Net outperforms both spatiotemporal deep learning baselines (Earthformer and PredRNNv2) and the operational Global Forecast System (GFS) in extreme-event detection and spectral representation. Furthermore, it demonstrates strong climatological consistency with Global Precipitation Measurement (GPM) satellite retrievals. The model reasonably reproduces the three-dimensional cloud structures in extreme weather events, such as Hurricane Ian. Feature attribution confirms its dependence on physical precursors such as relative humidity and wind convergence, offering a robust, physics-informed approach to long-tailed atmospheric prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PredHydro-Net，一种物理引导的双解码框架，用于改进三维水成物预报，通过解耦宏观热动力场与微物理过程、结合小波频域解耦、谱幅匹配和对抗训练，在保持定量精度的同时提升空间细节与极端事件捕捉能力。
AI.motivation: 全球数据驱动模型在连续大气变量预测上表现优异，但三维水成物（如云、雨、冰）预报仍面临挑战，因其分布呈零膨胀、长尾特性；标准深度学习优化易导致预报过度平滑，削弱极端事件和空间结构表征。
AI.method: 提出PredHydro-Net：采用物理引导的双解码架构，实现热力学/动力学大尺度场对水成物生成的单向调制；引入小波频域解耦、谱幅匹配与对抗训练，缓解多变量优化冲突并抑制平滑效应。
AI.result: 在72小时全球预报评估中，PredHydro-Net在极端事件检测、谱特征表示及气候一致性（对比GPM卫星数据）上均优于Earthformer、PredRNNv2和业务GFS；能合理再现飓风Ian等事件中的三维云结构；归因分析证实其依赖相对湿度、风辐合等物理前兆因子。
AI.conclusion: PredHydro-Net为长尾大气变量预报提供了兼具物理可解释性与高保真空间建模能力的新范式，显著提升了水成物三维预测的实用性与可靠性。

title: UXBench: Benchmarking User Experience in AI Assistants
summary: As AI assistants serve millions of users daily, evaluating user experience (UX) beyond general model capability has become increasingly important. We present UXBench, the first user-centric benchmark grounded in real user feedback signals for evaluating preference alignment and dialogue generation. The benchmark consists of three interconnected tasks, UX Judge, UX Eval, and UX Recovery, with 7,400 test instances extracted from over 70K interaction logs of a mainstream Chinese AI assistant. The dataset closely reflects real user distributions, covering 8 scenarios, 83 domains, and diverse failure patterns that pose severe challenges. Extensive experiments on 26 frontier language models provide novel insights into how well models perceive user experience and how improvements in model capability contribute to better dialogue engagement. Through comprehensive analysis of model behavior and performance gaps, we show that user feedback prediction is a learnable capability, where a reward model trained from in-the-wild feedback signals can achieve well-calibrated accuracy. We further document the systematic biases of LLM-as-a-judge evaluation protocols and compare typical response strategies that directly affect user experience. UXBench establishes a new evaluation landscape and calls for greater attention to tailored UX optimization, contributing to a user-centric scaling law that shapes the success of AI assistants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个基于真实用户反馈信号的用户中心基准UXBench，用于评估AI助手在偏好对齐和对话生成方面的用户体验（UX），包含三个任务，并通过26个前沿语言模型的实验揭示了模型在UX感知上的表现及改进方向。
AI.motivation: 随着AI助手服务数百万用户，仅评估模型通用能力已不足以反映真实用户体验，亟需一种基于真实用户反馈、以用户为中心的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了UXBench基准，包含UX Judge、UX Eval和UX Recovery三个任务，数据源自7万+真实中文AI助手交互日志（共7400个测试实例），覆盖8种场景、83个领域及多种失败模式；并开展26个前沿语言模型的系统性评测与偏差分析。
AI.result: 实验证明用户反馈预测是可学习的能力，基于野外反馈训练的奖励模型可实现良好校准的准确率；同时揭示了LLM-as-a-judge协议的系统性偏差，并对比了影响用户体验的典型响应策略。
AI.conclusion: UXBench建立了新的用户体验评估范式，呼吁重视面向用户体验的定制化优化，并推动构建以用户为中心的AI助手扩展定律。

title: An Enhanced Geometric-Spectral Feature Learning Framework for Airborne Multispectral Point Cloud Classification
summary: Multispectral point cloud (MPC) is composed of 3D spatial-spectral information, which holds tremendous potential for accurate land-cover classification. However, the representation power of classification models is limited by inherent high-dimensional and heterogeneous spatial-spectral information, unbalanced sample distribution, and inter-class spectral similarity of airborne MPCs. We build two MPC datasets and propose an enhanced geometric-spectral feature learning framework based on attentions for airborne MPC classification. A key component in our model is a two-stream feature fusion method with attention mechanisms, which enhances the representation capability of spatial-spectral features from high-dimensional heterogeneous MPCs. The first stream aims to extract position-encoded global spectral features with fusion self-attention, and the second stream comprises a multikernel point convolution and feature aggregation attention to extract spectral-guided geometric features. We then develop a residual attention fusion block to integrate the most informative geometric-spectral features from the two parallel streams. Another important contribution of this work is a joint loss function to improve the learning ability on unbalanced and interclass similar samples. Experimental results on two airborne MPC datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method compared with the state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, the codes and datasets used in this paper will be made available freely at https://github.com/HITlixian/TGRS_GSFF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的几何-光谱特征学习框架，用于解决机载多光谱点云（MPC）分类中高维异构数据、样本不平衡和类间光谱相似性等问题，并构建了两个MPC数据集。
AI.motivation: 多光谱点云分类面临高维异构空间-光谱信息表征能力受限、样本分布不平衡及类间光谱相似性高等挑战。
AI.method: 构建两个MPC数据集；提出双流注意力特征融合方法：第一流用融合自注意力提取位置编码的全局光谱特征，第二流用多核点卷积与特征聚合注意力提取光谱引导的几何特征；设计残差注意力融合模块整合两路特征；引入联合损失函数缓解样本不平衡与类间相似问题。
AI.result: 在两个机载MPC数据集上实验表明，所提方法优于当前最先进方法；代码与数据集将开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的几何-光谱特征学习框架有效提升了多光谱点云分类性能，尤其在处理高维异构、不平衡及光谱混淆数据方面具有优势。

title: EinSort: Sorting is All We Need for Tensorizing LLM
summary: Tensor networks provide efficient representations for compressing large neural networks. By carefully designing shapes and topologies, they can significantly reduce memory and computational costs. However, identifying implicit low-rank structures in large foundation models remains challenging due to their enormous scale and un-structured weight distributions. We propose an adaptive tensorization method that discovers inherent low-rank structure in a target tensor by index ordering. Experiments on weight and KV-cache compression demonstrate improved reconstruction quality compared to baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应张量化方法，通过索引排序发现目标张量中固有的低秩结构，从而在权重和KV缓存压缩任务中实现优于基线的重建质量。
AI.motivation: 大型基础模型规模庞大且权重分布无结构，难以识别其隐含的低秩结构，限制了张量网络在模型压缩中的应用效果。
AI.method: 提出一种基于索引排序的自适应张量化方法，用于自动发现目标张量中的内在低秩结构。
AI.result: 在权重压缩和KV缓存压缩实验中，该方法相比基线方法展现出更优的重建质量。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效挖掘大模型中未显式呈现的低秩结构，提升张量网络压缩性能。

title: Code Is More Than Text: Uncertainty Estimation for Code Generation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as code generators, where silently wrong programs pose real safety and reliability risks. Reliable uncertainty estimation (UE) is essential for selective prediction, human-in-the-loop review, and downstream agentic decisions. Yet most existing code UE methods are inherited from natural language (NL) generation and ignore properties that make code distinct. We argue that code differs from NL in three ways: a single wrong token can break an entire program (token fragility); algorithmic intent and concrete implementation can disagree independently (intent-code gap); and programs can be executed (executability). We instantiate these properties as three orthogonal uncertainty axes: lexical (Top-K token entropy), algorithmic (pseudo-code consistency), and functional (behavioral consistency). Across five code LLMs, our three-axis ensemble improves average AUROC from 0.696 for the strongest NL-derived baseline to 0.776 (+8.1 points). Notably, on Qwen3-14B, our single-pass Top-K token entropy matches the strongest multi-pass baseline while being over 3x cheaper; across models, it remains a competitive low-cost signal. These results suggest that code UE deserves code-specific design rather than direct NL ports.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向代码生成的三轴不确定性估计（UE）方法，利用代码特有的词法脆弱性、算法意图与实现间的差距、以及可执行性三个属性，分别设计了词法、算法和功能三个正交的不确定性维度，在多个代码大模型上显著提升了UE性能。
AI.motivation: 现有代码不确定性估计方法多直接沿用自然语言生成的方法，忽略了代码在词法脆弱性、意图-代码差距和可执行性等方面的独特性质，难以可靠评估生成代码的正确性。
AI.method: 基于代码的三个独特属性，构建三个正交的不确定性轴：词法轴（Top-K token熵）、算法轴（伪代码一致性）、功能轴（行为一致性），并采用集成方式融合三者进行不确定性估计。
AI.result: 在五个代码大模型上，三轴集成方法将平均AUROC从最强的NL基线0.696提升至0.776（+8.1点）；其中仅用单次推理的Top-K token熵在Qwen3-14B上即媲美最强多步基线，且计算开销降低3倍以上。
AI.conclusion: 代码不确定性估计需针对代码特性专门设计，不能简单套用自然语言方法；提出的三轴框架为更安全、可靠的代码生成提供了有效且高效的不确定性量化路径。

title: A Geometric Framework for Absolute Pose and Velocity Estimation with Event Cameras
summary: Despite the rapid advancements in event-based motion estimation, current geometric methods primarily focus on velocity estimation. However, absolute pose estimation, which is equally crucial for key applications such as robotic navigation and augmented reality, remains relatively underexplored. Consequently, the simultaneous recovery of absolute pose and velocity from event streams remains an open and challenging problem. To address this gap, we propose a geometric framework for absolute pose and velocity estimation by leveraging 3D lines in the scene and the events they trigger. At the core of the framework lie two key geometric constraints: the orthogonality between a 3D line and the normal vector of its corresponding event plane, and the collinearity of an event with the 2D projection of its associated line. Based on these constraints, we present both linear and polynomial solvers for absolute pose estimation. The former enables efficient computation, while the latter provides a globally optimal solution for rotation. For velocity estimation, we develop an efficient linear solver and a more accurate optimization-based solver to recover both angular and linear velocities. Notably, our methods require a minimum of three event-line correspondences to determine the 6-DoF absolute pose or velocities independently. Extensive experiments in simulation and on real-world datasets demonstrate that our methods achieve state-of-the-art performance, with significant improvements in accuracy and computational efficiency compared to existing methods. The demo code is publicly available at https://github.com/Zibin6/EventPoseVelocity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D直线与事件流的几何框架，用于同时估计绝对位姿和速度，通过正交性和共线性约束设计了线性和多项式求解器，并在仿真和真实数据上验证了其优越性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于事件的运动估计方法主要关注速度估计，而对机器人导航和增强现实等关键应用至关重要的绝对位姿估计却研究不足，导致从事件流中同时恢复绝对位姿和速度仍是一个开放难题。
AI.method: 提出一种利用场景中3D直线及其触发事件的几何框架，核心是两个几何约束：3D直线与其对应事件平面法向量正交、事件点与其关联直线2D投影共线；据此设计线性和多项式绝对位姿求解器，以及线性和优化-based速度求解器。
AI.result: 方法仅需最少三个事件-直线对应即可独立求解6自由度绝对位姿或速度；在仿真和真实数据集上达到SOTA性能，在精度和计算效率上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该几何框架有效解决了事件流中绝对位姿与速度联合估计的难题，兼具理论严谨性与实际高效性，为事件相机下游应用提供了新思路。

title: Titans-as-a-Layer: Test-Time Memory for Conversational Speech Emotion Recognition
comment: ICML 2026 Workshop on Machine Learning for Audio
summary: Speech emotion recognition (SER) is commonly formulated as utterance-level classification, although conversational emotion depends on a speaker's usual vocal range and the emotional context established by previous utterances. Speech-language models provide strong pretrained acoustic and semantic representations, and can adapts them to SER labels via finetune, but this mechanism still missing per-dialogue state. We study whether test-time neural memory can supply this missing context while leaving the large audio language models (LALMs) backbone intact. Building on Titans, we introduce a plug-and-play Memory-as-a-Layer (MAL) adapter that writes dialogue history into a small neural memory and reads it back as an audio-token-aligned residual update, avoiding changes to the host model's token positions. Across different audio LLMs and emotion recognition datasets evaluations, our design improves SER performs across different evaluation metrics, supporting test-time memory as a residual contextual mechanism for conversational SER.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Memory-as-a-Layer（MAL）适配器，在不修改大音频语言模型（LALM）主干的前提下，通过测试时神经记忆引入对话历史上下文，提升语音情感识别（SER）性能。
AI.motivation: 传统SER将每句视为独立样本，忽略了说话人声学特征范围和对话中前序话语的情感上下文；现有音频语言模型虽可微调，但仍缺乏对话级状态建模能力。
AI.method: 基于Titans框架，设计即插即用的Memory-as-a-Layer（MAL）适配器：在测试时将对话历史写入小型神经记忆，并以音频token对齐的方式生成残差更新，不改变原始模型token位置。
AI.result: 在多个音频语言模型和SER数据集上验证，MAL显著提升各类评估指标，证明测试时记忆可作为有效的残差式对话上下文机制。
AI.conclusion: 测试时神经记忆是一种可行且高效的补充机制，能在不改动大型音频语言模型结构的前提下，增强其对对话情感动态的建模能力。

title: Clinically Grounded Privacy Evaluation of Medical LMs
summary: Medical language models (LMs) can memorize and reproduce protected health information, but privacy evaluations often focus on recovery of training text rather than disclosure under realistic threat models. We introduce a clinically grounded framework that evaluates leakage along a graded axis of adversarial access, ranging from publicly inferable demographics to leaked note fragments. At each tier, we measure verbatim memorization of patient-specific text and semantic leakage of sensitive diagnoses. Applying the framework to an LM pretrained on 378k clinical notes, we find that routine encounter metadata (i.e. name, date of birth, provider, practice, visit date) elicits high rates of verbatim memorization across a patient's timeline and sensitive-diagnosis recovery (AUROC 0.91 for abortion, 0.81 for HIV). At the same time, exact-match memorization can overstate disclosure: 36% of memorized tokens reflect templated documentation. Our work highlights the risks of training on longitudinal clinical data, providing a practical framework for contextual privacy evaluation of medical LMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种临床导向的隐私评估框架，用于衡量医疗语言模型在不同对抗访问级别下对患者敏感信息的泄露程度，发现基于纵向临床数据训练的模型存在显著的患者身份和诊断信息泄露风险。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗语言模型的隐私评估多聚焦于训练文本的直接恢复，而忽视了现实威胁模型下的信息泄露；需建立更贴近临床实际的、分级的隐私评估方法。
AI.method: 构建了一个分级的临床隐私评估框架，涵盖从公开可推断人口统计信息到病历片段泄露的不同对抗访问层级，并分别量化原文记忆（verbatim memorization）和语义泄露（如敏感诊断）。在预训练于37.8万份临床病历的LM上进行实证评估。
AI.result: 常规就诊元数据（如姓名、出生日期、医生、诊所、就诊日期）会引发高概率的原文记忆及敏感诊断恢复（如堕胎AUROC=0.91，HIV AUROC=0.81）；但36%的记忆token源于模板化文书，表明精确匹配可能高估真实泄露风险。
AI.conclusion: 纵向临床数据训练易导致严重隐私泄露，本文框架为医疗语言模型提供了可操作、情境化的隐私评估范式。

title: DiffSight-Former: Modeling Structural Differences and Temporal Dynamics for Glaucoma Progression Prediction
summary: Glaucoma is a leading cause of irreversible blindness worldwide, and early detection from fundus images is critical for effective disease management. While deep learning has achieved promising performance in fundus image analysis, most existing methods rely on single time-point images and fail to capture longitudinal structural and vascular changes associated with disease progression. Sequential fundus images acquired during clinical follow-up provide valuable temporal information; however, current sequential models often struggle to detect subtle early progression signals and commonly depend on fixed-length inputs or diagnostic cues from already glaucomatous images, limiting their clinical utility for early prediction. To address these limitations, we propose DiffSight-Former, a framework for glaucoma progression prediction from sequential fundus images. It incorporates a time-variant feature extraction module based on a fundus-specific foundation model to obtain robust anatomical representations. A multi-structure difference modeling module is introduced to quantify progression-related changes in the optic disc/cup region and retinal vasculature. These representations are integrated with temporal interval embeddings and processed by a time-aware Transformer to model disease progression and estimate the probability of future glaucoma onset. Experiments were conducted on two longitudinal datasets, SIGF (405 sequences) and GRAPE (263 sequences). On SIGF, DiffSight-Former achieved an AUC of 91.54% and a sensitivity of 92.16% for progression prediction. On GRAPE, it achieved an average accuracy of 87.48% across three clinical visual-field progression criteria. Compared with existing approaches, DiffSight-Former demonstrates strong performance and robustness across different temporal settings, highlighting its potential for longitudinal glaucoma monitoring and early risk prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffSight-Former框架，利用时序眼底图像预测青光眼进展，结合时变特征提取、多结构差异建模与时间感知Transformer，在两个纵向数据集上取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多基于单一时点眼底图像，难以捕捉青光眼进展相关的纵向结构与血管变化；当前时序模型又常依赖固定长度输入或已患病图像的诊断线索，限制其在早期预测中的临床实用性。
AI.method: 提出DiffSight-Former：1）基于眼底特异性基础模型的时变特征提取模块；2）多结构差异建模模块，量化视杯/盘区域与视网膜血管的进展性变化；3）融合时间间隔嵌入的时间感知Transformer，建模疾病进展并预测未来青光眼发生概率。
AI.result: 在SIGF数据集上AUC达91.54%，敏感度92.16%；在GRAPE数据集上按三种视野进展标准平均准确率达87.48%；性能与鲁棒性优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DiffSight-Former能有效挖掘时序眼底图像中的细微进展信号，适用于青光眼纵向监测与早期风险预测，具有重要临床价值。

title: OrderDP: A Theoretically Guaranteed Lossless Dynamic Data Pruning Framework
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026
summary: Data pruning (DP), as an oft-stated strategy to alleviate heavy training burdens, reduces the volume of training samples according to a well-defined pruning method while striving for near-lossless performance. However, existing approaches, which commonly select highly informative samples, can lead to biased gradient estimation compared to full-dataset training. Furthermore, the analysis of this bias and its impact on final performance remains ambiguous. To address these challenges, we propose OrderDP, a plug-and-play framework that aims to obtain stable, unbiased, and near-lossless training acceleration with theoretical guarantees. Specifically, OrderDP first randomly selects a subset and then chooses the top-$q$ samples, where unbiasedness is established with respect to a surrogate loss. This ensures that OrderDP conducts unbiased training in terms of the surrogate objective. We further establish convergence and generalization analyses, elucidating how OrderDP affects optimal performance and enables well-controlled acceleration while ensuring guaranteed final performance. Empirically, we evaluate OrderDP against comprehensive baselines on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet-1K, demonstrating competitive accuracy, stable convergence, and exact control -- all with a simpler design and faster runtime, while reducing training cost by over 40%. Delivering both strong performance and computational efficiency, our method serves as a robust and easily adaptable tool for data-efficient learning. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/shengze-xu/OrderDP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OrderDP框架，通过随机选择子集再选取top-q样本实现无偏、稳定且近无损的数据剪枝，理论保证收敛性与泛化性，并在多个数据集上验证其高效性与准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据剪枝方法常因选择高信息量样本导致梯度估计偏差，且该偏差对最终性能的影响尚不明确。
AI.method: OrderDP首先随机选取子集，再基于代理损失函数选择top-q样本，确保对代理目标的无偏训练，并进行收敛性与泛化性理论分析。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet-1K上显著优于基线方法，精度相当、收敛稳定、训练成本降低超40%，运行更快、设计更简洁。
AI.conclusion: OrderDP是一种即插即用、理论保障强、易于适配的数据高效学习工具，在性能与效率间取得良好平衡。

title: Automated IEP Generation from Traditional Chinese Parent-Teacher Interviews via Corpus-Grounded Feature Diffusion
summary: Writing Individualized Education Programs (IEPs) is a high-labor, knowledge-intensive document burden; English-language research has demonstrated that generative AI can significantly reduce drafting time, yet automated IEP generation in Traditional Chinese remains virtually unexplored due to domain data scarcity, strict privacy regulations, and the absence of local evaluation benchmarks. We propose a low-resource fine-tuning pipeline centered on Corpus-Grounded Feature Diffusion (CGFD): (1) 25 dual-expert high-score seed transcripts are selected via a tau threshold with flag-aware score caps; (2) a FeatureProfile (sentence length, structure, quantification templates) is extracted from seeds and injected into LLM prompts alongside Verbalized-Sampling-style diversity control to drive diffusion; (3) 15 expert gold seeds are used as diffusion anchors, targeting 585 samples; 567 valid diffusion samples are obtained, yielding a 582-sample training set used to fine-tune Breeze-7B with QLoRA; (4) schema-constrained inference via Grammar-Constrained Decoding (GCD) enforces a hierarchical SMART Goal Ladder schema at inference time. Ablation results on a 55-sample schema stress set reveal an unexpected finding: GCD is counterproductive under Traditional Chinese token budgets -- the no-GCD path achieves 100% schema pass rate at 34% lower median latency, outperforming GCD on both reliability and speed. On the n=10 formal hold-out, the no-GCD inference path achieves BERTScore F1 = 0.779, exceeding GPT-5.4 (0.726), DeepSeek-V3.2 (0.703), Gemini-3-Flash-Preview (0.703), and Llama-4-Maverick (0.700) zero-shot baselines while maintaining fully local, air-gapped inference. This system addresses a gap in Traditional Chinese special-education NLP and offers a scalable, privacy-preserving local inference solution under an industrial engineering paradigm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种低资源微调流程CGFD，用于在缺乏数据和隐私严格限制下生成符合规范的繁体中文个别化教育计划（IEPs），并在无语法约束解码（no-GCD）路径下实现高准确率与低延迟。
AI.motivation: 繁体中文环境下自动化IEP生成研究几乎空白，受限于领域数据稀缺、隐私法规严格及缺乏本地评估基准。
AI.method: 提出基于语料驱动特征扩散（CGFD）的低资源微调流程：包括双专家筛选高质量种子、提取并注入句子特征至LLM提示、以专家金标为锚点进行扩散采样、QLoRA微调Breeze-7B模型，并采用语法约束解码（GCD）保障SMART目标层级结构；但最终发现no-GCD路径更优。
AI.result: 在55样本schema压力测试中，no-GCD路径实现100% schema通过率且中位延迟降低34%；在10样本正式保留集上BERTScore F1达0.779，超越多个大模型零样本基线，支持完全本地、离线推理。
AI.conclusion: 该系统填补了繁体中文特殊教育NLP空白，提供可扩展、隐私优先、符合工业工程范式的本地化IEP生成方案。

title: Decoding Pedestrian Crossing Intention from Egocentric Vision via Vision Language Models
summary: Egocentric vision offers a first-person view of human perception and decision making, yet its potential for traffic-safety prediction remains underexplored. In this work, we study the decoding of pedestrian crossing intentions from short egocentric video clips. We approach this by formulating the task as a closed-ended visual question answering (VQA) problem and leveraging vision language models (VLMs) to predict the pedestrians' intent. We first benchmark three families of state-of-the-art VLMs in a zero-shot setting, finding that they achieve moderate gains over random guessing but exhibit limited higher-level traffic reasoning. Motivated by these findings, we further adapt VLMs to the target task using parameter-efficient fine-tuning. Our results show that the fine-tuned models substantially outperform their zero-shot counterparts and achieve a 9\% accuracy improvement over a specialized transformer-based baseline. Finally, we demonstrate that incorporating additional contextual cues, including ego motion, vehicle motion, and eye gaze, further improves predictive performance. In particular, the fine-tuned Qwen3-VL-2B model guided by eye gaze and ego motion achieves a 14.5% accuracy improvement over the transformer baseline, establishing a new state of the art for egocentric pedestrian intent decoding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉语言模型（VLM）解码第一人称视频中行人过街意图的新方法，通过零样本基准测试、参数高效微调及融合眼动与自车运动等上下文线索，显著提升了预测准确率，达到新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 第一人称视觉在交通安全性预测中的潜力尚未被充分挖掘，尤其是对行人过街意图的实时解码缺乏有效方法。
AI.method: 将行人意图解码建模为封闭式视觉问答（VQA）任务，采用多种SOTA视觉语言模型进行零样本评估，并通过参数高效微调适配该任务；进一步引入自车运动、车辆运动和眼动等上下文线索增强模型性能。
AI.result: 微调后的Qwen3-VL-2B模型结合眼动与自车运动信息，在行人意图解码任务上相较专用Transformer基线提升14.5%准确率，达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 视觉语言模型经适当微调并融合多模态上下文线索后，可有效支持第一人称视角下的交通意图理解，为智能驾驶安全预警提供新范式。

title: Lost in the Non-convex Loss Landscape: How to Fine-tune the Large Time Series Model?
comment: This paper has been accepted by The Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026). The code is available at the link \url{https://github.com/Meteor-Stars/SFF}
summary: Recently, large time series models (LTSMs) have gained increasing attention due to their similarities to large language models, including flexible context length, scalability, and task generality, outperforming advanced task-specific models. However, prior studies indicate that pre-trained LTSMs may exhibit a poorly conditioned non-convex loss landscape, leading to limited trainability. As a result, direct fine-tuning tends to cause overfitting and suboptimal performance, sometimes even worse than training from scratch, substantially diminishing the benefits of pre-training. To overcome this limitation, we propose Smoothed Full Fine-tuning (SFF), a novel fine-tuning technology. Specifically, we construct an auxiliary LTSM via random initialization to obtain a smoother loss landscape, and then linearly interpolate its weights with those of the pre-trained model to smooth the original landscape. This process improves trainability while preserving pre-trained knowledge, thereby enabling more effective downstream fine-tuning. From an optimization perspective, SFF perturbs sharp minima without significantly harming flat regions, facilitating escape from poor local basins toward smoother and more generalizable solutions. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate consistent improvements across eight representative LTSMs, including Timer, TimesFM, MOMENT, UniTS, MOIRAI, Chronos, TTMs, and Sundial, on diverse downstream tasks. The code is available at the link: https://github.com/Meteor-Stars/SFF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Smoothed Full Fine-tuning（SFF）方法，通过引入随机初始化的辅助模型并线性插值其权重，平滑预训练大时间序列模型（LTSMs）的损失曲面，从而提升微调稳定性与泛化性，显著改善下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 预训练大时间序列模型（LTSMs）虽具潜力，但其损失曲面病态且非凸，导致直接微调易过拟合、性能下降甚至不如从头训练，削弱预训练优势。
AI.method: 提出Smoothed Full Fine-tuning（SFF）：构建随机初始化的辅助LTSM，将其权重与预训练模型线性插值，以平滑原始损失曲面；该策略在优化上扰动尖锐极小值而保留平坦区域，利于逃离不良局部极小点。
AI.result: 在Timer、TimesFM、MOMENT等8个主流LTSM上，SFF在多个下游任务中实现一致性能提升；实验验证其提升训练稳定性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SFF是一种简单有效、即插即用的微调技术，能兼顾知识保留与优化可训练性，为LTSM实用化提供关键支持。

title: AGENTSERVESIM: A Hardware-aware Simulator for Multi-Turn LLM Agent Serving
summary: Multi-turn LLM agents interleave model calls with external tool invocations, shifting serving from stateless request processing to stateful program execution. Serving these workloads requires scheduling, KV-cache management, and routing policies that use program-level context, including turn dependencies, tool-induced gaps, and reusable KV state. Evaluating such policies directly on real systems is costly, since each design point may require dedicated accelerator time across arrival rates, model scales, serving-instance counts, and memory hierarchies. Simulation offers a scalable alternative, but existing LLM serving simulators target stateless request-level workloads and therefore omit the core dynamics of agent serving: multi-turn program execution, cross-turn cache locality, and KV-cache residency during tool gaps. We present AGENTSERVESIM, a hardware-aware simulator for multi-turn LLM agent serving. AGENTSERVESIM evaluates serving policies at program granularity through composable modules: a Program Orchestrator preserves program identity and turn order, a Tool Simulator materializes tool-induced gaps, a Session-Aware Router maintains program-to-instance affinity for cache-aware dispatch, and a KV Residency Model tracks policy-defined KV placement across HBM, host DRAM/CXL, and eviction. Across real serving deployments and hardware configurations, AGENTSERVESIM reproduces real-system behavior within 6% error across key performance metrics while running entirely on commodity CPUs. These results show that AGENTSERVESIM enables controlled, repeatable exploration of agent-serving policies without requiring exhaustive deployment on costly accelerators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AGENTSERVESIM，一个面向多轮LLM智能体服务的硬件感知仿真器，支持在CPU上高效、高精度地评估调度、KV缓存管理和路由等策略，避免昂贵的加速器实测。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM服务仿真器仅针对无状态请求级负载，无法建模多轮智能体服务中的程序执行、跨轮缓存局部性和工具调用间隙期间的KV缓存驻留等核心动态；而真实系统评估成本高昂。
AI.method: 设计并实现AGENTSERVESIM仿真器，包含四个可组合模块：程序编排器（保持程序身份与轮次顺序）、工具模拟器（建模工具引入的延迟间隙）、会话感知路由器（维持程序到实例的亲和性以支持缓存感知调度）、KV驻留模型（跟踪HBM、主机DRAM/CXL及驱逐策略下的KV放置）。
AI.result: 在多种真实部署与硬件配置下，AGENTSERVESIM对关键性能指标的仿真误差控制在6%以内，且完全运行于通用CPU，显著提升策略探索效率与可重复性。
AI.conclusion: AGENTSERVESIM为多轮LLM智能体服务策略的设计与评估提供了高保真、低成本、可扩展的仿真基础设施，填补了当前LLM服务仿真领域对状态ful程序级负载建模的空白。

title: CAMF-Det: Closure-Aware Multimodal Fusion for LiDAR-Camera 3D Object Detection on UAV Platforms
summary: Multimodal 3D object detection based on LiDAR and cameras has demonstrated excellent performance in ground-vehicle scenarios, but has not been explored for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) platforms. In UAV top-down scenes, frequent groundobject occlusion dominated by tree canopies causes spatially varying and modality-dependent information degradation. Existing multimodal fusion frameworks neither explicitly model such ground-object occlusion nor embed occlusion awareness into the detection pipeline, limiting their performance in occluded UAV scenes. To address these challenges, we propose CAMF-Det, a closure-aware multimodal fusion framework for LiDAR-camera 3D object detection on UAV platforms, which derives dual-modal occlusion intensity through physics-inspired modeling and embeds them as priors throughout the detection pipeline. First, a dual-modal closure modeling module explicitly constructs occlusion intensity ground truth for both modalities offline via a Beer-Lambert-inspired formulation and building-mask correction. Second, using these ground-truth maps as supervision, a dual-modal prediction network converts the offline modeling results into online occlusion intensity predictions under single-frame inference. Third, both ground-truth and predicted occlusion intensity are injected into data augmentation, feature encoding, multimodal fusion, and detection head, enabling adaptive detection under spatially varying and modality-dependent information degradation. Experiments on two self-built UAV-based multimodal datasets, SI3D-DI and SI3D-DII, demonstrate that CAMF-Det achieves the best performance across all difficulty levels, with hard-level mAP$_{\mathrm{BEV}}$ improvements of 9.43% and 4.88% over the best competing methods, respectively. These results confirm the effectiveness of explicit occlusion prior modeling and exploitation for robust multimodal 3D detection in UAV scenes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAMF-Det框架，针对无人机（UAV）俯视场景中树冠遮挡导致的多模态信息退化问题，通过物理启发的双模态遮挡强度建模与端到端嵌入，显著提升LiDAR-相机融合的3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LiDAR与相机的多模态3D检测方法未针对UAV俯视场景中由树冠主导的、空间变化且模态依赖的地面目标遮挡问题进行建模，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 提出闭合感知多模态融合框架CAMF-Det：1）基于Beer-Lambert定律与建筑掩码校正构建离线双模态遮挡强度真值；2）训练网络在线预测单帧遮挡强度；3）将遮挡先验注入数据增强、特征编码、跨模态融合与检测头全过程。
AI.result: 在自建UAV多模态数据集SI3D-DI和SI3D-DII上，CAMF-Det在所有难度级别均达最优，困难级BEV mAP分别提升9.43%和4.88%。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模并利用遮挡先验可有效提升UAV场景下多模态3D检测鲁棒性，验证了遮挡感知融合设计的必要性与有效性。

title: A spectral audit framework reveals task-dependent aperiodic reliance across EEG and ECG deep learning
comment: 25 pages, being prepared for submission to peer-reviewed journal
summary: Deep learning on physiological time series is interpreted through domain-specific features -- oscillatory rhythms in EEG, morphological complexes in ECG -- yet these signals sit atop a broadband aperiodic 1/f-like envelope that covaries with arousal, age, and pathology. We introduce a spectral audit framework combining aperiodic/periodic decomposition, phase-preserving Fourier interventions, sham controls, and simulation validation. Aperiodic reliance was task-dependent and architecture-general: across six neural architectures, flattening drops exceeded 0.42 balanced-accuracy points for sleep-wake classification, reached 0.07-0.13 for clinical abnormality detection, and remained minimal for motor imagery. Six of seven EEG foundation models showed FDR-significant aperiodic reliance on clinical EEG; age/sex and recording-era controls reduced but did not eliminate the effect. Applying the audit to PTB-XL ECG revealed neural drops of 0.32--0.36 persisting after demographic matching, confirming this confound class extends beyond EEG. Aperiodic controls should become standard for interpretable physiological time-series deep learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种频谱审计框架，用于评估深度学习模型对生理时间序列中非周期性（1/f样）成分的依赖性，并发现这种依赖在不同任务和模型中普遍存在，尤其在临床EEG和ECG分析中显著，建议将其作为可解释性研究的标准步骤。
AI.motivation: 生理时间序列（如EEG、ECG）常被按周期性特征（如节律、波形）解读，但其底层宽带非周期性成分（1/f样包络）也与觉醒度、年龄及病理状态相关，可能成为模型混淆源，亟需系统评估。
AI.method: 提出频谱审计框架，整合非周期/周期分解、相位保持的傅里叶干预、伪对照（sham controls）和仿真验证，应用于多个神经网络架构及EEG/ECG数据集（如PTB-XL）。
AI.result: 发现模型对非周期成分的依赖具有任务特异性：睡眠-觉醒分类中性能下降超0.42平衡准确率，临床异常检测下降0.07–0.13，而运动想象中几乎无影响；6/7个EEG基础模型在临床EEG上呈现FDR显著依赖；PTB-XL ECG中亦观察到0.32–0.36的性能下降，且经人口统计匹配后仍存在。
AI.conclusion: 非周期性成分是生理时间序列深度学习中广泛存在的混淆因素，应成为可解释性研究和模型评估的标准控制项。

title: Civil Court Simulation with Large Language Models
summary: Court simulation bridges legal education and judicial practice, yet human-based simulations are costly and difficult to scale. Large language models (LLMs) offer a scalable alternative, but existing court-simulation research mainly focuses on criminal cases. Civil litigation is more common in practice and harder to simulate because its claims, liability, and remedies are more flexible. We present a multi-agent court simulation framework for Chinese civil cases. The framework organizes role-based interaction through a five-stage civil trial procedure and integrates memory module and statute retrieval to support long-process adjudication. Experiments show that the framework produces reliable civil judgments, with clear strengths in liability allocation and multi-item adjudication. Further experiments show that memory quality substantially affects downstream simulation quality. Through a five-layer factor framework, we analyze how legal grounding, information conditions, judicial capability and role orientation, organizational pressure, and social context affect the framework's reliability and behavior. These results support the effectiveness of the proposed framework for civil court simulation. The dataset and code are available at: https://github.com/foggpoy/Civil-Court.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向中国民事案件的多智能体法庭模拟框架，通过五阶段审判流程、记忆模块和法规检索机制提升长流程裁判可靠性，在责任分配与多项裁决上表现突出，并分析了影响其可靠性的五大因素。
AI.motivation: 现有法庭模拟研究主要集中于刑事案件，而更常见且更难模拟的民事诉讼缺乏有效解决方案；人工模拟成本高、难扩展，需探索基于大语言模型的可扩展替代方案。
AI.method: 构建面向中国民事案件的多智能体法庭模拟框架，按五阶段民事审判流程组织角色交互，集成记忆模块与法规检索机制以支持长流程裁判，并通过五层因子框架分析影响可靠性的关键因素。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架能生成可靠的民事判决，尤其在责任分配和多项裁决方面优势明显；记忆质量显著影响下游模拟效果；五层因子分析揭示了法律依据、信息条件、司法能力与角色定位、组织压力及社会情境对框架可靠性与行为的影响。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架在民事法庭模拟中具备有效性与实用性，为法律教育与司法实践提供了可扩展、可解释的技术支持，相关数据集与代码已开源。

title: Ultra Flash: Scaling Real-Time Streaming Video Generation to High Resolutions
summary: While recent autoregressive video diffusion models achieve remarkable streaming quality, they remain confined to low resolutions (e.g., 480P), leaving efficient, scalable, real-time high-resolution video generation a fundamental open challenge. To bridge this gap, we present Ultra Flash, a cascaded streaming framework capable of real-time high-resolution video generation. Ultra Flash achieves ~30 FPS at 1K resolution and ~18 FPS at 2K resolution on a single GPU through three key contributions: (1) an architecture-preserving T2V-to-TV2V super-resolution training paradigm coupled with an AIGC-oriented data degradation pipeline that effectively preserves the generative capability of the base model, enabling enhanced high-resolution detail when cascaded after mainstream low-resolution generative models; (2) a causal streaming latent upsampler paired with a high-resolution decoder, which enhances spatiotemporal coherence while enabling efficient latent spatial scaling and precise high-resolution decoding with negligible computational overhead; and (3) a cascade high-resolution streaming video generation optimization scheme that first performs hybrid-reward-enhanced sparse causalization and single-step distillation of the super-resolution model, then introduces cascaded streaming self-forcing preference optimization with dynamic cache management, jointly enhancing overall coherence, improving quality, and enabling real-time high-resolution streaming video generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Ultra Flash reliably produces ultra-high-resolution streaming video while maintaining state-of-the-art visual quality and superior efficiency.

AI.tldr: Ultra Flash 是一种级联流式框架，可实现实时高分辨率视频生成，在单GPU上达到约30 FPS（1K）和18 FPS（2K），通过三项关键技术：保持架构的超分训练范式、因果流式潜在上采样器与高分辨率解码器、以及级联流式自强制偏好优化方案。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归视频扩散模型虽在流式质量上表现优异，但受限于低分辨率（如480P），高效、可扩展、实时的高分辨率视频生成仍是根本性挑战。
AI.method: 提出Ultra Flash级联流式框架，包含：(1) 架构保持的T2V-to-TV2V超分训练范式与AIGC导向的数据退化流程；(2) 因果流式潜在上采样器+高分辨率解码器；(3) 级联高分辨率流式生成优化方案，含混合奖励增强稀疏因果化、单步蒸馏及动态缓存管理的自强制偏好优化。
AI.result: 在单GPU上实现~30 FPS（1K）和~18 FPS（2K）的实时高分辨率视频生成，视觉质量达SOTA，效率优越，支持超高清流式视频稳定生成。
AI.conclusion: Ultra Flash成功 bridged 低分辨率生成与实时高分辨率视频生成之间的鸿沟，为高效、高质量流式视频生成提供了新范式。

title: Convolutional Sparse Coding via the Locally Competitive Algorithm on Loihi 2
summary: Sparse coding provides a principled framework for signal representation by expressing an input as a linear combination of only a small number of basis functions. The Locally Competitive Algorithm (LCA) is particularly attractive in the context of neuromorphic computing because its dynamics, leaky integration, thresholding, and lateral inhibition map naturally to neuromorphic hardware. While prior work has studied non-convolutional LCA on Loihi 2, the convolutional setting is of particular interest because it introduces spatial structure, weight sharing, overlapping receptive fields, and scaling behavior that are more representative of practical sparse inference workloads. In this work, we present a Loihi 2 implementation of convolutional sparse coding via the LCA and evaluate it against a conventional GPU baseline on the same inference problems. The implementation follows a one-layer recurrent LCA formulation and extends it to convolutional feature maps with local inhibitory kernels derived from pairwise filter interactions. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first implementation and benchmark of convolutional LCA on Loihi 2. Our goal is not only to demonstrate feasibility, but also to clarify in which operating regimes convolutional sparse inference becomes attractive on neuromorphic hardware. The resulting study positions convolutional LCA as a useful benchmark for structured sparse inference on emerging neuromorphic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个在Loihi 2芯片上实现卷积稀疏编码（通过局部竞争算法LCA）的工作，并与GPU基准对比评估；其核心是将LCA扩展至卷积特征图，引入基于滤波器交互的局部抑制核，旨在明确卷积稀疏推断在神经形态硬件上的适用场景。
AI.motivation: 卷积设置比非卷积LCA更贴近实际稀疏推理任务，因其具有空间结构、权值共享、重叠感受野和可扩展性；而此前尚无Loihi 2上的卷积LCA实现与基准研究。
AI.method: 基于单层循环LCA框架，将其扩展至卷积特征图，设计由成对滤波器相互作用导出的局部抑制核，在Intel Loihi 2芯片上实现卷积稀疏编码，并与GPU基准在相同推理任务上对比评估。
AI.result: 首次在Loihi 2上成功实现并评测了卷积LCA；明确了其在特定运行区间（如低功耗、实时性要求高、输入尺寸适中）下相较GPU更具吸引力；确立了卷积LCA作为结构化稀疏推理的有用基准。
AI.conclusion: 卷积LCA不仅在Loihi 2上可行，而且为评估新兴神经形态系统在结构化稀疏推断任务中的性能提供了重要基准；该工作揭示了其适用边界，推动了神经形态稀疏计算的实用化发展。

title: Gradient-Guided Reward Optimization for Inference-time Alignment
summary: Ensuring the reliability of Large Language Models (LLMs) under distribution drift requires inference-time adaptation. While inference-time alignment methods such as Best-of-$N$ and rejection sampling are widely used, they frame the task as a sampling-intensive, reward-guided search, leading to two key limitations: their performance is bounded by the base model's generation quality, and their reliance on imperfect reward models makes them vulnerable to reward hacking. To address these challenges, we introduce Gradient-Guided Reward Optimization (GGRO), a lightweight inference-time method that performs targeted, minimal intervention during decoding via gradient guidance. Specifically, GGRO monitors token-level entropy to identify high-uncertainty regions indicative of drift or misalignment. Upon detection, it responds by injecting nudging tokens, generated using gradient signals from an off-the-shelf reward model, to steer the generation trajectory rather than merely re-ranking samples. Experiments show that GGRO consistently improves inference-time alignment across safety, helpfulness, and reasoning benchmarks. It also increases coverage of high-quality responses and robustness to reward hacking, with minimal computational overhead. Code is available at https://github.com/lhk2004/GGRO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级推理时对齐方法GGRO，通过监控token级熵识别不确定性区域，并利用奖励模型的梯度信号注入引导性token，以改善大语言模型在分布偏移下的可靠性，提升安全性、有用性和推理能力，同时增强抗奖励黑客攻击能力且计算开销小。
AI.motivation: 现有推理时对齐方法（如Best-of-N、拒绝采样）受限于基础模型生成质量，且易受不完美奖励模型导致的奖励黑客攻击影响。
AI.method: 提出Gradient-Guided Reward Optimization (GGRO)，在解码过程中监控token级熵以检测高不确定性区域，并基于现成奖励模型的梯度信号生成并注入‘ nudging tokens’，实现对生成路径的主动引导而非仅重排序。
AI.result: GGRO在安全性、有用性与推理类基准上持续提升推理时对齐效果，提高高质量响应覆盖率与抗奖励黑客鲁棒性，且计算开销极小。
AI.conclusion: GGRO是一种高效、鲁棒、低开销的推理时适应方法，为缓解分布偏移下LLM的可靠性问题提供了新思路。

title: OmniGen-AR: AutoRegressive Any-to-Image Generation
