summary: Autoregressive (AR) models have demonstrated strong potential in visual generation, offering superior performance with simple architectures and optimization objectives. However, existing methods are typically limited to single-modality conditions, e.g., text, restricting their applicability in real-world scenarios that demand image synthesis from diverse controls. In this work, we present OmniGen-AR, a unified autoregressive framework for Any-to-Image generation. By discretizing various visual conditions through a shared visual tokenizer and text prompts with a text tokenizer, OmniGen-AR supports a broad spectrum of conditional inputs within a single model, including text (text-to-image generation), spatial signals (segmentation-to-image and depth-to-image), and visual context (image editing, frame prediction, and text-to-video generation). To mitigate the risk of information leakage from condition tokens to content tokens, we introduce Disentangled Causal Attention (DCA), which separates the full-sequence causal mask into condition causal attention and content causal attention. It serves as a training-time regularizer without affecting the standard next-token prediction during inference. With this design, OmniGen-AR achieves new state-of-the-art or at least competitive results across a range of benchmark, e.g., 0.63 on GenEval and 80.02 on VBench, demonstrating its effectiveness in flexible and high-fidelity visual generation.

AI.tldr: OmniGen-AR 是一个统一的自回归框架，支持文本、分割图、深度图、图像编辑、视频帧预测等多种条件输入的任意到图像生成，并通过解耦因果注意力机制防止条件信息泄露，实现了多任务SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归视觉生成模型通常仅支持单模态条件（如纯文本），难以满足真实场景中多样控制信号（如分割图、深度图、参考图像等）驱动图像合成的需求。
AI.method: 提出 OmniGen-AR：1）使用共享视觉分词器和文本分词器统一离散化多源条件；2）引入解耦因果注意力（DCA），将因果掩码分为条件与内容两部分，训练时正则化、推理时保持标准自回归预测。
AI.result: 在 GenEval（0.63）和 VBench（80.02）等基准上达到新SOTA或具有竞争力，支持 text-to-image、segmentation/depth-to-image、image editing、frame prediction、text-to-video 等多种生成任务。
AI.conclusion: OmniGen-AR 验证了单一自回归架构可有效统一多模态条件图像生成，DCA 设计在不增加推理开销前提下提升了条件可控性与生成质量。

title: Quantum Global Variational Learning for Quantum Error Correction
summary: Efficient quantum error correction is essential for the advancement of quantum computing. We propose a quantum neural network with a global structure that reduces the number of unitary matrices required in quantum circuits. This approach resulted in a 97\% reduction in training time and up to a 25\% improvement in the training completion rate, ultimately achieving a 100\% success rate in training while surpassing the error correction performance reported in previous studies. In addition, we demonstrated the enhanced robustness of quantum error correction against internal network noise. Moreover, the fidelity of quantum error correction under internal network noise increased by up to 15\% due to the reduced computational load.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种具有全局结构的量子神经网络，显著减少了量子电路中所需的幺正矩阵数量，从而大幅缩短训练时间、提高训练完成率与纠错成功率，并增强了对内部网络噪声的鲁棒性及纠错保真度。
AI.motivation: 高效量子纠错对量子计算发展至关重要，而现有方法在训练效率和纠错性能上存在瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计一种具有全局结构的量子神经网络，以减少量子电路中所需的幺正矩阵数量。
AI.result: 训练时间减少97%，训练完成率提升最多25%，纠错成功率100%，纠错性能超越先前研究；在内部网络噪声下，纠错保真度提升最多15%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在训练效率、成功率、鲁棒性和纠错性能方面均取得显著提升，为量子纠错提供了更优解决方案。

title: Where Does the Answer Come From? Benchmarking View-Level Visual Evidence Identification in Multi-View MLLMs for Autonomous Driving
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) achieve strong results on visual reasoning benchmarks, but answer accuracy alone does not indicate whether a model relied on the correct visual evidence. This gap is particularly important in multi-view driving scenes used for autonomous driving, where a model can produce a plausible answer while grounding it in the wrong camera view. We introduce a multi-view visual question answering benchmark for evaluating evidence-source identification: given six synchronized NuScenes views and a question, the model must identify the supporting camera view and answer the question. The benchmark contains 122 conflict-centric question-answer pairs from 73 scenes, spanning causality, counterfactual reasoning, and intent prediction. View labels are proposed by an automatic conflict-mining pipeline and manually verified by annotators. We evaluate three settings: camera-view selection, oracle QA given the golden view, and joint prediction in which the model selects a view and answers in one pass. Answers are evaluated in both multiple-choice and free-form formats, using exact match for structured predictions and an LLM judge for free-form responses. By explicitly separating visual-source identification from answer correctness, the benchmark exposes grounding failures that answer-only evaluation misses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在多视角驾驶场景中视觉证据来源识别能力的新基准，强调模型不仅需回答正确，还需基于正确的摄像头视角进行推理。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在视觉推理基准上表现良好，但仅靠答案准确率无法判断模型是否依赖了正确的视觉证据，尤其在自动驾驶的多视角驾驶场景中，模型可能给出合理答案却基于错误视角，存在严重的接地失败风险。
AI.method: 构建了一个基于NuScenes数据集的多视角视觉问答基准，包含122个以冲突为中心的问题-答案对，覆盖因果、反事实和意图预测；采用自动冲突挖掘流水线生成视角标签并经人工验证；设计三种评估设置：视角选择、给定黄金视角的Oracle问答、联合预测；答案评估采用多选与自由作答两种形式，分别使用精确匹配和LLM裁判。
AI.result: 该基准能显式分离视觉源识别与答案正确性，有效暴露仅靠答案评估所忽略的接地失败问题。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基准为更全面评估MLLMs在关键安全场景（如自动驾驶）中的视觉接地能力提供了新标准，推动模型不仅‘答得对’，更要‘看得准’。

title: Zero-Parameter Geometric Gating for Temporally Stable Low-Altitude UAV Video Semantic Segmentation
summary: Video semantic segmentation for low-altitude UAVs requires temporal consistency, yet dense optical flow introduces spatially structured noise in the planar regions that dominate aerial imagery. We propose a zero-parameter geometric gate that uses RANSAC homography inlier ratios on a $16\times16$ spatial grid to route each region to either homography or optical flow warp before fusion via Semantic Similarity Propagation. The gate requires no learned parameters -- only a median-threshold binary decision on RANSAC statistics -- adding only 211K trainable parameters (the SSP fusion layer) to a frozen backbone. On synthetic UAVid, the method achieves +4.24--4.91\% mIoU improvement over base models across two architectures (SegFormer-b2 and Hiera-S+UPerNet). Mechanism diagnostics reveal that flow residuals in planar regions are spatially autocorrelated (Moran's I = 0.32, $p < 0.001$), predict boundary instability (Spearman $ρ= 0.66$), and that rigidification recovers temporal consistency from 62\% to 92\% (+29.5pp) in homography-valid regions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无参数的几何门控机制，结合RANSAC同源性内点率与光流，在无人机低空视频语义分割中提升时序一致性，显著提高mIoU。
AI.motivation: 低空无人机视频语义分割需保证时间一致性，但稠密光流在航拍图像主导的平面区域引入空间结构化噪声。
AI.method: 设计零参数几何门：在16×16空间网格上计算RANSAC单应性内点比，据此二值路由选择同源性或光流形变；再通过语义相似性传播（SSP）融合；仅SSP层含211K可训练参数，骨干网络冻结。
AI.result: 在合成UAVid数据集上，相比基线模型（SegFormer-b2和Hiera-S+UPerNet），mIoU提升4.24–4.91%；同源性有效区域的时间一致性从62%提升至92%（+29.5pp）；光流残差在平面区具有显著空间自相关性（Moran's I=0.32, p<0.001）且与边界不稳定强相关（Spearman ρ=0.66）。
AI.conclusion: 基于几何先验的无参门控可有效抑制光流噪声、增强时序一致性，为轻量、可解释的视频分割提供新范式。

title: How Much Capacity Does EEG Denoising Need? Ultra-Compact Networks reveal Benchmark Saturation and Metric-Utility Gap
comment: 17 pages, will be submitted to peer-reviewed journal
summary: Deep learning EEG denoising architectures have scaled from tens of thousands to tens of millions of parameters, yet no prior study has isolated model capacity as the experimental variable or tested whether reconstruction metrics predict downstream neural-signal utility. We address both gaps by fixing architecture, loss, data split, and training recipe while sweeping only channel width from 1.05K to 40.26K parameters in a minimal depthwise-separable convolutional U-Net. Models were evaluated on the EEGDenoiseNet benchmark, cross-dataset BCI transfer tests, controlled baseline retraining, and downstream motor-imagery classification with five decoder families across all nine BCI Competition IV-2a subjects. Reconstruction performance saturated by 3-6.5K parameters, with post-elbow gains of at most 0.015 correlation coefficient per log10-parameter unit. An 8.46M-parameter baseline retrained under the same pipeline matched the 40.26K compact variant on EOG--a 200x parameter gap yielding no advantage--while a Patch-Transformer control reproduced the same diminishing-return shape. Downstream evaluation exposed a classifier-dependent metric-utility gap: reconstruction-optimized denoising significantly degraded CSP+LDA classification across all nine subjects and three artifact types (best denoised accuracy 0.547 vs. 0.612 noisy baseline; Bonferroni p=0.0488), persisting on naturally recorded trials (Delta=-0.047; BH-FDR q=0.0049). End-to-end neural decoders showed variable or neutral effects. Standard EEG denoising benchmarks are saturated far below current model capacity, and reconstruction metrics do not predict BCI utility. Ultra-compact models at 33-46 KB and 1.27-2.61M FLOPs/segment are practical for edge deployment. These findings argue for capacity-controlled evaluation, harder task-aware benchmarks, and mandatory downstream validation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过控制实验变量，系统评估了EEG去噪模型容量对重建性能和下游BCI任务的影响，发现重建指标饱和早且不能预测实际神经信号效用，超紧凑模型即可满足边缘部署需求。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习EEG去噪模型参数量激增，但尚无研究单独考察模型容量的影响，也未验证重建指标是否能反映下游神经信号实用性。
AI.method: 固定架构、损失函数、数据划分与训练流程，仅调节通道宽度，在轻量级深度可分离卷积U-Net中将参数量从1.05K扫至40.26K；在EEGDenoiseNet基准、跨数据集BCI迁移、基线重训练及下游运动想象分类（五类解码器、九名被试）上全面评估。
AI.result: 重建性能在3–6.5K参数即饱和；40.26K参数模型与8.46M参数基线在EOG去噪上性能相当；重建优化显著损害CSP+LDA分类准确率（p=0.0488），而端到端解码器影响中性或可变；标准基准已远超实用所需容量。
AI.conclusion: 应采用容量可控的评估范式、构建更难的任务导向基准，并强制进行下游任务验证；超紧凑模型（33–46 KB，1.27–2.61M FLOPs/段）已足够用于边缘部署。

title: Beyond Accuracy: Community Perspectives on Machine Translation
summary: Despite remarkable progress in machine translation (MT), non-AI communities have raised growing concerns about MT systems, suggesting a noticeable gap between technical advancement and the needs of real-world users. For instance, while NLP researchers focus on benchmark performance, end users care about ethical concerns, trust, reliability, costs, and more. We argue that listening to various user communities is essential so that research efforts would be directed towards the problems that the communities care about. To this end, we present a large-scale analysis, for the first time, that investigates what four stakeholder communities (AI developers, professional translators, language learners, and language service providers) post about MT technology on social media. To do so, we construct a dataset of 79,286 posts and comments from Reddit, Facebook, Bluesky, and Mastodon from 2019 to 2025, and analyse where these communities disagree, and how and why. Overall, we find that communities often disagree, and even show strong conflicts due to polarised sentiments on topics such as translation quality, efficiency, and reliability. This is because these communities approach these topics differently: the AI community frames them as technical and computational problems, while non-AI (user) communities care more about quality nuances, time savings, user trust, and broader social issues.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模社交媒体数据分析，揭示了AI开发者与非AI用户群体（专业译员、语言学习者、语言服务提供商）在机器翻译技术认知上的显著分歧，指出技术社区关注计算性能，而用户社区更重视质量细节、信任度及社会影响，强调研究需倾听多元用户声音。
AI.motivation: 解决机器翻译技术进步与真实用户需求之间的脱节问题，回应非AI社区对伦理、可信度、成本等现实关切。
AI.method: 构建2019–2025年来自Reddit、Facebook、Bluesky和Mastodon的79,286条帖子与评论数据集，对四类利益相关者群体进行对比主题与情感分析。
AI.result: 发现各群体在翻译质量、效率和可靠性等议题上存在强烈分歧甚至对立：AI社区倾向技术视角，非AI用户更关注实际体验、信任与社会影响。
AI.conclusion: 机器翻译研究亟需纳入多元用户声音，将真实世界问题而非仅基准指标作为核心导向，以弥合技术发展与社会需求之间的鸿沟。

title: Vision-Language Guided Hyperspectral Object Tracking via Semantics Fusion and Contextual Template Updating
summary: Hyperspectral object tracking (HOT) leverages the rich spectral information provided by hyperspectral videos (HSVs), offering substantial potential for object tracking. However, efficiently extracting and exploiting spectral information from redundant spectral bands remains a fundamental challenge, which severely limits model generalization and tracking performance. Moreover, in dynamic scenes, targets often experience drastic appearance variations due to factors such as occlusion and illumination changes. These variations lead to large deformations between the current frame and the template. Such discrepancies pose major challenges for existing temporal modeling approaches. In this work, we propose VLHTrack, a novel hyperspectral vision-language (VL) joint tracking framework. Specifically, we incorporate language priors to address the fundamental challenge of spectral redundancy by designing a Language-Guided Band Selection Module (LBSM). By leveraging Large Language Model (LLM) descriptions, LBSM establishes a semantic-to-spectral mapping that mitigates redundancy and accentuates discriminative spectral features. A Multi-Modal Vision-Language Fusion Module is then employed to seamlessly integrate visual and linguistic embeddings, harnessing their complementary advantages to learn coherent cross-modal representations. To address target deformation in long-term sequences, we propose a dynamic update template feature strategy implemented via the Dynamic Template Update with Mamba (DTUM) module. By leveraging selective state space modeling, DTUM learns inter-frame dependencies to update template feature, ensuring efficient template feature evolution guided by temporal context. Experiments on HOT2023 and HOT2024 demonstrate that VLHTrack outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VLHTrack框架，通过语言引导的波段选择、多模态视觉-语言融合及基于Mamba的动态模板更新，解决高光谱目标跟踪中的光谱冗余与目标形变问题，在HOT2023/2024上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 高光谱目标跟踪面临两大挑战：一是光谱波段冗余导致模型泛化能力弱；二是动态场景中目标外观剧烈变化（如遮挡、光照变化）引发模板与当前帧间大幅形变，使现有时序建模方法失效。
AI.method: 提出VLHTrack框架：1）语言引导波段选择模块（LBSM），利用大语言模型描述建立语义-光谱映射以缓解冗余；2）多模态视觉-语言融合模块，融合视觉与语言嵌入以学习一致性跨模态表征；3）基于Mamba的动态模板更新模块（DTUM），利用选择性状态空间建模学习帧间依赖关系，实现时序引导的模板特征演化。
AI.result: 在HOT2023和HOT2024数据集上，VLHTrack性能超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 引入语言先验可有效缓解高光谱冗余并增强判别性光谱特征；视觉-语言联合建模与Mamba驱动的动态模板更新能显著提升长时跟踪鲁棒性，为高光谱跟踪提供了新范式。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Flow-Matching Policies with Density Transport
summary: We present an online reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm for fine-tuning flow-matching policies in continuous-control problems. Our key insight is to view RL-based policy improvement as a transport of action densities towards regions of high reward, which naturally aligns with the transport formulation of flow matching models. Prior methods either approximate the current or optimal policy distribution or resort to distillation, which introduces biased gradients or sacrifices multimodal modeling capacity. In contrast, our approach for RL with Density Transport, which we name \emph{RLDT}, constructs a transport field from a maximum-entropy RL objective using Stein Variational Gradient Descent (SVGD). Then, it finetunes a pretrained flow matching policy to align with this field. Training with this alignment objective is nontrivial because flow-matching policies generate actions via a multi-step process, making direct gradient-based optimization challenging. To overcome this challenge and stabilize training, we approximate policy actions from intermediate denoising steps via expected-target estimation. This allows the transport-field update to propagate into the network parameters without unstable backpropagation through time. Experimental results demonstrate that RLDT outperforms competitive baselines in reward quality and convergence speed. This performance holds across diverse continuous-control tasks, encompassing both dense and sparse rewards, as well as state- and vision-based long-horizon robot manipulation. The project webpage is \href{https://rpfey.github.io/rldt/}{https://rpfey.github.io/rldt/}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RLDT的在线强化学习算法，通过密度传输视角改进流匹配策略，在连续控制任务中实现高效细调，兼顾多模态建模与训练稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在基于流匹配的策略细调中存在偏差梯度或牺牲多模态建模能力的问题，亟需一种能直接优化动作密度、保持无偏且支持多模态的RL方法。
AI.method: 提出RLDT算法：基于最大熵RL目标构建传输场，利用Stein变分梯度下降（SVGD）生成；再通过期望目标估计近似中间去噪步骤的动作，使传输场更新稳定反向传播至网络参数，避免时序反传不稳定性。
AI.result: RLDT在多种连续控制任务（包括稠密/稀疏奖励、状态/视觉输入、长视野机器人操作）上显著优于基线方法，兼具更高奖励质量和更快收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: 密度传输为流匹配策略的RL细调提供了新范式，RLDT在理论一致性与实际性能上均展现出优势，验证了动作密度传输作为策略优化路径的有效性。

title: End-to-End Context Compression at Scale
summary: Long-context language model inference is bottlenecked by memory, as the KV cache grows with context length. Recent techniques to compress the KV cache fall short: they either degrade model quality substantially or require considerable time and compute to compress a single long prompt. Furthermore, many methods require the input to fit within the target model's context window, and are generally incompatible with modern production inference engines. Encoder-decoder compressors, which map a long token sequence to a shorter sequence of latent embeddings consumed by a decoder, are an appealing alternative in principle. However, existing approaches are not competitive with KV cache compression on the accuracy-efficiency frontier. In this work, we revisit encoder-decoder compression and close this gap. We first perform an architecture search, pre-training many variants from scratch to determine how best to design and train encoder-decoder compressors. Guided by our findings, we continually pre-train a family of 0.6B-encoder, 4B-decoder models on over 350B tokens each, at compression ratios of 1:4, 1:8, and 1:16. We introduce Latent Context Language Models (LCLMs), a family of compressors that improve the Pareto frontier across general-task performance, compression speed, and peak memory usage. We demonstrate that LCLMs serve as efficient backbones for long-horizon agents, letting the agent skim through a compressed long context and adaptively expand relevant segments on demand.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Latent Context Language Models (LCLMs)，一种高效 encoder-decoder 架构的上下文压缩器，显著提升长文本推理中的准确率-效率权衡，支持动态按需解压，并适用于实际推理引擎。
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存压缩方法在模型质量、压缩速度或兼容性上存在明显缺陷；encoder-decoder压缩器虽有潜力，但此前性能不具竞争力。
AI.method: 通过架构搜索与大规模持续预训练（每模型超350B token），构建0.6B编码器+4B解码器的LCLM系列，在1:4/1:8/1:16压缩比下优化设计；引入面向长程智能体的动态‘略读-展开’机制。
AI.result: LCLMs在通用任务性能、压缩速度和峰值内存占用三方面显著改善Pareto前沿；实验证明其可作为长时程智能体的高效上下文 backbone，支持自适应上下文扩展。
AI.conclusion: encoder-decoder压缩路径经系统性重设计后可超越传统KV压缩，在保持高质量的同时兼顾效率与工程实用性，为长上下文推理提供新范式。

title: Claude Code-Driving Scenario Mining for the Argoverse 2 Challenge
summary: We present our submission to the CVPR 2026 Argoverse 2 Scenario Mining Challenge. Our system uses a four-stage pipeline: (1) autonomous code generation via a Claude Code agent powered by GLM~5.1, (2) iterative training set screening with Timestamp Balanced Accuracy threshold 0.8 to curate few-shot examples, (3) semantic code review by a separate Claude Code session, and (4) Qwen3-VL scene-level verification to filter false positives. We report results on the Argoverse 2 test set.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种四阶段pipeline，用于CVPR 2026 Argoverse 2场景挖掘挑战，结合多模型协作实现代码生成、数据筛选、语义审查与场景验证。
AI.motivation: 应对Argoverse 2场景挖掘挑战，提升自动驾驶场景理解与挖掘的准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用四阶段pipeline：(1) 基于GLM-5.1驱动的Claude Code代理进行自主代码生成；(2) 使用时间戳平衡准确率阈值（0.8）迭代筛选训练集以构建高质量少样本示例；(3) 由另一Claude Code会话执行语义代码审查；(4) 利用Qwen3-VL进行场景级验证以过滤误报。
AI.result: 在Argoverse 2测试集上报告了实验结果，但具体数值未在摘要中给出。
AI.conclusion: 该多阶段、多模型协同方法为复杂自动驾驶场景挖掘任务提供了一种可行且系统化的解决方案。

title: Tyan-WP: A Wind Power Foundation Model for Ultra-Short-Term Probabilistic Forecasting
summary: Global wind power capacity, especially in China, is booming, with new farms spanning diverse terrains and climates. The industry urgently needs accurate wind power foundation models to shorten commissioning and accelerate grid connection. This is because site-specific time series models (TSMs) are not well suited to data-scarce scenarios and generalize poorly, while generic large time series models (LTSMs) are mostly limited to univariate inputs and cannot fully exploit static site attributes or the dependencies between power and meteorological covariates, leading to insufficient accuracy. To fill this gap, we propose \textbf{Tyan-WP}, the first wind power foundation model for ultra-short-term probabilistic forecasting. Pretrained on a large-scale wind power dataset covering more than 126,000 U.S. sites over seven years, Tyan-WP further improves zero-shot forecasting through two domain-specific module designs: static site embedding using coordinate, terrain, and ecoregion metadata, and a power-aware meteorological fusion (PAMF) module that models interactions between historical power and meteorological covariates. Under a unified evaluation protocol, Tyan-WP surpasses eight site-specific supervised TSMs on 10 in-domain sites and outperforms eleven generic LTSMs on 127 in-domain sites, reducing MAE by 19.9%, RMSE by 16.6%, CRPS by 22.2%, and AQL by 21.7%, while raising R^2 by 16.7%. It further demonstrates strong cross-geography generalization on six real U.K. sites. These results show that the wind power foundation model can achieve accurate zero-shot forecasting without target-site training, providing a practical pathway for rapid turbine onboarding and probabilistic risk management at new wind farms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tyan-WP，首个面向超短期概率性风电功率预测的风电基础模型，通过静态站点嵌入与功率感知气象融合模块，在零样本下显著提升预测精度，适用于数据稀缺与跨地域场景。
AI.motivation: 现有站点特异性时序模型在数据稀缺场景泛化差，通用大时序模型难以有效利用静态站点特征及功率与气象变量间的依赖关系，导致预测精度不足。
AI.method: 提出Tyan-WP风电基础模型，基于覆盖12.6万美国站点、七年跨度的大规模数据集预训练；引入静态站点嵌入（坐标、地形、生态区元数据）和功率感知气象融合（PAMF）模块，建模历史功率与气象协变量交互。
AI.result: 在统一评估协议下，Tyan-WP在10个域内站点上超越8种站点特异性监督时序模型，在127个域内站点上优于11种通用大时序模型，MAE降低19.9%，RMSE降低16.6%，CRPS降低22.2%，AQL降低21.7%，R²提升16.7%；并在6个英国真实站点上验证了跨地域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 风电基础模型可实现无需目标站点训练的高精度零样本预测，为新风电场快速并网与概率化风险管理提供实用路径。

title: When Built-in Thinking Helps and Hurts: Constraint-Level Error Shifts in Instruction Following
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) often improve math and coding performance, but their effect on instruction following is unclear. We study IFEval with Qwen3 models (1.7B-32B), using same-weights Thinking ON/OFF controls; four Hunyuan models provide directional cross-family support. Aggregate pass-rate changes are small (-0.55 to -3.52 pp), yet 10-20% of prompts switch between pass and fail across modes, suggesting that thinking changes the pattern of errors--some prompts improve while others worsen--rather than uniformly degrading performance. Under a post-hoc Qwen3-derived grouping, constraint types separate into Planning (global counting, structure, coordination), which improves at the class level under thinking, and Precision (exact local form), which consistently worsens; the class-level Planning/Precision sign pattern holds directionally for all four Hunyuan models despite Hunyuan's opposite aggregate direction. Thinking also changes final-answer length; matched-length analyses substantially reduce the Precision drop, but a residual penalty remains. Analyzing thinking traces with a cross-encoder relevance metric reveals three patterns: Neutral shows a positive relevance-compliance link (r approximately 0.15); Planning shows near-zero predictive correlation (r approximately 0.02) despite measurable trace engagement, consistent with an execution gap between CE-measured trace relevance and final-answer compliance; Precision shows a small negative correlation (r approximately -0.05), with failing instances having higher mean relevance than passing ones. Activation patching across four model sizes (1.7B-14B) shows that Precision flip instances are more often restored than Planning flip instances (32-58% vs. 14-40% mean layer-restoration), with the largest gap at 14B (about 30 pp).

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大型推理模型（LRMs）在指令遵循任务（IFEval）中启用“思维链”（Thinking ON/OFF）对性能的影响，发现其效果并非全局提升或下降，而是因指令约束类型（Planning vs. Precision）而异：Planning类约束受益于思维链，Precision类则受损；该模式跨模型家族（Qwen3与Hunyuan）具有一致性，并通过相关性分析、长度控制和激活修补等方法验证了内在机制差异。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型虽在数学与编程任务上表现优异，但其对指令遵循能力的影响尚不明确，尤其在启用思维链时是否普遍提升或损害指令执行效果缺乏系统认知。
AI.method: 基于IFEval基准，对比Qwen3系列（1.7B–32B）在Thinking ON/OFF下的表现；引入Hunyuan模型作跨家族验证；提出基于Qwen3的后验约束类型分组（Planning/ Precision）；结合匹配长度分析、交叉编码器相关性度量及多尺度激活修补实验进行机制剖析。
AI.result: 思维链未带来整体性能提升（平均下降0.55–3.52个百分点），但导致10–20%样本结果翻转；Planning类约束（如结构、协调）在思维下整体改善，Precision类（如精确格式）一致恶化；该分类趋势在Hunyuan模型中方向一致；匹配输出长度可缓解但不能消除Precision损失；相关性分析显示三类模式（Neutral/Planning/Precision）具有不同trace-答案一致性特征；激活修补表明Precision翻转样本更易被修复，尤其在14B模型中修复率差距达30个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 思维链对指令遵循的影响高度依赖于指令的语义约束类型，而非模型规模或家族；Planning与Precision代表两类本质不同的执行挑战，需差异化建模与优化；单纯延长思考过程或增强trace相关性不足以保障Precision类指令的准确执行。

title: Counterfactual Reasoning for Fine-Grained Evidence Disentanglement in VideoQA
summary: Recent advances in video multimodal models have significantly improved VideoQA performance. However, these systems often rely on spurious statistical correlations rather than answer-relevant causal evidence, resulting in unfaithful and brittle reasoning, especially in complex real-world scenarios. Existing methods either rely on cross-modality correlations, costly curated training resources, or insufficient causal assumptions and constraints, and typically operate at the time-interval level. As a result, they fail to explicitly disentangle causal visual cues from confounders and provide limited fine-grained evidence localization. To address this issue, we propose a Counterfactual Reasoning framework for fine-grained Evidence Disentanglement (CREDiT). CREDiT formulates the VideoQA process using a structural causal model and learns cross-modality representations that are explicitly decomposed into causal and non-causal components under independence and minimality constraints. To facilitate faithful disentanglement, we introduce feature-level causal interventions and construct counterfactual inputs that approximate causal effects while suppressing non-causal correlations. Extensive experiments on NExT-GQA, SportsQA, and SPORTU-video demonstrate that CREDiT consistently improves answer accuracy and reasoning reliability across both generic and complex sports scenarios, leading to more trustworthy VideoQA systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CREDiT框架，通过反事实推理和因果建模，在视频问答中实现细粒度证据解耦，提升答案准确性和推理可信度。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答模型依赖虚假统计相关性而非因果证据，导致推理不可靠，尤其在复杂真实场景中；且缺乏细粒度的因果视觉线索分离能力。
AI.method: 提出基于结构因果模型的反事实推理框架CREDiT，将跨模态表征显式分解为因果与非因果成分，并引入特征级因果干预与反事实输入以抑制非因果关联。
AI.result: 在NExT-GQA、SportsQA和SPORTU-video数据集上验证了CREDiT显著提升答案准确率与推理可靠性，尤其在通用及复杂体育场景中表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: CREDiT实现了更可信的视频问答系统，为多模态因果推理提供了新范式。

title: SpectrumKV: Per-Token Mixed-Precision KV Cache Transfer for Prefill-Decode Disaggregated LLM Serving
summary: Prefill-decode (PD) disaggregation decouples prompt processing from token generation, but it also turns the key-value (KV) cache into a network payload. Existing PD-side KV reduction methods are mostly binary: selected tokens are transmitted at full precision and the rest are not transmitted. This paper argues that binary selection leaves a useful design space unused. SpectrumKV assigns a precision level to each token instead: attention sinks and other high-importance tokens are protected at FP16, medium-importance tokens are sent at INT8, and low-importance tokens are sent at INT4 when the model can tolerate it. The main practical complication is that INT4 tolerance is model-dependent. Qwen2.5-7B catastrophically fails under INT4 KV quantization, while Mistral-7B and Gemma-2-9B remain stable. SpectrumKV therefore runs a lightweight deployment-time probe: three aggressive NIAH trials under a 3-tier policy. Models that pass use FP16+INT8+INT4; models that fail fall back to FP16+INT8. Across Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3, and Gemma-2-9B-it, SpectrumKV improves quality at the same transfer budget. At a 50% normalized KV budget on WikiText-2, SpectrumKV changes perplexity by +1.97%,-0.06%, and-0.44%, respectively, compared with PDTrim's +25.85%, +22.07%, and +35.63%. On NIAH retrieval at 4096 tokens, the adaptive policy reaches 52.6% on Qwen at the aggressive b=0.3 budget versus 26.3% for PDTrim, and reaches 100% by b=0.5; Mistral and Gemma preserve retrieval under the 3-tier policy. End-to-end GPU timing of the transfer path shows 50-62% TTFT reductions at b=0.5. These results suggest that PD KV transfer should be treated as a precision-allocation problem, not only as token pruning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpectrumKV，一种在prefill-decode（PD）架构中对KV缓存进行多级精度量化传输的方法，替代传统二值化token选择，根据token重要性分配FP16/INT8/INT4精度，并通过轻量部署时探针适配不同模型的INT4容忍度，在保持甚至提升生成质量的同时显著降低KV传输开销和首token延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有PD架构中的KV缓存压缩方法多为二值化（全精度传输或完全丢弃），忽略了精度可调的设计空间；同时，不同大模型对低精度KV（如INT4）的容忍度差异大，需模型自适应策略。
AI.method: SpectrumKV为每个token动态分配精度等级（FP16/INT8/INT4），依据其在注意力机制中的重要性（如attention sink）；引入轻量三轮NIAH探针测试判断模型是否支持INT4，失败则回退至FP16+INT8双级策略；在WikiText-2和NIAH任务上评估质量与延迟。
AI.result: 在50%归一化KV预算下，相比PDTrim，SpectrumKV使Qwen2.5-7B、Mistral-7B、Gemma-2-9B的困惑度变化分别为+1.97%、-0.06%、-0.44%（PDTrim为+25.85%、+22.07%、+35.63%）；NIAH检索率在Qwen上从26.3%提升至52.6%（b=0.3）并达100%（b=0.5）；端到端TTFT降低50–62%。
AI.conclusion: KV缓存传输应被建模为精度分配问题而非仅token剪枝问题；SpectrumKV通过模型感知的多级量化，在不牺牲质量前提下大幅提升PD系统效率，为大模型推理通信优化提供新范式。

title: PsychoSafe: Eliciting Psychologically-Informed Refusals in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) routinely face requests that should be refused, creating a trade-off between helpfulness and harm prevention. However, refusals themselves can be helpful. In high-risk interactions involving crisis, coercion, or escalating intent, blunt non-compliance may prevent direct harm while still failing to support the needs of the person behind the request. We present PsychoSafe, a psychologically-informed refusal framework that reframes refusal as structured supportive communication grounded in evidence-based intervention strategies. To develop PsychoSafe, we construct a corpus of 8019 prompt-response pairs spanning five psychologically salient risk domains and apply prompting and parameter-efficient fine-tuning to Qwen 3.5 27B. On a balanced validation set of 500 prompts, evaluated with an LLM judge and validated through human ratings, PsychoSafe prompting improves overall refusal quality by 28.1% over a generic baseline, with particularly strong gains in external resource referral (+46.8%) and psychological grounding (+34.8%), while preserving downstream performance on non-refusal tasks. Fine-tuning achieves near-perfect refusal and resource-referral rates but reduces response relevance. Additional evaluations on SORRY-Bench and XSTest show strong in-domain robustness but limited out-of-domain generalization, suggesting that future work should diversify fine-tuning data to help models apply interventions selectively rather than schematically.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PsychoSafe框架，将拒绝响应重构为基于心理学证据的支持性沟通，通过提示工程和参数高效微调提升大语言模型在高风险场景下的拒绝质量，尤其增强外部资源推荐与心理学依据，但存在跨领域泛化不足的问题。
AI.motivation: LLMs在面对应拒绝的请求时，需平衡帮助性与防害性；而传统生硬拒绝虽可防止直接伤害，却未能满足用户潜在心理需求，尤其在危机、胁迫或意图升级等高风险情境中。
AI.method: 构建涵盖5个心理风险领域的8019条prompt-response语料库，结合提示工程与Qwen 3.5 27B的参数高效微调，并采用LLM裁判+人工评估验证效果；同时在SORRY-Bench和XSTest上进行泛化性评测。
AI.result: PsychoSafe提示法相较基线整体拒绝质量提升28.1%，外部资源推荐+46.8%、心理学依据+34.8%；微调实现近100%拒绝与转介率但降低响应相关性；在域内稳健，域外泛化有限。
AI.conclusion: 结构化、心理学驱动的拒绝策略可显著提升高风险交互中的响应质量，但需更丰富多样的训练数据以支持选择性而非模式化地应用干预策略。

title: CP4D: Compositional Physics-aware 4D Scene Generation
summary: 4D generation (\textit{i.e.}, dynamic 3D generation) has recently emerged as a rapidly growing research frontier due to its powerful spatiotemporal modeling capabilities. However, despite notable advances, existing approaches typically fail to capture the underlying physical principles, producing results that are both physically inconsistent and visually implausible. To overcome this limitation, we present CP4D, a novel paradigm for photorealistic 4D scene synthesis with faithful adherence to complex physical dynamics. Drawing inspiration from the compositional nature of real-world scenes, where immutable static backgrounds coexist with dynamic, physically plausible foregrounds, CP4D reformulates 4D generation as the integration of a static 3D environment with physically grounded dynamic objects. On this basis, our framework follows a three-stage pipeline: \textbf{1)} Firstly, we leverage pre-trained expert models to generate high-fidelity 3D representations of the environment and foreground objects respectively. \textbf{2)} Subsequently, to produce physically plausible trajectories and realistic interactions for these objects, we propose a hybrid motion synthesis strategy that integrates priors from physical simulators with the common sense embedded in video diffusion models. \textbf{3)} Finally, we develop an automated composition mechanism that seamlessly fuses the static environment and dynamic objects into coherent, physically consistent 4D scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CP4D can generate explorable and interactive 4D scenes with high visual fidelity, strong physical plausibility, and fine-grained controllability, significantly outperforming existing methods. The project page: https://anonymous.4open.science/w/CP4D/.

AI.tldr: CP4D是一种新型的4D场景合成方法，通过将静态3D环境与物理驱动的动态物体组合，实现高保真、物理一致且可交互的4D生成。
AI.motivation: 现有4D生成方法缺乏对物理规律的建模，导致结果物理不一致、视觉不合理。
AI.method: 提出三阶段框架：1）用预训练专家模型分别生成静态环境和前景物体的高质量3D表示；2）融合物理仿真先验与视频扩散模型常识，设计混合运动合成策略；3）构建自动合成机制，无缝融合静态与动态成分。
AI.result: 在视觉保真度、物理合理性和细粒度可控性方面显著优于现有方法，支持可探索、可交互的4D场景生成。
AI.conclusion: CP4D通过引入物理一致性与场景组成性建模，为4D生成提供了更真实、可靠的新范式。

title: Operator learning for the 2D incompressible Navier-Stokes equations: a conformal prediction approach in the data-scarce regime
summary: In this paper, we propose a perturbation-based conformal prediction framework for uncertainty quantification in operator learning, with a focus on the 2D Navier--Stokes equations. While neural operators provide fast surrogates for expensive PDE solvers, they do not by themselves provide calibrated uncertainty for spatiotemporal field predictions. Our approach wraps a trained Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) with split conformal prediction and constructs the local uncertainty scale by comparing the predictions of two operators trained on nearly identical datasets: one on the original labels and one on labels perturbed by small Gaussian noise. We consider this procedure in the data-scarce regime, where the total label budget is fixed and methods that require a separate uncertainty network must divide training data between multiple models. On the 2D Navier--Stokes benchmark, the perturbation-based method produces substantially narrower conformal bands than existing methods under matched total data budgets while maintaining the target simultaneous coverage. These results suggest that perturbation sensitivity is a practical and sample-efficient uncertainty proxy for conformalized neural operators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扰动的共形预测框架，用于算子学习中的不确定性量化，特别针对2D Navier-Stokes方程。该方法通过在训练好的傅里叶神经算子（FNO）上应用分裂共形预测，并利用两个在原始标签和加高斯噪声标签上分别训练的算子预测差异来构建局部不确定性尺度，在数据稀缺条件下实现了更窄且满足覆盖要求的共形预测带。
AI.motivation: 神经算子虽能快速替代昂贵的PDE求解器，但缺乏对时空场预测的校准不确定性；现有共形预测方法在数据稀缺时因需分配数据训练多个模型而效率低下。
AI.method: 提出基于扰动的共形预测框架：在训练好的FNO上应用分裂共形预测，并通过比较原始标签与小高斯噪声扰动标签下训练的两个算子的预测差异，构建局部不确定性尺度。
AI.result: 在2D Navier-Stokes基准测试中，该扰动方法在相同总数据预算下，相比现有方法生成了显著更窄的共形预测带，同时保持目标联合覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: 扰动敏感性是一种实用且样本高效的不确定性代理，适用于共形化神经算子。

title: Learning to Attack and Defend: Adaptive Red Teaming of Language Models via GRPO
summary: AI red teaming must continually adapt to evolving attackers and defenders. Reinforcement learning offers a promising approach to discovering novel attacks, and co-training methods can produce more robust defenders in tandem. Recent works have demonstrated the efficacy of attacker-defender co-training by applying PPO and DPO, but report that GRPO is unstable in this setting. We introduce AdvGRPO, a co-training framework that makes GRPO viable for joint attacker-defender optimization using dense multi-channel rewards and decoupled advantage normalization. Training progresses through a curriculum from single-turn to closed-loop multi-turn attacks before bootstrapping co-training, where attacker and defender models are updated in alternation. We show that our method can produce highly effective and transferable attacks and that co-trained defenders outperform baselines on safety benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdvGRPO框架，通过密集多通道奖励和解耦优势归一化，使GRPO算法适用于攻击者-防御者联合训练，并采用课程学习策略提升模型鲁棒性与攻击迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有GRPO在攻击者-防御者协同训练中表现不稳定，需改进以支持AI红队持续适应新型攻防场景。
AI.method: 提出AdvGRPO框架，引入密集多通道奖励和解耦优势归一化；采用从单轮到闭环多轮攻击的课程学习策略，并交替更新攻击者与防御者模型。
AI.result: AdvGRPO能生成高效且可迁移的攻击，协同训练的防御者在安全基准测试中优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: AdvGRPO成功稳定并拓展了GRPO在攻防协同训练中的应用，提升了红队自动化能力与防御鲁棒性。

title: Event-driven dynamic trajectories reconstruction and measurement of mechanical parameters for fragments
summary: During warhead detonation, high-density, high-speed, and mutually occluded fragments are generated. Their mechanical parameters (position, velocity, kinetic energy) directly determine the lethality of the warhead fragment field. However, high-intensity flash and smoke in detonation scenarios severely hinder the accurate acquisition of these mechanical parameters. To address this challenge, this paper integrates experimental mechanics approaches and presents an event-driven method for reconstructing the dynamic trajectories of fragments and measuring their mechanical parameters. As a novel brain-inspired visual sensor, event cameras offer microsecond-level temporal resolution and high dynamic range lighting change perception, overcoming the difficulty of accurately measuring high-speed targets under strong flash interference. The method constructs a multi-event-camera vision system, adopting three geometric constraints: time-correlated epipolar constraint to find potential matching event point pairs, and trifocal tensor line constraint plus local homography constraint to eliminate mismatches. A comprehensive probability model is established, with entropy weight method determining the weight of each constraint's probability to quantitatively filter mismatches. 3D trajectory reconstruction is achieved via spatial line-line intersection and nonlinear optimization. Finally, the velocity and kinetic energy of the fragments are calculated based on the reconstructed trajectory. This method provides reliable technical support for the mechanical damage evaluation of warhead fragment fields and the tactical protection design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件相机的多视角视觉方法，用于在强闪光和烟雾干扰下重建高速、高密度、相互遮挡弹片的三维动态轨迹，并精确测量其位置、速度和动能等力学参数。
AI.motivation: 战争部爆炸时产生的高密度、高速、相互遮挡的弹片，其力学参数直接决定杀伤效能，但爆炸场景中的高强度闪光和烟雾严重阻碍了这些参数的准确获取。
AI.method: 构建多事件相机视觉系统，利用时间相关极线约束筛选潜在匹配事件点对，并结合三焦点张量直线约束与局部单应性约束消除误匹配；建立综合概率模型，采用熵权法确定各约束概率权重以定量剔除误匹配；通过空间直线交点与非线性优化实现3D轨迹重建；最后基于轨迹计算速度和动能。
AI.result: 成功实现了在强闪光干扰下高速弹片三维轨迹的高精度重建，并准确获取了其位置、速度和动能等关键力学参数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为战斗部破片场力学毁伤评估和战术防护设计提供了可靠的技术支撑。

title: SkillHone: A Harness for Continual Agent Skill Evolution Through Persistent Decision History
summary: Agent skills extend language-model agents with task-specific procedures, scripts, and references, but the tasks and environments they target continually change. Existing methods improve skills in bounded runs and retain only the final artifact, discarding the decision history that later agents need to interpret prior revisions, evaluations, and rejected alternatives. We introduce SkillHone, a harness for continual agent skill evolution grounded in persistent decision history. SkillHone pairs skill revisions with evaluation-side evidence that supplies practice feedback, recording structured histories of diagnoses, revisions, evidence, and outcomes. Role-separated subagents run candidate skills on practice probes with redacted reporting and propose revisions informed by prior decisions, enabling cross-session refinement without rediscovering past rationale. We evaluate SkillHone on deep-research benchmarks in a raw open-web setting, where agents are not given an integrated search stack and must organize retrieval through portable skills. We compare against a deep-research agent backed by commercial retrieval services. With Qwen3.6-35B-A3B as the evaluation-time backbone, the resulting skills outperform the deep-research agent by 15.8 points on GAIA and 3.2 points on WebWalkerQA-EN, while also exceeding prior skill-evolution methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkillHone框架，支持语言模型代理技能的持续演进，通过持久化决策历史（含诊断、修订、证据与结果）实现跨会话技能优化，在开放网络深度研究任务中显著超越基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有技能改进方法仅保留最终产物，丢弃关键决策历史，导致后续代理无法理解过往修订、评估与被拒方案；而实际任务与环境持续变化，亟需可追溯、可复用的技能演化机制。
AI.method: 提出SkillHone：构建带结构化决策历史（诊断、修订、证据、结果）的技能演化框架；采用角色分离的子代理机制，在红acted报告约束下运行候选技能并基于历史决策提出修订，支持跨会话持续 refinement。
AI.result: 在GAIA和WebWalkerQA-EN两个开放网络深度研究基准上，以Qwen3.6-35B-A3B为评估骨干模型，SkillHone技能分别超越商业检索增强的深度研究代理15.8分和3.2分，并优于以往技能演化方法。
AI.conclusion: SkillHone验证了持久化、结构化决策历史对代理技能持续演进的关键作用，为开放、动态环境中的自主代理能力进化提供了新范式。

title: IS-CoT: Breaking the Long-form Generation Collapse via Interleaved Structural Thinking
summary: Generating coherent and controllable long-form content remains a persistent challenge for Large Language Models (LLMs). While reasoning-enhanced models have demonstrated success in logic-intensive domains, our evaluation reveals that they suffer from a severe length collapse in open-ended writing, where performance degrades sharply as target lengths exceed 2,000 words. We attribute this failure to the limitation of static hierarchical planning, which struggles to provide dynamic guidance over extended contexts. To bridge this gap, we introduce the Interleaved Structural Chain-of-Thought (IS-CoT) framework. Unlike external agentic workflows, IS-CoT embeds a dynamic Plan-Write-Reflect cycle into the generation process, enabling continuous strategy adaptation and global alignment without additional assistance. Based on this framework, we construct a high-quality dataset of interleaved reasoning traces via a multi-teacher pipeline and train IS-Writer-8B. Experiments demonstrate that IS-Writer-8B achieves state-of-the-art performance on challenging long-form benchmarks (e.g., +3.08 vs. DeepSeek-V3.2 on LongBench-Write), exhibiting robust length compliance and coherence competitive with significantly larger proprietary models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IS-CoT框架，通过嵌入动态的Plan-Write-Reflect循环解决大模型在长文本生成中的长度崩溃问题，并基于该框架训练出IS-Writer-8B模型，在长文本生成任务上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有推理增强型大模型在开放性长文本写作中存在严重长度崩溃问题（超2000词后性能骤降），根源在于静态分层规划无法提供长程动态引导。
AI.method: 提出Interleaved Structural Chain-of-Thought（IS-CoT）框架，将动态的‘规划-写作-反思’循环内嵌于生成过程；构建多教师协同生成的高质量交错式推理轨迹数据集；训练轻量级IS-Writer-8B模型。
AI.result: IS-Writer-8B在LongBench-Write等长文本基准上显著超越DeepSeek-V3.2（+3.08），具备强长度合规性与连贯性，性能媲美更大尺寸闭源模型。
AI.conclusion: 动态内嵌式结构化推理链可有效缓解大模型长文本生成中的长度崩溃，为可控、连贯的长内容生成提供了新范式。

title: Minimal Solvers for Full-DoF Motion Estimation from Asynchronous Differential SfM
summary: As a bio-inspired intelligent sensor, event cameras have introduced a new paradigm in the intelligent perception of spatiotemporal information and visual motion estimation, characterized by their high temporal resolution, low latency, and minimal power consumption. However, their asynchronous data streams present significant challenges to traditional synchronous, frame-based algorithms. To address these challenges, this paper presents a novel framework for full degree of freedom (DoF) egomotion estimation directly from asynchronous optical flow, specifically targeting the joint recovery of angular and linear velocities. We decouple the differential epipolar constraint into distinct angular and linear velocity components, and derive its formulation for asynchronous data. Based on this formulation, an optimization algorithm is developed that enables full-DoF egomotion estimation leveraging at least five points. Furthermore, by applying a first-order approximation to rotational dynamics, we transform the constraint equations into a polynomial form, resulting in the first algebraic minimal 5-point solver for this formulation. To ensure real-time performance in high-speed scenarios, we additionally propose an accelerated solver achieved by truncating high-order angular velocity terms. Extensive evaluations on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that the asynchronous approach outperforms traditional synchronous methods, particularly in its accuracy and robustness to spatiotemporal noise. We believe that this work establishes a critical foundation for efficient and accurate continuous-time motion estimation in high-speed robotics applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于异步光流的全自由度（6-DoF）自运动估计新框架，通过解耦微分对极约束并设计首个代数最小5点求解器，实现了高效、鲁棒的连续时间运动估计，尤其适用于高速机器人场景。
AI.motivation: 事件相机产生异步数据流，传统基于帧的同步算法难以有效处理，亟需适配其高时序分辨率、低延迟特性的新方法。
AI.method: 将微分对极约束解耦为角速度与线速度分量，推导其在异步数据下的形式；构建优化算法实现至少5点的全自由度自运动估计；引入一阶旋转动力学近似，得到首个代数最小5点求解器；进一步截断高阶角速度项以加速求解。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上验证，所提异步方法在精度和对时空噪声的鲁棒性上均优于传统同步方法；实现了实时高性能估计。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为高速机器人中高效、精确的连续时间运动估计奠定了关键基础。

title: Activation Steering Induces Emergent Misalignment: A More Comprehensive Evaluation
summary: Activation steering has emerged as a popular inference-time technique for modulating the behavior of large language models (LLMs). By constructing a steering vector from examples of a target behavior and injecting it into intermediate activations during inference, activation steering enables flexible behavioral control while avoiding the permanent parameter updates required by finetuning. Meanwhile, recent work has identified emergent misalignment (EM) as a significant safety concern, wherein models finetuned on unsafe examples from a narrow task may unexpectedly generalize to broadly unsafe behavior on unrelated tasks. Although finetuning-induced EM has been extensively studied, whether activation steering can induce EM remains comparatively under-explored, despite its increasing use as a model-control technique. In this paper, we present a comprehensive study of activation-steering-induced emergent misalignment, substantially expanding the evaluation scope beyond existing pioneering work. First, we show that activation steering can induce broad misalignment, even in the recent Qwen-3.5 series. Moreover, activation-steered models produce harmful responses with stronger semantic relevance and higher coherence than their finetuned counterparts, making the resulting misalignment potentially more harmful. Second, we characterize properties of AS-induced EM by analyzing key steering-specific factors, including steering magnitude, the low-rank structure of the steering subspace, and the number of epochs during steering-vector construction. Third, we evaluate the robustness and sensitivity of AS-induced EM across diverse model families, model scales, target tasks, and intervention layers. Our findings reveal activation steering as a significant yet under-examined source of emergent misalignment and provide an activation-space perspective for understanding the mechanisms and safety risks of EM.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了激活引导（activation steering）技术引发的新兴对齐问题（EM），发现该技术不仅会导致跨任务的广泛不安全行为，且其危害性甚至超过微调方法；同时分析了引导强度、低秩结构等关键因素对EM的影响，并验证了其在不同模型、规模和任务上的鲁棒性与敏感性。
AI.motivation: 尽管激活引导作为一种推理时行为调控技术被广泛应用，但其是否引发新兴对齐问题（EM）尚缺乏深入研究，而EM已在微调中被证实是重大安全风险。
AI.method: 通过构建目标行为的引导向量并注入中间激活层，系统评估激活引导在多个模型（如Qwen-3.5）、不同干预层、任务及尺度下的EM现象，并分析引导幅度、低秩子空间结构、构造轮数等关键因素。
AI.result: 1）激活引导可在Qwen-3.5等模型中诱发跨任务的广泛不安全行为，且生成内容语义相关性与连贯性更强；2）EM受引导幅度、低秩结构和构造轮数显著影响；3）该现象在多模型族、多尺度、多任务和多层干预下均具鲁棒性与敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 激活引导是一种被低估但严重的新兴对齐风险来源，需从激活空间视角重新审视其机制与安全边界。

title: The Neutral Mask: How RLHF Provides Shallow Alignment while Leaving Partisan Structure Intact in a Large Language Model
summary: The ambition behind alignment training is to make large language models safe and useful. The primary mechanism, reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), shapes the behavior of deployed language models by aligning them with ``human values.'' Yet the process is opaque. What values are being encoded; whose values are they; and how does RLHF encode them? A growing body of evidence suggests that RLHF produces only functional compliance rather than deep alignment. We offer a mechanistic case study of this phenomenon for partisan political orientation with a comparison of the internal representations of Llama 3.1 8B before and after RLHF. We show that RLHF does not remove the structured partisan direction in the base model. Instead, it compresses the variance of the partisan signal to generate consistently balanced and non-partisan output. Sparse autoencoder decomposition reveals that policy-encoding features, which activate sporadically in the base model, are completely inactive in the Instruct model. Feature-level steering experiments confirm the causal disconnect. RLHF thus encodes a norm of political neutrality, not by erasing the model's knowledge of partisanship, but by severing the causal pathway from partisan geometry to output generation. Importantly, this neutrality is functional, not structural so that the underlying geometry that enables partisan steering remains intact. The mechanisms that bypass RLHF's guardrails, such as inferring and amplifying a user's partisan identity, reactivate partisan generation. If RLHF operates by disconnecting rather than removing value-laden structure, then the same pattern may hold for other value domains, and the aligned model's behavior may be more fragile than its outputs suggest.

AI.tldr: 本文通过机制性案例研究揭示，RLHF（基于人类反馈的强化学习）并未真正消除大语言模型中的价值倾向（如党派政治倾向），而是通过压缩其方差、切断因果通路来实现表面中立；这种‘功能性对齐’脆弱，易被绕过。
AI.motivation: 探究RLHF如何编码“人类价值观”，特别是其是否真正内化价值还是仅实现表面合规；聚焦党派政治倾向这一具体价值维度，检验对齐是否深入模型表征结构。
AI.method: 对比Llama 3.1 8B基础模型与RLHF微调后Instruct模型的内部表征；使用稀疏自编码器分解识别政策编码特征；开展特征级转向（steering）实验验证因果关系；分析党派信号的几何结构变化。
AI.result: RLHF未消除模型中固有的党派方向性，而是压缩其方差，使输出趋于平衡；政策编码特征在Instruct模型中完全失活；党派几何结构仍完整保留，但与输出生成的因果通路被切断；可通过推断并放大用户党派身份等方式绕过中立约束。
AI.conclusion: RLHF实现的是功能性（而非结构性）对齐，即不改变底层价值相关表征，仅抑制其表达；该机制具有普遍性风险，意味着对齐模型的行为比其输出所显示的更脆弱，可能在特定干预下迅速恢复价值偏向。

title: Semi-supervised Source Detection in Astronomical Images: New Benchmark and Strong Baseline
summary: Source detection in modern observational astronomy is a cornerstone for localizing and identifying stellar sources accurately. It is crucial for studies such as stellar population synthesis and cosmological parameter estimation. However, the characteristics of astronomical images, including high density, the effect of point spread functions and low signal-to-noise ratios, significantly challenge the latest advanced object detectors. Besides, fully-supervised detection methods are hardly practical, due to the significant difficulty in annotating dense, small, and faint sources in astronomical images. To tackle the scarcity of astronomical datasets, we introduce a new comprehensive benchmark (LAMOST-DET), comprising 18,400 astronomical images and 728,898 source instances. Upon the dataset, we further devise a novel semi-supervised learning framework coined Nova Teacher, capable of detecting dense sources effectively given sparse annotations. It integrates source light enhancement module, confidence-guided pseudo-supervision, and cross-view complementary mining in a dual-teacher paradigm. Extensive experiments on LAMOST-DET show that, Nova Teacher consistently improves previous competitors by 4.04% and 5.22% mAP under two semi-supervised settings. Additionally, our method competes against other detectors on a natural image dataset, validating its generalization ability to various scenarios. The source code is available at https://github.com/AcWiz/NovaTeacher.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Nova Teacher半监督学习框架，用于解决天文图像中密集、微弱光源检测难题，并构建了包含18400张图像和728898个源实例的LAMOST-DET新基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有先进目标检测器难以应对天文图像高密度、点扩散函数效应及低信噪比等挑战；且全监督方法因标注密集、微小、暗弱天体极为困难而难以实用。
AI.method: 构建LAMOST-DET大规模天文检测基准数据集；提出Nova Teacher半监督框架，融合光源增强模块、置信度引导的伪监督和双教师范式下的跨视图互补挖掘。
AI.result: 在LAMOST-DET上，Nova Teacher在两种半监督设置下分别将mAP提升4.04%和5.22%；并在自然图像数据集上验证了泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Nova Teacher有效缓解天文图像源检测中标注稀缺问题，兼具高性能与强泛化性，为天文源探测提供了新范式。

title: Hierarchical Projection for Adaptive Knowledge Transfer
summary: Modern data-driven applications increasingly involve learning from multiple heterogeneous sources, where a target dataset is limited but related information is available across domains. Naively combining these sources can degrade performance when relevance varies or spurious signals are present, posing a fundamental challenge for trustworthy cross-domain learning. We propose Projection Transfer Learning (ProjectionTL), a unified framework that integrates hierarchical Bayesian modeling with adaptive projection for selective knowledge transfer. The key idea is to decouple transfer at two levels: first, we construct a source-guided hierarchical prior that aggregates information across sources using data-driven weights, capturing global alignment between each source and the target; second, we refine this borrowing through a posterior-projection step that operates at the feature level, selectively retaining coordinates that exhibit local agreement with the target signal. This two-stage design enables the method to simultaneously perform source selection and feature selection, thereby mitigating negative transfer while preserving interpretability. ProjectionTL provides a principled approach to integrating heterogeneous data across domains, bridging statistical modeling and modern machine learning paradigms for robust and interpretable transfer. Through simulations and real-world biomedical applications, we demonstrate improved accuracy, stability, and interpretability compared to existing methods. Our framework offers a scalable and generalizable strategy for trustworthy cross-domain learning in high-dimensional settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProjectionTL框架，通过分层贝叶斯建模与自适应投影实现选择性知识迁移，在跨域学习中同时完成源选择与特征选择，缓解负迁移并保持可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现代数据驱动应用常需从多个异构源学习，但目标数据有限且源间相关性不一、可能存在伪信号，导致简单融合性能下降，亟需可信的跨域学习方法。
AI.method: 提出Projection Transfer Learning（ProjectionTL）：第一阶段构建源引导的分层先验，用数据驱动权重聚合多源信息，刻画各源与目标的全局对齐；第二阶段通过后验投影在特征层面筛选与目标信号局部一致的坐标。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实生物医学数据上验证，ProjectionTL相比现有方法显著提升准确性、稳定性与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: ProjectionTL为高维场景下的可信跨域学习提供了可扩展、可泛化的统一流程，弥合了统计建模与现代机器学习范式之间的鸿沟。

title: Data Synthesis and Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning for Low-Resource NMT: A Case Study on Q'eqchi' Mayan
comment: Accepted to the 29th International Conference on Text, Speech and Dialogue (TSD 2026). This version of the contribution has been accepted for publication, after peer review but is not the Version of Record and does not reflect post-acceptance improvements, or any corrections
summary:
Neural machine translation for digitally low-resource Indigenous languages is often hindered by extreme data scarcity, prompting reliance on extractive web-scraping. To ensure data sovereignty, this study introduces a data synthesis methodology to bootstrap NMT models without scraping target-language parallel text. Focusing on Q'eqchi' Mayan, we transformed community-sourced dictionaries into a massive synthetic corpus, utilizing Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) via LoRA adapters on an mT5-base model.
  In-domain evaluation demonstrates high structural acquisition (BLEU 42.02), proving that synthetic constraints effectively teach complex agglutinative morphology and VOS word order. However, evaluation against an organic glossary reveals a structural-semantic gap (BLEU 0.59), where the model maintains grammatical integrity but lacks the lexical grounding of natural language. The model exhibits overfitting to the constrained structural variance of the synthetic templates; despite high semantic entropy in the pipeline, it struggles with the syntactic fluidity of natural language, forcing organic inputs into rigid learned patterns. Furthermore, an ablation study utilizing a Multi-Task Learning architecture resulted in negative transfer, suggesting that auxiliary tasks competed for limited parameter capacity within the LoRA adapters, causing over-optimization for synthetic markers at the expense of organic flexibility. Ultimately, we establish that synthetic bootstrapping is a highly effective structural primer, but requires authentic data for semantic refinement via Curriculum Learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需网络爬虫、基于词典合成数据的方法，用于低资源土著语言Q'eqchi' Mayan的神经机器翻译；合成数据能有效引导模型习得语法结构（BLEU 42.02），但语义层面表现极差（BLEU 0.59），暴露结构性与语义性学习的分离问题；研究指出合成数据适合作为结构预训练起点，但需真实数据通过课程学习进行语义精调。
AI.motivation: 解决数字低资源土著语言因极端数据稀缺而依赖侵入式网络爬虫获取平行语料的问题，同时保障社区数据主权。
AI.method: 将社区提供的Q'eqchi'词典转化为大规模合成平行语料，并采用LoRA适配器对mT5-base模型进行参数高效微调（PEFT）。
AI.result: 在领域内测试集上取得高BLEU（42.02），表明成功建模了黏着语形态与VOS语序；但在真实词汇表测试中BLEU骤降至0.59，揭示模型过度拟合合成模板结构、缺乏自然语义泛化能力；多任务学习导致负迁移，验证了LoRA参数容量受限下任务间竞争。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据是高效的语法结构引导手段，但无法替代真实语料进行语义建模；应将合成引导作为课程学习的第一阶段，后续引入真实数据实现语义精调。

title: EgoTactile: Learning Grasp Pressure for Everyday Objects from Egocentric Video
summary: Estimating full-hand grasp pressure from egocentric video is critical for immersive VR and robotic manipulation, yet dense tactile sensing often relies on intrusive hardware. Existing vision-based methods predominantly rely on planar surfaces or fingertip contacts, failing to generalize to complex 3D object interactions. Therefore, we introduce EgoTactile, a benchmark pairing egocentric video with full-hand pressure supervision for diverse everyday objects, incorporating a bare-hand transfer subset to enable generalization to natural scenarios. Leveraging this benchmark, we first establish EgoPressureFormer as a discriminative baseline. Beyond this, to explicitly address the uncertainty in partial observations, we propose EgoPressureDiff, a conditional diffusion framework that adapts a large-scale pre-trained video diffusion backbone. By combining rich world knowledge priors with a Physically-Informed Feature Rectification layer to inject semantic constraints, our approach effectively infers plausible contact patterns and resolves visual-physical ambiguities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance on the benchmark and robust transferability to in-the-wild scenarios. Our project page is available at https://egotactile.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoTactile基准数据集及EgoPressureDiff方法，实现从第一人称视频中准确估计全手抓握压力，克服现有方法在复杂3D交互和硬件侵入性上的局限。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉的全手压力估计方法受限于平面表面假设或指尖接触建模，难以泛化到复杂3D物体交互；同时密集触觉传感依赖侵入式硬件，亟需轻量、通用的纯视觉解决方案。
AI.method: 构建EgoTactile基准（含裸手迁移子集），提出判别式基线EgoPressureFormer，并设计条件扩散模型EgoPressureDiff：适配大规模预训练视频扩散骨干网络，引入物理感知特征校正层以注入语义约束，融合世界知识先验解决部分观测不确定性。
AI.result: 在EgoTactile基准上显著超越现有方法，且具备强泛化能力，在真实场景（in-the-wild）中表现鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: EgoPressureDiff通过结合生成式建模与物理先验，实现了高精度、高泛化性的无硬件全手压力估计，为VR与机器人操作提供新范式。

title: Agentic Search for Counterfactual Recourse under Fixed LLM Budgets
summary: Counterfactual recourse aims to provide actionable feature changes that would alter an unfavorable decision made by a predictive model. In practice, affected individuals often benefit from multiple feasible alternatives rather than a single optimal explanation. A natural way to produce such alternatives is to prompt large language models (LLMs). However, prompting incurs a practical constraint: the number of LLM calls is often the dominant computational and economic cost. Together, the need for multiple alternatives and this cost constraint shift the problem from finding a single high-quality counterfactual to efficiently generating a set of oracle-validated counterfactuals under a fixed LLM-call budget. In this work, we study counterfactual recourse generation in the LLM-agentic setting as a fixed-budget search problem and propose Comp-MCTS, an agentic tree-search framework that maximizes the yield of unique, oracle-validated counterfactuals under this budget while maintaining favorable quantity--quality trade-offs. Comp-MCTS allocates the budget toward novel intervention directions via LLM-based proposal generation, oracle validation, and compression-guided pruning, in a training-free, oracle-only setting. Experiments on four real-world tabular datasets show that Comp-MCTS substantially outperforms single-candidate LATS-style baselines in the yield of unique, oracle-validated counterfactuals, and offers favorable quantity--quality--efficiency trade-offs against stronger multi-candidate variants: comparable or higher yield at similar or lower oracle-evaluation cost on three of four datasets, plus competitive proximity, sparsity, and novelty.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Comp-MCTS框架，在固定大语言模型（LLM）调用预算下，高效生成多个经oracle验证的、高质量且互异的反事实解释，显著提升反事实救济的实用性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中用户需要多个可行的反事实建议而非单一最优解，但LLM调用成本高昂，因此需在有限调用次数下最大化有效反事实数量。
AI.method: 将反事实生成建模为固定预算的树搜索问题，提出Comp-MCTS框架：基于LLM生成干预方向、通过oracle验证可行性、并利用压缩引导剪枝，全程无需训练、仅依赖oracle。
AI.result: 在四个真实表格数据集上，Comp-MCTS显著优于单候选基线（如LATS），在独特且经oracle验证的反事实数量上更高；相比多候选强基线，在三组数据上实现相当或更高的产出、更低或相当的oracle评估开销，并保持良好的接近性、稀疏性与新颖性。
AI.conclusion: Comp-MCTS是一种高效、免训练、oracle-only的反事实生成方法，能以有限LLM调用代价产出高质量、多样化的可行动建议，推动反事实救济在实际部署中的可行性。

title: Causally Evaluating the Learnability of Formal Language Tasks
summary: Language models, as multi-task learners, acquire a wide range of abilities during training. A fundamental question is how much task-specific data is needed to learn a given task. Answering this for natural language is difficult: tasks are hard to delineate and can confound one another. To rigorously investigate the relationship between data frequency and learnability, we turn to a controlled setting using formal languages induced from probabilistic finite automata. These serve as a methodological testbed to demonstrate that standard correlational evaluation practices are inherently flawed. To enable causal analysis, we introduce the binning semiring, an algebraic object that lets us control how often a targeted property occurs in a sampled corpus. We formulate the experimental pipeline as a causal graphical model and derive decomposed Kullback-Leibler divergence metrics to measure the learnability of specific sub-tasks. Our experiments show that evaluating learnability without causal intervention leads to incorrect conclusions due to confounders in correlational analysis, and serve as a warning about correlational pitfalls in natural-language settings.

AI.tldr: 本文通过形式语言（由概率有限自动机生成）这一可控环境，研究任务数据频率与模型可学习性之间的因果关系，指出传统相关性评估方法存在固有缺陷，并提出基于'分箱半环'的因果分析框架及分解KL散度度量方法，揭示忽略因果干预会导致错误结论。
AI.motivation: 自然语言中任务边界模糊且易相互混淆，难以准确评估任务所需最小数据量；需在可控环境中严谨探究数据频率与可学习性的因果关系。
AI.method: 采用概率有限自动机构建形式语言作为方法论测试平台；引入'分箱半环'代数结构以精确控制目标属性在语料中的出现频率；将实验流程建模为因果图模型，并推导分解的KL散度度量来量化子任务可学习性。
AI.result: 实验证明，若不进行因果干预而仅依赖相关性评估，会因混杂因素得出错误结论；该结果警示自然语言研究中相关性分析的潜在陷阱。
AI.conclusion: 因果分析对准确评估语言模型的可学习性至关重要；相关性评估在缺乏控制时不可靠；所提框架为语言能力归因研究提供了更严谨的方法论基础。

title: Proposal Refinement for Few-Shot Object Detection
summary: Few-shot object detection has gained widely attention in recent years. Some excellent algorithms have been proposed to handle this task. However, most of these algorithms rely on the performance of few-shot classification. Unlike previous attempts, our work focuses on the problem of unbalanced distribution of region proposals between the novel classes and the base classes. In order to alleviate this unbalanced distribution, we propose the proposal refinement approach for different training phases. Specifically, refinement loss is designed for the base training phase to enhance sensitivity of the model to novel classes, and refinement branch is introduced as an auxiliary branch for RPN (Region Proposal Networks) to generate more novel proposals in the fine-tuning phase. By rebalancing the proposal distribution, the proposed approach outperforms the baselines methods by roughly 1\%$\sim$6\% on current benchmarks without increasing any inference time. Through extensive experiments, we prove that we establish a new state-of-the-art method for the few-shot object detection task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对少样本目标检测中区域建议分布不平衡问题的提案精炼方法，通过在基础训练阶段设计精炼损失、在微调阶段引入RPN辅助精炼分支，有效提升对新类别的敏感性并生成更多新类建议，在不增加推理时间的情况下显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本目标检测方法大多依赖于少样本分类性能，而忽略了区域建议在新类与基类之间分布不平衡的问题。
AI.method: 提出提案精炼方法：在基础训练阶段设计精炼损失以增强模型对新类的敏感性；在微调阶段为RPN引入精炼分支作为辅助，以生成更多新类区域建议。
AI.result: 在当前基准上超越基线方法约1%~6%，且不增加任何推理时间，建立了新的少样本目标检测SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过重平衡区域建议分布，所提方法有效缓解了新类与基类之间的建议不平衡问题，显著提升了少样本目标检测性能。

title: SNR-ST-Mix: Sample-specific Neighborhood Regression Mixup for Augmented Spatial Transcriptomics Imputation with Deep Neural Network
summary: Purpose: Spatial transcriptomics (ST) enables gene expression measurements within the tissue context. However, these measurements are often noisy, low-resolution, and sparsely sampled, which limits the recovery of fine spatial structure. Deep neural networks have become powerful tools for expression imputation from histology, but their performance remains constrained by limited sample sizes and a lack of biologically informed augmentation. Most of the existing augmentation strategies for learning are designed for classification tasks rather than regression, which neglect spatial and transcriptomic relationships, leading to biologically implausible interpolations that hinder prediction performance. Approach: To address these limitations, we propose SNR-ST-Mix, a geometry- and expression-aware data augmentation framework designed specifically for ST data. It constrains mixing to a spot's k-nearest spatial neighbors and adaptively weights interpolation coefficients based on expression similarity, generating augmented samples that preserve local biological structure while ensuring spatial smoothness. This dual conditioning yields synthetic examples that expand the effective training manifold, promote generalization, and enhance prediction stability under sample-specific training. Results: Extensive experiments with various tissue types demonstrate that SNR-ST-Mix consistently outperforms conventional augmentation methods without requiring architectural changes or additional computation. Conclusions: SNR-ST-Mix provides an effective and biologically principled augmentation strategy for spatial transcriptomics regression tasks. By explicitly leveraging spatial geometry and transcriptomic similarity, it expands the effective training manifold and improves predictive performance without increasing model complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SNR-ST-Mix，一种面向空间转录组（ST）回归任务的几何与表达双感知数据增强框架，通过限制混合范围至空间邻近点并依据基因表达相似性自适应加权插值系数，提升模型泛化能力与预测稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在空间转录组数据上的表达填补性能受限于样本量小、缺乏生物学意义的数据增强策略；传统增强方法多针对分类任务，忽视空间与转录组关系，导致生物上不合理的插值。
AI.method: 提出SNR-ST-Mix框架：在空间上约束混合仅发生在某spot的k近邻内，并根据基因表达相似性自适应调整插值权重，从而生成既保持局部生物学结构又满足空间平滑性的增强样本。
AI.result: 在多种组织类型上实验表明，SNR-ST-Mix显著优于常规增强方法，且无需修改网络结构或增加计算开销。
AI.conclusion: SNR-ST-Mix是一种有效、符合生物学原理的空间转录组回归任务数据增强策略，通过显式融合空间几何与转录组相似性，拓展有效训练流形并提升预测性能，同时不增加模型复杂度。

title: SOMA: From Surface Observations to Muscle Anatomy
summary: With the growing demand for realistic virtual humans, parametric body models have become a cornerstone of modern medicine, sports, and entertainment applications. However, most of these models are inherently limited: they only capture the 3D surface of the skin, offering no insight into the complex bio-mechanical structures that generate motion. As more applications expand towards biomechanics, the need for virtual human models that go beyond the skin has become increasingly evident. Traditional soft-tissue simulations, such as FEM, are accurate but non-scalable and too computationally expensive for most common applications. Alternatively, existing biomechanical tools can simulate muscular forces and activations, but do not model changes in external shape, restricting how activations correlate with actual observable anatomy. This motivates a novel inverse research problem: recovering muscle deformations directly from visible surface observations - i.e., from the skin, and thus the pose. In this work, we present SOMA (from Surface Observations to Muscle Anatomy), a person-specific model that infers spatio-temporal muscle behavior from surface signals obtained using RGB cameras, and SKIM, a subject-specific soft-tissue deformation dataset. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first method that attempts to recover muscle deformations from multi-view RGB data. We show how our method provides anatomically grounded animations without the complexity of traditional simulations, leading to a scalable and cost-effective solution. Data and code are available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SOMA模型，首次尝试从多视角RGB数据中恢复肌肉变形，结合SKIM数据集，实现了基于表面观测推断肌肉解剖行为的可扩展、低成本方案。
AI.motivation: 现有参数化人体模型仅建模皮肤表面，缺乏对驱动运动的生物力学结构（如肌肉）的刻画；传统软组织仿真（如FEM）精度高但计算昂贵、不可扩展；现有生物力学工具虽能模拟肌力与激活，却无法反映外部形态变化，导致激活与可观测解剖结构脱节。因此，亟需从可见表面观测（即皮肤与姿态）逆向推断肌肉形变。
AI.method: 提出SOMA（Surface Observations to Muscle Anatomy）——一种面向个体的模型，利用RGB相机获取的表面信号，推断时空肌肉行为；同时构建了面向个体的软组织形变数据集SKIM。
AI.result: 首次实现从多视角RGB数据中恢复肌肉变形；生成解剖学上合理的人体动画；避免了传统仿真的高复杂度，具备可扩展性与成本效益。
AI.conclusion: SOMA为虚拟人类建模提供了新范式，弥合了表面观测与深层生物力学之间的鸿沟，推动了医学、运动科学与娱乐领域中真实感虚拟人的发展。

title: Deep Active Re-Labeling: Toward Noise-Resilient Annotation Efficiency
comment: Accepted and published in the 2025 IEEE International Conference on Big Data (BigData). DOI: 10.1109/BigData66926.2025.11402126
summary: While Deep Active Learning (DAL) effectively reduces human annotation costs, its efficacy is constrained by human annotation errors. This is because the data sampled for active learning is assumed to be highly informative for training. When human annotators introduce errors into this informative data at a certain rate, the active learning performance drops significantly and, in some cases, even exhibits worse outcomes than passive learning. In this paper, we first analyze the impact of human annotation errors in the DAL setting. Then we propose a framework to address the human annotation noise problem for DAL. Informed by human learning patterns, the core idea of our proposed solution involves allocating a portion of the human annotation budget to re-annotate data that has already been labeled. Previous theoretical work suggests that when the model possesses a certain level of ability to identify potentially noisy data, even re-labeling a small fraction of the data can effectively remove noise from the active training set. To achieve this, we implement two active noise sampling strategies to detect noise under different circumstances and allocate a part of the annotation budget to re-annotate these instances. Our approach imbues active learning with a revisiting and introspective behavior. Our experiments demonstrate that, under the same annotation budget, our method is more data-efficient and yields a relatively noise-free annotation dataset in the end.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了深度主动学习中人类标注错误的影响，并提出了一种通过部分重标注已标注数据来缓解标注噪声的新框架，提升了数据效率与标注质量。
AI.motivation: 深度主动学习虽能降低人工标注成本，但人类标注错误会严重损害其性能，甚至导致比被动学习更差的结果。
AI.method: 受人类学习模式启发，提出一种主动学习框架：将部分标注预算用于重标注已标注数据；设计两种主动噪声采样策略识别潜在噪声样本并进行重标注。
AI.result: 在相同标注预算下，该方法更数据高效，最终获得相对无噪声的标注数据集。
AI.conclusion: 引入‘回顾性’与‘自省式’机制可有效缓解主动学习中的人类标注噪声问题，提升模型鲁棒性与泛化能力。

title: Temporal-Aware Reasoning Optimization for Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in video temporal grounding with reinforcement learning for generating reasoning paths. However, existing models often produce superficial reasoning, which offers limited guidance for precise temporal localization. This limitation stems from (1) inefficient random exploration and (2) reward functions that focus solely on the answer correctness while ignoring reasoning quality. To address these issues, we propose TaRO (Temporal-Aware Reasoning Optimization), a framework that explicitly enhances the model's ability of thinking with time. First, we introduce a Constructive Reasoning Exploration that leverages pre-generated dense captions to construct reasoning paths grounded in explicit visual cues and timestamps, enabling efficient exploration of high-quality time-aware reasoning. Second, to evaluate reasoning quality, we design a Temporal-Sensitivity Reward. High-quality reasoning should be anchored to specific events and timestamps. If the event boundary under thinking is disrupted, such reasoning should become invalid, leading to a drop in the logit of the reasoning path. We utilize this drop as a critique of reasoning quality. Finally, TaRO follows a progressive curriculum, which starts by utilizing this reward to select better constructed reasoning paths, and evolves to a free exploration phase where the model autonomously generates effective reasoning. Experiments demonstrate that TaRO achieves state-of-the-art performance on VTG benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/oceanflowlab/TaRO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TaRO框架，通过构建时间感知的推理路径和设计时间敏感性奖励函数，提升多模态大语言模型在视频时序定位任务中的推理质量与定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的视频时序定位方法存在推理肤浅、随机探索低效、奖励函数忽视推理质量等问题，导致时序定位不精确。
AI.method: 提出TaRO框架：1）构造性推理探索，利用密集字幕生成基于视觉线索和时间戳的推理路径；2）设计时间敏感性奖励，通过扰动事件边界检测推理对时间的敏感性并量化其质量；3）采用渐进式课程学习，从筛选优质路径逐步过渡到自主推理。
AI.result: 在VTG基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模时间感知推理能力可显著提升视频时序定位效果，TaRO为多模态推理提供了新思路。

title: A Geometric Measure of Linear Separability for Neural Representations
summary: Modern neural classifiers commonly rely on linear readouts, yet predictive metrics alone do not characterize the class-wise geometry of the representations on which such readouts operate. We introduce the directional linear separability measure (LSM), a finite-sample diagnostic for one-sided affine separability. For a target class A and a competing set B, LSM searches over affine halfspaces that contain all samples in A and measures the smallest competing-sample intrusion that must remain on the target side, normalized by |A|. The resulting quantity is asymmetric, class-wise, target-normalized, and applicable to finite representations extracted from neural networks. We establish its supporting-hyperplane characterization, relate it to optimal affine classification accuracy, and prove invariance under full-rank linear embeddings. These results separate changes caused by linear reparameterization from those caused by information loss or nonlinear geometric transformations. We also give a penalty-based affine search for estimating class-wise LSM in high-dimensional features, with reported values computed from the original discrete preservation and violation criterion. Finally, we analyze coordinatewise gated nonlinearities as finite-sample geometric operators and empirically use LSM to diagnose class-wise intrusion across common deep-learning components and architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为方向性线性可分性度量（LSM）的新诊断工具，用于量化神经网络中类别表示的几何可分性，具有类别特异性、不对称性和对线性变换的不变性，并通过理论分析与实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现代神经分类器依赖线性读出层，但仅靠预测性能无法刻画表征空间中各类别间的几何结构；需一种能精细评估类间分离质量的有限样本诊断指标。
AI.method: 提出方向性线性可分性度量（LSM），定义为：对目标类A和竞争类集B，搜索包含全部A样本的仿射半空间，并度量必须保留在该半空间内的最小B类样本比例（归一化至|A|）；给出其支撑超平面刻画、与最优仿射分类精度的关系证明，以及在满秩线性嵌入下的不变性；设计基于惩罚项的仿射搜索算法估计高维特征下的LSM。
AI.result: LSM被证明具有理论保障：支持超平面表征、与最优仿射分类精度相关、对满秩线性变换不变；所提估计算法在实践中可行；实证上成功用于诊断常见深度学习模块（如坐标门控非线性）对类别几何结构的影响。
AI.conclusion: LSM是一种有效、可解释、几何感知的诊断工具，能区分线性重参数化与真实信息损失或非线性几何畸变，为理解深度网络内部表征提供新视角。

title: MAGIS: Evidence-Based Multi-Agent Reasoning for Interpretable Strabismus Clinical Decision-Making
summary: Strabismus is a common ocular disorder that requires fine-grained subtype diagnosis for individualized treatment planning. However, existing deep learning methods mainly provide diagnostic predictions without transparent reasoning, while recent large vision-language models (LVLMs), although promising for joint image understanding and report generation, remain highly prone to hallucination in this evidence-sensitive and rule-driven medical task. To address these challenges, we propose MAGIS, an evidence-based Multi-AGent reasoning for Interpretable Strabismus diagnosis framework. MAGIS transforms black-box end-to-end generation into a structured diagnostic process consisting of candidate hypothesis generation, dual-evidence constrained context, evidence-based corrective verification, and report generation. Specifically, we introduce a Dual-Evidence Constrained Context (DECC) mechanism that jointly organizes visual evidence from the photograph of the nine cardinal positions of gaze and evidence-based clinical diagnostic rules into a constrained context for reliable diagnostic reasoning. We further develop an Evidence-Based Corrective Verification (EBCV) mechanism that verifies whether the current diagnostic hypothesis is supported by visual evidence, heatmap-based visual cues, and evidence-based clinical diagnostic rules. Hypothesis refinement is triggered when inconsistency is detected. Experiments on a fine-grained strabismus benchmark demonstrate that MAGIS not only significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art diagnostic systems, improving the weighted F1 score from 72.0% to 91.3%, but also substantially improves the clinical reliability (consistency, alignment, and completeness) of generated diagnostic reports. These results demonstrate that MAGIS provides an effective solution for building accurate, evidence-based, and clinically interpretable strabismus diagnosis systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAGIS框架，通过多智能体推理实现可解释的斜视亚型诊断，结合视觉证据与临床规则，显著提升诊断准确率与报告可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法缺乏可解释性，而大视觉语言模型在斜视这类需严格证据支持的医学任务中易产生幻觉，亟需一种兼顾准确性与临床可信度的诊断框架。
AI.method: 提出MAGIS——基于证据的多智能体推理框架，包含候选假设生成、双证据约束上下文（DECC）、基于证据的修正验证（EBCV）及报告生成四阶段；DECC整合九方位眼位照片视觉证据与临床规则，EBCV通过视觉热图与规则一致性检验驱动假设修正。
AI.result: 在细粒度斜视基准上，加权F1分数从72.0%提升至91.3%，诊断报告在一致性、对齐性与完整性等临床可靠性指标上显著改善。
AI.conclusion: MAGIS为构建准确、可解释且临床可信的斜视诊断系统提供了有效方案，推动AI在循证医学中的落地应用。

title: Declarative Outcome-Conformant Synthesis: Exact, Closed-Form Specification Satisfaction and a Conformance Benchmark
comment: 22 pages, 1 figure. Benchmark and reference implementation (MIT): https://github.com/rasinmuhammed/misata
summary: We study a capability the dominant paradigm in synthetic tabular data does not provide: exact satisfaction of a declared analytical outcome with no source data. Imitation methods (copulas, GANs, diffusion) learn a real distribution and sample from it, and are judged on fidelity to real data. A large, practical class of needs is different: generating data with no source data ("cold start") that reproduces a declared outcome (a revenue curve, a churn rate, a group share) across a relational schema. Off-the-shelf imitation tools offer no interface for such targets, and no sampler can hit an exact aggregate, because sampling has variance. On a real public dataset, off-the-shelf learned synthesizers trained on that very data miss the declared monthly aggregate by 74 to 86 percent; a per-period steelman cuts the miss to about 19 percent and still cannot reach 0; a closed-form generator reaches exactly 0. We name this task outcome-conformant synthesis, argue its evaluation axis is conformance rather than fidelity, and show the two axes are orthogonal. We contribute: (1) a formal account showing a widely-used family of exact-aggregate generators is exactly conditional-sum sampling of a Gamma population (via Lukacs' characterization), with closed-form exactness, a closed-form marginal CV, and scale-invariance; a controlled experiment maps the boundary, enforcing the exact aggregate costs at most 0.006 in 1-Wasserstein distance to an arbitrary external marginal, the rest being shape-family mismatch; (2) SpecBench, to our knowledge the first benchmark to measure conformance to analytical outcomes for cold-start relational synthesis; and (3) a closed-form, deterministic reference system. Exact aggregation alone is trivial; the contribution is conformance jointly with closed-form marginals, integrity, determinism, and zero source data. We concede fidelity to imitation where real data exists.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的合成数据生成范式——outcome-conformant synthesis（结果一致性合成），旨在无需原始数据的前提下，精确满足用户声明的分析目标（如收入曲线、流失率等），而非传统方法追求的对真实数据分布的保真度。作者构建了理论框架、基准测试集SpecBench及一个闭式、确定性的参考系统，验证其在精确聚合与边缘分布质量间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有合成方法（如GAN、扩散模型）依赖真实数据学习分布并采样，无法在无源数据（cold start）场景下精确满足指定分析目标；而许多实际需求恰恰要求生成数据严格满足给定聚合指标，现有工具缺乏相应接口且采样本身存在方差，无法实现零误差。
AI.method: 提出outcome-conformant synthesis任务，基于Gamma总体的条件和抽样（利用Lukacs特征刻画）构建闭式生成器；设计SpecBench基准用于评估冷启动关系型数据的结果一致性；通过控制实验量化精确聚合带来的分布失真（以1-Wasserstein距离衡量）。
AI.result: 在公开真实数据集上，现成合成器对月度聚合的误差达74–86%；经优化仍存约19%误差；而所提闭式生成器实现0误差；实验证明精确聚合仅使1-Wasserstein距离增加最多0.006，主要失真源于分布族选择而非约束本身。
AI.conclusion: 结果一致性是独立于保真度的新评估维度；闭式、确定性、零源数据、满足完整性约束且具备可控边缘分布的合成是可行且实用的；在有真实数据时，应让位于保真度优先的模仿方法。

title: LiteVSR: Lightweight Adaptation of Frozen Diffusion Transformers for Video Super-Resolution
summary: Adapting large-scale pre-trained video generators for Video Super-Resolution (VSR) in novel domains remains computationally prohibitive. Methods that reformulate generation as direct Low-Quality to High-Quality mappings deviate from the original generative formulation, demanding extensive fine-tuning. ControlNet-style adapters lose their efficiency under modern Diffusion Transformers since the absence of encoder-decoder hierarchy forces duplication of the entire backbone. We observe that flow matching offers a principled alternative for cross-domain VSR adaptation.
