GD-MIL achieves C-index 0.704, significantly outperforming both the clinical baseline (delta-c = +0.029, p = 0.0005) and the best imaging-only model (delta-c = +0.062, p = 0.039), suggesting H&E morphology contains prognostic information complementary to grade. A median risk split yields log-rank p < 0.0001 separation in BCR-free survival (~20% vs ~70% at five years).

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个严格的基准测试，评估了H&E全切片图像（WSI）在前列腺癌根治术后生化复发（BCR）预测中的额外预后价值，并提出Grade-Disentangled MIL（GD-MIL）模型，在保持对Gleason分级不变性的同时融合临床变量，显著提升C-index至0.704。
AI.motivation: 探究H&E全切片图像是否携带超越Gleason分级的预后信息，以及多实例学习（MIL）能否有效提取该信号；同时解决现有方法因在验证集上选择模型检查点而导致性能虚高的问题。
AI.method: 在TCGA-PRAD数据集（487例患者，101例BCR事件）上采用五折交叉验证重复五次的严格外部评估框架；比较多种MIL聚合器与不同特征提取器（如ResNet50与病理基础模型）；提出GD-MIL——一种带梯度反转分级对抗模块的门控注意力MIL编码器，实现分级无关的表征学习并融合临床变量。
AI.result: 临床Cox模型（分级、分期、年龄）C-index为0.687；最佳影像模型仅达0.639，未显著超越临床模型；GD-MIL达0.704，显著优于临床基线（p=0.0005）及最佳影像模型（p=0.039）；中位风险分组显示BCR无复发生存显著分离（log-rank p<0.0001）。
AI.conclusion: H&E形态学图像确实包含独立于Gleason分级的预后信息，GD-MIL能有效解耦分级影响并提升BCR预测性能，为病理图像辅助精准预后提供新范式。

title: Heterophily-Aware Adaptive Knowledge Distillation for Hypergraph Neural Networks
summary: Hypergraph knowledge distillation aims to retain the predictive performance of a hypergraph neural network (HNN) teacher while reducing inference costs through a lightweight student model. In this work, we observe that HNNs exhibit substantially lower prediction performance on heterophilic nodes connected through semantically diverse hyperedges, indicating that the reliability of teacher knowledge varies across nodes. Motivated by this observation, we propose HADES, a heterophily-aware adaptive distillation method for hypergraph neural networks. HADES quantifies node heterophily and leverages it as an estimate of teacher reliability to modulate the transfer of teacher knowledge during distillation. Experimental results on real-world hypergraphs demonstrate that HADES consistently improves student performance across different HNN teachers and distillation objectives. In many cases, the resulting student models surpass the predictive performance of their teachers while achieving up to 12.3 times faster inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HADES方法，通过量化节点异质性来评估教师模型在超图神经网络知识蒸馏中的可靠性，并据此调节知识迁移过程，从而提升学生模型性能并加速推理。
AI.motivation: 观察到超图神经网络（HNN）在语义多样超边连接的异质性节点上预测性能显著下降，表明教师知识的可靠性存在节点级差异。
AI.method: 提出异质性感知自适应蒸馏方法HADES，利用节点异质性作为教师可靠性估计，动态调节知识蒸馏过程。
AI.result: 在真实超图数据集上实验表明，HADES能持续提升不同HNN教师和蒸馏目标下的学生性能；部分学生模型甚至超越教师性能，且推理速度最高提升12.3倍。
AI.conclusion: HADES通过建模教师知识的节点级可靠性，有效提升了超图知识蒸馏的效果与效率，为异质性超图学习提供了新思路。

title: Training-Free Generalized Few-Shot Segmentation through Open-Vocabulary Semantic Arbitration
summary: Generalized Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation (GFSS) has traditionally been approached as a representation-learning problem, requiring task-specific adaptation to incorporate novel classes from limited support examples. Recent foundation models, however, already exhibit strong open-vocabulary recognition and segmentation capabilities, raising a different question: can GFSS be solved through inference-time coordination of frozen semantic priors rather than parameter adaptation? We answer this question with Open-V, a training-free GFSS framework that combines Segment Anything (SAM3) Promptable Concept Segmentation (PCS) with a K-shot CLIP support centroid through calibrated per-pixel semantic arbitration. OpenV introduces no trainable components and supports arbitrary semantic categories at inference time. Beyond segmentation performance, our study contributes three broader findings. First, we show that support information can be incorporated through inference-time semantic grounding, and that its contribution increases as foundation-model text priors weaken on label-disjoint vocabularies. Second, we identify a reproducibility confound in foundationmodel segmentation, demonstrating that preprocessing and evaluation-space mismatches can silently distort reported performance. Finally, we validate Open-V across PASCAL5i, COCO-20i, and ADE-OW, showing that training-free coordination of foundation-model priors generalizes across both conventional GFSS and open-vocabulary evaluation settings. On PASCAL-5i (1-shot), Open-V attains base/novel/harmonic mIoU of 78.4/77.5/77.9, without GFSS-specific training surpassing the strongest trained baseline by +17.7 HM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Open-V，一种无需训练的广义少样本语义分割（GFSS）框架，通过冻结的基础模型（SAM3和CLIP）在推理时协调语义先验，实现零训练、开词汇、任意类别支持，并在多个数据集上显著超越有训练基线。
AI.motivation: 传统GFSS依赖任务特定参数适配，而现有基础模型已具备强开放词汇能力，作者探索能否仅通过推理时协调冻结语义先验而非参数更新来解决GFSS。
AI.method: Open-V融合SAM3的可提示概念分割（PCS）与K-shot CLIP支持样本质心，通过校准的逐像素语义仲裁实现无训练推理；不引入任何可训练组件。
AI.result: 在PASCAL-5i 1-shot上达base/novel/harmonic mIoU为78.4/77.5/77.9，HM指标较最强有训练基线提升+17.7；并在COCO-20i、ADE-OW上验证泛化性；同时揭示预处理与评估空间错位对性能评估的影响。
AI.conclusion: GFSS可通过纯推理时语义先验协调高效解决，无需训练；支持开词汇与任意类别；该范式不仅提升性能，还揭示了基础模型分割中影响可复现性的关键实践问题。

title: Beyond Neural Collapse: Task-Intrinsic Geometry Governs Neural Representations in Modular Arithmetic
summary: While neural collapse (NC) predicts that a $K$-class-balanced classifier should organize terminal representations as a $(K-1)$-dimensional simplex equiangular tight frame (ETF), modular addition consistently enters a different regime: networks compress to a two-dimensional cyclic geometry in which both classifier weights and token embeddings lie on circles. We refine the explanation of this phenomenon in three directions. First, we formalize a layerwise non-uniform training mechanism: downstream classifier weights are driven by dense cross-entropy gradients into a rank-2 equiangular configuration before upstream embeddings fully reorganize, and once this classifier plane forms, backpropagated feature gradients constrain embedding motion to the same plane while weight decay suppresses orthogonal components. Second, after this subspace locking, the induced in-plane dynamics admit an entropy-regularized transport interpretation on $S^1$; combined with modular-addition labels, this reduces embedding formation to phase alignment, whose minimizers are single-frequency characters of $\mathbb{Z}/P\mathbb{Z}$ and hence equal-angle points on a circle. Third, we quantify why this solution prevails over NC: a simplex ETF gains only an $O(1)$ advantage in cross-entropy, whereas the cyclic rank-2 solution enjoys a $Θ(K)$ advantage under Schatten or weight-decay surrogates, yielding a critical threshold $λ_{\mathrm{crit}} = Θ(1/K)$. Our results explain both why classifier weights move first and why embeddings subsequently align with them, showing that grokking on modular arithmetic is governed not by maximal separation alone but by a task-structured trade-off between separation, symmetry, and complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了神经坍缩（NC）理论在模加法任务中的失效现象，发现模型会形成二维循环几何结构而非NC预测的单纯形ETF结构，并从分层非均匀训练机制、熵正则化传输解释和损失优势量化三方面给出新解释。
AI.motivation: 神经坍缩理论预测K类平衡分类器应使表征形成(K−1)维单形ETF结构，但在模加法任务中观察到模型收敛至二维循环几何（权值与嵌入均落在圆上），需深入解释该偏离现象。
AI.method: 1）提出分层非均匀训练机制：下游分类器权值先由交叉熵梯度驱动形成秩-2等角构型，进而约束上游嵌入运动于同一平面；2）将子空间锁定后的平面动力学建模为S¹上的熵正则化传输问题，结合模加法标签导出相位对齐机制；3）量化比较循环秩-2解与单纯形ETF在Schatten范数或权重衰减代理损失下的优势，推导临界正则化强度λ_crit = Θ(1/K)。
AI.result: 揭示模加法grokking中分类器权值先演化、嵌入后对齐的因果机制；证明循环解因具有Θ(K)级损失优势而主导训练动态；指出grokking本质是任务结构驱动的分离性、对称性与复杂性三者权衡。
AI.conclusion: 模加法任务中的表征几何由任务固有对称性主导，神经坍缩并非普适规律；grokking源于特定任务下优化目标的结构性偏好，需超越最大分离假设，纳入对称性与正则化强度的联合分析。

title: Efficient Minimal Solvers for Visual-Inertial Relative Pose Estimation in Multi-Camera Systems
summary: Estimating the relative poses of multi-camera systems is a fundamental problem in computer vision, with critical applications in autonomous vehicles, mobile devices, and unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). However, existing solutions often suffer from high computational complexity or rely on an excessive number of point correspondences, limiting their real-world applicability. To address these limitations, we propose two efficient minimal solvers for estimating the relative poses of multi-camera systems using a novel parameterization. The first solver leverages the vertical direction prior provided by Inertial Measurement Units (IMUs), while the second utilizes the rotation axis direction prior from IMUs. Our methods require only four point correspondences and reduce the problem of multi-camera relative pose estimation to solving a univariate 6th-degree polynomial, a significant improvement over existing approaches, which typically involve 8th-degree polynomials. This reduction in computational complexity and correspondence requirements makes our solvers particularly effective when integrated into RANSAC frameworks, demonstrating strong potential for visual odometry applications. Through rigorous evaluations on synthetic data and the KITTI benchmark, our methods achieved superior computational efficiency and competitive accuracy compared to state-of-the-art algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种基于IMU先验信息的高效最小解法，用于多相机系统相对位姿估计，仅需4个点对应关系，并将问题简化为求解一元6次多项式，显著降低了计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法计算复杂度高或依赖过多点对应关系，限制了其在实际场景（如自动驾驶、无人机）中的应用。
AI.method: 提出两种基于IMU提供的垂直方向先验和旋转轴方向先验的新型参数化最小解法，将多相机相对位姿估计简化为求解一元6次多项式。
AI.result: 在合成数据和KITTI数据集上验证，所提方法在计算效率上优于现有方法，同时保持有竞争力的精度。
AI.conclusion: 所提最小解法在降低计算复杂度与点对应需求方面效果显著，适用于RANSAC框架和视觉里程计等实时应用。

title: LEAF: A Learning-Enabled ADMM Framework for Accelerated Convex Optimization
summary: We propose LEAF, a learning-enabled ADMM framework for accelerated convex optimization. The key idea is to approximate the Moreau envelope of the objective function using an Input Convex Neural Network (ICNN), resulting in a learned model that preserves convexity and smoothness. This leads to the proposed Moreau Envelope Learning ADMM (MEL-ADMM) and its splitting variant sMEL-ADMM. Unlike existing approaches that learn high-dimensional operators directly, LEAF learns a scalar-valued Moreau envelope, significantly reducing model complexity and improving data efficiency. The framework accommodates a broad class of convex problems with smooth and non-smooth objectives. By embedding convexity explicitly through the ICNN architecture, the proposed approach maintains high approximation accuracy while preserving key structural properties of the optimization problem. Both MEL-ADMM and sMEL-ADMM are developed with theoretical guarantees of convergence and feasibility under the learned model. Rigorous analysis shows that the proposed methods achieve convergence rates comparable to classical ADMM while reducing per-iteration computational cost. Numerical experiments demonstrate up to an order-of-magnitude speedup over state-of-the-art solvers while maintaining low optimality gaps

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEAF，一种基于学习的ADMM框架，通过ICNN近似目标函数的Moreau包络，构建保持凸性和光滑性的学习模型（MEL-ADMM及其分裂变体sMEL-ADMM），显著降低模型复杂度与数据需求，并具备理论收敛保证和实际加速效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接学习高维算子，模型复杂、数据效率低；而凸优化中需兼顾结构保持与加速性能，亟需一种既能保证凸性又高效的学习框架。
AI.method: 利用输入凸神经网络（ICNN）显式建模Moreau包络，构造凸且光滑的标量学习模型，进而设计MEL-ADMM与sMEL-ADMM算法，并提供收敛性与可行性理论分析。
AI.result: 所提方法在理论层面达到与经典ADMM相当的收敛速率，同时显著降低单次迭代计算开销；实验显示相较前沿求解器提速达一个数量级，且维持较低最优性间隙。
AI.conclusion: LEAF框架成功将深度学习与凸优化结构先验融合，在保证理论严谨性的同时实现显著加速，为学习型优化器的设计提供了新范式。

title: Optical Music Recognition for Real-World Manuscripts with Synthetic Data
comment: Accepted for publication at the ICDAR 2026 conference
summary: Optical Music Recognition (OMR) has seen major progress in model design, with end-to-end methods now capable of recognising notation at all levels of complexity. However, the impact of this progress has been limited by the visual domains of available training datasets, which are largely born-digital. Existing large collections of sheet music in libraries and other heritage institutions contain predominantly manuscripts, whose visual domains are highly diverse and different, so existing OMR systems fail when applied in the real world. These institutions are often resource-constrained, so large in-domain datasets cannot be expected. We provide a first baseline on real-world manuscripts with complex piano notation in the resource-constrained scenario. Using fine-grained music notation graph (MuNG) annotations and the Smashcima synthesis tool, we then show that while some direct transcriptions of in-domain data remain essential, domain adaptation using synthetic musical manuscript images brings significant improvement. Furthermore, the symbols used do not need to be in-domain, so the expensive fine-grained annotation can be avoided. We thus bring OMR closer to one of its stated goals: preserving and promoting musical cultural heritage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在资源受限场景下，利用合成手写乐谱图像进行领域自适应的方法，显著提升了光学乐谱识别（OMR）系统在真实世界手稿上的性能，无需昂贵的细粒度标注，推动音乐文化遗产保护。
AI.motivation: 现有OMR系统在真实世界手写乐谱（尤其是图书馆等遗产机构中大量存在的、视觉域高度多样且与数字乐谱差异大的手稿）上表现差，而这些机构往往缺乏资源构建大规模领域内训练数据。
AI.method: 基于细粒度音乐符号图（MuNG）标注和Smashcima合成工具，结合少量真实手稿直接转录与合成手写乐谱图像的领域自适应方法；验证了使用非领域内符号合成图像的有效性，从而规避高成本细粒度标注。
AI.result: 在真实复杂钢琴手稿上建立了首个资源受限场景下的基线；证明合成手稿图像的领域自适应能显著提升性能；且合成所用符号无需来自目标领域。
AI.conclusion: 该工作使OMR更接近其核心目标之一——保护与推广音乐文化遗产，尤其适用于资源受限的真实应用场景。

title: Understanding Quantization-Aware Training: Gradients at Quantized Weights Bias to the Low-Loss Basin
summary: Post-training quantization (PTQ) converts a trained full-precision model into low-bit weights without task-level retraining, while quantization-aware training (QAT) incorporates quantization into the training loop. Although PTQ is efficient and often accurate at moderate bitwidths, it can fail sharply at aggressive bitwidths; QAT is more expensive but can often recover the lost accuracy. We propose a unified geometric framework that explains both PTQ failure and QAT recovery. We model full-precision training as following a low-loss \emph{river} inside a wider \emph{valley}: a normal neighborhood of the river forms a nearly flat \emph{basin}, while leaving this basin incurs a sharp loss increase. When the quantization grid is comparable to the basin width, local PTQ objectives, including rounding and Hessian-based second-order reconstruction, can select a high-loss deployed quantized point outside the basin even when nearby low-loss quantized points exist. In this regime, straight-through-estimator-based QAT has a useful bias: it evaluates gradients at the deployed quantized weights while updating latent full-precision weights, causing the gradient to sense the valley wall and acquire an inward component that steers subsequent quantized iterates back into the basin. We formalize this mechanism through a local landscape model, construct a geometric PTQ failure mode, and prove finite-time QAT recovery under local quantizer-compatibility assumptions. Experiments across vision and language models under multiple neural-network quantization schemes corroborate the predicted basin-crossing failure of PTQ and the corresponding recovery mechanism of QAT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的几何框架，解释了后训练量化（PTQ）在低比特下的失效原因及量化感知训练（QAT）如何恢复精度：PTQ可能因量化网格过粗而跳出低损失‘盆地’，而QAT借助直通估计器的梯度偏置将量化权重拉回盆地内。
AI.motivation: PTQ在低比特下常失效，QAT虽有效但开销大；需从几何视角统一理解其失效与恢复机制。
AI.method: 构建基于‘河流-山谷-盆地’类比的局部损失景观模型，形式化PTQ的盆地穿越失效模式，并在量化器兼容性假设下证明QAT可有限时间内恢复。
AI.result: 理论证明QAT在局部条件下可实现有限时间恢复；实验在多个视觉与语言模型及量化方案中验证了PTQ的盆地穿越失效与QAT的恢复机制。
AI.conclusion: PTQ失效源于量化网格与损失盆地宽度不匹配导致跳出低损区域，而QAT通过STE引入朝向山谷内壁的梯度分量实现恢复，该几何视角为量化方法设计提供了新指导。

title: ContextShift: A Controlled Benchmark for Context Dependence in Object Detection
summary: Modern object detectors achieve strong performance on standard benchmarks, yet their robustness to contextual variation remains insufficiently understood. Prior evaluations largely rely on aggregate metrics such as AP on uncontrolled distribution shifts, which can obscure how performance degrades under context change. We introduce ContextShift, a controlled benchmark that systematically manipulates object--context relationships while preserving object appearance. Built on COCO 2017, it isolates context as an independent variable through geometric transformations and synthetic and natural background substitutions, including a continuous compatibility axis based on normalized pointwise mutual information (NPMI). Across diverse detector architectures, we observe a consistent degradation pattern: false negatives increase by up to 227% and prediction volume decreases by up to 44%, while false positives remain stable or decline. This suppression behavior is not captured by aggregate metrics such as AP, which can mask substantial recall loss and changes in prediction dynamics. Further analysis suggests that degradation is driven less by reduced confidence than by a reduced formation of valid detection candidates. Moreover, performance along the statistical compatibility axis is non-monotonic, peaking at intermediate NPMI and degrading toward both extremes, indicating that statistical co-occurrence does not correlate linearly with effective visual context. Finally, we show that context-aware augmentation improves robustness: every augmented variant outperforms the dataset-only baseline on both original and manipulated test images, partially recovering performance lost to prediction-suppression failures by exposing models to object--context decoupling during training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ContextShift基准，系统性地操控物体-上下文关系以评估检测器对上下文变化的鲁棒性，发现现有检测器在上下文失配时显著出现预测抑制现象（召回率大幅下降、预测数量减少），且该现象无法被AP等聚合指标反映；进一步分析揭示性能退化主因是有效检测候选框生成减少而非置信度降低，并发现统计兼容性（NPMI）与性能呈非单调关系；最后验证上下文感知数据增强可提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现代目标检测器在标准基准上性能优异，但其对上下文变化的鲁棒性尚缺乏深入理解；已有评估方法多依赖于未加控制的分布偏移下的聚合指标（如AP），易掩盖上下文变化导致的具体性能退化模式。
AI.method: 构建了可控基准ContextShift，基于COCO 2017，通过几何变换和合成/自然背景替换系统操纵物体-上下文关系，引入基于归一化点互信息（NPMI）的连续兼容性轴以量化上下文匹配程度；在多种检测器上进行系统评估，并结合候选框生成、置信度分布及NPMI相关性分析探究退化机制；最后探索上下文感知数据增强对鲁棒性的提升效果。
AI.result: 检测器在上下文失配时呈现一致的‘预测抑制’行为：漏检率最高上升227%，预测框总数最多下降44%，而误检率稳定或下降；该现象被AP等聚合指标掩盖；退化主因是有效检测候选框生成减少而非置信度降低；性能随NPMI呈非单调变化，峰值出现在中等兼容性处；上下文感知增强能显著提升原始与操纵图像上的检测鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 上下文鲁棒性是当前检测器的关键短板，需超越AP等聚合指标，采用可控基准（如ContextShift）进行细粒度诊断；检测器对上下文高度敏感且机制复杂（非线性、候选驱动）；上下文解耦的数据增强是提升鲁棒性的有效途径。

title: Structural Grid Descriptors Predict Within-Task Solver Success on ARC-AGI
summary: We ask whether structural properties of intermediate grid states predict whether a symbolic ARC-AGI solver will succeed, framed as a test of conditional mutual information I(X;Y|task) > 0. Across 44,800 runs spanning two architecturally distinct solvers (beam search and Stochastic DFS), 400 ARC tasks, 28 configurations per solver, and both training and evaluation splits, hand-crafted grid descriptors measured at 50% trajectory completion discriminate successful from failed runs within the same task (mean within-task best-feature AUC = 0.885, p < 0.001 under within-task label permutation). Most predictive content lies along a single grid-complexity axis. The result generalizes across solver architectures: a feature selected on one solver predicts success on the other with AUC 0.747-0.762 in all four transfer directions (p < 0.001, leakage controlled). On a pre-registered held-out set of 41 reliable tasks, the frozen feature n_components_final achieves AUC = 0.765 (95% CI [0.717, 0.810], p < 0.001), robust under task-clustered bootstrap resampling and cross-solver task collapsing. The signal is not explained by solver capacity (configuration-residualized AUC = 0.927 and 0.896 for beam search and SDFS, p < 0.001) and is only weakly coupled to score trajectories (R^2 approximately 0). Early stopping at 50% completion reduces beam-search compute by 33.6% while retaining 98.9% of solves; degenerate-trajectory detection reduces SDFS compute by 65.3% with no solve loss. Finally, on 229 of 400 evaluation tasks the DSL primitive library produces no valid transition from the input grid. This 0-step collapse is invariant to search budget and universally failed by beam search, indicating a DSL coverage limitation rather than a search-budget effect.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了ARC-AGI求解器在中间网格状态下的结构特性是否能预测其求解成功与否，发现网格复杂度是关键预测因子，且该信号跨不同求解器架构具有泛化能力，并可用于显著降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 探究中间网格状态的结构性质能否预测符号化ARC-AGI求解器的成功率，以理解求解过程中的内在规律并提升效率。
AI.method: 在44800次运行中，使用手制网格描述符（在50%轨迹完成时测量），评估两个不同架构求解器（beam search与Stochastic DFS）在400个ARC任务上的表现；采用条件互信息框架、AUC评估、跨求解器特征迁移、预注册验证及消融分析等方法。
AI.result: 网格复杂度轴最能区分成功与失败；单个冻结特征n_components_final在41个预留任务上AUC达0.765；早期停止和退化轨迹检测分别降低beam search和SDFS计算量33.6%与65.3%，几乎不损失求解率；229个任务存在DSL原语库无法生成有效转移的0步崩溃现象。
AI.conclusion: 中间网格状态的结构特性（尤其复杂度）是求解成功率的强预测信号，具备跨架构泛化性与实用优化潜力，同时揭示了DSL覆盖能力的瓶颈。

title: Prisma-World: Camera-Controllable Multi-Agent Video World Model
summary: Video world models have made rapid progress in generating controllable visual experiences, but most of them still simulate the world from a single observer. Extending such models to multiple agents raises a central challenge: if each agent's future state is generated independently, overlapping views may instantiate different versions of the same scene, leading to inconsistent objects, layouts, and appearances across agents. Conventional camera conditioning controls individual trajectories, but it does not explicitly couple the generation of views that should agree under shared scene geometry. We introduce Prisma-World, a camera-controllable multi-agent world model that formulates multi-agent generation as a joint geometry-aware denoising process for cross-view consistency. Prisma-World processes all agent videos within one full-attention sequence, uses a multi-agent RoPE design to distinguish agent identities while preserving synchronized temporal coordinates, and injects relative camera geometry into attention to bias overlapping viewpoints toward shared scene evidence. To further strengthen multi-view consistency and enhance global spatial perception, we augment our framework with an overlap-decaying curriculum training paradigm alongside minimap-conditioned structural guidance. To facilitate the training and evaluation of multi-agent models, we introduce PrismaDataset, a large-scale UE5 dataset with panoramic acquisition across diverse scenes, composable multi-agent view groups with flexible agent counts and complex camera trajectories, and precise camera/action annotations for consistency training and evaluation. Experiments show that a single Prisma-World model can generate high-fidelity multi-agent videos with flexible agent numbers, camera controllability, improved cross-view consistency, and spatial grounding under minimap guidance.

AI.tldr: Prisma-World 是一种面向多智能体的视频世界模型，通过联合几何感知去噪、全注意力序列建模、多智能体RoPE设计及相对相机几何注入，实现跨视角一致性；配合重叠衰减课程学习与最小地图引导，显著提升多视角一致性和空间感知能力，并依托新构建的大规模UE5数据集PrismaDataset进行训练与评估。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型多为单观察者建模，扩展至多智能体时易因独立生成导致各视角间场景对象、布局和外观不一致；传统相机条件控制无法显式耦合共享几何约束下的多视角生成。
AI.method: 提出Prisma-World：1）将多智能体生成建模为联合几何感知去噪过程；2）在统一全注意力序列中处理所有智能体视频；3）采用多智能体RoPE编码以区分身份并保持时间同步；4）在注意力中注入相对相机几何信息；5）引入重叠衰减课程学习与最小地图结构化引导；6）构建PrismaDataset数据集支持训练与评估。
AI.result: 单个Prisma-World模型可生成高保真、智能体数量灵活、相机可控、跨视角一致性增强且具备最小地图空间定位能力的多智能体视频。
AI.conclusion: Prisma-World 通过几何感知的联合建模与结构化训练策略，有效解决了多智能体视频世界模型中的跨视角不一致问题，为具身智能与协同仿真提供了更可靠的基础模型。

title: TRIAGE: Dialectical Reasoning for Explainable Risk Prediction on Irregularly Sampled Medical Time Series with LLMs
summary: Clinical early warning systems built on electronic health records, in which clinical observations are recorded as irregularly sampled medical time series (ISMTS), must deliver both calibrated risk scores for patient triage and interpretable rationales that clinicians can verify. Large Language Models (LLMs) have been explored for this task, yet they collapse graded clinical risk into overconfident binary predictions. This risk polarization undermines both calibration and cross-patient comparability. To address this, we propose TRIAGE, a framework that trains an LLM to generate dialectical reasoning over competing clinical outcomes by eliciting outcome-specific rationales. This dialectical formulation mitigates risk polarization, enabling a single LLM to yield continuous risk scores grounded in explicit clinical reasoning. Evaluated on three ISMTS benchmarks, TRIAGE achieves an average AUPRC improvement of 3.3% and reduces calibration error by 81% compared to the competitive baselines. An LLM-as-a-judge assessment further shows that our rationales surpass post-hoc explanations from the baseline by 20% in clinical reasoning quality. The source code is available at https://github.com/HyeongWon-Jang/TRIAGE .

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRIAGE框架，利用大语言模型（LLM）生成针对不同临床结局的辩证式推理与特异性理由，以缓解风险极化问题，从而提升早期预警系统的风险评分校准性、可比性与可解释性。实验表明其在多个指标上显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于电子健康记录的临床早期预警系统中，大语言模型常将连续临床风险压缩为过度自信的二元预测，导致风险极化，损害预测校准性和跨患者可比性。
AI.method: 提出TRIAGE框架，训练LLM生成针对竞争性临床结局的辩证推理，并输出结局特异性的理由，从而支持连续、可解释的风险评分生成。
AI.result: 在三个不规则采样医学时间序列（ISMTS）基准上，TRIAGE平均AUPRC提升3.3%，校准误差降低81%；LLM-as-a-judge评估显示其理由在临床推理质量上比基线后验解释高20%。
AI.conclusion: TRIAGE通过辩证式推理机制有效缓解LLM在临床预警中的风险极化问题，兼顾风险评分的校准性、连续性和可解释性，为可信临床AI提供了新范式。

title: Securing Self-supervised Data Curation for Foundation Models Robustness
summary: Self-supervised data curation provides a pathway to scaling and improving the generalization capabilities of machine learning models. By leveraging self-supervised learning (SSL) for data curation, the demand for massive training datasets required by foundation models can be effectively met. SSL greatly alleviates the costs associated with annotation and manual dataset curation while minimizing the need for human oversight. However, the integrity of SSL-curated datasets must be rigorously checked, as reliance on anonymous and unvetted external sources can substantially increase the risk of data poisoning. In this paper, we propose a Poisoned Data Detector (PDD), an active defense mechanism designed to ensure the integrity of SSL-curated datasets prior to foundation model training. PDDs are designed using a combination of the pretrained ImageBind model and traditional classifiers, including Random Forest (RF), k-Nearest Neighbors (KNN), Naive Bayes (NB), and Support Vector Machines (SVM). We rigorously evaluated PDDs using 176,200 images from three diverse datasets and three different adversarial attacks encompassing both in-distribution and out-of-distribution scenarios. Notably, SVM-PDD achieves superior performance for both in-distribution (Set3-Set5) and out-of-distribution (TrueFace and 140K RealFace) datasets. Our design demonstrates strong scalability and enables the rapid integration of new adversarial attack detectors through an ensemble approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Poisoned Data Detector (PDD)的主动防御机制，利用ImageBind预训练模型与多种传统分类器（如SVM、RF等）结合，用于检测自监督学习（SSL）所构建数据集中的中毒数据，以保障基础模型训练前的数据完整性。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习虽可降低数据标注成本并扩展数据集规模，但其依赖未经审核的外部数据源易引入数据中毒风险，亟需可靠的数据完整性验证机制。
AI.method: 提出Poisoned Data Detector（PDD），融合ImageBind多模态预训练特征与Random Forest、KNN、Naive Bayes、SVM等传统分类器；在176,200张图像、三个数据集及三类对抗攻击（含分布内/外）下进行评估。
AI.result: SVM-PDD在分布内（Set3-Set5）和分布外（TrueFace、140K RealFace）数据上均表现最优；方案具备良好可扩展性，支持通过集成方式快速接入新型攻击检测器。
AI.conclusion: PDD为SSL驱动的数据策展提供了有效且可扩展的中毒数据检测方案，显著提升了基础模型训练前的数据安全性和可靠性。

title: DynaCF: Mitigating Shortcut Learning in Reward Models via Dynamic Counterfactual Sensitivity
summary: Reward models trained from pairwise preferences often exploit superficial shortcut cues rather than learning true response quality. We propose DynaCF, a dynamic reweighting framework for mitigating shortcut learning in reward model training. Unlike static shortcut heuristics, DynaCF measures shortcut sensitivity online during optimization by applying semantics-preserving counterfactual perturbations and tracking the resulting margin shifts and preference flips under the current model. Samples with higher shortcut sensitivity are dynamically downweighted in the Bradley-Terry objective, encouraging the model to rely less on superficial patterns and more on task-relevant preference signals. Extensive experiments show that DynaCF consistently improves robustness in preference modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DynaCF动态重加权框架，通过在线测量样本的捷径敏感性并动态降低其权重，以缓解奖励模型训练中的捷径学习问题。
AI.motivation: 奖励模型在基于成对偏好的训练中常依赖表面捷径线索而非真实响应质量，导致泛化能力差。
AI.method: DynaCF在优化过程中实时施加语义保持的反事实扰动，监测当前模型下的间隔变化和偏好翻转，据此量化样本的捷径敏感性，并在Bradley-Terry目标函数中动态下调高敏感样本的权重。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，DynaCF在偏好建模中持续提升了模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DynaCF能有效抑制奖励模型中的捷径学习，提升其对真实响应质量的建模能力与泛化性能。

title: SwiftVR: Real-Time One-Step Generative Video Restoration
summary: Real-time video restoration (VR) for live streams requires high-resolution outputs under strict per-frame latency constraints. Existing one-step diffusion-based VR models remain difficult to deploy on consumer-grade GPUs due to two main bottlenecks: quadratic spatial attention at high resolutions and the latency-memory overhead of large video autoencoders. We present SwiftVR, a streaming one-step generative VR framework that reduces both bottlenecks under a causal chunk-wise protocol. For attention, mask-free shifted-window self-attention gathers each spatial window into a dense tensor via deterministic indexing, keeping all attention calls on the dense scaled dot-product attention path without masks, cyclic shifts, padding, or hardware-specific sparse kernels. Because SwiftVR uses only standard dense SDPA calls, the trained model transfers to consumer GPUs without retraining or custom kernels. For autoencoding, a lightweight Restoration-aware Autoencoder enables fast chunk-wise decoding while preserving reconstruction quality. On a single H100, SwiftVR sustains 31~FPS at 2560x1440 and 14~FPS at 3840x2160, whereas all compared diffusion-based VR baselines exceed the memory limit at 4K. On a consumer RTX~5090, SwiftVR reaches 26~FPS at 1920x1080. To our knowledge, SwiftVR is the first generative VR model to achieve real-time 1080p streaming on a consumer-grade GPU, while attaining strong no-reference perceptual quality with lower inference cost. Project is available at https://h-oliday.github.io/SwiftVR.

AI.tldr: SwiftVR是一种面向实时视频修复的流式单步生成框架，通过无掩码移窗自注意力和轻量级修复感知自动编码器，在消费级GPU上实现1080p实时视频修复，兼顾高分辨率、低延迟与低内存开销。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的视频修复方法在消费级GPU上难以部署，主要受限于高分辨率下的二次复杂度空间注意力机制和大型视频自编码器带来的延迟与内存开销。
AI.method: 提出SwiftVR框架：1）采用无掩码的移窗自注意力（mask-free shifted-window self-attention），仅使用标准密集型缩放点积注意力（SDPA），避免掩码、循环移位、填充或定制稀疏核；2）设计轻量级修复感知自编码器，支持快速分块解码并保持重建质量；整体遵循因果分块协议。
AI.result: 在单张H100上，SwiftVR在2560x1440达31 FPS、3840x2160达14 FPS；在RTX 5090上达1920x1080@26 FPS；所有对比扩散模型在4K分辨率下均超出显存限制；首次在消费级GPU上实现1080p实时生成式视频修复，且具有优异的无参考感知质量与更低推理成本。
AI.conclusion: SwiftVR有效解决了高分辨率实时视频修复中的注意力计算与自编码瓶颈，为消费级硬件上的端到端生成式视频修复提供了实用可行的新范式。

title: Adversarial Attack and Disturbance Detection by Hadamard-Coded Output Representations for Object Detection and Semantic Segmentation
summary: Conventional one-hot encodings often yield poorly calibrated models, being overconfident under attack, and letting entropy-based detection algorithms fail. Previous image classification works have demonstrated that Hadamard-coded output representations can improve adversarial robustness. However, attempts to integrate Hadamard codes into semantic segmentation fall far behind state-of-the-art models in mean intersection-over-union performance. Regarding object detection, such output encodings have not yet been investigated at all. Further, no prior art addressed intrinsic codeword inconsistencies or actually exploited intrinsic codeword redundancy. Accordingly, we first derive a novel decoding procedure for Hadamard codewords towards optimal class-wise probabilities, solving the underlying optimization problem by using the projection onto the probability simplex. Second, our optimization delivers a measure of prediction inconsistency. Third, we are the first to show how to exploit these inconsistencies for adversarial attack and disturbance detection. Fourth, we introduce HadamardNet, a framework employing Hadamard codes as output representations for semantic segmentation and object detection models and tasks. We conduct a comprehensive evaluation both on disturbances and adversarial attacks, achieving state-of-the-art perturbation detection performance for both tasks in only a single detection pass, while delivering equivalent or close-by reference performance on clean data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HadamardNet框架，通过改进Hadamard编码的解码方法和利用其内在冗余与不一致性，在语义分割与目标检测任务中同时提升对抗鲁棒性与扰动检测能力，且不显著牺牲干净数据性能。
AI.motivation: 传统one-hot编码导致模型校准差、对抗下过度自信，熵检测失效；现有Hadamard编码在分割中性能落后，在检测中未被探索；且未解决编码不一致性和未利用其冗余性。
AI.method: 1）提出基于概率单形投影的最优类概率解码方法；2）量化预测不一致性；3）首次将不一致性用于攻击与扰动检测；4）构建HadamardNet框架，适配分割与检测任务。
AI.result: 在扰动与对抗攻击检测上达到SOTA性能（单次前向即可），同时在干净数据上保持接近基准的mIoU与检测精度。
AI.conclusion: Hadamard编码经合理解码与不一致性建模后，可有效增强分割与检测模型的鲁棒性与可解释性检测能力，为输出表示设计提供新范式。

title: Beyond Convolution: Advancing Hypergraph Neural Networks with Hypergraph U-Nets
summary: Convolutions have successfully transitioned from image processing to the complex realm of non-Euclidean higher-order domains, particularly in hypergraphs. Despite the success in convolution, the exploration of a popular architecture named U-Net remains largely unexplored for hypergraph data due to the lack of well-defined pooling and unpooling operations. This work pioneers the study of U-Net architectures for hypergraph data, addressing the critical challenge of designing effective pooling and unpooling operations that retain maximal structural information from the input hypergraph. Motivated by hierarchical clustering, we propose to construct the pooling and unpooling operators all at once by cutting the clustering dendrogram at different granularities, named the Parallel Hierarchical Pooling (PHPool) and Unpooling (PHUnpool) operators. Unlike existing pooling methods that risk local structural damage through a sequential learning procedure, our PHPool operators are designed in a global and parallel manner to ensure fidelity to the original hypergraph structure with efficient computation while the PHUnpool operators are tailored to perform inverse operations of the PHPools for hypergraph reconstruction. We validate our model through hypergraph reconstruction simulation, hypergraph classification, and node-level anomaly detection, where it demonstrates superior performance over existing state-of-the-art graph and hypergraph deep learning methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向超图数据的U-Net架构，核心是基于层次聚类树（dendrogram）一次性构建并行的池化（PHPool）与反池化（PHUnpool）操作，以全局、高效地保留超图结构信息，并在重建、分类与异常检测任务中超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: U-Net在图像领域成功，但在超图数据上尚未被探索，主因缺乏定义良好且能保持结构信息的池化与反池化操作。
AI.method: 提出Parallel Hierarchical Pooling（PHPool）和Unpooling（PHUnpool）操作：通过在层次聚类树不同粒度处剪枝，一次性构建池化/反池化映射，实现全局、并行、可逆的结构压缩与恢复。
AI.result: 在超图重建仿真、超图分类和节点级异常检测任务中，该模型均优于当前图与超图深度学习最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将U-Net范式拓展至超图领域，所提PHPool/PHUnpool为超图表示学习提供了结构保真、计算高效的层次化操作新范式。

title: A VideoMAE-v2 Approach to Zero-Shot Traffic Accident Anticipation
summary: Traffic accident anticipation -- predicting the likelihood of an imminent collision at every frame of a dashcam video -- is safety-critical yet difficult to scale, because collecting in-domain annotated accident footage for every deployment scenario is prohibitively expensive. We study this task under a zero-shot setting where no target-domain training data is available: the model must learn exclusively from a publicly available binary-labelled driving-accident dataset and generalise to unseen dashcam footage. We propose a framework that bridges the gap between the frame-level temporal risk estimation task and coarsely labelled binary accident datasets by coupling a VideoMAE-v2 backbone with a per-frame prediction head under a sliding-window protocol. Our method achieves 2nd place in the 2026 CVPR@AUTOPILOT Zero-Shot Accident Anticipation competition. Code is available at https://github.com/TimeSouth/zero-shot-taa-solution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种零样本交通事故预判框架，利用VideoMAE-v2和滑动窗口协议，从粗粒度二分类事故数据中学习帧级风险预测，无需目标域标注数据，在CVPR@AUTOPILOT竞赛中获第二名。
AI.motivation: 交通意外预判对安全至关重要，但为每个部署场景收集带标注的事故视频成本过高，因此需在无目标域训练数据的零样本设定下实现泛化。
AI.method: 采用VideoMAE-v2作为视频特征骨干网络，结合逐帧预测头，并通过滑动窗口协议将帧级风险估计任务与粗粒度二分类事故标签对齐。
AI.result: 该方法在2026年CVPR@AUTOPILOT零样本事故预判竞赛中获得第二名。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能有效利用公开二分类事故数据，在零样本设定下实现对未见行车记录仪视频的可靠帧级事故风险预测，具备良好跨域泛化能力。

title: INFUSER: Influence-Guided Self-Evolution Improves Reasoning
summary: Self-evolution offers a scalable path to stronger reasoning: a pretrained language model improves itself with only minimal external supervision. Yet existing methods either depend on extensively curated or teacher-generated training data, or, when the generator runs unsupervised, reward it by a difficulty heuristic that need not improve the solver. We introduce INFUSER, an iterative co-training framework with two co-evolving roles: a Generator that drafts questions and reference golden answers from a pool of unstructured, automatically collected documents, and a Solver that improves by training on them. The solver is trained with standard correctness rewards against the generator-provided answers, while the generator is rewarded by an optimizer-aware influence score that measures whether each proposed question would actually improve the solver on the target distribution. Because this continuous, noisy influence score is poorly served by standard GRPO, we propose DuGRPO, a dual-normalized variant of GRPO, for generator training. Together, these turn the document pool into an adaptive curriculum that favors questions useful to the current solver, not just hard ones. On Qwen3-8B-Base, INFUSER outperforms strong self-evolution baselines with over 20% relative improvement on Olympiad and SuperGPQA benchmarks, and an 8B INFUSER co-evolving generator outperforms a frozen 32B thinking generator on math and coding. Ablations confirm each design choice is necessary, and two extensions, applying INFUSER to an instruction-finetuned anchor and augmenting it with rule-verifiable RLVR data, further demonstrate the flexibility and generalizability of the framework. Code is available at https://github.com/FFishy-git/INFUSER.

AI.tldr: 本文提出INFUSER框架，通过生成器与求解器协同进化实现语言模型的自我进化，利用未结构化文档池构建自适应课程，显著提升推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自进化方法依赖大量人工标注数据或基于难度启发式的奖励机制，无法保证实际提升求解能力。
AI.method: 提出INFUSER协同训练框架：生成器从无结构文档中自动生成问题与黄金答案；求解器用标准正确性奖励训练；生成器则使用优化器感知的影响分（optimizer-aware influence score）进行奖励，并采用新提出的DuGRPO算法进行训练。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-8B-Base上，INFUSER在Olympiad和SuperGPQA基准上相对强基线提升超20%；8B INFUSER生成器甚至超越冻结的32B思考生成器；消融实验证明各设计均必要，且框架可拓展至指令微调模型和RLVR增强场景。
AI.conclusion: INFUSER提供了一种高效、可扩展、无需强监督的自进化路径，将文档池转化为面向当前求解器能力的动态课程，显著提升复杂推理性能。

title: Streaming Interventions: Can Video Large Language Models Correct Mistakes as They Occur?
comment: Qualcomm Interactive Cooking: Ego-MC-Bench -- available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/neuripsedtracksub/ego-mistake-corrections and Ego-CoMist -- available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/neuripsedtracksub/ego-counterfactual-mistakes
summary: Learning everyday skills, like cooking a dish, relies increasingly on instructional media such as online videos. This opens the door to the use of video (and multimodal) large language models (LLMs) as task guidance assistants. A crucial capability for the real-world success of a prospective task guidance assistant is it's ability to intervene proactively as soon as a mistake is apparent in order to guide the user. To evaluate this crucial capability, we introduce Ego-MC-Bench (Mistake Corrections), a benchmark for evaluating reactive, step-by-step task guidance in realistic cooking scenarios. Extensive experiments show that Ego-MC-Bench is highly challenging for state-of-the-art video LLMs. We argue that a key reason is the limited availability of training data for fine-tuning models on this task. Although there exists a wide range of cooking video datasets, existing datasets lack examples of mistakes along with appropriately timed interventions. To help address this data limitation, we also introduce Ego-CoMist, a counterfactual synthetic dataset created by transforming non -interactive cooking videos into supervised training examples showing proactive interventions. We show that fine-tuning on Ego-CoMist yields performance gains especially for smaller and more efficient video LLMs that are well suited for delivering assistance on edge devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ego-MC-Bench基准用于评估视频大模型在烹饪任务中主动纠错能力，并指出数据缺乏是主要瓶颈；为此构建了合成数据集Ego-CoMist，实验证明其能有效提升轻量级视频LLM的纠错性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频大语言模型缺乏在真实场景中及时识别并纠正用户操作错误的能力，而评估和提升该能力受限于缺乏含错误及适时干预标注的训练数据。
AI.method: 构建了面向错误纠正的现实烹饪场景评测基准Ego-MC-Bench，并设计了基于反事实合成的训练数据集Ego-CoMist，通过改造非交互式烹饪视频生成带主动干预标注的监督样本，进而对视频LLM进行微调。
AI.result: Ego-MC-Bench对当前SOTA视频LLM极具挑战性；使用Ego-CoMist微调显著提升了小规模、高效率视频LLM在边缘设备上的错误纠正性能。
AI.conclusion: 主动错误纠正能力是实用化任务引导助手的关键，而高质量合成数据（如Ego-CoMist）可有效弥补真实干预数据稀缺问题，尤其利好边缘部署的轻量级视频大模型。

title: Stage-1 Controls the Entropy Regime, Not the Outcome
summary: Two-stage post-training -- a Stage-1 warm-start (supervised fine-tuning, SFT, or on-policy distillation, OPD) followed by Stage-2 reinforcement learning (RL) -- is increasingly used for vision-language models (VLMs). We ask what Stage-1 actually controls in a small-data study using Qwen2.5-VL-7B with a same-modality 72B VLM teacher for OPD. First, the three warm-starts reach a narrow $53$--$54\%$ band on Geometry3K internal validation, consistent with the narrow range reported by recent specialized methods; this setup provides little evidence that Stage-1 changes the in-domain endpoint. Second, a matched-recipe, early-stopped SFT improves out-of-domain MathVista by $+2.1$ points, reversing the $-9.5$-point drop of an over-trained variant. The clearest difference is the \emph{entropy regime}: OPD enters RL with substantially higher policy entropy than either SFT initialization, and the separation remains visible through the available trajectories. At the in-domain initialization, OPD also has higher answer diversity and pass@16 ($+2.0$ to $+5.2$ points over SFT), although problem-level bootstrap intervals show that the smaller contrast is uncertain. The advantage is absent after RL (endpoint pass@16 values within $1.1$ points) and on MathVista (six models within $1.2$ points). Our contribution is therefore a bounded empirical characterization: Stage-1 is strongly associated with the entropy regime in this setup, but the downstream payoff is small, localized, and not evidence that OPD is a better RL warm-start.

AI.tldr: 本文通过小规模数据实验研究了视觉语言模型（VLM）两阶段后训练中第一阶段（Stage-1）的作用，发现不同Stage-1方法（SFT或OPD）对最终性能影响有限，主要差异体现在策略熵水平上，但该差异在RL微调后基本消失，下游任务增益微弱且不具统计显著性。
AI.motivation: 探究两阶段后训练中Stage-1（如监督微调SFT或在线策略蒸馏OPD）究竟控制哪些关键因素，尤其在小数据设定下其对模型最终性能和行为的影响。
AI.method: 在Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型上，使用同模态72B VLM作为教师模型进行OPD，并与SFT对比；在Geometry3K（内域）和MathVista（外域）上评估性能；分析策略熵、答案多样性、pass@16等指标随训练动态的变化。
AI.result: Stage-1方法导致显著不同的初始策略熵（OPD熵更高），并带来初期答案多样性及pass@16提升（+2.0~+5.2），但RL后该优势消失（终点pass@16差距≤1.1）；外域MathVista上性能变化微弱（±2.1点），且无统计显著性。
AI.conclusion: Stage-1主要决定初始熵状态，但并非决定性RL暖启动优势来源；其下游影响小、局部化、缺乏稳健证据支持OPD优于SFT作为RL起点。

title: TUDSR: Twice Upsampling-Diffusion for Higher Super-Resolution
summary: Diffusion-based generative models have achieved remarkable success in real-world image super-resolution (SR). With tiled diffusion techniques, these models can produce high-resolution images that exceed their native-supported resolution. However, the quality of such high-resolution (e.g $2048^2$) outputs often remains extremely poor, primarily due to two factors we consider: the image upsampling ratio (e.g $\times8$) exceeding the model's native-supported upsampling ratio (e.g $\times4$), and the model's native-supported resolution. In practice, training a native high-resolution model requires larger architectures, which incur significant computational overhead and GPU memory costs, making it hard on limited-resource equipment. Thus, we present TUDSR, a Twice Upsampling-Diffusion framework for higher SR. The TUDSR framework mainly consists of two stages: the first involves training at $R$-resolution, and the second introduces a looped chunk-based training strategy at $NR$-resolution. Each stage adapts a one-step GAN architecture comprising a generator and a discriminator. Based on SD2.1-base, we develop TUDSR-S, which achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks. Extensive experiments further demonstrate that TUDSR-S generates high-quality images at the resolutions of $1024^2$ and even $2048^2$, significantly outperforming existing approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/wuer5/TUDSR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TUDSR框架，通过两次上采样扩散模型解决高分辨率图像超分辨率问题，在1024²和2048²分辨率下显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在生成超高分辨率（如2048²）图像时质量差，主因是上采样倍率和原生支持分辨率受限；训练原生高分辨率模型计算与显存开销大，难以在资源受限设备上实现。
AI.method: 提出TUDSR（Twice Upsampling-Diffusion）框架：第一阶段在R分辨率训练，第二阶段采用循环分块策略在NR分辨率训练；每阶段使用基于SD2.1-base的一步GAN架构（含生成器与判别器）。
AI.result: TUDSR-S在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能，成功生成高质量1024²甚至2048²分辨率图像，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: TUDSR通过分阶段、分块训练策略有效突破了扩散模型在超高分辨率SR中的性能瓶颈，兼顾效果与资源效率。

title: OnlyDense: Reduced-Order Modeling for Lagrangian simulation
summary: In science and engineering, Lagrangian simulation methods such as Smooth Particle Hydrodynamics (SPH) or Material Point Method (MPM) are often employed to study the behavior of dynamic systems. However, these methods can be prohibitively computationally expensive, particularly when simulating multi-scale spatial or temporal phenomena, e.g., void growth and coalescence within macro-scale geometries, structural failure of spacecraft components resulting from hypervelocity impact of space debris particles, etc. In contrast to graph-based methods, where the state of the system is understood as a discrete set of particles, we propose a learning framework for scalable representation and dynamics modeling of massive particle systems by treating the system state as a function and its evolution as a trajectory in Hilbert space. Rather than representing the state as a discrete set of particles or embedding it in a nonlinear latent manifold, we approximate the state space with a linear subspace spanned by learned neural basis functions. This parameterization enables direct projection to obtain latent coefficients and explicit access to the basis functions, avoiding optimization over a nonlinear latent space. The resulting representation admits a natural interpretation: latent variables correspond to coefficients in Hilbert space, and basis functions correspond to spatial modes, analogous to Proper Orthogonal Decomposition. The framework thus unifies classical projection-based reduced-order modeling with modern deep learning, while remaining invariant to the number of discretization points. Experiments on large-scale SPH simulations with over one million particles, including dynamic events with extreme deformation and fragmentation, demonstrate that the proposed method accurately reconstructs and predicts dynamics, achieving an R$^2$ score above $0.99$ with as few as $32$ basis functions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于希尔伯特空间函数表示的可扩展学习框架，用于大规模粒子系统的动力学建模，避免了传统非线性隐空间优化，兼具POD的物理解释性与深度学习的表达能力，并在百万级SPH模拟中实现了高精度重建与预测。
AI.motivation: 传统拉格朗日方法（如SPH、MPM）在模拟多尺度动态现象时计算代价过高；现有图神经网络等离散表示方法难以兼顾可扩展性与物理可解释性。
AI.method: 将系统状态视为函数、演化视为希尔伯特空间中的轨迹；用可学习的神经基函数张成线性子空间来近似状态空间，实现直接投影获取潜变量系数，并显式获得空间模态基函数。
AI.result: 在超百万粒子的SPH大规模模拟（含剧烈变形与破碎）上，仅用32个基函数即达R² > 0.99的重建与预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架统一了基于投影的降阶建模与深度学习，保持对离散点数的不变性，兼具高效性、可扩展性与物理可解释性。

title: ATN3D: Density-Aware LiDAR-Radar Early 3D Object Detection Under Extreme Sparsity
summary: 3D object detection is the backbone of perception for automated vehicles (AV) and broader intelligent transportation systems applications. Long-range detection is challenging because sensing evidence is sparse; yet this ``long-range'' scenario is routine in traffic. Although >30m is often labeled long-range in computer vision, on roadways it affords only approx. 1-2s for perception and decision-making. Under such extreme sparsity, two core challenges arise. First, early multimodal fusion tends to discard sparsity information and inject noise from empty or falsely occupied cells, degrading long-range recall. Second, context-agnostic uniform channel supervision favors dense and near-range samples, leaving far and small objects under-optimized, delaying the earliest detection of distant objects. We propose ``Ask The Neighbor'' (ATN3D), a LiDAR-Radar framework tailored for sparse-range conditions. ATN3D introduces (i) Density-aware early fusion with cross-modal gating that conditions fusion on per-voxel density/sparsity and Radar evidence, (ii) Occupancy-gated neighborhood aggregation with circular kernels to aggregate only from credible cells, (iii) Evidence-conditioned channel self-attention to adapt channel weights with weather/range, and (iv) a Range-aware loss that re-balances classification and localization by distance, aligning training with distance-stratified evaluation. On the VoD benchmark across clear and foggy conditions, ATN3D surpasses strong baselines: +3.55% mAP in clear weather and +8.41% mAP under simulated heavy fog; for >30m objects, gains are +3.33% (clear) and +2.09% (heavy fog). These results indicate earlier and more reliable long-range detections under sparse sensing in on-road traffic.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ATN3D框架，专为激光雷达-毫米波雷达融合的稀疏长距3D目标检测设计，通过密度感知融合、占用门控邻域聚合、证据条件通道自注意力和距离感知损失，显著提升远距离（>30m）检测性能，尤其在雾天条件下效果突出。
AI.motivation: 长距离（>30m）3D目标检测在自动驾驶中至关重要但极具挑战性，因传感器数据极度稀疏，导致早期多模态融合引入噪声、远距离小目标优化不足，影响实时决策。
AI.method: 提出ATN3D框架，包含四项关键技术：(i)基于体素密度与雷达证据的密度感知早期融合与跨模态门控；(ii)占用门控的环形核邻域聚合，仅从可信体素聚合；(iii)依据天气与距离动态调整通道权重的证据条件通道自注意力；(iv)按距离分层重平衡分类与定位损失的Range-aware损失函数。
AI.result: 在VoD数据集上，ATN3D在晴天提升+3.55% mAP，浓雾下提升+8.41% mAP；对>30m目标，晴天提升+3.33%，浓雾下提升+2.09%。
AI.conclusion: ATN3D有效应对长距稀疏检测核心挑战，在真实道路场景中实现更早、更可靠的远距离目标检测，增强自动驾驶系统在复杂气象与长距条件下的感知鲁棒性。

title: A Unifying Lens on Reward Uncertainty in RLHF
summary: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) is bottlenecked by \emph{reward hacking}, where the policy exploits errors in a proxy reward model (RM) and produces high RM scores without genuine quality gains. A natural mitigation is \emph{pessimism}: penalizing rewards in regions where the RM is uncertain. However, standard scalar RMs provide no principled notion of uncertainty. We argue that the right object is a \emph{distributional} reward model $p(r\mid x,y)$. Under either a Bayesian inference or a KL-distributionally robust optimization (KL-DRO) lens, the KL-regularized RLHF objective admits a closed-form effective reward $\tilde r(x,y) = \pmβ\log\mathbb{E}_p[e^{\pm r/β}]$. The pessimistic branch unifies the prior heuristics for RM ensemble aggregation: mean aggregation, worst-case optimization (WCO), and uncertainty-weighted optimization (UWO) all emerge as limits or truncations of this single expression. This also clarifies the implicit assumptions of each existing rule.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分布式奖励模型（distributional reward model）的RLHF新框架，通过KL正则化推导出统一的有效奖励形式，将多种现有悲观策略（如均值聚合、最坏情况优化、不确定性加权优化）统一为同一公式的不同极限或截断，从而揭示了各自隐含假设并缓解奖励黑客问题。
AI.motivation: 解决RLHF中因代理奖励模型（RM）错误导致的奖励黑客（reward hacking）问题，传统标量RM缺乏不确定性建模能力，需引入更合理的不确定性感知机制。
AI.method: 提出分布式的奖励模型p(r|x,y)，在贝叶斯推断或KL分布鲁棒优化（KL-DRO）视角下，对KL正则化RLHF目标进行理论推导，得到闭式有效奖励表达式，并分析其不同极限情形与现有启发式方法（如mean、WCO、UWO）的对应关系。
AI.result: 推导出统一的有效奖励公式\tilde r(x,y) = ±β log E_p[e^{±r/β}]，证明多种现有RM集成策略均为该公式的特例或近似，明确了各方法背后的隐含假设。
AI.conclusion: 分布式的奖励建模为RLHF提供了 principled 的不确定性量化基础，所提出的KL正则化框架统一并解释了多种悲观策略，为更鲁棒的对齐学习提供了理论支撑。

title: CineDance: Towards Next-Generation Multi-Shot Long-Form Cinematic Audio-Video Generation
summary: The fidelity and structural diversity of training datasets fundamentally determine the capabilities of video generation models. While commercial systems showremarkableabilitytogeneratecinematicnarratives, the progress of open-source models remains limited by the scarcity of high-quality training data. To bridge this gap, we introduce CineDance-1M, a large-scale, open research Text-to-Audio-Video (T2AV) dataset designed specifically for multi-shot, long-form joint audio-video generation. Averaging 92.8 seconds and 24.2 continuous shots per video, it provides configurable, structured annotations for both audio and video modalities. This exceptional quality is achieved through a rigorous three-stage curation pipeline: i) diverse sourcing and comprehensive cleansing, ii) film-theory-inspired narrative parsing, and iii) hierarchical dual-modal captioning. For a comprehensive assessment, we propose CineBench, featuring a diverse prompt suite and a six-dimensional, human-aligned metric system tailored for complex narrative audio-video evaluation. Furthermore, we adapt LTX-2.3 into CineDance, which demonstrates exceptional single-modality quality alongside precise audio-video alignment and robust subject and environment consistency, effectively validating our curation strategy and the high quality of CineDance-1M. We anticipate that this work will serve as a solid foundation for accelerating future research in multi-shot, long-form joint audio-video generation. Our project page is available at https://aliothchen.github.io/projects/CineDance/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CineDance-1M，一个大规模开放文本-音频-视频（T2AV）数据集，专为多镜头、长时联合音视频生成设计，并配套提出评估基准CineBench和适配模型CineDance-LTX，验证了数据集的高质量与有效性。
AI.motivation: 开源视频生成模型受限于高质量训练数据的稀缺，而商业系统已展现出强大能力；亟需构建高质量、结构丰富、支持多模态联合生成的大规模开放数据集。
AI.method: 构建CineDance-1M数据集：采用三阶段严谨策展流程（多样来源与清洗、电影理论驱动的叙事解析、分层双模态标注）；设计CineBench评估基准（含多样化提示集与六维人对齐指标）；将LTX-2.3模型适配为CineDance-LTX进行验证。
AI.result: CineDance-1M平均时长92.8秒、含24.2个连续镜头，具备可配置结构化音视频标注；CineBench实现复杂叙事音视频的精细化评估；CineDance-LTX在单模态质量、音视频对齐及主体/环境一致性上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: CineDance-1M及其配套基准与模型为多镜头、长时联合音视频生成研究提供了高质量开放基础，有望显著推动该领域发展。

title: Neural Legendre-Fenchel transform with Hessian Preconditioning
summary: The Legendre-Fenchel (LF) transform is a fundamental tool in convex analysis and machine learning that maps lower semi-continuous functions to their convex conjugates. In practice, when closed-form formula are not available for expressing convex conjugates of given functions, one must approximate them using various techniques. One recent such versatile numerical method is the deep Legendre transform method which relies on neural networks although it remains challenging particularly for tackling ill-conditioned functions. This work builds on the reformulation of the LF transform as a projective polarity. A notable property of this framework is its affine invariance. We leverage this affine invariance to introduce a Hessian-based preconditioning strategy. Specifically, we apply an affine deformation around a minimizer so that the second-order Taylor approximation of the function coincides with the canonical paraboloid, whose conjugation map is the identity. A residual network initialized near the identity can then learn this simplified mapping, while the original conjugation map is recovered through the inverse deformation. The proposed preconditioning incurs only a modest computational overhead, consisting of a single eigendecomposition during initialization and two matrix-vector multiplications per query. Experiments on a diverse set of convex functions, including high-dimensional benchmarks, demonstrate improved convergence rates and enhanced numerical accuracy of the conjugation, with particularly significant gains for ill-conditioned problems. Finally, we discuss the scope of applicability of our proposed method and highlight several of its limitations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Hessian的预处理策略，利用Legendre-Fenchel变换的仿射不变性，通过在极小值点附近进行仿射变形使函数二阶泰勒近似与标准抛物面一致，从而简化共轭映射学习，并用残差网络建模，显著提升了对病态函数的共轭计算精度和收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 现有深度Legendre变换方法在处理病态函数时存在挑战，缺乏高效稳定的数值逼近手段。
AI.method: 基于Legendre-Fenchel变换的射影极性重构，利用其仿射不变性设计Hessian驱动的预处理：在函数极小值点处做仿射变形，使二阶泰勒展开匹配标准抛物面（其共轭为恒等映射），再用初始化接近恒等映射的残差网络学习简化后的映射，最后通过逆变形恢复原始共轭；预处理仅需一次特征分解和每次查询两次矩阵-向量乘法。
AI.result: 在多种凸函数（含高维基准）实验中，该方法显著提升共轭计算的收敛速度与数值精度，尤其对病态问题改善明显。
AI.conclusion: 所提预处理策略有效缓解了深度Legendre变换在病态场景下的不稳定性，兼具理论合理性与计算高效性，但适用范围受限于可求极小值与Hessian信息的前提，且对非光滑或非强凸函数效果待验证。

title: MAVIS: Multi-Agent Video Retrieval via Structured Video Understanding
summary: The dominant paradigm in video retrieval relies on embedding-based full-corpus scanning, which suffers from inherent computational inefficiency and the semantic asymmetry between information-dense videos and sparse textual queries. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{MAVIS}, a novel multi-agent framework that rethinks retrieval as cooperative reasoning rather than brute-force search. MAVIS first bridges the granularity mismatch by parsing raw videos into a \textbf{Structured Semantic Library}, enabling explicit attribute-level indexing. During retrieval, a planner decomposes complex user intents into atomic sub-tasks, dispatching specialized agents to independently nominate candidates. Crucially, MAVIS employs a \textbf{Logic-aware Debate} mechanism with a strict veto protocol, where agents collaboratively prune logical mismatches to identify a compact set of ``controversial'' candidates for fine-grained verification. This agentic workflow effectively bypasses the inefficiency of full-library traversal. Extensive experiments on MSR-VTT, MSVD, and ActivityNet demonstrate that MAVIS achieves competitive performance without task-specific fine-tuning, offering a scalable and interpretable alternative to traditional dual-encoder approaches.

AI.tldr: MAVIS是一种多智能体视频检索框架，通过结构化语义库、任务分解与逻辑感知辩论机制，替代传统嵌入式全库扫描，提升效率与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 解决视频检索中嵌入式全库扫描存在的计算低效和视频-文本语义不对称问题。
AI.method: 提出MAVIS多智能体框架：构建结构化语义库对视频进行属性级索引；由规划器分解用户意图并调度专用智能体提名候选；引入带否决协议的逻辑感知辩论机制协同筛选争议性候选集。
AI.result: 在MSR-VTT、MSVD和ActivityNet上验证有效，无需任务特定微调即达竞争性性能。
AI.conclusion: MAVIS为视频检索提供了更高效、可扩展且可解释的替代方案，突破了传统双编码器范式的局限。

title: The Hidden Bias of Process Reward Models:PRISM for Rewarding the Right Reasoning
summary: Process Reward Models (PRMs) improve credit assignment for reasoning by providing step-level feedback. However, we identify a hidden bias in PRMs caused by severe imbalance in step-level training data. Standard cross-entropy training amplifies this bias, causing PRMs to overcredit plausible but incorrect steps and produce high false-positive rates. We show that these false positives have an asymmetric downstream effect: false negatives mainly slow exploration, whereas false positives actively steer Best-of-N selection, guided decoding, and policy optimization toward flawed reasoning. This suggests that PRM training should shift from pointwise label fitting to reliable relative comparisons. To address this, we propose PRISM (Precision Ranking for Improved Step Modeling), a policy-aware PRM training framework that learns from contrastive step-level comparisons and hard negatives generated by a temporal lookahead strategy, requiring no new human labels. We further use a difficulty-aware curriculum to optimize the contrastive step margin. Across PRMBench and ProcessBench, PRISM substantially reduces false positives (22% on PRMBench) and improves macro F1 over strong discriminative PRMs. When applied to policy optimization and search tasks, including guided decoding and Best-of-N selection, it consistently improves accuracy (up to 22% for guided decoding and 33% for Best-of-N) and robustness. More broadly, trustworthy process supervision is not just about assigning high rewards, but about rewarding the right reasoning for the right reasons.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRISM框架，通过对比学习和难度感知课程优化，解决过程奖励模型（PRMs）中因训练数据不平衡导致的步骤级高假阳性问题，显著提升推理过程监督的可靠性与下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有PRMs在步骤级训练中存在严重数据不平衡，标准交叉熵训练加剧了对似是而非但错误步骤的过奖励，导致高假阳性率，并对下游推理任务产生不对称的负面影响。
AI.method: 提出PRISM框架：基于策略感知的对比学习，利用时间前瞻策略生成难负样本，无需新的人工标注；引入难度感知课程以优化对比步骤间隔。
AI.result: 在PRMBench和ProcessBench上，PRISM将假阳性率降低22%，宏观F1显著提升；在引导解码和Best-of-N等下游任务中，准确率最高提升22%和33%。
AI.conclusion: 可信的过程监督关键不在于给予高奖励，而在于为正确的推理、基于正确原因给予奖励；PRISM通过强调可靠相对比较而非点式标签拟合，提升了PRM的鲁棒性与实用性。

title: Do Video Foundation Models Understand Intuitive Physics? A Layerwise Probing Analysis
summary: We study whether pretrained video foundation models encode intuitive-physics information in their frozen representations, and how this information varies across model families, layers, and probe types. Using frozen-feature probing on IntPhys2 and Minimal Video Pairs (MVP), we compare predictive joint-embedding models (V-JEPA), masked reconstruction models (VideoMAE), and a diffusion-based video generator (LTX-Video). V-JEPA achieves the strongest overall results across benchmarks, especially with probes that model temporal dynamics, while VideoMAE remains competitive and LTX-Video recovers weaker but non-trivial signal. Layerwise analyses show that physics-relevant information is weakest in early layers and becomes most accessible at intermediate-to-late depth, and temporal controls show that disrupting frame order substantially reduces performance, especially on MVP. Together, these results suggest that intuitive-physics knowledge emerges reliably in pretrained video representations, but its accessibility depends strongly on pretraining paradigm, representational depth, and readout mechanism.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了预训练视频基础模型是否在其冻结表示中编码了直觉物理信息，并分析了这种信息在不同模型家族、网络层和探针类型中的变化。
AI.motivation: 探究预训练视频基础模型是否隐含编码直觉物理知识，以及该知识如何随模型架构、深度和读出方式变化。
AI.method: 在IntPhys2和Minimal Video Pairs（MVP）数据集上，对冻结特征进行探针分析，对比V-JEPA（联合嵌入）、VideoMAE（掩码重建）和LTX-Video（扩散生成）三类模型；并开展逐层分析与帧序干扰控制实验。
AI.result: V-JEPA整体表现最优，尤其在建模时序动态的探针上；VideoMAE次之；LTX-Video虽较弱但仍具非零信号；物理相关信息在中间至深层最显著，打乱帧序会显著降低性能（尤其在MVP上）。
AI.conclusion: 直觉物理知识在预训练视频表征中可靠涌现，但其可访问性高度依赖于预训练范式、表征深度和读出机制。

title: FlashMemory-DeepSeek-V4: Lightning Index Ultra-Long Context via Lookahead Sparse Attention
comment: Technical report. 11 pages. Code and model available at https://github.com/libertywing/FlashMemory-Deepseek-V4 and https://huggingface.co/libertywing/FlashMemory-Deepseek-V4
summary:
Conventional LLMs keep the full KV cache loaded during decoding, causing a severe GPU memory bottleneck for ultra-long context serving. In this report, we propose Lookahead Sparse Attention (LSA), a novel inference paradigm powered by a Neural Memory Indexer built upon the DeepSeek-V4 architecture. Rather than passively attending to all historical tokens, LSA proactively predicts future context demands and preserves only the query-critical KV chunks in the GPU memory. Crucially, we instantiate this architecture via a backbone-free decoupled training strategy. By formulating the indexer as a standard dual-encoder architecture, we train it independently using standard retrieval training frameworks without ever loading the massive backbone model into GPU memory.
  We demonstrate that this "less is more" paradigm significantly maximizes serving efficiency while acting as an effective attention denoiser in tasks that rely on long-term global memory. Across primary long-context evaluation suites (e.g., LongBench-v2, LongMemEval, and RULER), FM-DS-V4 compresses the average physical KV cache footprint down to merely 13.5% of the full-context baseline, while consistently preserving or slightly elevating downstream accuracy (+0.6% absolute margin on average). Crucially, at extreme 500K scales, FlashMemory suppresses the physical KV cache overhead by over 90% without destabilizing the backbone's core reasoning capacities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Lookahead Sparse Attention（LSA），通过神经记忆索引器动态预测并仅保留关键KV块，大幅压缩长上下文推理中的GPU内存占用，同时保持甚至提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统大语言模型在解码时需加载全部KV缓存，导致超长上下文服务中GPU内存严重瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出LSA推理范式，基于DeepSeek-V4架构构建无主干网络的解耦训练神经记忆索引器，采用双编码器结构独立训练，无需加载庞大主干模型。
AI.result: 在LongBench-v2、LongMemEval和RULER等长上下文评测套件中，KV缓存占用降至全量基准的13.5%，平均准确率提升0.6%；在500K长度下KV开销降低超90%。
AI.conclusion: LSA实现了‘少即是多’的高效服务范式，既显著提升推理效率，又作为注意力去噪器增强长程记忆任务性能。

title: Visual Prompting Meets Feature Reconstruction-Based Anomaly Detection with Dual-Teacher Supervision
summary: Recent Anomaly Detection methods achieve perfect detection and segmentation scores on well-established datasets, such as MVTec. However, many of these methods face challenges when foundational assumptions - such as consistent object scale, viewpoint, background, illumination, and centered placement - are violated. Those variations that occur render anomaly detection methods unusable in many real-world scenarios. To address these limitations, we introduce three key contributions: (1) a visual prompting pipeline that isolates objects using foreground-background masking; (2) a mechanism for unfreezing the teacher in student-teacher models to improve domain adaptability; and (3) a data augmentation strategy leveraging diffusion-generated synthetic images to enhance anomaly detection performance. We achieve a 3.5 percentage point improvement over the previous state-of-the-art on the challenging AeBAD dataset by using the Masked Multiscale Reconstruction (MMR) model as our backbone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的异常检测方法，通过视觉提示、解冻教师模型和扩散模型生成的数据增强，在AeBAD数据集上超越了先前最优方法3.5个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测方法在MVTec等标准数据集上表现优异，但在真实场景中因尺度、视角、背景、光照和物体位置等变化而失效，亟需提升鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出三方面改进：(1) 基于前景-背景掩码的视觉提示流程；(2) 在师生模型中解冻教师网络以增强域适应性；(3) 利用扩散模型生成合成图像进行数据增强；以Masked Multiscale Reconstruction (MMR) 为骨干模型。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的AeBAD数据集上，相较此前SOTA方法提升了3.5个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法显著增强了异常检测模型对现实世界多变条件的鲁棒性与适应性，为实际部署提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: Beyond FLOPs: Benchmarking Real Inference Acceleration of LLM Pruning under a GEMM-Centric Taxonomy
summary: Pruning has emerged as a dominant paradigm for accelerating large language model (LLM) inference, spanning a broad spectrum of methods that remove computation across tokens, layers, heads, dimensions, and attention patterns. Despite sharing the same objective, these pruning approaches induce fundamentally different execution behaviors, causing realized speedups to depend heavily on hardware and kernel implementations. Consequently, the practical acceleration benefits of different pruning families remain poorly understood. In this work, we introduce a GEMM-centric taxonomy that reorganizes existing pruning methods according to the logical \textbf{M}, \textbf{N}, and \textbf{K} dimensions of general matrix multiplication (GEMM). Leveraging this abstraction, we build a unified benchmarking framework that enables implementation-consistent comparison across the pruning design space and systematically characterizes the acceleration--quality Pareto frontier. Our results show that static depth pruning remains the strongest Pareto-optimal baseline and stays closest to its theoretical acceleration upper bound in memory-bounded scenarios. During prefill, the frontier transitions from static depth at low quality loss (0\%--4\%), to dynamic depth at moderate loss (5\%--16\%), and finally to static width pruning at higher loss levels (17\%--26\%). These findings establish the first unified view of the practical limits of pruning-based LLM acceleration and provide guidance for future pruning research.\footnote{Code is available at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/LLM-Pruning/tree/main/PruningInferSim}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以GEMM为中心的剪枝方法分类法，并构建了统一基准框架，系统评估不同剪枝策略在加速与质量间的权衡，揭示了各类剪枝在实际硬件上的性能边界。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM剪枝方法虽目标一致，但因执行行为差异大，导致实际加速效果高度依赖硬件和内核实现，缺乏统一、可比的评估视角。
AI.method: 提出基于GEMM的M/N/K维度的剪枝分类体系，并构建实现一致的统一基准框架，用于系统性刻画加速-质量Pareto前沿。
AI.result: 发现静态深度剪枝在内存受限场景下最接近理论加速上限；预填充阶段，Pareto最优剪枝策略随质量损失增加依次为：静态深度（0%–4%）、动态深度（5%–16%）、静态宽度（17%–26%）。
AI.conclusion: 建立了首个关于剪枝加速实际极限的统一认知框架，为未来剪枝研究提供实践指导。

title: SoccerNet 2026 Player-Centric Ball-Action Spotting:Retraining and Post-Processing Extensions to the FOOTPASS Baselines
comment: CVPR 2026 SoccerNet Player Centric Ball Action Spotting Challenge, Rank 7
summary: We describe our system for the SoccerNet 2026 Player-Centric Ball-Action Spotting Challenge, which requires predicting who performs which action and when, across eight classes in broadcast soccer. Building on the three FOOTPASS baselines [1] (TAAD, TAAD+GNN, and TAAD+DST), we contribute four extensions: (1) gradient check pointing to enable full-backbone fine-tuning on a single GPU; (2) fusion of GNN logits into the DST encoder, combining graph-based tactical context with per-player visual features; (3) square-root frequency class weighting to address the 213:1 pass-to-tackle imbalance in the training data; and (4) a post processing pipeline comprising per-class logit gating, temporal frame refinement, jersey re-assignment, and a two-model ensemble. Our system achieves 0.548 Macro F1 on the test set and 0.446 on the challenge set (server evaluation).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于SoccerNet 2026球员中心球动作识别挑战的系统，在八个动作类别上实现了对‘谁在何时执行何种动作’的预测，通过改进FOOTPASS基线模型并引入四项关键扩展，在测试集和挑战集上分别达到0.548和0.446的Macro F1分数。
AI.motivation: 解决SoccerNet 2026 Player-Centric Ball-Action Spotting挑战任务，即在广播足球视频中细粒度地定位每个球员执行的八类球相关动作（如传球、铲球），尤其应对严重类别不平衡（传球:铲球=213:1）和计算资源限制问题。
AI.method: 基于FOOTPASS三大基线（TAAD、TAAD+GNN、TAAD+DST），提出四项改进：(1) 梯度检查点技术以支持单GPU全主干微调；(2) 将GNN输出logits融入DST编码器，融合图结构战术上下文与个体视觉特征；(3) 采用平方根频率类别加权缓解数据不平衡；(4) 设计包含逐类logit门控、时序帧精炼、球衣号重分配及双模型集成的后处理流程。
AI.result: 在SoccerNet 2026挑战官方测试集上取得0.548 Macro F1，在服务器评估的挑战集上取得0.446 Macro F1，显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提四方面改进——高效训练策略、多源特征融合、不平衡学习机制与精细化后处理——共同提升了球员中心动作识别的精度与鲁棒性，验证了结合图建模、视觉特征与领域知识后处理的有效性。

title: Stabilizing On-Policy Distillation for MLLM Reasoning with Global Normalization
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) has recently emerged as an important post-training paradigm. By using a stronger teacher model to provide dense, fine-grained supervision for sampled trajectories, OPD offers a clear advantage over reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), which typically depends on sparse binary or outcome-based environmental feedback. However, naive token-level distillation can suffer from gradient instability, due to magnitude misalignment in outlier states. To address this issue, we propose Globally Normalized Distillation Policy Optimization (GNDPO), a practical method that stabilizes optimization by transforming raw KL scores into batch-level relative advantages. This normalization effectively mitigates gradient explosions while retaining the benefits of token-level guidance. Experimental results show that GNDPO substantially improves training robustness and downstream performance across multimodal reasoning tasks. The code is released at https://github.com/OPPO-Mente-Lab/GNDPO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GNDPO方法，通过全局归一化解决在线策略蒸馏中因异常状态导致的梯度不稳定问题，提升多模态推理任务的训练鲁棒性和下游性能。
AI.motivation: 现有在线策略蒸馏（OPD）虽优于稀疏奖励强化学习，但朴素的词元级蒸馏易因异常状态下的KL散度幅值不匹配导致梯度不稳定。
AI.method: 提出全局归一化蒸馏策略优化（GNDPO），将原始KL得分转化为批次级相对优势，以稳定优化过程并保留词元级指导优势。
AI.result: 实验表明GNDPO显著提升了多模态推理任务中的训练鲁棒性和下游性能。
AI.conclusion: GNDPO是一种实用且有效的在线策略蒸馏改进方法，能缓解梯度爆炸问题，同时保持细粒度监督优势。

title: GenEyePose: Patient-Free, Knowledge-Based Saccadic Eye Movement Modeling for Digital Neurophysiologic Biomarker Development
summary: Eye movements, including saccades, are widely regarded as highly sensitive and objective biomarkers of neurophysiologic states. Detecting saccadic signatures in neurologic diseases offers a rapid, portable alternative to brain imaging, avoiding access and cost barriers. Currently, there are no robust AI-enabled video-oculographic solutions (e.g., digital biomarkers) for screening, triaging, or localizing brain abnormalities due to privacy issues and scarce datasets. In this work, we propose the first fully synthetic, patient-free, multimodal eye movement generation pipeline for generalizable saccade analysis. Using this synthetic dataset, we trained a deep learning classifier to distinguish between normal and abnormal (hypometria and hypermetria) saccadic accuracies and evaluated its performance on real-world clinical data. The model achieved an AUROC of 0.76 and a sensitivity of 0.71, showing that the synthetic data has strong potential to generalize for clinical applications, including as a screening tool in at-home and emergency room settings or a tool for precise neuroanatomic localization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需真实患者数据的全合成、多模态眼动生成流程，用于训练深度学习模型识别正常与异常扫视（如低幅/高幅扫视），在临床数据上达到AUROC 0.76和敏感度0.71，展示了其在家庭筛查、急诊分诊及神经解剖定位中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有AI驱动的视频眼动分析工具受限于隐私问题和真实数据稀缺，缺乏可用于神经疾病筛查、分诊和病灶定位的鲁棒数字生物标志物。
AI.method: 构建首个完全合成、患者无关、多模态的眼动（尤其是扫视）生成流水线，并基于该合成数据训练深度学习分类器，以区分正常与异常（低幅/高幅）扫视准确性。
AI.result: 模型在真实临床数据上取得AUROC为0.76、敏感度为0.71的结果，验证了合成数据具备良好的临床泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 全合成眼动数据可有效支撑AI模型开发，有望成为便携、低成本、隐私安全的神经功能评估工具，适用于居家筛查、急诊快速评估及神经解剖定位。

title: From Shortcuts to Reasoning: Robust Post-Training of Theory of Mind with Reinforcement Learning
summary: Theory of Mind (ToM) is a must-acquire skill for modern foundation model systems to operate effectively and safely in the real world. Recent works have explored honing ToM via post-training; however, we show that such progress is confounded by a pervasive "shortcut" issue: tasks can reach up to 99% accuracy by simply exploiting spurious causal correlations, leading to a false sense of ToM. Motivated by this, we first develop a framework to systematically examine ToM datasets for shortcuts and provide guidance for future development. We find that questions reducible to pure state tracking, such as "belief," are especially shortcut-prone compared to mind questions, such as "intention," where reasoning beyond tracking is required. Using four shortcut-free datasets across three ToM contexts, we then comprehensively study whether Reinforcement Fine-Tuning with verifiable rewards and explicit reasoning chains, called Thinking-RFT, elevates ToM beyond Supervised Fine-Tuning, or SFT. Our key findings are as follows. First, Thinking-RFT effectively improves ToM in all scenarios, with a 6% improvement over SFT, particularly in complex higher-order reasoning, with a 10% improvement over SFT, and multimodal cases, with a 7% improvement over SFT. It also generalizes notably better to unseen domains and higher-order queries while being more robust to counterfactuals. Second, ToM benefits specifically from the joint effect of reasoning and RL: Thinking-RFT outperforms Non-Thinking-RFT by 7% on average. Third, RFT works by learning to ground its reasoning on anchor cues, such as keywords and state changes, that correspond to causal factors. We believe our study is useful for developing effective and robust ToM post-training datasets and advancing critical ToM capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了当前ToM（心智理论）后训练中普遍存在的‘捷径’问题，即模型通过利用虚假因果关联而非真正推理获得高准确率；为此提出系统性检测框架，并基于无捷径数据集验证了结合可验证奖励与显式推理链的强化微调方法（Thinking-RFT）显著优于监督微调（SFT），尤其在高阶、多模态及泛化场景下。
AI.motivation: 现有ToM后训练方法因任务中存在虚假相关性（shortcut）导致性能虚高，无法真实反映模型的心智推理能力，亟需构建更鲁棒、可验证的评估与训练范式。
AI.method: 1）构建ToM数据集shortcut检测框架，识别易被状态跟踪等浅层线索解决的问题；2）设计四个无shortcut的ToM数据集，覆盖三种ToM场景；3）提出Thinking-RFT方法——融合显式推理链与基于可验证奖励的强化微调，并对比SFT、Non-Thinking-RFT等基线。
AI.result: Thinking-RFT在所有ToM任务上平均提升6%，高阶推理提升10%，多模态提升7%；泛化性与反事实鲁棒性更强；其优势源于推理链与RL的协同作用（较Non-Thinking-RFT平均+7%）；模型学会锚定关键词和状态变化等因果线索进行推理。
AI.conclusion: ToM能力的真正提升依赖于消除数据捷径并联合使用显式推理与强化学习；本研究为构建可信、可泛化的ToM后训练方法与数据集提供了理论基础与实践指南。

title: Cranio-Diff: Diffusion-based Cross-domain Craniofacial Reconstruction with 2D X-ray Skull Guidance and Structural Identity Constraints
summary: The state-of-the-art generative models, such as CycleGAN, Pix2Pix, and diffusion models have demonstrated remarkable performance in the face generation task. However, they fail to effectively capture cross-modality semantic information in craniofacial reconstruction when translating from the skull (x-ray) to the face (optical) domain, due to a mismatch in the alignment of structural identity across modalities. To address this issue, we propose Cranio-Diff, a diffusion-based framework for cross-domain cranio-facial reconstruction from 2D X-ray skull images. The proposed approach integrates skull-conditioned structural guidance through ControlNet with biometric text conditioning to generate a face which is more semantically and structurally aligned with the given skull. The proposed Cranio-diff method is evaluated on skull-face dataset obtained from X-ray scans of 120 subjects in lateral and frontal views. To enable controlled evaluation, each face image is synthesised across three age groups (25, 45, 65) and three BMI variations of -10%, baseline and +10%, yielding 4320 paired samples. To the best of our knowledge, this is the only X-ray-face dataset with this magnitude. Extensive experiments showed that the proposed method outperforms recent existing approaches in both generated image quality and retrieval task. Finally, to evaluate the performance of our proposed method, we have evaluated the quality of the generated image using FID, IS, SSIM, LPIPS, PSNR and ArcFace score. Additionally, retrieval performance is evaluated using recall@k, mAP@k and MRR@k. Obtained experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can be used as an alternate tool in providing aid in forensic investigations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cranio-Diff，一种基于扩散模型的颅面重建方法，通过ControlNet结构引导和生物特征文本条件控制，从2D X光颅骨图像生成语义与结构更对齐的面部图像，并在自建大规模X光-面部配对数据集上验证其优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型（如CycleGAN、Pix2Pix、扩散模型）在颅面重建任务中难以有效捕获X光颅骨与光学面部之间的跨模态语义信息，主因是跨模态结构身份对齐不匹配。
AI.method: 提出Cranio-Diff框架：结合ControlNet实现颅骨条件下的结构引导，并引入生物特征文本（如年龄、BMI）进行多条件控制；构建含120名受试者、覆盖多种年龄与BMI组合的X光-面部配对数据集（共4320样本）。
AI.result: 在FID、IS、SSIM、LPIPS、PSNR、ArcFace及检索指标（recall@k、mAP@k、MRR@k）上均优于现有方法；生成图像质量高且具备法医应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: Cranio-Diff为跨模态颅面重建提供了新范式，可作为法医调查中的辅助工具。

title: Addressing Market Regime Changes and Heavy-Tailed Returns in Portfolio Optimization via Bayesian VAR and Elliptical Black-Litterman
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Extends our prior work [Mikriukov et al., ICIC 2025] on Black-Litterman under Elliptical Distributions (BLED). Manuscript under review
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) frameworks for portfolio optimization have shown promise for their ability to learn allocation rules dynamically from market data. However, these models fail to account for fat-tailed returns, which characterize actual market behavior with more frequent extreme events. Furthermore, historical data is treated homogeneously, without accounting for temporal importance, leading models to fail during regime changes. We propose a new BAVAR-BLED algorithm that combines methods derived from Bayesian-Averaging Vector Autoregressive (BAVAR) and the Black-Litterman model using Elliptical Distributions (BLED) within a TD3 architecture. BAVAR captures a set of vector autoregressive representations that consider multi-scale temporal features, enabling adaptive allocation decisions based on regime-aware estimates of return expectations and dispersion matrices. These estimates serve as prior inputs to BLED, a model that uses Student's t-distributions, allowing for more realistic fat tail return estimates. The BAVAR-BLED algorithm uses transformer networks for view construction and CNNs for risk-aversion estimates, which modify dynamic allocation decisions based on market conditions. An evaluation of 29 Dow Jones Industrial Average constituents over a decade-long market period shows that BAVAR-BLED significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving Sharpe and Sortino ratios of 1.72 and 2.70, respectively, and total returns of 57.26%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BAVAR-BLED算法，结合贝叶斯平均向量自回归（BAVAR）与基于椭圆分布的Black-Litterman模型（BLED），嵌入TD3框架，以应对资产收益厚尾性和市场状态变化问题；通过Transformer构建观点、CNN估计风险厌恶，提升动态资产配置性能，在道指成分股十年实证中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习投资组合优化方法未能有效建模金融收益的厚尾特性，且将历史数据同等对待，忽视时间重要性，导致在市场状态切换时表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出BAVAR-BLED算法：BAVAR模块提取多尺度时序特征，生成状态感知的收益期望与协方差先验；BLED模块基于Student's t分布建模厚尾收益；整体嵌入TD3框架，并用Transformer构建市场观点、CNN估计风险厌恶系数。
AI.result: 在29只道琼斯工业平均指数成分股、为期十年的实证中，BAVAR-BLED取得Sharpe比率1.72、Sortino比率2.70、总收益率57.26%，显著优于当前最优方法。
AI.conclusion: BAVAR-BLED通过融合贝叶斯时序建模、厚尾分布假设与深度强化学习架构，有效提升了动态资产配置在真实市场中的鲁棒性与收益表现。

title: HDSL: A Hierarchical Domain-Specific Language for Structured 3D Indoor Scene Generation and Localized Editing with LLM Agents
summary: Text-driven indoor scene generation and editing require an intermediate representation that language models can both produce and revise. Existing LLM-based systems often rely on scene graphs or global constraint lists, which are compact but underspecify local geometry and make instruction-based edits difficult to localize. We frame this problem as structured program generation and local program repair, and propose Hierarchical Descriptive Scene Language (HDSL), an XML/CSS-style domain-specific language for structured 3D indoor scenes. HDSL represents rooms, regions, objects, and support surfaces as a tree with local coordinates, making complex scenes easier to plan recursively and easier to retrieve for editing. Our pipeline uses LLM agents to generate HDSL subtrees with bounded verification, grounds non-virtual nodes through multimodal asset retrieval, and applies force-directed layout optimization to repair boundary and collision errors. For editing, Hierarchical Retrieval-Augmented Generation retrieves the relevant subtree, asks the LLM to rewrite only that local context, and merges the result back through a deterministic three-way merge.
