In our reproduced benchmark, HDSL improves average object coverage, text-scene alignment, and generation time over full text-to-scene baselines while remaining competitive with recent layout-only reproductions on geometry metrics; for editing, HRAG reduces token use by $5.22\times$ and runtime by $6.19\times$, produces valid DSL for all eight paired edits, and better preserves unrelated scene objects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于文本驱动室内场景生成与编辑的分层描述性场景语言（HDSL），通过结构化程序生成与局部修复，提升场景几何表达、编辑局部性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的室内场景生成方法依赖场景图或全局约束列表，难以精确表达局部几何结构，且指令驱动的编辑难以定位和执行。
AI.method: 提出HDSL——一种类似XML/CSS的领域专用语言，以树形结构表示房间、区域、物体和支持面；结合LLM代理生成带验证的子树、多模态资产检索实现节点具身化、力导向布局优化修复碰撞/边界错误；编辑阶段采用分层检索增强生成（HRAG）进行局部子树重写与三路确定性合并。
AI.result: 在复现基准中，HDSL在物体覆盖率、文本-场景对齐度和生成时间上优于端到端文生场景基线，几何指标接近最新布局方法；编辑方面，HRAG将token消耗降低5.22倍、运行时间降低6.19倍，8组配对编辑全部生成有效DSL，且更好保留无关物体。
AI.conclusion: HDSL为语言模型提供了可生成、可验证、可局部编辑的结构化3D场景中间表示，显著提升了文本驱动室内场景生成与编辑的质量、效率与可控性。

title: Hybridizing Equilibrium Propagation with Ising Machines for Efficient Energy-Based Learning
summary: The rapid evolution of artificial intelligence has led to substantial advances in deep neural networks. Nonetheless, conventional GPU-based training remains highly energy-demanding, motivating the exploration of physical dynamics and compatible energy-based learning schemes, such as equilibrium propagation (EP). EP-based training, however, frequently suffers from convergence to local minima due to phase-space contraction. Here we introduce an Ising-dynamics-inspired equilibrium-propagation framework in which dissipative Hopfield relaxation is replaced by an extended phase-space dynamics with conjugate variables. The resulting training paradigm keeps the local two-phase learning rule of EP while changing the physical route by which neural states reach equilibrium. We show that this dynamics lowers effective energy barriers, accelerates convergence, improves noise robustness, and trains deep convolutional Hopfield networks on MNIST, FashionMNIST, and CIFAR-10 with performance comparable to backpropagation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受伊辛动力学启发的平衡传播（EP）新框架，通过引入共轭变量扩展相空间，替代传统霍普菲尔德耗散弛豫，从而改善收敛性、鲁棒性，并在多个数据集上达到与反向传播相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统GPU训练能耗高，而现有基于物理的平衡传播方法易陷入局部极小值，主要源于相空间收缩问题。
AI.method: 提出一种受伊辛模型启发的EP框架，用含共轭变量的扩展相空间动力学替代霍普菲尔德耗散弛豫，在保持EP局部两阶段学习规则的同时改变神经状态达平衡的物理路径。
AI.result: 该方法降低了有效能垒、加速收敛、增强噪声鲁棒性，并成功训练深层卷积霍普菲尔德网络，在MNIST、FashionMNIST和CIFAR-10上性能媲美反向传播。
AI.conclusion: 扩展相空间的EP新范式为低能耗、物理可实现的类脑学习提供了可行路径，兼具理论创新与实际训练效果。

title: Hybrid Robustness Verification for Spatio-Temporal Neural Networks
comment: Accepted at the 9th International Symposium on AI Verification (SAIV 2026)
summary: With AI increasingly deployed in safety-critical systems, providing formal robustness guarantees for the underlying models is essential. Existing verification methods either rely on overly conservative approximations or incur prohibitive computational costs. For example, the use of lp-norm perturbations in video settings encodes the belief that the adversary can inject noise in every video frame. In practice, adversarial perturbations exhibit structured spatial and temporal correlations, constrained to lower-dimensional, semantically meaningful subspaces. In this work, we study robustness verification of 3D CNNs processing video and volumetric inputs, targeting applications in action recognition (UCF-101), autonomous driving (Udacity), and medical imaging (MedMNIST) exploiting realistic assumptions on adversarial strength by modelling them as spatio-temporal constraints - where the attacker can modify either a subset of frames or patches within a set of consecutive frames. We demonstrate that modelling realistic constraints enables tighter approximations. We introduce Spatio-Temporal Bound Propagation (STBP), a verification framework that computes an exact closed-form characterization of the first convolutional layer and propagates certified bounds through subsequent layers using scalable approximations. Computing the exact closed form provides the tightest bounds for the first convolutional layer. Thus, we utilise approximation methods in the remainder of the network. To spur further progress in this field, we propose ST-Bench, a verification benchmark for autonomous driving and activity recognition, to systematically evaluate verifiable robustness. Compared to existing verification-based approaches, STBP provides stronger robustness guarantees with significantly improved scalability, achieving 1.7x higher certified robust accuracy under identical perturbation budgets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向3D CNN的时空鲁棒性验证框架STBP，通过建模更现实的时空对抗约束（如仅修改部分帧或连续帧内的局部块），实现比现有方法更紧致、更可扩展的认证鲁棒性保证，并构建了新基准ST-Bench。
AI.motivation: 现有视频/体数据模型的鲁棒性验证方法要么过于保守（如使用全帧lp范数扰动），要么计算开销过大；而实际对抗扰动具有时空结构相关性，应建模为低维语义子空间上的约束。
AI.method: 提出Spatio-Temporal Bound Propagation（STBP）：对首层卷积精确闭式求解认证界，后续层采用可扩展近似传播；将对抗扰动建模为时空约束（如限定修改帧数或连续帧内局部patch）。
AI.result: 在UCF-101、Udacity和MedMNIST上验证有效；相比现有方法，在相同扰动预算下认证鲁棒精度提升1.7倍；并发布新基准ST-Bench。
AI.conclusion: 建模现实时空对抗约束能显著提升验证紧致性与可扩展性；STBP为3D视觉模型提供了更强、更实用的形式化鲁棒性保障。

title: Counterfactual Transport Flows for Offline Conservative Trajectory Refinement
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) offers a path to policy improvement from logged data alone, using historical returns or other measurable outcomes as world feedback. A key difficulty is improving observed behavior without extrapolating beyond what the offline data supports. We propose \emph{counterfactual transport flows}, a source-conditioned trajectory refinement framework for offline decision-making guided by world feedback. Given a low-feedback candidate trajectory, we construct local preference pairs from offline data by retrieving nearby trajectories in latent trajectory space with higher task-specific feedback, and use them as weak supervision for conservative refinement. The framework learns instance-specific refinement directions: at inference time, a refinement strength parameter controls how far the candidate trajectory is transported, enabling a trade-off between preserving the original behavior and applying stronger improvement. Experiments on D4RL benchmarks, including AntMaze and MuJoCo tasks, show that our method improves behavior from historical returns as world feedback, while providing interpretable trajectory-level refinement paths.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'反事实传输流'的离线强化学习框架，通过基于世界反馈（如历史回报）对候选轨迹进行保守且可解释的局部细化，实现策略改进。
AI.motivation: 离线强化学习中，如何在不超出离线数据支持范围的前提下改进已有行为是一个关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出'反事实传输流'框架：对低反馈候选轨迹，在潜在轨迹空间中检索具有更高任务反馈的邻近轨迹构成偏好对，作为弱监督信号进行实例特定的保守轨迹细化；推理时通过调节细化强度参数控制轨迹迁移程度。
AI.result: 在D4RL基准（包括AntMaze和MuJoCo任务）上验证了该方法能有效利用历史回报提升行为，并提供可解释的轨迹级细化路径。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了基于世界反馈的安全、可控、可解释的离线策略改进，平衡了行为保真与性能提升。

title: SemDINO: A DINOv3-Driven Network for Cross-Temporal Semantic Alignment in Change Detection
summary: Semantic change detection (SCD) aims to simultaneously locate land-cover changes and identify semantic categories before and after transition. However, existing methods suffer from insufficient cross-temporal alignment, weak multi-scale representation, and poor robustness to pseudo-changes caused by illumination, season, and registration noise. To address these issues, we propose a novel end-to-end semantic change detection network named SemDINO, which integrates a dual-branch encoder, multi-scale temporal interaction, semantic purification, change enhancement, and decoupled multi-task prediction into a unified framework. Specifically, we construct a dual-branch encoder that combines a CNN backbone and frozen DINOv3 features via gated pyramid fusion, enabling rich multi-scale semantic representation. Then, a multi-scale temporal bidirectional transformer interaction (M-TBTT) module is proposed to achieve global cross-temporal feature alignment and information interaction. To further enhance genuine changes and suppress pseudo-variations, we introduce semantic purification (SCP), bidirectional change enhancement (BiChangeEnhance), and multi-scale change enhancement (MCE) modules collaboratively. Finally, a multi-branch CD prediction head is designed to jointly output binary change mask, bi-temporal semantic maps, and edge constraint. Extensive experiments on public remote sensing CD datasets demonstrate that SemDINO achieves superior performance and generalization ability against state-of-the-art methods, especially in complex scenarios with interference factors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端语义变化检测网络SemDINO，通过双分支编码器、多尺度时序交互、语义净化与变化增强等模块，提升跨时序对齐、多尺度表征能力，并抑制光照、季节等引起的伪变化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跨时序对齐、多尺度表征及对光照、季节和配准噪声引起的伪变化鲁棒性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出SemDINO网络：采用CNN与冻结DINOv3特征融合的双分支编码器；引入多尺度时序双向Transformer交互（M-TBTT）模块；结合语义净化（SCP）、双向变化增强（BiChangeEnhance）和多尺度变化增强（MCE）模块；设计解耦多任务预测头输出变化图、双时相语义图和边缘约束。
AI.result: 在多个公开遥感变化检测数据集上显著优于SOTA方法，尤其在含干扰因素的复杂场景中表现出更强泛化能力与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SemDINO通过结构化建模时序语义一致性与变化敏感性，有效解决了语义变化检测中的关键挑战，为高精度遥感变化分析提供了新范式。

title: Optimizing Energy-based Neural Network Training with Coherent Ising Machine
summary: While Ising machines serve as advanced physical solvers for the Ising model,enabling applications in combinatorial optimization and neural network training,their scalability for large-scale neural networks remains constrained by hardware connectivity limitations and suboptimal training methodologies. In this work,we leverage a Coherent Ising Machine (CIM) to train an energy-based neural network using Equilibrium Propagation, achieving performance comparable to existing software-based implementations. We further enhance the algorithm by integrating the Adam optimizer to solve for the ground state of a Hopfield energy network, significantly improving convergence speed and solution accuracy. Additionally, we demonstrate the scalability of our approach across deeper network architectures and convolutional operations. Our results highlight the potential of CIM dynamics as a scalable platform for training complex neural networks, offering a pathway toward energy-efficient implementations via analog circuits, optoelectronics, or integrated photonics. This work establishes a novel physical framework for next-generation AI hardware development.

AI.tldr: 本文利用相干伊辛机（CIM）结合平衡传播和Adam优化器训练能量型神经网络，显著提升收敛速度与精度，并验证其在深层网络和卷积结构中的可扩展性，为低功耗AI硬件提供新物理范式。
AI.motivation: 伊辛机在大规模神经网络训练中受限于硬件连通性与训练方法不足，亟需提升可扩展性与能效。
AI.method: 采用相干伊辛机（CIM）实现能量型神经网络训练，结合平衡传播（Equilibrium Propagation）与Adam优化器求解Hopfield能量网络基态，并拓展至深层及卷积架构。
AI.result: 训练性能媲美软件实现，收敛速度与解精度显著提升，且在更深网络和卷积操作中展现良好可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: CIM动力学可作为可扩展、高能效的神经网络训练物理平台，为基于模拟电路、光电子或集成光子的下一代AI硬件奠定基础。

title: POTATR: A Lightweight Image-to-Graph Model for Page-Level Table Extraction
summary: Large-scale document processing requires contextually aware table extraction (TE) that is both accurate and efficient. Yet current approaches require billions of parameters, hundreds of autoregressive steps, or costly API inference. Motivated by this, we introduce the Page-Object Table Transformer (POTATR), a lightweight 29M parameter image-to-graph model that extends the Table Transformer (TATR) for contextualized page-level TE. POTATR outperforms all models tested on the PubTables-v2 Single Pages benchmark -- including frontier MLLMs -- achieving $\textrm{GriTS}_\textrm{Con}$ of 0.964 while running over 130$\times$ faster at roughly 300$\times$ lower cost. Further, POTATR's output is spatially grounded: every recognized element has a bounding box, enabling visual verification and geometric text assignment. As a result, POTATR performs unified page-level TE while composing with other models, enabling extension to scanned documents via external OCR and to full-document TE via techniques like cross-page merging. Code and models will be released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级的图像到图模型POTATR（Page-Object Table Transformer），用于上下文感知的页面级表格提取，参数仅29M，在PubTables-v2单页基准上性能超越所有对比模型，速度提升130倍、成本降低300倍，并支持空间定位与多模型协同扩展。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模文档处理中的表格提取方法存在参数量大、自回归步数多或API调用昂贵等问题，亟需更高效、准确且低成本的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出POTATR模型，基于Table Transformer（TATR）进行扩展，构建轻量级（29M参数）图像到图架构，支持页面级上下文建模与空间定位输出（含边界框）。
AI.result: 在PubTables-v2单页基准上取得GriTS_Con 0.964，显著优于包括前沿MLLM在内的所有对比模型；推理速度快130倍、成本低300倍；输出带空间坐标，支持OCR集成与跨页合并。
AI.conclusion: POTATR实现了高效、准确、可扩展的页面级表格提取，兼具轻量化、空间可解释性与模块化集成能力，为实际文档理解系统提供了实用新范式。

title: Claw-R1: A Step-Level Data Middleware System for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Agentic reinforcement learning (RL) has become an important post-training paradigm for turning LLMs from static chatbots into interactive agents, giving rise to representative applications such as OpenClaw. Existing work mainly focuses on policy optimization algorithms and training frameworks, but pays less attention to the full data lifecycle of agent-environment interactions, from data production to training consumption. To bridge this gap, we present Claw-R1, an interactive step-level data middleware system for agentic RL. Claw-R1 connects heterogeneous agent runtimes with RL training backends through two core components: a Gateway Server and a Data Pool. The Gateway Server captures multi-turn interaction steps through a unified LLM API entry point, while the Data Pool organizes them into step-level records consisting of prompt IDs, response IDs, rewards and other metadata. In our demo, users can interactively inspect live trajectories, examine the state, action, and reward of each step, curate data by quality and readiness, and configure training-ready batches for different downstream RL algorithms. Overall, Claw-R1 treats agent interaction traces as managed data assets rather than temporary runtime logs. Through this demonstration, we hope to encourage the community to recognize the importance of data management in agentic RL. Our code is available at https://github.com/AgentR1/Claw-R1 and the demonstration video can be found at link https://youtu.be/Pw47dAOw6B0.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Claw-R1，一个面向智能体强化学习（Agentic RL）的交互式步级数据中间件系统，旨在统一管理智能体与环境交互产生的全生命周期数据，提升数据在训练中的可复用性与可控性。
AI.motivation: 现有工作聚焦于策略优化算法和训练框架，忽视了智能体-环境交互数据从生成到训练消费的完整生命周期管理。
AI.method: 设计并实现Claw-R1系统，包含Gateway Server（统一捕获多轮交互步骤）和Data Pool（组织为含prompt ID、response ID、reward等元信息的步级记录），支持交互式轨迹检查、质量筛选与训练批次配置。
AI.result: 构建了一个可交互、可管理、可配置的步级数据中间件系统，将智能体交互轨迹视为受管数据资产而非临时日志，并开源代码与演示视频。
AI.conclusion: 强调数据管理在Agentic RL中的核心地位，呼吁社区重视交互数据的系统化治理，为后续研究提供基础设施支持。

title: End-to-End Optimization of Incoherent Imaging for Classification Under Detector-Limited Readout
summary: End-to-end co-optimization of optical front-ends (e.g. metasurfaces) and neural network back-ends has been widely applied to imaging tasks, yet a formalism characterizing when and why such systems outperform conventional lens-based imaging is largely lacking. This paper focuses on object classification, a central imaging task, and asks when end-to-end optimization of a phase mask for incoherent imaging improves performance over a conventional focusing lens. We find that these gains arise primarily under constrained detector readout and are limited under full detector readout. In the latter setting, we prove that no incoherent phase mask exceeds the ideal-channel mutual information between detector measurements and class labels; a conventional focusing lens approaches this ceiling, and joint optimization yields no empirical gain. When detector readout is constrained -- by coarse spatial sampling or a limited number of measurements -- optimized optics can substantially improve classification by increasing class separability in the detector measurements. These gains are largest under low detector noise and shrink as noise grows, because the optics shape the signal before it reaches the detector but cannot remove noise added afterward. The advantage also depends on the spectral structure of the task: co-design helps most when class-discriminative content is concentrated at lower spatial frequencies than within-class variation. We develop a theoretical framework formalizing these distinctions and test its predictions on synthetic data and standard benchmarks (MNIST, FashionMNIST, SVHN).

AI.tldr: 本文研究了端到端联合优化光学前端（如相位掩模）与神经网络后端在物体分类任务中的性能优势条件，指出其增益主要出现在探测器读出受限（如空间采样粗糙或测量数少）时，而在全读出下无显著增益；理论证明聚焦透镜已接近理想信道互信息上限，并通过合成数据和标准数据集验证了噪声水平、频谱结构对协同设计效益的影响。
AI.motivation: 缺乏对端到端光-电协同优化为何及何时优于传统镜头成像的系统性理论解释，尤其在物体分类这一核心成像任务中。
AI.method: 建立理论框架，分析相位掩模在非相干成像中对分类性能的影响，结合信息论（互信息上界）、信号频谱特性与探测器约束建模，并在合成数据及MNIST、FashionMNIST、SVHN等基准上实验验证。
AI.result: 1）全探测器读出下，传统聚焦透镜逼近理想互信息上限，联合优化无实证增益；2）读出受限时，优化光学可显著提升类间可分性；3）增益随探测器噪声增大而减小；4）当类间区分信息集中在较低空间频率时协同设计收益最大。
AI.conclusion: 端到端光-电协同优化并非普遍优于传统成像，其有效性高度依赖于探测器读出能力、噪声水平与任务频谱结构；该工作为智能成像系统的设计提供了理论判据与实用指导。

title: Improved Convergence Analysis of Topology Dependence in Decentralized SGD
summary: Decentralized SGD is a fundamental algorithm in decentralized learning, although the influence of an underlying network topology on its convergence behavior is not yet fully understood. Existing convergence analyses have shown that topologies with a small spectral gap significantly deteriorate the convergence rate of Decentralized SGD in both homogeneous and heterogeneous cases. However, many prior papers have reported that indeed the choice of the topology has a significant experimental impact in the heterogeneous case, but has little experimental impact on training behavior in the homogeneous case. In this paper, we present a tighter convergence analysis of Decentralized SGD, offering a more precise understanding of how topologies affect the convergence rate than the prior analysis. Specifically, unlike existing convergence analyses that used only the spectral gap as a property of the topology, our novel analysis shows that all eigenvalues of the mixing matrix affect the convergence rate. Throughout the experiments, we carefully evaluated the convergence behavior of Decentralized SGD and demonstrated that our novel convergence analysis can more accurately describe the effect of topology on the convergence rate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种更紧致的去中心化SGD收敛性分析，指出混合矩阵的所有特征值而非仅谱隙影响收敛速率，并通过实验验证了该分析对拓扑结构影响的更准确刻画。
AI.motivation: 现有分析仅用谱隙描述网络拓扑对去中心化SGD收敛的影响，但实验显示在同质数据下拓扑影响甚微，而理论预测不一致，需更精细的分析工具。
AI.method: 提出一种新的收敛性分析框架，将混合矩阵的所有特征值纳入收敛率表达式，而非仅依赖谱隙；并通过系统实验验证该分析对不同拓扑的实际预测能力。
AI.result: 新分析表明所有特征值共同影响收敛速率；实验结果证实该分析比仅依赖谱隙的传统分析更能准确反映拓扑对收敛行为的实际影响，尤其在同质与异质场景下均具更高一致性。
AI.conclusion: 混合矩阵的全部特征谱信息是理解去中心化SGD收敛行为的关键，单一谱隙指标过于粗略；本工作为网络拓扑设计与算法分析提供了更精细的理论基础。

title: The Injection Paradox: Brand-Level Suppression in Safety-Trained LLM Recommendations via RAG Context Injection
comment: 16 pages, 1 figure, 15 tables. Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on Failure Modes in Agentic AI (FAGEN), a non-archival venue
summary: We present a reproducible failure mode of safety training in RAG-based LLM recommendation -- the Injection Paradox -- in which prompt injections embedded in retrieved documents backfire against the attacker, suppressing the target brand below the injection-free baseline. In safety-trained Claude models, documents containing prompt injections suffer a sharp drop in recommendation rate, and this suppression propagates beyond the injected document to unmodified documents of the same brand. In Claude Opus 4.6, the target brand drops from a 54% baseline to zero top-2 recommendations across all 50 trials, even though only 1 of 4 brand documents in the corpus contains an injection. The directional pattern is reproduced in counterfactual experiments and across three brands. A contrasting result across the GPT models tested, where the same injection instead increases recommendations, suggests model-family differences in how injection-like context affects recommendation behavior. These findings raise the technical possibility of a reverse-attack scenario in which an adversary embeds injections in a competitor's documents to suppress the competitor's brand via safety-sensitive model behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了RAG系统中安全训练引发的一种反直觉失败模式——‘注入悖论’：在检索文档中嵌入提示注入，反而会抑制目标品牌推荐率，尤其在安全训练过的Claude模型中显著；而GPT模型则呈现相反效果，提示不同模型家族对注入的响应机制存在本质差异。
AI.motivation: 探究RAG系统中安全训练是否可能引入新的、反直觉的脆弱性，特别是在品牌推荐场景下提示注入的实际影响。
AI.method: 通过在检索文档中嵌入提示注入，对比测试Claude（Opus 4.6等）与GPT系列模型在品牌推荐任务中的行为变化，并开展跨品牌、多轮次、反事实控制实验。
AI.result: 在安全训练的Claude模型中，含注入文档导致目标品牌推荐率骤降（如Opus 4.6中从54%降至0%），且抑制效应扩散至同品牌未注入文档；GPT模型则表现出推荐率上升；该现象在三个品牌上可复现。
AI.conclusion: 安全训练可能使模型对注入类上下文过度敏感，诱发‘注入悖论’，从而催生新型‘反向攻击’——即攻击者通过污染竞品文档来间接压制其品牌曝光，这对RAG系统安全设计提出新挑战。

title: Crop Recommendation and Agricultural Query Answering System Using Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Networks and Hybrid Retrieval Augmentation
summary: This paper presents a unified system designed to support precision agriculture by integrating advanced weather prediction, crop recommendation, and a question-answering tool for farmers. We propose two deep learning models -- a Transformer-based Graph Neural Network and a Spatio-Temporal Graph Convolutional Network (STGCN) -- to forecast weather conditions for the next 30 days using data from 1,359 locations in Nepal. The STGCN outperforms the Transformer-based model in accuracy (MSE ~0.011 vs. 0.013), effectively modeling both spatial and temporal dependencies in climate data. These predictions are combined with static soil properties such as pH, moisture, and organic content to generate localized crop recommendations through a scoring algorithm that matches each crop's optimal growing conditions. Additionally, we develop a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) chatbot that leverages domain-specific agricultural documents to answer farmers' questions in natural language. The entire system is deployed via a mobile application, offering real-time suggestions and conversational support. User feedback confirms the system's usability and relevance, especially in rural settings where personalized farming guidance is limited. Overall, our approach demonstrates how combining machine learning models with local agricultural data can empower farmers with actionable insights, promoting more informed decisions, better crop yields, and increased resilience to climate variability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套面向精准农业的统一系统，融合天气预测、作物推荐和农民问答功能；采用STGCN和Transformer-GNN模型进行30天天气预报（STGCN更优），结合土壤数据生成本地化作物推荐，并构建基于RAG的农业问答聊天机器人，最终通过移动应用部署并验证其在农村地区的实用性。
AI.motivation: 解决尼泊尔农村地区缺乏个性化农事指导的问题，提升农民应对气候变化的能力，提高作物产量与决策水平。
AI.method: 提出两种深度学习模型（Transformer-based Graph Neural Network 和 Spatio-Temporal Graph Convolutional Network）进行30天天气预测；结合静态土壤属性（pH、湿度、有机质等）通过评分算法生成作物推荐；构建基于检索增强生成（RAG）的农业领域问答聊天机器人；系统集成并部署于移动应用。
AI.result: STGCN模型在天气预测中表现更优（MSE≈0.011）；系统成功生成本地化作物推荐并提供自然语言问答支持；用户反馈证实其在农村场景下的可用性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 融合多模态机器学习模型与本地农业数据的系统可有效赋能农民，提升农业决策质量、产量及气候适应力。

title: PBSD: Privileged Bayesian Self-Distillation for Long-Horizon Credit Assignment
summary: Long-horizon agentic tasks pose a fundamental credit assignment challenge for outcome-base reinforcement learning: trajectory-level rewards verify final correctness but provide limited guidance on which intermediate reasoning steps or tool interactions contribute to the outcome. The difficulty is especially pronounced in multi-turn search agents, where successful trajectories may contain misleading actions and failed trajectories may contain valuable evidence-gathering steps. We propose PBSD (Privileged Bayesian Self-Distillation), a Bayes-calibrated self-distillation method for fine-grained credit assignment under sparse final rewards. PBSD measures trajectory quality through the posterior-to-prior probability ratio of the verified answer and applies Bayes' rule to convert this hard-to-estimate answer-side ratio into a tractable likelihood ratio between a standard student model and a privileged answer-conditioned teacher model. Autoregressive decomposition of this Bayesian evidence score yields turn-level signals that identify whether each intermediate turn supports or undermines the verified outcome. Consequently, PBSD provides a principled and elegant reweighting scheme that transforms sparse outcome supervision into Bayes-calibrated turn-level credit signals, while remaining fully compatible with standard policy optimization. Experiments demonstrate that PBSD consistently enhances performance across both in-domain and out-of-domain settings, and effectively transfers knowledge from short-context training to long-context inference, suggesting that its fine-grained credit assignment mechanism facilitates more effective policy learning and yields improved generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PBSD方法，通过贝叶斯自蒸馏实现稀疏终局奖励下的细粒度信用分配，提升长周期搜索智能体的策略学习效果与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 长周期智能体任务中，基于结果的强化学习面临根本性的信用分配难题：轨迹级奖励仅验证最终正确性，却难以指导哪些中间推理步骤或工具交互真正起作用，尤其在多轮搜索场景下，成功轨迹可能含误导动作，失败轨迹也可能含有价值信息收集步骤。
AI.method: 提出PBSD（Privileged Bayesian Self-Distillation），利用后验-先验概率比衡量轨迹质量，并通过贝叶斯定理将其转化为学生模型与答案条件化特权教师模型之间的似然比；再通过自回归分解该贝叶斯证据分，得到每一轮的信用信号，从而实现稀疏奖励到细粒度回合级信用信号的转换。
AI.result: 实验表明PBSD在域内与域外设置下均持续提升性能，并能有效将短上下文训练知识迁移到长上下文推理，证明其细粒度信用分配机制增强了策略学习效率和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: PBSD为稀疏奖励下的长周期智能体学习提供了一种原理清晰、优雅且与标准策略优化完全兼容的信用分配新范式。

title: CANS: Accelerating Multiuser Collaborative Edge Inference via Cooperative Autodidactic NeuroSurgeon
comment: 24 pages, 14 figures, 5 tables, submitted for possible journal publication
summary: Recently, mobile edge computing (MEC)-enabled collaborative deep neural network (DNN) inference has emerged as a promising approach for delivering intelligent services to resource-constrained mobile devices. A representative scenario is multi-user collaborative edge inference, where distinct devices independently partition their DNN models and offload backend computation to a common edge server over wireless networks. However, determining the optimal DNN partition for each device is challenging due to unknown and time-varying system conditions, including fluctuating wireless links and diverse device capabilities. To address this problem, we propose Cooperative Autodidactic NeuroSurgeon (CANS), a collaborative edge inference framework that enables devices to adaptively learn optimal DNN partitions by sharing informative feedback during online inference. To handle the challenge of device heterogeneity and better leverage offline inference experience, we integrate a novel FedLinUCB-DW algorithm that groups devices of the same type and warm-starts online exploration using local offline early-exit inference experience. Furthermore, we provide theoretical guarantees for FedLinUCB-DW by deriving the regret upper bound. We also validate our method on both a simulated environment and a hardware prototype system. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that CANS achieves lower inference latency compared to state-of-the-art baselines. Especially, in prototype experiments on two edge devices, the proposed CANS reduced average inference latency by up to 50% compared to the non-cooperative baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CANS框架，通过协作式在线学习优化多用户边缘计算中的DNN模型分割策略，结合FedLinUCB-DW算法实现设备分组与离线经验暖启动，并在仿真和硬件原型中验证其显著降低推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 在多用户协同边缘推理场景中，由于无线信道波动和设备能力差异等未知时变系统条件，难以确定各设备最优的DNN分割点。
AI.method: 提出协作式自学习框架CANS，引入FedLinUCB-DW算法：按设备类型分组、利用本地离线早退出推理经验进行在线探索暖启动，并提供理论悔界上界分析。
AI.result: 在仿真与硬件原型（两个边缘设备）实验中，CANS相比非协作基线平均推理延迟最高降低50%，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CANS通过协作反馈与分组暖启动机制，有效应对设备异构与时变环境挑战，显著提升协同边缘DNN推理效率。

title: PTL-Diffusion: Manifold-Aware Diffusion with Periodic Terminal Laws
summary:
Standard diffusion models typically use a single time-homogeneous Gaussian terminal distribution as the reference law for generation. While this choice is analytically convenient and empirically powerful, it provides little explicit structure for data concentrated near low-dimensional manifolds, where different regions of the data distribution may correspond to distinct local geometric or semantic factors. As a result, the reverse model must recover manifold-level structure almost entirely from an unstructured terminal reference distribution.
  We propose PTL-Diffusion, a proof-of-concept diffusion framework whose forward noising process converges to a nonconstant periodic family of Gaussian terminal laws rather than to a single invariant law. Unlike a phase-conditioned DDPM, where phase information only enters the denoising network while the forward process remains unchanged, PTL-Diffusion embeds phase structure directly into the forward noising dynamics.
  The proposed construction remains close to standard denoising diffusion models: for a periodically forced Ornstein--Uhlenbeck-type forward process, we derive closed-form forward marginals, the limiting periodic Gaussian terminal family, and explicit Gaussian reverse posteriors, enabling standard noise-prediction training. We also introduce an invariant-average regularization term coupling the phase-conditioned reverse dynamics through the averaged periodic reference law. Experiments on torus and cylinder point-cloud benchmarks and the Olivetti face dataset show that PTL-Diffusion improves manifold-level distributional matching over matched DDPM baselines, reducing phase-conditioned errors, feature-space covariance errors, and nearest-neighbour manifold distances. These results suggest structured terminal reference laws as a promising direction, while motivating more expressive phase constructions and larger-scale evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PTL-Diffusion，一种将前向加噪过程导向周期性高斯终端分布族（而非单一高斯分布）的扩散模型，通过在前向动力学中显式嵌入相位结构，提升对流形数据（如环面、圆柱点云和人脸）的几何与语义结构建模能力。
AI.motivation: 标准扩散模型使用单一、静态的高斯终端分布，难以显式刻画集中在低维流形上的数据的局部几何或语义结构，导致反向模型需从无结构参考分布中重建流形信息。
AI.method: 构建一个周期性受迫的Ornstein-Uhlenbeck型前向过程，导出闭式前向边缘分布、极限周期性高斯终端分布族及显式高斯反向后验；引入基于平均周期参考律的不变性正则项，耦合相位条件下的反向动力学。
AI.result: 在环面、圆柱点云和Olivetti人脸数据集上，PTL-Diffusion相比基线DDPM显著降低相位条件误差、特征空间协方差误差及最近邻流形距离，提升了流形层级的分布匹配质量。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的终端参考分布是改进扩散模型对流形数据建模能力的有效途径，未来需探索更丰富的相位构造与更大规模验证。

title: Asymptotic Optimality of Thompson Sampling for Risk-Averse Bandits with Sub-Gaussian Rewards
summary: We prove that $ρ\text{-}\mathrm{NPTS}_{\mathrm{SG}}$, an anchor-free nonparametric Thompson Sampling algorithm for risk-averse bandits, achieves regret matching the instance-dependent lower bound to leading order in $\log n$, establishing it as asymptotically optimal for any continuous risk functional $ρ$ (CVaR, mean-variance, Sharpe ratio, distortion risk measures, and more) on the class of distributions with bounded density and sub-Gaussian tails, including Gaussian arms. Both this result and its bounded-support counterpart require only continuity of $ρ$: strictly weaker than the dominance condition of prior parametric Thompson Sampling results, and strictly weaker than the Lipschitz condition of UCB-type algorithms, yielding the first instance-optimal guarantees for non-Lipschitz functionals such as the Sharpe ratio without parametric reward assumptions. The bounded-support case is developed first as a stepping stone sharing the same proof structure. The key technical contributions are a discretisation lemma (bounded support) and a truncated discretisation lemma (sub-Gaussian tails), each projecting the growing-alphabet Dirichlet posterior onto a fixed grid via the Dirichlet aggregation property, holding all polynomial prefactors at fixed degree independent of sample size and breaking the super-exponential barrier that blocked prior proofs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无锚点、非参数的Thompson采样算法ρ-NPTS_SG，用于风险厌恶型多臂赌博机问题，并证明其在连续风险泛函（如CVaR、均值-方差、夏普比率等）下达到渐近最优的实例依赖性遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 现有方法对风险泛函施加了过强的条件（如支配性或Lipschitz连续性），无法处理如夏普比率等非Lipschitz泛函；本文旨在建立更弱条件下的实例最优保证。
AI.method: 提出ρ-NPTS_SG算法，利用Dirichlet后验的聚合性质，通过离散化引理（有界支撑）和截断离散化引理（次高斯尾）将后验投影到固定网格，克服超指数增长障碍。
AI.result: 在有界密度与次高斯尾分布类上，算法实现与实例依赖下界匹配的log n阶遗憾；仅需风险泛函ρ的连续性，弱于以往所有条件。
AI.conclusion: ρ-NPTS_SG是首个对广泛连续风险泛函（含非Lipschitz型）实现渐近实例最优的非参数Thompson采样算法，显著拓展了理论适用范围。

title: Reasoning Arena: Trace Tournaments When Verifiable Rewards Fall Short
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables (17 pages including references and appendices)
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a leading paradigm for improving the reasoning ability of large language models through outcome-based supervision. However, verifiable rewards frequently become uninformative at the group level: when all sampled traces of a given prompt receive identical rewards, group-relative advantage estimation provides no gradient signal, even though the traces may differ substantially in reasoning quality. We propose Reasoning Arena, an adaptive training framework that routes such non-diverse reward groups to a judge system instead of discarding them. Beyond examining the final answer, Reasoning Arena constructs trace tournaments, where reasoning traces are compared head-to-head to expose finer-grained preferences within the group, converting reasoning quality into rich relative reward signals. To make reward estimation efficient, rather than exhaustively comparing every pair, each new trace is evaluated against a small, dynamically updated pool of previously generated traces as anchors to efficiently establish a relative ranking. We then fit a Bradley-Terry model on the incomplete comparison graph, enabling scalable RL integration without quadratic pairwise comparisons. Empirical results demonstrate that Reasoning Arena consistently outperforms the RLVR baseline by 7.6% on average in competition mathematics and coding benchmarks. By converting otherwise wasted zero-advantage samples into useful gradient updates, our method accelerates training by 27% to 41%, saving nearly 50% of generation compute, and substantially improves overall reasoning performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Reasoning Arena框架，通过构建推理轨迹的头对头比较（trace tournaments）和动态锚点池，将原本无梯度信号的同奖励样本转化为细粒度相对奖励，从而提升大模型推理能力训练效率与效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）方法在群体层面奖励相同时无法提供梯度信号，导致大量高质量但奖励相同的推理轨迹被浪费。
AI.method: 提出Reasoning Arena：1）识别非多样性奖励组并交由裁判系统处理；2）构建轨迹锦标赛，进行头对头比较；3）使用动态更新的小规模锚点池避免全量两两比较；4）在不完全比较图上拟合Bradley-Terry模型以高效估计相对奖励。
AI.result: 在竞赛数学与编程基准上平均超越RLVR基线7.6%；训练加速27%-41%，节省近50%生成计算开销。
AI.conclusion: Reasoning Arena有效利用原本无效的零优势样本，将推理质量差异转化为可学习的相对奖励信号，在提升推理性能的同时显著降低计算成本。

title: OmniGameArena: A Unified UE5 Benchmark for VLM Game Agents with Improvement Dynamics
summary: Vision-language model (VLM) agents are increasingly deployed in interactive game environments. Yet game benchmarks for VLM agents typically report a single first-attempt score per (agent, game) pair, focus on single-agent Solo play, and lack unified protocols for evaluating heterogeneous agent classes (commercial VLMs, open-weight VLMs, and specialized game policies) on the same footing. We address these gaps with OmniGameArena, a real-time benchmark of twelve newly built Unreal Engine 5 games spanning Solo (7), PvP (3), and Coop (2) with unified action interfaces, and the Improvement Dynamics Curve (IDC), an agentic-reflection harness in which a tool-using reflector LLM autonomously refines a bounded skill prompt across multiple rounds. Beyond cold-start leaderboard scores, IDC exposes two additional observables for each (agent, game) pair: how the score evolves across reflection rounds, and how the learned skill behaves on held-out task variants. We report these observables for twelve VLM agents on the cold-start leaderboard and four top agents under IDC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了OmniGameArena，一个包含12个Unreal Engine 5游戏的实时基准测试平台，支持Solo、PvP和Coop模式，并引入Improvement Dynamics Curve（IDC）评估框架，通过工具增强型反射LLM动态优化技能提示，以更全面地评估VLM代理在游戏环境中的冷启动性能与持续改进能力。
AI.motivation: 现有游戏基准测试仅报告单次尝试分数、聚焦单智能体Solo玩法，且缺乏统一协议来公平评估不同类别的视觉语言模型（商业/开源VLM及专用游戏策略）。
AI.method: 构建OmniGameArena——12个UE5游戏组成的多模态游戏基准（含Solo/PvP/Coop），设计统一动作接口；提出IDC框架，利用工具调用型反射LLM在多轮中自主优化技能提示。
AI.result: 在冷启动排行榜上评估了12个VLM代理，并对其中4个顶尖代理应用IDC，获得每轮分数演化曲线及在未见任务变体上的泛化表现。
AI.conclusion: OmniGameArena与IDC共同提供了比单一冷启动分数更丰富、更具诊断性的VLM代理评估维度，推动交互式游戏环境中智能体能力的精细化衡量与提升。

title: Latent Spatial Memory for Video World Models
summary: Video world models that maintain 3D spatial consistency across generated frames typically rely on explicit point cloud memory constructed in RGB space. This design is both computationally expensive, requiring repeated rendering and VAE encoding, and inherently lossy, as the round trip through pixel space discards rich features of the learned latent representation. In this paper, we introduce \emph{latent spatial memory} for video world models, a persistent 3D cache that stores scene information directly in the diffusion latent space, avoiding pixel-space reconstruction. Building on this, we propose Mirage, a latent-space spatial memory framework that constructs the memory by lifting latent tokens into 3D via depth-guided back-projection and queries it by synthesizing novel views through direct latent-space warping. This unified formulation eliminates both the information loss of pixel-space reconstruction and the computational burden of repeated encoding and rendering. Experiments show that latent spatial memory achieves up to \textbf{10.57}$\times$ faster end-to-end video generation and \textbf{55}$\times$ reduction in memory footprint relative to explicit 3D baselines. Leveraging the geometric prior of the diffusion model, Mirage attains state-of-the-art performance on WorldScore and strong reconstruction quality on RealEstate10K.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'latent spatial memory'的新型视频世界模型架构，将3D场景信息直接缓存在扩散模型的潜在空间中，避免像素空间重建带来的信息损失与计算开销；基于此构建了Mirage框架，通过深度引导的反投影和潜在空间扭曲实现高效、高质量视频生成。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型依赖RGB空间中显式点云内存，计算昂贵且因像素空间往返导致潜在特征丢失。
AI.method: 提出潜空间空间记忆（latent spatial memory），在扩散潜在空间中持久化3D场景信息；构建Mirage框架，通过深度引导的潜在token 3D提升（back-projection）建模记忆，并通过潜在空间直接扭曲合成新视角。
AI.result: 相比显式3D基线，端到端视频生成速度快10.57×，内存占用减少55×；在WorldScore上达到SOTA，在RealEstate10K上重建质量优异。
AI.conclusion: 潜空间空间记忆是一种更高效、保真度更高的视频世界建模范式，Mirage验证了其在速度、内存与性能上的显著优势。

title: Orange Lab: Lowering Barriers to Data Mining through Embedded Interactive Workflows
summary: While visual programming of data analysis workflows has become an important vehicle for the democratization of data science, such systems remain largely confined to standalone applications and offer limited support for transitioning their visual analytics solutions into interactive web environments. As a result, data analysis pipelines are difficult to share, embed, and adapt into user-facing analytical tools. We present Orange Lab, a web-based collaborative environment for visual data analytics. At its core, Orange Lab enables users to visually construct machine learning workflows from modular components, where interactions in any component propagate seamlessly through the workflow, turning static pipelines into dynamic, reactive systems that support exploration and data-driven storytelling. Our key contribution is component exposition, a paradigm that allows authors to embed selected workflow components, or parts of their interfaces, into arbitrary web contexts, creating synchronized, interactive interfaces while hiding underlying workflow complexity. This enables the development of tailored analytical views and narrative-driven experiences that integrate data analysis directly into online materials. We demonstrate the approach through deployments in data literacy education, where embedded components guide students in hands-on exploration of machine learning concepts without requiring knowledge of the underlying system, showing that Orange Lab effectively lowers barriers to entry and supports the democratization of data science.

AI.tldr: Orange Lab 是一个基于 Web 的协作式可视化数据分析环境，通过组件公开（component exposition）范式，支持将可视化机器学习工作流嵌入任意网页，实现交互同步与复杂性隐藏，推动数据科学的普及。
AI.motivation: 现有可视化数据分析系统多为独立应用，难以共享、嵌入和适配到 Web 环境，阻碍了分析流程向用户端分析工具的转化。
AI.method: 提出 '组件公开' 范式，使用户可选择性地将 Orange 工作流中的组件或其界面部分嵌入任意 Web 上下文；构建 Orange Lab 平台，支持动态、响应式、可探索的可视化机器学习工作流。
AI.result: 成功实现工作流组件在 Web 中的同步交互嵌入，降低使用门槛；在数据素养教育中验证其有效性，学生无需了解底层系统即可开展机器学习概念的动手探索。
AI.conclusion: Orange Lab 通过组件公开机制弥合了可视化分析与 Web 应用之间的鸿沟，增强了可分享性、可嵌入性与可叙事性，有效支持数据科学的民主化。

title: BSTabDiff: Block-Subunit Diffusion Priors for High-Dimensional Tabular Data Generation
comment: Published as a paper at the 2nd DeLTa Workshop, ICLR 2026
summary: High-Dimensional Low-Sample Size (HDLSS) tabular domains (e.g., omics) are characterized by $n \ll m$, where $n$ = number of samples, and $m$ = number of features. Such domains often exhibit strong local correlation groups, sparse cross-group dependencies, heavy-tailed non-Gaussian marginals, heteroscedastic noise, and structured missingness, making direct density learning in $\mathbb{R}^m$ ill-conditioned since $n \ll m$. We propose BSTabDiff, a block-subunit generative framework that partitions the $m$ observed features into $M$ latent blocks ($M \ll m$) and generates each block via a shared low-dimensional subunit variable, concentrating global dependence learning in the compact block-latent space $\mathbb{R}^M$ while decoding to the full feature space with copula-driven dependence, flexible per-feature marginals, and explicit missingness mechanisms. BSTabDiff supports modern deep priors on block latents, including diffusion and normalizing flows, enabling stable synthesis and controllable benchmark generation in the HDLSS regime. Empirically, BSTabDiff produces more realistic and stable high-dimensional synthetic data when compared with unstructured tabular generators on HDLSS data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BSTabDiff，一种针对高维低样本量（HDLSS）表格数据的块子单元生成框架，通过将特征划分为少量潜在块并利用共享低维子单元变量建模全局依赖，在块隐空间中学习依赖关系，并结合copula、灵活边缘分布和显式缺失机制解码到原始空间，显著提升合成数据的真实性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: HDLSS表格数据（如组学数据）因样本远少于特征，且存在局部强相关、跨组稀疏依赖、重尾非高斯边缘分布、异方差噪声及结构化缺失等问题，直接在高维空间进行密度估计严重病态。
AI.method: BSTabDiff将m个特征划分为M个潜在块（M≪m），每个块由一个共享的低维子单元变量生成；全局依赖集中在紧凑的块隐空间ℝ^M中学习，再通过copula建模块间依赖、灵活的单特征边缘分布及显式缺失机制解码至全特征空间；支持扩散模型和归一化流等现代深度先验。
AI.result: 在HDLSS数据上，BSTabDiff相比无结构表格生成器能生成更真实、更稳定的高维合成数据。
AI.conclusion: BSTabDiff通过块化隐结构与copula解码，有效缓解HDLSS下的病态密度估计问题，为高维表格数据生成提供了稳定、可控且可解释的新范式。

title: Escaping the KL Agreement Trap in On-Policy Distillation
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) provides dense token-level supervision by asking a teacher to score student-generated rollouts. However, when the student drifts into an unrecoverable prefix, the teacher may locally agree with the degraded state, producing low reverse KL but little corrective training signal. We identify this persistent regime as a low-KL agreement trap. Further analyses show that tokens during and after such traps produce less useful supervision signals. We propose KAT (KL Agreement Trap Termination), an online OPD termination rule that detects persistent low-KL agreement with a dynamic training-adaptive threshold. By filtering weak supervision from degenerate agreement, KAT improves avg@k accuracy by 2.66% and pass@k by 3.43% across four mathematical benchmarks, while reducing average rollout length by 59.73%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KAT方法，通过动态阈值检测并终止低KL一致性陷阱，提升数学基准测试的准确率和通过率，同时显著缩短平均rollout长度。
AI.motivation: 现有on-policy distillation（OPD）方法在学生生成不可恢复前缀时，教师可能局部认可退化状态，导致低逆KL但缺乏纠正信号，形成低KL一致性陷阱，削弱监督效果。
AI.method: 提出KAT（KL Agreement Trap Termination），一种在线OPD终止规则，利用动态、训练自适应的阈值检测持续低KL一致性，并过滤由此产生的弱监督信号。
AI.result: 在四个数学基准上，avg@k准确率提升2.66%，pass@k提升3.43%，平均rollout长度减少59.73%。
AI.conclusion: KAT有效缓解低KL一致性陷阱问题，提升了OPD在数学推理任务中的训练效率与性能。

title: ERBench: A Benchmark and Testsuite for Equation Discovery Algorithms
summary: Equation discovery aims to automate the discovery of scientific models in the form of mathematical equations from data. Technically, equation discovery is implemented by symbolic regression algorithms. Performance of symbolic regression for equation discovery is measured along two dimensions: Prediction accuracy on test data, and recovery of known groundtruth formulas. For standard regression, accuracy is typically measured on in-domain test data, for instance, by splitting a data set randomly into training and test data. While this makes sense for in-domain interpolation, which is the common goal in ordinary regression, it can be a misleading proxy for true model discovery and generalization. The obvious alternative is to measure out-of-domain accuracy. However, obtaining challenging out-of-domain test data is a non-trivial problem. Therefore, we focus on equation recovery for evaluating symbolic regression algorithms for equation discovery. The rationale is that symbolic regression algorithms that perform well in recovering known groundtruth formulas are good candidates to perform well in unknown equation discovery. Existing benchmarks for symbolic regression include equation recovery tasks, however, with only a small number of groundtruth formulas that are publicly known. Moreover, these benchmarks place less emphasis on evaluating the robustness of algorithms in terms of their behavior under changing dimensionality, sampling size, sampling distribution and sampling domain. This, however, is of central importance to practitioners wanting to discover equations for modeling natural phenomena, since data is almost certainly noisy and comes from diverse domains, distributions, and sample sizes. To fill this gap, we introduce the Equation Recovery Benchmark (ERBench), a new evaluation framework designed to rigorously assess algorithms explicitly targeting the task of equation discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的方程发现评估框架ERBench，聚焦于已知真实公式恢复能力，以更可靠地评估符号回归算法在科学建模中的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有符号回归基准在公式恢复任务中公式数量少、缺乏对维度、采样规模、分布和域变化下算法鲁棒性的系统评估，难以反映实际科学发现中面对噪声与多样数据的真实表现。
AI.method: 构建Equation Recovery Benchmark（ERBench），一个专为方程发现设计的评估框架，强调在不同维度、采样大小、采样分布和采样域下对算法恢复已知真实公式的鲁棒性进行系统评测。
AI.result: ERBench提供了更全面、更具挑战性的方程恢复评测环境，弥补了现有基准在多样性、鲁棒性和实用性上的不足。
AI.conclusion: 以公式恢复能力作为方程发现算法的核心评估指标更为合理；ERBench为推动可泛化、鲁棒的符号回归方法发展提供了标准化、可扩展的评测基础。

title: Internalizing Geometric Law: Learning from Solver Residuals for Precision-Critical Generation
summary: Large Language Models frequently hallucinate in precision-critical domains such as technical diagramming and mechanical design, where outputs must satisfy strict geometric constraints. We study open-ended geometric synthesis from natural language: translating free-form descriptions into precise constructions whose entities must simultaneously satisfy dozens of interacting constraints. To make this tractable, we release PyGeoX, a programmable geometric DSL that compiles declarative constraints into a differentiable loss, and PyGeoX-Bench, a stratified suite of 300 problems with per-constraint verifiable rewards. Using PyGeoX as a verifier, we identify a failure mode we call Outlier Gradient Masking: under global-norm rewards (any scheme that aggregates residuals through a single norm, for example, $\exp(-\mathrm{MSE})$), a single outlier constraint can nullify the learning signal across all others. To address this, we propose Saturating Additive Rewards (SAR), which decompose the reward into bounded per-constraint terms, preserving partial progress and ensuring consistent gradients even under severe violations. Against MSE-based rewards, the natural baseline for geometry solvers, SAR improves the hard-tier solving rate by $2.3\times$, and the resulting 8B model is competitive with much larger frontier systems on this benchmark. We release the engine, benchmark, and data at https://github.com/Huawei-AI4Math/PyGeoX.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Saturating Additive Rewards（SAR）方法，解决大语言模型在几何合成任务中因全局奖励函数导致的梯度掩盖问题，显著提升求解率，并发布PyGeoX几何DSL与PyGeoX-Bench评测基准。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在技术制图和机械设计等精度敏感领域常产生幻觉，难以满足严格的几何约束；现有基于全局范数的奖励机制易受单个异常约束干扰，导致其他约束梯度失效。
AI.method: 提出可编程几何DSL PyGeoX，将声明式约束编译为可微损失；构建含300题的分层评测集PyGeoX-Bench；设计Saturating Additive Rewards（SAR），采用有界、可加的逐约束奖励机制以保留部分进展信号并稳定梯度。
AI.result: 相比MSE类基线奖励，SAR使困难题求解率提升2.3倍；所训练的8B模型在该基准上媲美更大规模的前沿系统。
AI.conclusion: SAR有效缓解Outlier Gradient Masking问题，验证了细粒度、鲁棒奖励设计对几何推理任务的重要性；PyGeoX生态为AI4Math提供了可验证、可扩展的几何合成新范式。

title: Trajectory Geometry of Transformer Representations Across Layers
summary: Understanding how transformer representations evolve across layers, not merely what they encode, remains an open problem in mechanistic interpretability. We recast the transformer forward pass as a discrete population trajectory through a high-dimensional representation manifold, drawing on geometric tools from computational neuroscience. Rather than probing for pre-specified features, we characterize trajectory geometry using five metrics computed directly in the ambient space: trajectory length, curvature, a semantic convergence index, layerwise cosine similarity, and representational stability. Across three model families (GPT-2, TinyLlama, Qwen2.5) and five controlled prompt families, we report four findings. First, semantically related prompts converge significantly in middle-to-late layers (peak CI 0.41--0.58, p<0.001, Mann-Whitney U), consistent with attractor-like dynamics. Second, reasoning tasks produce trajectories of greater curvature than lexical variations (0.71--0.83 rad vs. 0.27--0.31 rad), suggesting curvature encodes computational complexity. Third, ambiguous tokens exhibit trajectory bifurcation with up to 5.6x representational separation by the final layer, absent in unambiguous controls. Fourth, layerwise cosine similarity reveals a universal three-phase structure: encoding, elaboration, and output preparation, consistent across all three architectures. All four effects vanish under shuffled-layer and random-embedding controls. We release a fully open-source, model-agnostic pipeline and argue that trajectory geometry constitutes a principled, probe-free lens for mechanistic interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文将Transformer前向传播重新建模为高维表征流形上的离散种群轨迹，提出基于几何的五种轨迹度量（轨迹长度、曲率、语义收敛指数、层间余弦相似度、表征稳定性），在多个模型和提示集上发现四类可复现的几何规律，并开源了模型无关的分析工具链。
AI.motivation: 理解Transformer表征如何随层数演化（而不仅是编码了什么）仍是机制可解释性的开放问题。
AI.method: 将Transformer前向传播视为高维表征流形上的离散种群轨迹，使用五种几何指标（轨迹长度、曲率、语义收敛指数、层间余弦相似度、表征稳定性）直接在原始嵌入空间中刻画轨迹结构，并在GPT-2、TinyLlama、Qwen2.5上对五类可控提示进行系统验证。
AI.result: 发现四个稳健现象：1）语义相关提示在中后层显著收敛（CI峰值0.41–0.58）；2）推理任务轨迹曲率显著高于词汇变化（0.71–0.83 vs. 0.27–0.31 rad）；3）歧义词触发轨迹分叉，最终层表征分离达非歧义对照的5.6倍；4）层间余弦相似度呈现普适的三阶段结构（编码→拓展→输出准备）。所有效应在打乱层序或随机嵌入控制下消失。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹几何提供了一种无需预设特征探针、原理清晰且模型无关的机制可解释性新视角，所提方法具有跨架构泛化性和可复现性。

title: Intention Driven Identification of In-Possession Match Phases in Association Football through Temporal Graph Learning
summary: Understanding tactical organisation of association football, hereafter referred to as football, requires identifying distinct match phases. Yet in-possession phases are rarely directly observable and are shaped by evolving tactical intentions, rather than spatial patterns alone. This study proposes a data-driven framework for identifying in-possession match phases from spatiotemporal tracking data. Seven German Bundesliga matches recorded at 25 Hz with TRACAB were analysed. A hierarchical phase model was defined with three tactical intentions (Invade Opponent Space, Keep Possession, Scoring) and six phases (Build Up, Progression, Counter Attack, Maintenance, Sustained Threat, Finishing). A Temporal Graph Attention Network (T-GAN) was developed to combine frame-level player-interaction graphs, contextual features, and Transformer-based temporal modelling. Performance was evaluated using frame-level F1 and a sequence-aware Intersection over Truth-Dominance (IoT-D) metric. T-GAN achieved macro-average frame-level F1 scores of 0.87 at the intention level, 0.76 for invasion-related phases, and 0.79 for scoring phases. At the sequence level, mean diagonal IoT-D F1 increased from 0.68 to 0.79 for intentions and from 0.61 to 0.71 for phases after post-processing, indicating improved temporal coherence. Model comparisons showed that sequence modelling was the main driver of segmentation quality, while graph-based relational modelling was particularly beneficial for Counter Attack recognition. Exploratory player attention analysis further suggested that wide and midfield positional groups contributed strongly to phase discrimination. Overall, the framework translates continuous tracking data into tactically interpretable in-possession phase representations, with potential applications in automated match annotation, tactical analysis, and playing-style profiling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空追踪数据的数据驱动框架，利用Temporal Graph Attention Network（T-GAN）识别足球比赛中控球阶段的战术意图与具体阶段，显著提升了帧级和序列级相位识别性能，并揭示了不同位置球员在阶段判别中的作用。
AI.motivation: 足球比赛中控球阶段难以直接观测，且由动态变化的战术意图而非单纯空间模式决定，亟需一种能从连续追踪数据中提取战术可解释相位表示的方法。
AI.method: 构建包含3种战术意图、6个具体阶段的分层相位模型；设计融合帧级球员交互图、上下文特征与Transformer时序建模的Temporal Graph Attention Network（T-GAN）；采用帧级F1与序列感知指标IoT-D评估性能，并进行后处理提升时序一致性。
AI.result: T-GAN在战术意图层级宏平均F1达0.87，在入侵相关阶段和得分相关阶段F1分别为0.76和0.79；经后处理，序列级IoT-D F1分别从0.68提升至0.79（意图）和0.61提升至0.71（阶段）；消融分析表明时序建模是分割质量主因，图建模对反击识别尤为有效；注意力分析显示边路与中场球员对阶段判别贡献突出。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功将连续追踪数据转化为战术可解释的控球阶段表征，具备自动化比赛标注、战术分析与球队风格刻画等应用潜力。

title: PRISM: Topology-Aware Cross-Modal Imputation for Modality-Deficient Federated Graph Learning
summary: Multimodal federated graph learning (MM-FGL) aims to collaboratively learn from decentralized graphs with text and images. However, real-world clients may not share a common modality basis: a visual-search client may contain image--interaction graphs but no seller descriptions, while a catalog client may provide text but no product images. We refer to this practical setting as client-level modality deficiency. Unlike random instance-wise missingness, a deficient client lacks the local semantic basis needed to reconstruct the absent modality. More importantly, in graph learning, incomplete representations initialize message passing, so imputation errors can be filtered, mixed, and amplified by the receiving topology. To address this gap, we propose \textbf{PRISM} (\textbf{P}roactive \textbf{R}etrieval and \textbf{I}mputation via \textbf{S}tructural \textbf{M}eta-prompting), a topology-aware federated cross-modal imputation framework. Rather than reconstructing the missing modality solely from local observations, PRISM recovers missing-modality semantics from the federation and introduces them into local graph propagation under topology-aware control. Experiments on six multimodal graph datasets across graph-centric and modality-centric tasks show that PRISM consistently improves modality-deficient clients, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines by \textbf{4.48}\% on average.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRISM框架，用于解决多模态联邦图学习中客户端级模态缺失问题，通过拓扑感知的跨模态推理与结构化元提示实现联邦级语义恢复，显著提升模态缺失客户端性能。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中不同客户端存在模态不全（如仅有图像无文本，或仅有文本无图像），且这种缺失是客户端级、非随机的，导致本地无法重建缺失模态语义；同时图消息传递会放大局部插补误差。
AI.method: 提出PRISM：一种基于拓扑感知的联邦跨模态插补框架，利用联邦全局信息主动检索并生成缺失模态语义，并在本地图传播中受拓扑结构调控引入该语义。
AI.result: 在六个多模态图数据集上实验表明，PRISM在图中心与模态中心任务中均稳定提升模态缺失客户端性能，平均超越SOTA基线4.48%。
AI.conclusion: PRISM有效缓解客户端级模态缺失对联邦图学习的负面影响，验证了利用联邦协同与图结构先验进行跨模态语义恢复的可行性与优越性。

title: BrainSurgery: Reproducible and Reliable Declarative Weight Manipulations for Model Editing and Upcycling
summary: As deep learning models scale, managing, inspecting, and modifying large checkpoints has become increasingly challenging. Researchers often need to alter model weights for layer restructuring, precision casting, low-rank factorization, and architectural debugging, yet these workflows often rely on fragile ad-hoc Python scripts. Here, we introduce BrainSurgery, a tool for robust and reproducible "tensor surgery" on neural network checkpoints, and provide a system demonstration covering four examples and three case studies from model upcycling to LoRA extraction. By abstracting storage formats and memory management, BrainSurgery executes complex transformations through declarative YAML plans. It supports structural modifications, mathematical transformations, and tensor reshaping through expressive regex and structural targeting, while built-in assertions validate tensor shapes, data types, and values to prevent silent errors. We envision that BrainSurgery will provide a strong foundation for future research through its reproducible and validated operations.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了BrainSurgery，一个用于对神经网络检查点进行鲁棒、可复现‘张量手术’的工具，支持通过声明式YAML计划执行结构修改、数学变换和张量重塑，并内置断言机制防止错误。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习模型规模扩大，管理、检查和修改大型检查点变得愈发困难；现有基于临时Python脚本的工作流脆弱且不可复现。
AI.method: 提出BrainSurgery工具，抽象存储格式与内存管理，通过声明式YAML计划实现张量级操作，支持正则与结构化定位、多种变换及内置断言验证。
AI.result: 实现了支持层重构、精度转换、低秩分解和架构调试等任务的可复现张量操作，并在模型再利用与LoRA提取等三个案例中验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: BrainSurgery为模型检查点的可靠、可复现操作提供了坚实基础，有望推动未来相关研究。

title: Toward Compiler World Models: Learning Latent Dynamics for Efficient Tensor Program Search
summary: Tensor program optimization is essential for modern machine learning systems, but its search space is enormous. Existing auto-schedulers reduce measurement cost with learned cost models, yet they usually evaluate each candidate as a static code snapshot, ignoring the schedule trajectory that produced it. This makes them insensitive to action dependencies and vulnerable to superficial code variations. We propose a \emph{world-model-inspired} evaluator that models schedule evaluation as action-conditioned latent dynamics over program states. Starting from the initial program, it rolls out scheduling actions in a continuous latent space with a lightweight transition model, avoiding expensive AST mutation and repeated code encoding. The final dynamic representation is combined with action and hardware features to rank candidates. Implemented in TVM AutoScheduler, our method improves representative-subgraph latency over Ansor by 1.37$\times$ on GPU and 1.54$\times$ on CPU under the same 64-trial budget. It also matches Ansor-10K within 2.2% geometric mean using 10$\times$ fewer measurements, and accelerates full-model inference over PyTorch/PyTorch-opt(cuDNN) by 4.61$\times$/3.67$\times$ geometric mean.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受世界模型启发的张量程序调度评估器，通过在连续潜在空间中建模调度动作的动态演化，避免了传统静态代码快照评估的局限性，在更少测量次数下实现了更高性能的自动调度优化。
AI.motivation: 现有自动调度器将每个候选调度视为静态代码快照进行评估，忽略了生成该调度的轨迹，导致对动作依赖不敏感且易受表面代码变化干扰。
AI.method: 提出一种世界模型启发的评估器，将调度评估建模为动作条件下的程序状态潜在动态演化；从初始程序出发，用轻量级转移模型在连续潜在空间中展开调度动作，避免昂贵的AST修改和重复代码编码；最终将动态表征与动作及硬件特征融合用于候选排序。
AI.result: 在TVM AutoScheduler中实现后，相比Ansor，在相同64次试验预算下，代表性子图延迟在GPU和CPU上分别提升1.37×和1.54×；仅用1/10的测量次数即以2.2%几何平均差距达到Ansor-10K性能；全模型推理相比PyTorch/PyTorch-opt(cuDNN)分别加速4.61×/3.67×（几何平均）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过建模调度轨迹的动态演化，显著提升了自动调度器的样本效率与优化质量，为张量程序优化提供了新范式。

title: Machine-Learning Emulation of Satellite Greenhouse Gas Retrievals: Stability over Time
summary:
Retrieval algorithms are used to estimate atmospheric concentrations of greenhouse gases (GHGs), such as carbon dioxide (CO2) and methane (CH4), by solving inverse problems from high-spectral-resolution satellite radiance measurements. However, these algorithms are computationally expensive, which makes real-time estimation at scale difficult. Machine-learning models have therefore been proposed as fast emulators of retrieval algorithms. Most existing studies, however, evaluate them only on test data from the same period as the training data.
  We study the stability over time of such emulators using data from the Greenhouse Gases Observing SATellite (GOSAT). We show that prediction accuracy generally deteriorates when the test period moves away from the training period. We also show that including time as an input feature substantially improves XCH4 prediction for Lasso and neural-network models. Among the methods considered, a simple Lasso model performs as well as or better than more complex methods such as neural networks, and yields more stable predictions over time. We further validate the results using the Total Carbon Column Observing Network (TCCON), a ground-based observation network. On the TCCON-matched dataset, the time-augmented Lasso achieves errors against TCCON that are comparable to the disagreement between GOSAT and TCCON for both XCO2 and XCH4.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了机器学习模型作为温室气体遥感反演算法替代品的时间稳定性，发现简单Lasso模型在加入时间特征后，性能优于复杂神经网络，且在GOSAT和TCCON数据上表现稳健。
AI.motivation: 传统GHG反演算法计算昂贵，难以实时大规模应用；已有机器学习替代模型缺乏对时间泛化能力的评估。
AI.method: 使用GOSAT卫星数据训练多种机器学习模型（Lasso、神经网络等），对比不同时间跨度下预测精度变化，并引入时间作为输入特征；进一步用TCCON地面观测数据验证模型性能。
AI.result: 模型预测精度随测试期远离训练期而下降；加入时间特征显著提升XCH4预测效果；Lasso模型性能不逊于神经网络，且时间稳定性更强；时间增强型Lasso在TCCON匹配数据上误差与GOSAT-TCCON原始差异相当。
AI.conclusion: 时间信息对提升GHG反演机器学习模型的长期稳定性至关重要，简单线性模型（如Lasso）在兼顾精度与稳定性方面具有优势，适合作为业务化快速反演工具。

title: A Universal Dense Football Event Representation Based on TabTransformer
comment: 12 pages, 1 figure. Preprint submitted to the 13th Workshop on Machine Learning and Data Mining for Sports Analytics (MLSA 2026)
summary: Football event data constitute a rich spatiotemporal source for quantitative analysis of player actions in team sports. These datasets contain heterogeneous features, combining continuous location coordinates with categorical variables such as action type, action outcome, and body part. Such data have been applied in sports analytics for match outcome forecasting, player evaluation, and tactical pattern recognition. However, existing approaches predominantly encode categorical features using one-hot or ordinal embedding representations, overlooking the intrinsic semantics of action descriptors. The Transformer is a deep neural network architecture based on self-attention that captures dependencies between input features at arbitrary positions. We propose and implement a Transformer-based model to learn latent dependencies among categorical event features and produce dense representations of football events. By encoding categorical features as learned embedding vectors, sport-specific action semantics are captured during pretraining, enabling the representations to support downstream tasks such as action value estimation and play style recognition. Empirical evaluation shows that the embedding representations yield superior probability calibration over task-specific baselines on the downstream prediction tasks, as measured by Brier score.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的模型，用于学习足球事件中分类特征（如动作类型、结果等）之间的潜在语义依赖关系，并生成稠密事件表征，从而提升下游任务（如动作价值评估和比赛风格识别）的预测性能与概率校准能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法对足球事件数据中的分类特征多采用one-hot或序数嵌入编码，忽略了动作描述符本身的语义信息，难以有效建模动作间的内在关联。
AI.method: 提出并实现一个基于Transformer的模型，将分类事件特征映射为可学习的嵌入向量，在预训练中捕获运动特异性的动作语义，进而生成事件的稠密表征。
AI.result: 实验表明，所学嵌入表征在动作价值估计和比赛风格识别等下游任务上，相比任务特定基线模型具有更优的概率校准效果（Brier分数更低）。
AI.conclusion: Transformer能有效建模足球事件中分类特征的语义依赖，其学习到的嵌入表征具备更强的泛化性和任务适应性，为体育分析提供了更具解释性和实用性的特征表示方法。

title: iOSWorld: A Benchmark for Personally Intelligent Phone Agents
summary: A useful phone agent needs to be personally intelligent. It should reason over a user's identity, history, and preferences as they exist on the device, not just follow isolated instructions in an impersonal sandbox. Existing mobile agent benchmarks lack this kind of personalization. We introduce iOSWorld, the first interactive native iOS simulator benchmark built around a persistent user identity spanning 26 newly built iOS apps. These apps contain connected data such as transactions, messages, travel records, social relationships, and financial activity. iOSWorld includes 133 tasks across three increasingly difficult categories. Single-app tasks (27) test one app, multi-app tasks (60) span 2 to 8 apps, and memory and personalization tasks (46) require agents to infer patterns from personal data. We evaluate frontier and open-source computer-use models in both vision-only and privileged vision+XML settings. The best configuration reaches 52\% overall but only 37\% on multi-app tasks. Privileged vision+XML access improves frontier models by up to 26 percentage points, while smaller models do not benefit from added accessibility-tree input. We release iOSWorld as an open-source benchmark with all apps, seeded data, tasks, rubrics, and evaluation code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了iOSWorld，首个基于持久用户身份的交互式原生iOS模拟器基准测试，包含26个相互关联的应用程序和133个任务，旨在评估手机代理在个性化、跨应用及记忆推理方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有移动代理基准缺乏个性化能力评估，无法反映代理对用户身份、历史和偏好的理解与推理能力。
AI.method: 构建iOSWorld基准：包括26个具有连接数据（如交易、消息、旅行记录等）的原生iOS应用，设计133个分三类难度的任务，并在视觉输入与视觉+XML可访问性树两种设置下评估前沿及开源计算机使用模型。
AI.result: 最佳配置整体准确率达52%，但多应用任务仅37%；特权视觉+XML输入使前沿模型提升最多26个百分点，而小模型未从中受益。
AI.conclusion: iOSWorld为评估个性化手机代理提供了新标准，揭示了当前模型在跨应用协作与长期记忆推理上的显著不足，并开源全部资源以推动该领域发展。

title: Thresholded Local Hyper-Flow Diffusion
summary: Local Hyper-Flow Diffusion (HFD) gives an edge-size-independent Cheeger-type guarantee for seeded clustering in general submodular hypergraphs, but existing HFD solvers do not keep intermediate computation local at every iteration. We introduce Thresholded Local HFD (TL-HFD), a first-order method that maintains an active region around the seeds, performs projected subgradient updates on that region and its immediate boundary, and expands via thresholded (top-k) boundary activation. We prove that the local update is exact: the degree-preconditioned projected subgradient step restricted to the active region and its boundary coincides with the unrestricted global update. We establish finite-time dual suboptimality for both exact and thresholded updates, treating the latter as inexact projected subgradient steps with explicit skipped-boundary error. We further derive an additive activated-volume bound controlled by realized local subgradient norms and the minimum boundary-push among newly activated vertices, and translate approximate dual optimality with localized support into a robust sweep-cut guarantee for early-stopped iterates. For general submodular cut-costs, each iteration is local in the scanned region and oracle-sensitive in the hyperedge primitive. Empirically, TL-HFD often matches or improves over HFD while activating less volume, with the largest gains on noisy instances where diffusion tends to absorb non-target vertices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的局部超图扩散算法TL-HFD，通过阈值化边界激活和局部投影次梯度更新，在保证理论性能（如Cheeger型保证、对偶次优性、sweep-cut鲁棒性）的同时显著减少计算体积，尤其在噪声数据上优于原有HFD方法。
AI.motivation: 现有HFD求解器无法在每次迭代中保持中间计算的局部性，导致计算开销大、易受噪声干扰；需设计一种真正局部、可扩展且理论可证的替代算法。
AI.method: 提出Thresholded Local HFD（TL-HFD）：维护种子附近的活跃区域，仅在该区域及其直接边界上执行度预处理的投影次梯度更新，并通过top-k阈值机制动态扩展边界；证明局部更新等价于全局更新，并将阈值更新建模为带显式误差的不精确投影次梯度法。
AI.result: 理论上建立了有限时间对偶次最优性、激活体积的加性上界、以及基于局部支持的近似最优性到鲁棒sweep-cut保证的转化；实验表明TL-HFD常匹配或超越HFD，且激活体积更小，尤其在噪声实例中优势明显。
AI.conclusion: TL-HFD实现了局部性、高效性与强理论保证的统一，为子模超图上的种子聚类提供了更实用、鲁棒且可扩展的新范式。

title: Scaling Neural Network Verification with Tensor Parallelism and Fully Sharded Data Parallelism
summary: Formal neural network verification -- proving that a network satisfies safety properties for \emph{all} inputs in a specified domain -- is bounded in practice by GPU memory: standard implementations of bound-propagation algorithms (IBP, CROWN, $α$-CROWN) require weight and relaxation-coefficient matrices to reside entirely on one accelerator. We adapt two parallelism techniques originally developed for large-scale model training to the \texttt{auto\_LiRPA}\,/\,$α,β$-CROWN verification framework. \textbf{Tensor Parallelism (TP)} shards both weight and $A$-matrices across GPUs, achieving ${\approx}2\times$ peak-memory reduction at $P{=}2$; soundness is confirmed on VNN-COMP 2022 MNIST-FC benchmarks, though bound tightness degrades with the number of sharded zones due to forced IBP substitution for intermediate bounds inside sharded zones. \textbf{Fully Sharded Data Parallelism (FSDP)} shards only weight matrices with a per-layer \texttt{AllGather}, producing bounds that are \emph{bitwise identical} to the single-GPU baseline: baseline memory drops by 80--90\%, peak memory by 34--39\% on wide MLPs. FSDP integrates cleanly with complete verification ($β$-CROWN + Branch-and-Bound) and with convolutional layers (\texttt{BoundConv}); a complete \emph{unsat} result is obtained for CIFAR-100 ResNet-large (VNN-COMP 2024) under FSDP. Across all experiments the memory bottleneck in $α$-CROWN+BaB mode proves to be per-neuron alpha tensors, not weight matrices, pointing to the key direction for future work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种并行化技术（张量并行TP和全分片数据并行FSDP）以缓解神经网络形式化验证中的GPU内存瓶颈，尤其在α-CROWN+BaB框架中；TP降低峰值内存但牺牲部分界紧性，FSDP则保持精度不变且大幅降低内存占用，并成功验证CIFAR-100上大型ResNet。
AI.motivation: 神经网络形式化验证受限于GPU内存，尤其是bound-propagation算法（如IBP、CROWN、α-CROWN）需将权重和松弛系数矩阵全部加载至单个加速器，难以扩展到大模型。
AI.method: 将训练领域中的两种并行技术——张量并行（TP）和全分片数据并行（FSDP）——适配至auto_LiRPA/α,β-CROWN验证框架：TP对权重和A矩阵跨GPU分片；FSDP仅分片权重矩阵，每层通过AllGather通信，保证结果与单卡完全一致。
AI.result: TP在2卡时峰值内存减少约2倍，但界紧性随分片数增加而下降；FSDP使基线内存降低80–90%，峰值内存降低34–39%，且验证结果比特级一致；首次在FSDP下完成CIFAR-100 ResNet-large的完整unsat验证；发现α-CROWN+BaB模式下的主要内存瓶颈实为每神经元α张量，而非权重矩阵。
AI.conclusion: TP和FSDP有效缓解了神经网络验证的GPU内存瓶颈，其中FSDP在不损失精度的前提下显著提升可扩展性；未来工作应聚焦于优化α张量的内存使用。

title: Distilling Safe LLM Systems via Soft Prompts for On Device Settings
summary: Deploying safe large language models (LLMs) on resource-constrained edge devices presents a critical challenge: while dual-model systems combining LLMs with guard models provide effective safety guarantees, their substantial memory and computational demands make them prohibitively expensive for on-device deployment. This paper presents a comprehensive study of parameter-efficient safety alignment methods for resource-constrained settings. Through systematic evaluation across multiple LLM architectures, training objectives, and parameter-efficient fine-tuning approaches, we identify that soft prompts combined with distillation-based training consistently outperform alternative methods. We introduce distillation frameworks based on total variation and KL divergence that effectively transfer safety behaviors from guard models into learned soft prompts. Our evaluations on various benchmarks demonstrate that this combination achieves superior safety-usefulness trade-offs compared to LoRA adapters, steering vectors, and direct optimization methods, while requiring minimal additional memory and compute at inference time. These findings establish soft prompt distillation as the preferred approach for safety alignment in on-device LLM deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向资源受限边缘设备的参数高效安全对齐方法——软提示蒸馏，通过总变差和KL散度蒸馏框架，将守卫模型的安全行为迁移至软提示中，在保持低内存与计算开销的同时，实现了优于LoRA、转向向量等方法的安全-效用权衡。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的边缘设备上部署安全的大语言模型（LLMs）面临挑战：双模型系统（LLM+守卫模型）虽安全但内存与计算开销过大，难以实际部署。
AI.method: 系统评估多种LLM架构、训练目标及参数高效微调方法；提出基于总变差（TV）和KL散度的蒸馏框架，将守卫模型的安全行为蒸馏至软提示中；采用软提示+蒸馏训练策略。
AI.result: 软提示结合蒸馏训练在多个基准测试中显著优于LoRA适配器、转向向量和直接优化等方法，在极低推理内存与计算成本下实现更优的安全-实用性权衡。
AI.conclusion: 软提示蒸馏是面向边缘端LLM部署的安全对齐首选方案，为轻量级、高安全性模型落地提供了可行路径。

title: Benchmarking Empirical Privacy Protection for Adaptations of Large Language Models
summary: Recent work has applied differential privacy (DP) to adapt large language models (LLMs) for sensitive applications, offering theoretical guarantees. However, its practical effectiveness remains unclear, partly due to LLM pretraining, where overlaps and interdependencies with adaptation data can undermine privacy despite DP efforts. To analyze this issue in practice, we investigate privacy risks under DP adaptations in LLMs using state-of-the-art attacks such as robust membership inference and canary data extraction. We benchmark these risks by systematically varying the adaptation data distribution, from exact overlaps with pretraining data, through in-distribution (IID) cases, to entirely out-of-distribution (OOD) examples. Additionally, we evaluate how different adaptation methods and different privacy regimes impact the vulnerability. Our results show that distribution shifts strongly influence privacy vulnerability: the closer the adaptation data is to the pretraining distribution, the higher the practical privacy risk at the same theoretical guarantee, even without direct data overlap. We find that parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods, such as LoRA, achieve the highest empirical privacy protection for OOD data. Our benchmark identifies key factors for achieving practical privacy in DP LLM adaptation, providing actionable insights for deploying customized models in sensitive settings. Looking forward, we propose a structured framework for holistic privacy assessment beyond adaptation privacy, to identify and evaluate risks across the full pretrain-adapt pipeline of LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了差分隐私（DP）在大语言模型（LLM）适应性训练中的实际隐私效果，发现预训练数据分布与适应数据分布的接近程度显著影响隐私风险，即使无直接数据重叠；LoRA等参数高效微调方法在分布外数据上展现出更强的实证隐私保护能力，并提出覆盖预训练-适应全流程的综合隐私评估框架。
AI.motivation: 现有工作虽将差分隐私应用于LLM适应以提供理论隐私保障，但其实际有效性尚不明确，尤其因预训练与适应数据间潜在的重叠和依赖关系可能削弱隐私保障。
AI.method: 采用前沿攻击方法（如鲁棒成员推断、金丝雀数据提取）实证分析DP适配下的隐私风险；系统调节适应数据分布（从与预训练数据完全重叠、到同分布IID、再到完全分布外OOD）；评估不同适应方法（如LoRA）及不同隐私预算下的风险变化。
AI.result: 分布偏移程度显著影响隐私脆弱性：适应数据越接近预训练分布，相同理论隐私预算下的实际隐私风险越高；参数高效微调（如LoRA）在OOD数据上实现最强的实证隐私保护；识别出影响DP LLM适应实际隐私的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 理论DP保证不能直接等同于实际隐私安全，需结合数据分布特性与适应方法协同设计；本文提出的全流程隐私评估框架为敏感场景下定制化LLM的安全部署提供了可操作指导。

title: LargeMonitor: Monitoring Online Task-Free Continual Learning via Large Pretrained Models
summary: Online task-free continual learning (TFCL) requires intelligent agents to sequentially accumulate knowledge from an unbounded, non-stationary data stream under strict single-pass constraints and without any explicit task identifiers. Existing online TFCL paradigms primarily rely on parameter-efficient prompt tuning or dynamic structure expansion driven by training-coupled optimization dynamics, such as empirical loss fluctuations or evolving latent distances. As a result, these training-coupled solvers remain agnostic to the structural origins of distribution drift, mechanically enforcing a fixed strategy across fundamentally distinct streaming variations. To address this gap, we propose LargeMonitor, a framework that leverages large pretrained foundation models to autonomously orchestrate task-free continuous adaptation. Specifically, LargeMonitor introduces a decoupled detection module utilizing the frozen, stable representation space of large vision models (LVMs) to achieve robust, zero-shot drift detection without training-dependent interference or brittle threshold tuning. Upon a confirmed drift, the framework activates a context-aware diagnostic module driven by large multimodal models (LMMs) to interpret the precise semantic etiologies of the stream variation (e.g., novel class emergence vs. environmental domain shift). This dual-stage capability empowers the continuous learner to dynamically deploy adaptive and shift-specific optimization strategies. Extensive experiments across multiple TFCL settings and benchmarks demonstrate that LargeMonitor achieves precise, robust detection and diagnosis of complex data streams while consistently improving the performance of existing online TFCL algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LargeMonitor框架，利用大预训练基础模型实现任务无关的在线持续学习，通过解耦的零样本漂移检测与上下文感知的语义诊断，提升持续学习算法在复杂数据流中的适应性与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有在线任务无关持续学习方法依赖训练耦合的优化动态（如损失波动或潜在距离变化）进行漂移检测与结构扩展，忽视分布漂移的结构性根源，导致策略泛化能力差。
AI.method: LargeMonitor包含两个核心模块：1）基于冻结大视觉模型（LVM）表征空间的解耦漂移检测模块，实现零样本、免调参的鲁棒检测；2）由大多模态模型（LMM）驱动的上下文感知诊断模块，解析漂移的语义成因（如新类出现或环境域偏移），从而触发适配性优化策略。
AI.result: 在多个TFCL设置与基准上实验表明，LargeMonitor能精确、鲁棒地检测与诊断复杂数据流，并显著提升现有在线TFCL算法的性能。
AI.conclusion: LargeMonitor通过解耦检测与语义诊断，使持续学习系统能自主识别并理解数据分布变化的本质，从而实现更智能、更自适应的在线任务无关持续学习。

title: Graph Mamba Operator: A Latent Simulator for Interacting Particle Systems
summary: Modeling interacting dynamical systems requires capturing spatial interactions alongside long-range temporal dependencies. Graph neural networks (GNNs) provide a natural representation but typically rely on autoregressive rollouts and treat spatial and temporal dynamics separately, leading to error accumulation over long horizons. Existing approaches also focus on local interactions and short temporal contexts, limiting their ability to capture multi-hop dependencies and global structure. We introduce the Graph Mamba Operator (GraMO), a latent-space simulator that integrates state-space models with graph-based interaction learning. In contrast to prior work that sequences nodes or applies spatial and temporal updates in separate stages, GraMO couples graph-based interactions and temporal state updates within a single recurrence. The update is linear in the latent state, with input-dependent coefficients that adapt across regimes. We evaluate GraMO on N-body systems, motion capture, and robotics datasets, achieving the lowest error across benchmarks and the largest gains in long-horizon prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Graph Mamba Operator (GraMO)，一种将状态空间模型与图结构交互学习融合的潜空间模拟器，通过在单一轮回中耦合图交互与时间状态更新，显著提升长时程预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络在建模动态系统时存在误差累积、忽略长程时空依赖、难以捕获多跳及全局结构等问题。
AI.method: 提出GraMO，将图结构交互学习嵌入状态空间模型，在单一递归中联合更新空间关系与时间状态，且更新为潜状态的线性变换，系数随输入自适应变化。
AI.result: 在N-body系统、动作捕捉和机器人数据集上取得最低预测误差，尤其在长时程预测中增益最大。
AI.conclusion: GraMO有效统一了空间交互与时间建模，克服了传统GNN在长时程动力学建模中的局限性，为复杂动态系统仿真提供了新范式。

title: Operator learning for solving Fokker-Planck equations with various initial conditions
summary: The Fokker-Planck equation (FPE) plays a pivotal role in describing the time evolution of probability density functions (PDFs) for systems governed by stochastic dynamics. In this work, we propose a conditional normalizing flow-based physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework for efficiently approximating the solution operator of the FPE for a whole range of initial conditions. Leveraging the Chapman-Kolmogorov equation for Markovian stochastic processes, the problem is reformulated into approximating a transition PDF starting at initial time from a Dirac mass centered at an arbitrary point. The PDF of an associated linearized stochastic differential equation (SDE) is employed as the base distribution for the normalizing flow, providing a good approximation of the target PDF, especially for small times, and thereby avoiding the singularity of the map associated with the Dirac delta initial distribution. Furthermore, a time-weighted loss function is introduced to mitigate numerical instabilities arising at small times, achieving a balance between causality and training difficulty as time progresses. A variety of numerical experiments are presented to illustrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件归一化流的物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架，用于高效近似Fokker-Planck方程（FPE）对任意初始条件的解算子。通过Chapman-Kolmogorov方程将问题转化为逼近从狄拉克δ函数出发的转移概率密度函数（PDF），并以线性化SDE的PDF作为归一化流的基础分布，避免了δ初始分布带来的奇异性；同时引入时间加权损失函数缓解小时间数值不稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在求解Fokker-Planck方程时难以高效处理任意初始条件，且狄拉克δ初始分布导致映射奇异性；需兼顾物理约束与训练稳定性。
AI.method: 构建条件归一化流结构的PINN，以线性化SDE的PDF为基分布，结合Chapman-Kolmogorov方程重构问题，并设计时间加权损失函数。
AI.result: 该方法在多种数值实验中展现出高精度、强鲁棒性和对不同初始条件的泛化能力，有效缓解小时间数值不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 所提条件归一化流PINN框架为FPE提供了一种高效、稳定且可推广的算子学习方法，兼具物理一致性与计算可行性。

title: Breaking the Tokenizer Barrier: On-Policy Distillation across Model Families
summary: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) has become a core technique in the post-training of Large Language Models (LLMs) for transferring knowledge from domain experts to student models. However, existing OPD distillation methods require teacher and student models to share the same tokenizer, restricting the applicability of OPD within the model series. Current mainstream practice typically employs Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) on teacher-generated responses for cross-tokenizer distillation, which fails to capture the rich knowledge embedded in the teacher's probability distribution. In this work, we enable the standard on-policy distillation method to operate across model families, ensuring that high-fidelity token-level signals can propagate across different tokenizers with a precise token-mapping algorithm. Extensive experiments show that cross-tokenizer OPD is significantly more compute-efficient than baselines on various benchmarks. Our results unlock a broader range of teacher-student pairs for OPD, opening up new avenues for adapting and enhancing interactions between LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨分词器的On-Policy Distillation（OPD）方法，通过精确的token映射算法，使标准OPD能在不同tokenizer的模型间进行知识蒸馏，显著提升计算效率并扩展适用场景。
AI.motivation: 现有OPD方法要求师生模型共享同一分词器，限制了其在不同模型系列间的应用；而当前跨分词器蒸馏多依赖SFT，无法充分利用教师模型的概率分布知识。
AI.method: 设计了一种精确的token映射算法，使标准on-policy distillation能跨不同tokenizer运行，保留高保真token级信号传递能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提跨分词器OPD方法在多个基准上显著优于基线方法，计算效率更高，并支持更广泛的师生模型组合。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了OPD对分词器一致性的依赖，为大语言模型间的知识迁移与协同提供了新范式。

title: Loss-Guided Adaptive Scale Refinement for Molecular Force Prediction
comment: 23 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables. Preprint on adaptive scale refinement for molecular force prediction
summary:
Molecular systems involve interactions across multiple spatial scales, from local coordination and short-range perturbations to long-range electrostatic and solvent-mediated effects. However, most molecular representation learning methods rely on manually predefined scales, and the task-optimal modeling scale may not coincide with these fixed levels. This study introduces a loss-guided adaptive scale refinement framework for molecular force prediction, treating predefined scales as initial anchors and discovering task-effective resolutions through interpolation, routing, differentiable scale updates, and scale pool refinement.
  Using a NaCl aqueous ionic system as a minimal testbed, this study constructs short-scale and long-range force prediction branches and analyzes their complementarity.
